Browse the bookshelf to see what's there.
一套《星神的失落——银河民俗考》丛书，一本《社会生活中的星神崇拜印痕》，《银河神话举隅：神话中的星神内涵叙略》，以及《星神之下：作为意志与表象的低维世界》。

There's a copy of The Fall of The Aeons – A Discussion on Cosmic Traditions series, a copy of Marks of Aeon Worship in Society, a copy of Cases of Cosmic Myths: The Meanings Behind Aeons in Myth, and a copy of Beneath the Aeons: The Low-Dimensional World As A Will and A Surface Phenomenon.
Pick out a book at random and flip through.
指尖划过书脊，最终在《星神之下：作为意志与表象的低维世界》的封皮上停下。
Your fingertips run over the book spines before landing on Beneath the Aeons: The Low-Dimensional World As A Will and A Surface Phenomenon.
书籍被包上了空间站标识的封皮，内里却都是货真价实的文献巨作。你翻阅书籍时，一张纸条从书页间掉了出来。
The book is bound with covers containing the logo of the space station, but the contents are all authentic masterpieces. As you flip through the pages, a piece of paper falls out.
纸条上写满了看起来潦草的字，你努力辨认，发现页面印着「密卷科」字样，右下角还贴上了猫咪图案的贴纸。

The paper is filled with scribbled words. Squinting to make things out, you discover the words "Department of Insight" printed on the page. There's also a cat-shaped sticker at the bottom-right corner.
你猜测这张纸条或许来自某位密卷科科员的笔记本。
You surmise that this note could be from a Department of Insight researcher's notebook.
又见到你了…除了星神…我了解的知识并不多……
We meet again... I don't know much about anything apart from the Aeons...
我捡到一张纸条，是你的吗？
I found this note. Is it yours?
是…是在《星神之下：作为意志与表象的低维世界》里夹在的那张纸吗？
W—Was it inside the book called Beneath the Aeons: The Low-Dimensional World As A Will and A Surface Phenomenon?
是我的！那不是笔记啦，那是…是我特地留下的实验品。成功了，没想到实验真的成功了！！
It's mine! It's not a note, but... an experiment specifically placed there. It worked. I didn't expect it to be a success!
太好了…我对星神的研究与信念，终于得到了回应…呜呜！
Great... my research and faith in the Aeons have finally yielded a response... Woohoo!
不是吧，你在书里找到的纸条，就不看看那本书讲什么吗？
Come on. Didn't you even read the book you found the note in?
《星神之下：作为意志与表象的低维世界》说的是我们处在一个低维世界里，感应星神的存在时，可能遇到的是一种更高维度的投影。

Beneath the Aeons: The Low-Dimensional World As A Will and A Surface Phenomenon talks about us living in a low-dimensional world, and the Aeons we sense are simply projections from a higher dimension.
我留下纸条，祈求星神投影现身，果然把你给「召唤」来了。
The note I left is a prayer for the Aeons to project and materialize and, as expected, you were summoned.
说吧！你是不是来自一个迥然不同的世界？你是不是生活在星神的「高维世界」里？
Tell me! Are you from a radically different world? Do you come from the higher dimensional world of the Aeons?
What the heck are you harping on about...
Do you need to get a medical check-up?
别急，听我给你分析，你要多留意那些看似不起眼的细节。
Don't worry. Just listen to my analysis. You have to pay attention to those seemingly inconspicuous details.
比如说…你知道公司的取木星吗？把它们出口的木材，按「公司」采购清单上的种类名称排序，摘出开头第一个读音，再拼起来——

Like... you know the IPC's planet, Junipter? Take the types of lumber it exports, list them according to the categories in the IPC's purchase orders, then take the first letter of each one and spell it out —
「灰——咪——」你听，发音是不是很像「毁灭」？这就是「毁灭」星神在背后干扰「公司」运转的证据！
"D... E... S... T..." see? Doesn't it spell out the start of "Destruction"? This is proof that the Aeon of Destruction is secretly pulling all the strings in the IPC!
You're just making this all up.
哎，我这是建立在扎实文献研究之上的合理推论！
Hey, it's a reasonable conclusion to reach based on solid research of the literature!
要用心去感受，仔细听听，不像吗？
You have to feel it with your heart and focus. Are you getting it?
多读点文献吧！希望你能抛开愚昧无知的陈腐思想，积极拥抱科学的前沿理论！
Keep on reading, then! I hope you can put aside your foolish superstitions and embrace the theories of modern science!
Whatever. So long as you're happy.
... I don't wanna chat with you right now.
你也别气馁，我能有这样的研究发现，是因为在密卷科打下了扎实的理论基础，和你的起点是不一样的……
Don't lose hope. I owe this scientific discovery to the theoretical foundation given to me at the Department of Insight. We come from different backgrounds...
唉，我看你确实也不像高维存在。我还要忙，回头再聊吧！
Ack, I don't think you really look like a high-dimensional being. I've gotta get back to work. Chat with you later then!
你依稀记得，在主控舱段时常见到密卷科科员们的身影，或许该去那里打听打听。
You vaguely remember seeing the members of the Department of Insight flitting around the master control zone. Maybe you can go there and ask around.
这杯咖啡静默地坐在桌上，好似一名优雅的贵族，即便杯身冰冷，它依旧昂着高傲的头颅——散发馥郁的浓香。
This cup of coffee sits silently on the table, like an elegant aristocrat. Despite being cold, it holds its head aloft and exudes a rich aroma.
这股香味仿佛有种魔力，望着深褐色的液体，你的思绪似乎也坠入了深渊……
This aroma seems to have its own magic and as you gaze into the deep brown liquid, you feel your thoughts slipping into the abyss...
嘴唇触碰杯身的刹那，你感到些许余温。或许这杯咖啡从被制作出来到现在，并未过去太久，仍带有一种「初生」的美感。
You feel some lingering warmth the moment your lips touch the rim of the cup. Perhaps it hasn't been long since this coffee was brewed, and it still retains a kind of "newborn" beauty.
只可惜你只浅尝了一口，并未品出更多的韵味。也许应该再多喝一些！
It's a shame you only took a tiny sip and couldn't taste more of the aroma. Maybe you should drink some more!
咖啡的苦涩味霸占了你的口腔，这种滋味带着侵略性，向你的味蕾发起残酷的冲锋。
The bitter flavors of the coffee begin to take over your mouth, aggressively and brutally assaulting your taste buds.
苦涩的味道似乎被淡化了，味蕾摘下了它的面纱。这杯咖啡背后真实的容颜会是俏丽、温柔、甜美的吗？需要等待……

The bitterness seems to have dissipated and your taste buds took off the veil that concealed the flavor's true self. Will the real aroma of this coffee turn out to be pretty, gentle, and sweet? One can only wait and see...
Go on and take another sip.
果香味逐渐扩散，你好似置身于山谷与鸟鸣之间，而这股涓涓涧溪就是抚慰苦难心灵的最好良药。
The fruity scent gradually spreads. You seem to be among birdsong in a valley, and the trickling stream before you is the best balm to soothe your suffering soul.
演出的闭幕往往最为精彩，正如这一口咖啡的余味。
The concluding act of a show is always the most exciting moment, just like the aftertaste of this cup of coffee.
轻盈的气流将你托起，柔软的羽毛包围着躯干，眼前出现的星光点点也开始左右摇摆……
A light breeze lifts you up and soft feathers surround your body as the stars before you begin to sway from side to side...
I thought something had gone wrong.
你醒啦？感觉如何？还头晕吗？
Are you awake? How are you feeling — dizzy?
你一个人在那么危险的地方干嘛？
What were you doing alone in such a dangerous place?
口腔的苦涩与胃部间歇性的抽搐让你倍感疲乏。你摇摇头，不想回答无关紧要的问题。
The bitterness in your mouth and intermittent stomach pains leave you feeling extremely weary. You shake your head, not wanting to answer extraneous questions like that.
好吧…你自己小心点，感觉不舒服就去医生那儿看看。
Alright... take care of yourself, and go see the doctor if you feel sick.
危险的地方少去，下次可不一定这么走运，被咱们救回来啦。
Stay out of dangerous places. You might not be so lucky to have us save you next time.
面对二人忧心忡忡的神情，你欲言又止。这一定是因为那杯「咖啡」——回忆起它，你不禁忆起舌尖的苦涩和甜美。当初的浅尝辄止是正确的，但，如果再给你一次机会……

You hold your tongue, seeing the worried look on both of their faces. This must be because of that cup of "coffee." You reminisce on the bitterness and sweetness that was on your tongue. It was the right thing to do to stop after a few sips. However, if you had another chance...
你还会品尝那杯咖啡吗？
Would you still try that cup of coffee?
咖啡固然提神，却也令人失眠。显然，你不想错失任何一场美梦。
Sure, coffee can add some pep to your step, but it also will make you lose sleep. You clearly don't want to miss a single lovely dream.
Forget it. I won't drink it.
除了苦涩味，没有别的味道，放下杯子，你开始思索到底什么人会喜欢咖啡。
It's bitter and doesn't have any other flavor. You put down the cup and start to ponder why anyone could actually like coffee.
杯身里还有不少咖啡，你决定——
There is still quite a bit of coffee in the cup. You decide to...
咖啡很苦，就像人生一样苦，你决定不再折磨自己。
Coffee, like life, is utterly bitter. You decide not to torture yourself anymore.
也不知道咖啡在这儿放了多久，考虑到食品安全问题，你果断放下了杯子。
You have no clue how long this coffee has been sitting here. After thinking about food safety issues, you make firmly put the cup down.
空气中悬浮着一丛气泡，七彩的光华流溢其中，恍惚间形成似有深意的画面。你敢肯定自己看见了一轮红日坠入雪山，穿着长袍的少女倒在剑戟之下。甚至，你还听见了些微笑声，真真切切，并非幻想……

Bubbles are floating in the air with a colorful glow gliding on their surfaces. For some reason, they form an image that seems to carry a profound meaning. You are sure you saw a red sun descending into the snowy mountains, and a girl in a robe falling under the tip of a sword. You have even heard someone softly laughing. Everything is real, and it is not your imagination...
你伸出手，指尖停留在距气泡极近的地方。什么事也没有发生，也许你应该找了解这东西的人问一问？
You extend your arm, and your fingertip stops extremely close to the bubble. Nothing happens. Perhaps, you should ask for more info from someone who knows what it is.
There are strange bubbles at the space station...
啊，这东西可是机密，千万不能让外人知道我有这么个玩意。你得先签个保密协议。
Oh, this is a top secret. Outsiders can never know that I own this thing. You must sign a non-disclosure agreement first.
你没签保密协议前，我一个字也不能说。
I won't tell you a thing before you sign the agreement.
你接过黑塔递给你的纸笔，签了自己的名字。纸的质地很奇怪，墨水落在纸上瞬间就干涸了。当笔尖离开纸面时，你的心脏突然悸动。

You take the paper and pen from Herta and leave your signature. The paper is made from a bizarre material, and the ink dries up the moment it touches the paper. When you move the tip of the pen away, your heart suddenly flutters.
你要知道，这张协议可不仅仅具有法律效应——你必须遵守的是「虚数」的法则，它超乎于一切社会法则与自然法则之上，即使公司也不能打破。

Please bear in mind that this agreement is more than a legally binding contract. You must also abide by the law of the Imaginary, which is above the social and natural laws. Not even the IPC can override it.
Why didn't you say that before I signed the agreement?
就算说了，难道你会不签吗？你看着就是那种藐视代价的人，先把选择做了，哪管洪水滔天。
Would you have refused to sign if I'd told you that? You seem like the kind who doesn't think much about consequences. You will make a decision regardless of its price.
也就是宇宙的法则，世界的法则，唯一仅有牢不可破的法则。
It is the law of the universe and the world — the only unbreakable law.
能签个废除保密协议的协议吗？
Can I sign another agreement to nullify this non-disclosure agreement?
放心吧。我真想坑你，你一命呜呼了都不知道怎么回事。
Don't worry. If I want to swindle you, you'll never see it coming.
行，签了协议，我的忆泡随你玩吧！只要别让流光忆庭的人看见就没问题，其实我觉得看见了也多半没事……

Now that you have signed the agreement, you can do anything you like with my Memory Bubbles. Just make sure you are out of the sight of entities from the Garden of Recollection. In fact, I don't think there will be any trouble even if they catch you...
流光忆庭的手段，能够窃取别人的记忆。为了保存记忆，他们用「意质」构建了外膜，把它收藏在像气泡一样的东西里，方便携带。

The Garden of Recollection has ways to steal the memories of others. To preserve memories, they created a Sentiention membrane to keep the memories wrapped up in it like a bubble, making it easy to carry memories around.
他们还有更高级的技术，叫做「光锥」，那东西捕捉的可不止是记忆了…唉，我没有星神浮黎的祝福，光锥的技术始终搞不定。

They have an even more advanced technology called Light Cones. With that, they can capture more than just memories... It's a shame that I can never master the Light Cone technology without the Blessing of the Aeon Fuli.
崇拜星神「浮黎」的派系，他们觉得认知即世界，记忆则是世界存在的证明。为此，这群人不惜放弃肉身。

It is a faction that worships the Aeon Fuli. In their opinion, the world is defined by everyone's perception, and memories are the proof of the world's existence. They are willing to forgo their physical bodies for that purpose.
要我说，流光忆庭、筑城者、家族，当然还有反物质军团这群人都是一群傻瓜，崇拜星神崇拜得都魔怔了。
If you ask me, the Garden of Recollection, the Architects, The Family, and the Antimatter Legion are all idiots. They obsessively worship their Aeons.
流光忆庭的成员，穿行于各世界收集珍贵的记忆。你早晚会遇上他们的，银河列车乘客的记忆，流光忆庭一定特别想要。

They are members of the Garden of Recollection who travel between worlds to collect precious memories. You will run into them sooner or later. I bet the memory of a Astral Express passenger is highly sought after by them.
碰到文明的忆员未尝不是件好事，他们也许会用神奇的记忆和你交换；但要特别小心流光忆庭里的激进派，那群「窃忆者」——他们偷你记忆时一声招呼都不打。

You could get lucky if you meet civilized Memokeepers, since they might use an amazing memory to exchange with yours. However, watch out for the Memosnatchers, the radicals in the Garden of Recollection. They won't give you a heads-up before stealing your memory.
现在我能触碰气泡了吗？
Can I touch the bubble now?
请～用额头接触它即可。记住闭上眼睛，不然会晕。
Sure~ Just touch it with your forehead. Remember to close your eyes, or your head will start spinning.
空气中悬浮着一丛气泡，七彩的光华流溢其中，恍惚间形成似有深意的画面。靠近时，一个像是黑塔的女声不带感情地低语：星神。

Bubbles are floating in the air with a colorful glow gliding on their surfaces. For some reason, they form an image that seems to carry a profound meaning. As you approach them, a female voice that sounds similar to Herta's murmurs monotonously, "Aeon."
你靠近忆泡，感到一丝凉意。凉意温柔地穿过你的皮肤、骨肉，穿过更深层的……
You approach the bubble and experience a chilly sensation that gently pierces through your skin, flesh, and bones, then goes down deeper...
你望着女人在宽檐兜帽遮掩下不大真切的面容，对她方才所述的种种离奇故事感到难以置信。
Staring at the woman's surreal face concealed under the wide brim of her hood, you can hardly believe the bizarre stories she has just told.
神是存在的？神由凡人擢升而成？神并非全知全能，而是各执权柄、各行其路？这实在是太荒唐了！她竟还自称什么「令使」、什么「揽镜人」……

Gods really exist, and they are elevated from mortals? Gods aren't almighty, but each holds different authorities and walks different roads? This is too ridiculous! She even claims to be some sort of Emanator and Mirror Holder...
「你感到错乱，」女人微微颔首，「这很正常。」她仿佛能够洞穿你的想法，只以平和的语调冷冷续道。
The woman nods. "It's normal for you to be confused." She speaks in a calm and cold tone as if she can see through you.
话音将落，她将纤长的手指探入披风，自那绸缎下托出一逸散光彩的锐利物件。你感到眼花缭乱，刚想定睛观瞧，却又被女人开口搅乱了思绪。

The woman then reaches underneath her silk cloak with her slender fingers and takes out a gleaming, sharp object. Dazzled by the glow, you try to take a close look, only to be distracted again by the woman's voice.
「这是『超验之镜』，」她的音色依旧冷清，「看看祂吧——看看『星神』的样子。」
"This is the Mirror of Transcendence. Look at THEM. Look at what the Aeon look like." The woman's voice remains frosty.
好奇心迫使你向其中窥伺。你未能如预料般从镜中看到自己，反而是一尊华美的雕塑。那雕塑自上而下裂解，通体如断桩遭雷击，向两侧剥离，各自延展。

You stare into the mirror as curiosity gets the better of you. Instead of your reflection, you see a magnificent sculpture. The sculpture shatters from top to bottom as if it is struck by lightning. It splits vertically into halves, and the separated parts fall independently.
属于雕塑左侧的似是一健美的男性，而右侧则像是绮丽的女子；每侧各有双臂，其掌攀向对侧的躯体，相互支撑、托举，又执着刻刀，仿佛正在雕琢其本身。

The left part of the sculpture is a muscular man, while the right part is a gorgeous woman. Each part has two arms extended toward the other. They support and uplift each other, but also hold a carving knife each as though they are crafting each other.
两对身躯虬曲着，纠缠着，舞动着，俨然一道石质的螺旋；却又自腰部以下融合，共享同一半身。那姿态十足诡丽，令你如痴如醉，心荡神驰。

The pair of twisting, entangled, and intertwined bodies look like a spiral made of stone. Yet, they are joined together from their waists down. You are mesmerized and fascinated by the remarkably gorgeous and bizarre posture.
恍惚间，你竟发觉镜中之人的双眸在某一刹那与你的视线相接——你震栗，即刻从超然的体验中剥离。「这就是你们的神…」你喃喃自语。
Suddenly, your gaze meets the eyes of the being in the mirror. Stunned, you quickly withdraw yourself from the extraordinary experience. "So, this is your god..." you mumble.
「不，这只是你认为最『纯美』的事物。」女人摇头，摩挲手中的碎镜：「而这正是祂*本身*。」
"No. This is what beauty in its purest form looks like in your perception." The woman shakes her head as she strokes the cracked mirror in her hands. "This is what THEY ARE."
空气中悬浮着一丛气泡，七彩的光华流溢其中，恍惚间形成似有深意的画面。靠近时，一个像是黑塔的女声不带感情地低语：瑰丽的星球。

Bubbles are floating in the air with a colorful glow gliding on their surfaces. For some reason, they form an image that seems to carry a profound meaning. As you approach them, a female voice that sounds similar to Herta's murmurs monotonously, "a splendid planet."
你靠近忆泡，感到一丝凉意。凉意温柔地穿过你的皮肤、骨肉，穿过更深层的……
You approach the bubble and experience a chilly sensation that gently pierces through your skin, flesh, and bones, then goes down deeper...
「嘿，卡罗，」你身旁的男性望着舷窗外，那颗悬于无垠深空中的碧玉珠翠，「这是第几次星出了？」
"Hey, Caro." The man next to you stares out the porthole at a sparkling jade-like object hovering in the boundless space. "How many times has the star rise happened?"
「呃…我看看，」你用小小的手掌握着太空笔，笔尖从表格的顶端自上而下，「<unbreak>27</unbreak>次？」你咕哝着。「嗯，<unbreak>27</unbreak>次。」你舔舔嘴唇。其实你还不太能认字。

"Um... Let me see..." Holding a space pen in your small palm, you trace at the form from top to bottom with the tip of the pen. "<unbreak>27</unbreak> times, I guess?" You mutter. "Yes, <unbreak>27</unbreak> times." You lick your lips. Actually, you are not quite literate yet.
「又一个系统月过去了。」他叹气，「你说，我们什么时候才能回去？」
"Another system month has passed." He sighs. "When do you think we can go back?"
「地面上已经没有人能引导我们着陆了——我们甚至进入不了大气层！」你摸了摸胡须：「如果他们也能从这个视角看看她…悲剧或许就不会发生了。」

"There's no one left on the planetary surface to guide our landing. We can't even make it to the atmosphere!" You touch your whiskers. "If only they could look at the planet from this angle... Then the tragedy might not have happened."
「你看看她…这就是我们曾经的家。这就是曾经的我们。在这里曾经生活着每一个人——你爱的人，你认识的人——每一个人！无论是谁，都将在此度过一生……

"Look at her... This used to be our home and our past. Everyone, including the people you love and know, stayed there! People were originally bound to spend their entire lives there regardless of who they are..."
「我们的所有喜怒哀乐，我们的所有宗教信仰，我们的所有意识形态…所有的猎人与强盗、国王与农民、英雄与懦夫，所有的父母、还有他们满怀希望的孩子……
"All of our emotions, religions, and ideologies... All the hunters and robbers, kings and peasants, heroes and cowards, parents and their children..."
「我们的一切所见、所闻、所思、所想…一切的一切，全都存在于这个*黯点*上——一粒悬浮在射线暴与恒星光中的微尘，一个发着绿色微光的黯点！
"Everything we see, hear, think, and feel exists on this DARK SPOT — a speck of dust floating in ray bursts and the sparkle of stars, a dark spot that radiates a feeble green glow!"
「你看看她，」你扬起手，「那帮老掉牙的政客…竟然以为这个黯点就是世界的中心，他们就因此在宇宙中享有生杀大权！还有比这更可笑的事吗？」

"Look at her." You lift your hand. "How dare those ancient politicians assume this dark spot to be the center of the world, and therefore meant they have the power to control the universe? Could there be anything more ridiculous than that?"
「哇哦。」他看着你，表情显得有些不可思议：「真没想到…你还是个演讲家。」
"Wow." He stares at you with an incredulous expression. "I didn't know you were so articulate."
「得了吧，你也知道我识不得几个字，」你甩了甩尾巴，「我可是只*老鼠*啊！」
"Come on, you know I can't even read well." You flick your tail. "I'm just a RAT!"
平平无奇的小机器人，为空间站提供着平平无奇的生活服务。
A very ordinary little robot providing very ordinary life services aboard the space station.
你注意到机器人身上有一个凸出的按钮，看上去像是电源标志，你决定——
You notice a button sticking out of the robot, looking like it might be a power button. You decide to —
你注意到小机器人在此待机已久，你按下电源键，小机器人进入了休眠模式。
You notice that the little robot has been on standby here for some time. You push the power button, sending the little robot into sleep mode.
你为空间站节省了些许能源，尽管不多，但某种满足感令你不由自主地挺起了胸膛！
You've saved just a teensy bit of power for the space station. It's not much, but it's still enough to make you puff your chest out in pride!
小机器人继续在此待机，等待空间站的工作调配。
The little robot continues humming along in standby mode, waiting for its next task to be allocated.
房间里矗立着一个平平无奇的…家用设备。瞧着它格格不入的模样，你怀疑自己是否走错了地方。
Standing upright in the middle of the room is an unremarkable... Err, household "object." It looks so out of place that you start to suspect you might have taken a wrong turn somewhere.
陶瓷质地的表面上贴着张便条：「奇物『新世界大门』已被应物科████实验借用，非实验人员眼看手勿动。」
There's a note stuck to the ceramic surface: "Curio: Door to A New World, loaned to ████ at the Department of Implement Arts for experiments. Non-research personnel should not touch this object."
在某个按钮附近还贴着一张警告：「未经许可坐下以及按下冲水按钮，造成的一切后果本科室概不承担。」
There's also a warning posted near a particular button: "The Department is not responsible for any consequences from unauthorized persons sitting down and pressing flush."
警告的内容与其说是警示，倒不如说是某种使用教程。你决定——
It's not so much a warning but a tutorial. You decide to —
你坐上「新世界大门」，刚按下冲水键，一股古怪的吸力传来——
You sit down on the Door to A New World. As soon as you push the flush button, you start to feel a strange suction —
「新世界大门」将你带到了危险地带，想要离开可并不容易。
The Door to A New World has brought you to a dangerous place, and it isn't going to be easy to get out of here.
怪物身手不凡，但还好你技高一筹，有惊无险。
The monster has extraordinary skills, but you're much stronger still. The affair was more of a shock than any real danger.
还是赶紧按下冲水键离开这里吧。
Just flush it and get outta here.
你这人怎么回事，吓我一跳！
Who the — what the!? You scared the heck out of me!
啊，抱歉，你是生病了吗，还是去医疗科看看吧。
Oh no, are you sick? You should go to the Medical Department and get that checked out.
Have you seen a toilet bowl around here?
什么马桶？这里又不是厕所…等等！这是什么？！
Toilet bowl? What toilet bowl? This isn't a restroom... Hang on! What's this!?
我就偷个懒，怎么会不断有人冒出来？还有这个…马桶？！又是这个玩意！
I just want to slack off for a while, but why are all these people popping out of nowhere? And this... toilet!? Not this again!
呃是的…就跟你刚刚一样。
Uh, yeah... Like you just did right now.
怎么说呢，这个地方本来是我的「专属休息区」，有时候实验数据不理想，我就过来休息一下。
How to put it... This place was once my own private rest area. Whenever experiments wouldn't go my way, I'd come here for a little break.
但最近总遇到奇怪的事，比如说我在走神的时候，偶尔会听到惊呼声——哦对了，每次都有冲水声！
But recently, I keep on running into weird things. Like, when I was daydreaming, I'd sometimes hear startled cries — oh yeah, and always with this sound of flushing water!
我就纳闷了，我又不是在厕所休息，怎么会听到冲水声！而且这次还真冒出来个「马桶」！到底什么情况！
I got so confused — I wasn't in the restroom, so how come there's this flushing sound!? And then this "toilet bowl" just popped out of nowhere!
哦…原来如此…我明白了，谢谢。
Oh... So that's how it is then... I got it. Thank you.
那个…这里是我的「专属休息区」，没什么事的话能不能请你暂时先出去，我想清净会儿……
Um... This is my private rest area. If you don't mind, could I please ask you to leave for a bit? I'd like a little peace and quiet...
一阵令人不适的眩晕感后，你被「新世界大门」带到了主控舱段。
After a period of uncomfortable dizziness, you are transported to the master control zone by the Door to A New World.
迎接你的并不是一场波澜壮阔的冒险，但就这样平平淡淡才是真也没什么不好。
No magnificent adventure greets you, but you're okay with this level of mundanity.
一阵令人不适的眩晕感后，你被「新世界大门」带到了基座舱段。
After a period of uncomfortable dizziness, you are transported to the base zone by the Door to A New World.
一阵令人不适的眩晕感后，你被「新世界大门」带到了收容舱段。
After a period of uncomfortable dizziness, you are transported to the storage zone by the Door to A New World.
一个平平无奇的…家用设备。
It is a common... household item.
在某个按钮附近贴着一张警告：「未经许可坐下以及按下冲水按钮，造成的一切后果本科室概不承担。」
There's a button with a warning posted beside it: "Our department is not responsible for any consequences suffered by those who sit down and press Flush without permission."
你坐上「新世界大门」，刚按下冲水键，一股古怪的吸力传来——
You sit down on the Door to A New World. As soon as you push the button, you start to feel a strange suctioning force —
一阵令人不适的眩晕感后，你被「新世界大门」带到了空间站的某处。
After a period of uncomfortable dizziness, you are transported somewhere at the space station by the Door to A New World.
Champion! Could I pleeeease get your autograph?
His muscles... I'm going to faint!
Don't crowd around, have some order.
Everyone will have their share, don't worry.
How popular! As expected of the champ.
唷，这不是搏击俱乐部冉冉升起的新星{NICKNAME}吗！
Whew, if it isn't the Fight Club rising star, {NICKNAME}!
我听说你们一伙人早早就飞出地表，回太空里行侠仗义去了——这不还没走嘛？
I thought you lot already left this planet for more chivalrous adventures in space, but you're still here!
怎么，手痒了，特地跑来想过把拳击瘾？这可不好办啊，现在是休赛期……
Did you come all the way here to scratch your boxing itch? This might be a bit tough, since it's the off-season now...
什么？！你在俱乐部混了这么久了，居然没听说过那位？
What!? You've been in the club for so long, but you still haven't heard of him?
告诉你吧，那位可是连续二十七届搏击擂主挑战赛的冠军，「熔锤镇的卢卡」！
Let me tell you, he's the <unbreak>27</unbreak>-time champion of the Fighting King Challenge, "Luka of Moltammerville"!
You've got quite a crowd here.
那是当然，也不看看是谁回来了！
Of course. Just look who's back!
旁边那位——对，就是正被粉丝团团围住的那个红头发少年——可是连续二十七届搏击擂主挑战赛的冠军，「熔锤镇的卢卡」！
That guy - yes, that red-haired boy surrounded by fans - is the <unbreak>27</unbreak>-time champion of the Fighting King Challenge, "Luka of Moltammerville"!
卢卡小哥可是奥列格首领的得意门生，还是「地火」最靠得住的干部之一！即便如此，他还是以性格平易近人著称——这可不是件容易事！
Luka is the favorite student of Chief Oleg, and one of the most reliable members of Wildfire! He's also known for being approachable despite it all. That's not an easy ask!
我也是冠军，怎么没这待遇？
I, too, am a champion. Where's my crowd of adoring fans?
呃…我不都说了吗，人家是连续蝉联二十七届的超级冠军！
Um... I did say Luka is a <unbreak>27</unbreak>-time super champion, no?
粉丝不都是靠成绩积累赢来的吗？别急，我打赌，你很快也能拥有自己的后援会了！
You get more fans by accumulating achievements! Don't worry, I bet you'll have your own fan club soon!
呃，我上哪知道去？我猜无非是去执行「地火」的任务，帮下层区别的镇子抵御裂界之类的吧？
My guess is as good as yours. I figure he probably went on some Wildfire mission to help the other Underworld towns fight against the Fragmentum.
别看现在馆里这么热闹，但其实那帮粉丝都是三分钟热度…我最了解这群人了。你要是想跟卢卡小哥聊聊，就等他们散了再过去吧？
The club might be crowded now, but these fans won't be sticking around for long... I've seen this all before. If you want to chat with Luka, just wait till the fans leave.
卢卡，你最近在研究什么新的必杀技吗？
Luka, have you been working on some new ultimate technique lately?
哈哈哈，这可是秘密！还是赛场上见真章吧！
Hahaha, well, that's a secret! You'll have to wait and see.
卢卡哥哥，你以后会教我们拳击技术吗？
Big Brother Luka, will you teach us how to fight in the future?
有机会的话，一定！前提是你们得好好学习，好好吃饭！
If the chance arises, then definitely! On the condition that you work hard and eat well!
（七嘴八舌的…感觉插不上话啊。）
(There're so many people talking... I don't think I can get a word in.)
(I'll come back after the crowd has died down.)
…嗯？不好意思，我刚才在思考些事情！你是来要签名的吗？还是……
...Hmm? Sorry, I was just thinking about something! Are you here for an autograph? Or...
等等，这身装扮…绝对没错，你就是那位大名鼎鼎的「开拓者」！
Wait, your outfit... There's no mistake, you must be the famous "Trailblazer"!
What an honor to meet ya, I'm {NICKNAME}.
哪里哪里，该感到荣幸的人是我才对！你的名字，奥列格师父跟希儿他们都经常提及。
No, no, the honor's all mine! Master Oleg and Seele have mentioned your name many times before.
没错，我就是贝洛伯格的传奇。
You're right. I'm the legend of Belobog.
哈哈哈，跟奥列格师父和希儿他们说的一样，你的确是个有趣的家伙！
Hahaha, you're just as Master Oleg and Seele described. You really are an interesting one!
可惜！我前段时间一直在支援磐岩镇周边的镇子，起早贪黑地跟裂界里冒出来的妖魔鬼怪打交道，完全错过了你们拯救世界的大冒险……
What a pity! I was supporting the folks around Boulder Town, dealing with the monsters emerging from the Fragmentum from dawn to dusk. I completely missed you lot's big saving-the-world adventure...
不过能在镇上偶遇你这位大英雄，也算是弥补了些遗憾了！
But being able to meet a great hero such as yourself right now more than makes up for it!
哦，太激动一下忘了，我还没正式自我介绍——我叫卢卡，跟希儿一样是「地火」的干部。奥列格首领你应该很熟了吧？他是教我战斗技巧的师父。

Oh, I got so excited that I almost forgot to formally introduce myself. My name is Luka, and I'm a core member of "Wildfire" just like Seele. You should be very familiar with Chief Oleg, right? He is the master who taught me how to fight.
怎么不提你<unbreak>27</unbreak>届冠军的事？
Why didn't you mention your <unbreak>27</unbreak> championship victories?
嗯？哈哈哈，原来这你都知道了啊！
Huh? Hahaha, so you've heard about that, too!
我觉得这算不上什么，跟你们为贝洛伯格做的事比起来，实在不值一提！
I didn't think it was anything worth mentioning compared to what you people have done for Belobog!
我不是为了争夺什么荣誉才参加搏击比赛的…嗐，听着是不是有点故作谦虚的意思？但我真的是这么想的，你得信我！
I didn't compete for glory or anything... Now that I listen to myself say that, it does sound rather pretentious, doesn't it? But it's true. Please believe me!
哦…你说的是俱乐部的老板史考特先生吧？没有，我跟他不熟。
Umm... You must be referring to the Fight Club's owner, Mr. Scott? No, I'm not acquainted with him.
老实说，我不太喜欢他搞的那套规矩，拳手经纪人什么的…我觉得没必要，太浮夸了。我只想靠自己的实力说话，其它的一概不感兴趣。

To be honest, I don't really like the set of rules he made. Boxing managers and all that... I don't really think it's necessary. It's too pretentious. I just want to let my own abilities do the talking, and I am not interested in anything else.
What has Wildfire been up to recently?
多亏了你们，我们最近的活计都轻松了不少。
Thanks to you lot, everything's been going much more smoothly for us lately.
日常的放哨巡逻当然不能落下，偶尔还要帮街里街坊的解决些小矛盾…哦，对了，最近还要配合铁卫搞几场联合演练，这事不能忘。

Of course, the daily sentry and patrol duties can't be dropped, and occasionally I have to help to resolve some small conflicts in the neighborhood... Oh, I shouldn't forget to work with the Silvermane Guards to conduct a few joint exercises soon.
Let's spar together if we have the chance.
没问题！能跟拯救了贝洛伯格的「开拓者」一较高下，这绝对是千载难逢的机会！
Of course! Being able to trade notes with the savior of Belobog would be a rare opportunity!
看你这架势，是要赶着去帮助其他遇到困难的人吧？哈哈哈，我从老远就能嗅到乐于助人的味道！
You look like you're rushing off to help others in trouble, right? Hahaha, I can smell the willingness to help from miles away!
回见，{NICKNAME}！希望还有机会在下层区遇到你。
See you later, {NICKNAME}! I hope I'll have a chance to see you in the Underworld again!
Yo, {NICKNAME}! Were you just in the neighborhood?
我要先歇一会儿再去做下一组锻炼，正好可以陪你聊两句！
I was just resting for a bit before getting to my next set of exercises, and I'm just in time to chat with you!
So I hear you're the <unbreak>27</unbreak>-time champion?
空气中悬浮着一丛气泡，七彩的光华流溢其中，恍惚间形成似有深意的画面。靠近时，一个像是黑塔的女声不带感情地低语：家族。

Bubbles are floating in the air with a colorful glow gliding on their surfaces. For some reason, they form an image that seems to carry a profound meaning. As you approach them, a female voice that sounds similar to Herta's murmurs monotonously, "The Family."
你靠近忆泡，感到一丝凉意。凉意温柔地穿过你的皮肤、骨肉，穿过更深层的……
You approach the bubble and experience a chilly sensation that gently pierces through your skin, flesh, and bones, then goes down deeper...
你从未想过自己还能坐在这里。富丽堂皇的剧院，豪华包厢，丝滑的红色天鹅绒沙发里填充着轻盈的皮埃尔鸭绒…除了「上流」，你想象不到任何形容词了。

You have never imagined yourself to be sitting in the lavish box of a grand theater. The silky red velvet sofa is stuffed with Pierduck down feathers. You can't find a better word to describe the sofa other than "extravagant."
舞台正上演着一出你不知内容的古典歌剧。《国王寻欢作乐》——如果你没记错的话，这应该是那剧目高贵的名字。其实，你可以问问身旁的雷诺阿先生……

An unfamiliar classical opera is playing on the stage. "The King's Pleasure" ...If you are not mistaken, that's the opera's elegant title. Actually, you could ask Mr. Renoir, who's sitting next to you, about it...
思来想去，你还是放弃了求证。反正也看不懂，你想，我只是奉命来调查「家族」的…如果一切顺利，或许能够拿到通向匹诺康尼的邀请函——这才是你的目的。

After some consideration, you decide not to ask anything, since you cannot understand what's going on anyway. After all, you're only here to investigate The Family... If everything goes well, you might get your hands on an invitation letter to Penacony — that's what you are after.
你不想节外生枝，便又装作聚精会神似的盯着舞台上的演员，看他们纵情宣叙，引吭高歌。你又以余光打量着雷诺阿……
Not wanting any trouble, you pretend to be engrossed in the performance and songs of the actors onstage. At the same time, you size Renoir up from the corner of your eye...
他似乎注意到了你。「先生，」他以那惯常一丝不苟的微笑示人，「这剧目令您感到厌烦了么？」你无法从他的话语中察觉任何情绪…这令你有些许不适。
Renoir seems to notice you. "Sir," he asks with his usual impeccable smile, "do you find the opera boring?" The fact that you cannot detect any emotions in his words makes you feel uncomfortable.
「不不不，」你连忙摆手，「我只是…有些好奇。」雷诺阿先生不发一语地注视着你，仿佛在示意你继续——他最好是，你想——不然这趟可白来了……

"Not at all." You quickly wave your hand dismissively. "I'm just... curious." Mr. Renoir watches you silently, as if asking you to continue — well, he better be — otherwise you would've wasted your time...
「那『家族』…果真存在么？」你试探。他摆头，抬手示意侍应生上前。那位年轻的侍应手举托盘，将其上所呈之物向你二人展示。
"Does The Family... really exist?" You ask tentatively. Renoir shakes his head and beckons a waiter over. The young waiter presents an item on a tray to the two of you.
一只精美木匣，侧面开一狭长小口。你正好奇这是什么时，却听得雷诺阿含混不清道：「放进去。」——不…那真的是他的声音吗？你确信自己听到了*杂声*……

It is an exquisite wooden box with a long and narrow opening on its side. As you wonder what it is, you hear Renoir speaking in a muddled voice. "Put it in." No... Is that Renoir's voice? You are sure you heard a NOISE...
尽管那指令极不清晰，你还是凭本能将手掌置入其中。但为什么？你为这下意识的反应感到震悚…随后，你感到一股莫之能御的愧疚感席卷全身——

Although the instruction is unclear, you still place your hand in the box out of instinct. But why? You are shocked by your reaction... Next, you experience an overwhelming sense of guilt surging through your body...
就像是一名听候宣判的罪犯。是的…你确信，在那一瞬间，你感受到了目光——尖冷，刺骨…来自雷诺阿先生，来自侍应生，来自整个剧院。
You feel like a criminal waiting for judgment. Yes... You are certain that looks are being leveled at you — penetrating, icy gazes from Mr. Renoir, the waiter, and everyone else in the theater.
空气中悬浮着一丛气泡，七彩的光华流溢其中，恍惚间形成似有深意的画面。靠近时，一个像是黑塔的女声不带感情地低语：背叛。

Bubbles are floating in the air with a colorful glow gliding on their surfaces. For some reason, they form an image that seems to carry a profound meaning. As you approach them, a female voice that sounds similar to Herta's murmurs monotonously, "Betrayal."
你靠近忆泡，感到一丝凉意。凉意温柔地穿过你的皮肤、骨肉，穿过更深层的……
You approach the bubble and experience a chilly sensation that gently pierces through your skin, flesh, and bones, then goes down deeper...

你以直径<unbreak>20</unbreak>厘米的<unbreak>160</unbreak>度广角镜头环视会场。<unbreak>46</unbreak>根大理石石柱将直径<unbreak>43</unbreak>米、高<unbreak>138</unbreak>米的穹顶高擎，使这东西宽<unbreak>190</unbreak>米、南北长<unbreak>310</unbreak>米的柱廊大厅显得十足宽阔。

You scan the venue through a <unbreak>160</unbreak>-degree wide-angle lens with a diameter of <unbreak>20</unbreak> cm. Thanks to the <unbreak>46</unbreak> marble pillars that support the dome ceiling with a diameter of <unbreak>43</unbreak> meters and a height of <unbreak>138</unbreak> meters, the colonnaded hall <unbreak>190</unbreak> meters wide and <unbreak>310</unbreak> meters long appears spacious.
与会人数应有<unbreak>138</unbreak>人，实际到场<unbreak>136</unbreak>人。其中<unbreak>42</unbreak>人位于你左侧，<unbreak>44</unbreak>人位于右侧，<unbreak>49</unbreak>人与你遥遥相对，而最后1人正在你身下不远处的讲台上慷慨陈词。
