The inside of the chest is completely black, but in the corner of the chest's lining, you see a flash of light that particularly catches your eye.
Is it good luck or bad luck?
你把目光投向旁边的女人。但她面无表情，你从那张脸上读不出任何提示。
You look toward the lady off to the side. Her face is expressionless. You can't get a single hint from her.
Whatever... Grab it and see what happens.
你将颤抖的手伸入一片漆黑中，抓住了那个——不对，是那一堆——坚硬的、发光的东西。
Your hands tremble as you reach into the pitch-black darkness. You take hold of a single — no, a pile of rigid, shining objects.
你将手举到眼前，仔细端详掌心里那一撮五颜六色的晶石。
You bring your hand up to your eyes and closely examine the multicolored crystals in your palm.
——如果这些漂亮的小石头代表的不是「幸运」，那你的价值观真的会被彻底颠覆。
If these beautiful little stones don't represent good luck, then your values would be completely overturned.
今天的你得到了「幸运」的青睐…这是莫大的馈赠。
Today, you have received fortune's favor... This is a great gift.
记住…不要轻视自己的选择。任何选择。
Remember... never forget the importance of your decisions. Any decision.
女人的眼神中透露出欣慰…但她的眼角很快又恢复了平整。
The lady's eyes express relief and satisfaction... but her expression quickly returns to normal.
我从你的沉默里察觉到了明智。
From your silence, I detect wisdom.
另外一个箱子里有什么？
女人给了你一个冷酷的眼神…但她的眼角很快又恢复了平整。
The lady pierces you with an icy glare... but her expression quickly returns to normal.
你今天已经走过一次运了。
You have been lucky once today already.
...Do not trifle with your own fate.
也包括现在这个选择吗？
Does that also include this choice right now?
女人露出了一个狡黠的眼神…但她的眼角很快又恢复了平整。
The lady gives you a sly look... but her expression quickly returns to normal.
但愿你能记住今天学到的东西。
May you always remember what you have learned today.
看你做选择相当有趣…过程值得我细品一番。
Watching you make decisions is fascinating... The process is worth savoring.
你只是一眨眼…那个神秘的女人就从眼前消失了。连一根发丝都没落下。
You blink and she's... gone. The mysterious woman has disappeared before your very eyes, vanishing without a trace.
This really was... an unusual encounter.
但那个宝箱还在旁边，哪儿都没去。那个可能藏匿着「不幸」的容器……
But the chest is still there. It hasn't gone anywhere. There it is, a container that conceals bad luck...
该怎么做？选择在你手上，{NICKNAME}。
What should you do? The choice is yours, {NICKNAME}.
这就是女人口中装着「不幸」的宝箱……
This is the chest that as the lady said contains bad luck...
看上去和你在探险途中遇到的宝箱区别不大。也许那个女人只是在故弄玄虚，也许……
It looks pretty much like the chests you've come across while exploring. Maybe that woman was trying to trick you...
...But what if she was telling the truth?
你决定离开。你诚心地希望这是你今天做出的最明智的决定。
You decide to leave. You earnestly hope that is the wisest decision you've made today.
诱惑是魔鬼——今天你战胜了魔鬼。
Temptation is the devil, and you beat that devil today.
一股恶臭扑面而来。不是木头，不是锈蚀，也不是腐烂许久的食物——
A putrid smell rushes towards your face. It's not the smell of wood, rust, or food that has long gone bad.
——是无比巨大的敌意散发出的恶臭。
It is the stench of an incomparable hostility.
敌意和臭味一同消散了。你眼前只剩下一个空空如也的宝箱。
The hostile presence and stench dissipate. An empty chest lays in front of you.
你不清楚那龇牙咧嘴的怪物是从哪儿钻出来的…但你耳边回响起了那个魔术师女人的话：
You have no idea where that ferocious monster comes from, but... you recall the voice of the lady magician.
「不要轻视自己的选择。任何选择。」
"Never forget the importance of your decisions. Any decision."
一股恶臭扑面而来。不是木头，不是锈蚀，也不是腐烂许久的食物——
A putrid smell rushes towards your face. It's not the smell of wood, rust, or food that has long gone bad.
——是无比巨大的敌意散发出的恶臭。
It is the stench of an incomparable hostility.
敌意和臭味一同消散了。你眼前只剩下一个空空如也的宝箱。
The hostile presence and stench dissipate. An empty chest lays in front of you.
如果从宝箱里突然跳出龇牙咧嘴的裂界怪物还不能被称之为「不幸」…那你的价值观真的会被彻底颠覆。
If the ferocious Fragmentum monster that suddenly jumped out of the chest doesn't qualify as bad luck... then your values would be overturned.
朴素的木桌上摆放着纸，笔，和黑色的墨水。
Paper, pens, and a pot of black ink are laid out on a plain wooden table.
你微微俯下身去，想看清纸张上潦草的手写字迹——
You lean down slightly, trying to make out the messy handwriting on the paper...
——虽然下层区的科技水平落后，但「印刷」这种技术依旧足够普及。店家之所以选择手写，也许是为了让客人能感受到被重视的温暖。

Technology in the Underworld might be outdated, but printing as a technique remains as prevalent as ever. Perhaps this establishment opted to handwrite its notes to give customers a warm feeling of being valued.
…可这样的好意却徒增了你阅读的压力。你扫过那些客套的、用来传递友好的文字，眼睛已经开始生疼…终于，你在纸张的最下方发现了值得注意的重点。

...But this kind thought only manages to make reading more difficult for you. As you scan over those polite and pointless words, your eyes start to hurt... Finally, you find the most important part at the bottom of the page.
「…歌蒂掌柜诚心邀您为我们的服务做出评价。」
"...Gertie, the owner, warmly invites you to rate our services."
Ah, a grading session. Your favorite.
你依稀记得自己有过这样的经历：你坐在浮空的士的后座上，从城市的一个地点飞到了另一个地点。
You vaguely remember having this experience before, with you sitting in the back seat of a hover-taxi, flying from one place in the city to another.
驾驶浮空的士的飞行员全程没有和你搭话，甚至连最基本的打招呼也被略过了。但在你打开车门、准备下车之前，他突然开口了——
The pilot of the hover-taxi doesn't chat with you for the whole ride, not offering even the most cursory of greetings. But as you open the door to climb out, he suddenly says —
不，你才不会那么做。你是公正的化身。你绝不会因为可耻的怜悯就把考卷上的<unbreak>59</unbreak>修改成<unbreak>60</unbreak>。你坚信…好评是挣来的，不是施舍来的。

No, you won't. You are the embodiment of impartiality. You would never take pity on a test with a score of <unbreak>49</unbreak> and change it to a <unbreak>50</unbreak> for a pass. You strongly believe that good reviews are earned, not handed out.
你环顾这个廉价房间的四周。你听到墙壁在哭嚎，你看到衣柜在发抖…因为你来了——银河排名第一的公正锐评侠。
You look around this cheap room. You hear the walls wailing and see the cupboard trembling... Now, you're the most impartial critic in the whole of the cosmos.
「亲爱的住客，请您评价本宾馆房间床铺的舒适度。」
"Dear guest, please rate how comfortable the bed is in your hotel room."
只要评价足够真实，你的良心就不会作痛。
Your conscience won't hurt as long as you leave a truthful rating.
它何止是*一般*。它甚至可以被用来定义*一般*。
It's more than just *average*. It could even be used to define the concept of *average*.
如果让你从它和列车客厢的小床之间做选择，你不会有丝毫犹豫。
If you had to choose between this bed and the small beds in the Express' Passenger Car, you wouldn't hesitate for a second.
「亲爱的住客，请您评价本宾馆房间提供的茶水服务。」
"Dear guest, please rate the tea provided in your hotel room."
太冰，太淡，还散发出一股真菌发霉的味道。糟糕透顶。
Too cold, too bland, and stinks of musty mold. Utterly terrible.
在你认真读书或沉迷游戏的时候，你不会拒绝有这样一壶茶在你手边。
You wouldn't turn away such a pot of tea if you were engrossed in reading or gaming.
世间极品！如果有机会，你真想把丹恒拉来一起细品。不为别的——单纯因为你认定丹恒是个懂茶的人。
The best tea ever! If possible, you'd love to bring Dan Heng here to sample this tea, solely because you are convinced that he is someone who knows a lot about tea.
「亲爱的住客，请您评价本宾馆房间的采光和窗景。」
"Dear guest, please rate the lighting and view from your hotel room."
采光？什么光？早上醒来的客人在下床时恐怕都看不到自己的脚趾。
Light? What light? I'm afraid guests getting out of bed in this room would scarcely be able to see their own toes.
至于窗景…对于完全不存在的东西，你只能默认给出最低级的评价了。
As for the view... You can only default to the lowest rating possible for something that doesn't exist at all.
房间的采光还算凑合。至少你现在还能看清这张纸上写的是什么字。
The lighting in the room is not too shabby. At the very least, you're able to read what's written on this paper clearly.
至于窗景…你知道设计、建造这座宾馆的人们已经足够尽力了。你很难要求更多。
As for the view... You knew the people who designed and built this hotel did their best. You could hardly ask for more.
房间的采光正是你喜欢的程度，不太亮也不太暗，十分舒适。
The lighting in the room is exactly how you like it: Not too bright, not too dark. Very comfortable.
至于窗景——作为闻名银河的复古派建筑鉴赏家，磐岩镇的街景正合你的胃口。
As for the view — as a well-known connoisseur of retro architecture, you find the Boulder Town street view to be very appealing.
「感谢您对歌德宾馆的服务做出评价。您可以在以下空白区域为我们留言，宾馆工作人员会收集您的意见，并尽量改善不足之处。」
"Thank you for evaluating the service here at the Goethe Hotel. You may leave a comment in the space below. We will take your feedback seriously and try our best to improve our services."
留言…涉及原创的环节总会让你倍感苦恼。不如把它变成一道选择题。
A comment... Coming up with original content is always a headache. It's better to make it a multiple choice question.
感谢关照，服务总体很满意。
I'm very happy with the excellent service. Thank you.
体验一般，下次不会再住了。
It was an average experience. I probably won't come back.
建议采购记忆泡沫枕头和天鹅绒被。
May I suggest you buy some memory foam pillows and velvet quilts?
你顺利通过了留言环节的考验，这张纸片上只剩下最后一格空白了。
You successfully passed the comment component of the test. There's only one blank space left on this piece of paper.
「如果可以，请您留下自己的名字，以便我们在推出优惠入住活动时及时提醒您。」
"If possible, please leave your name, so we can notify you when we have discounts."
——优惠！多么美妙的字眼。那就在空格里留下你响亮的大名吧。
Discounts! What a beautiful word. Let's write your esteemed name here then.
大功告成！你刚刚完成了世界上最公正的服务评价——绝不带一丝一毫的主观情绪。
Your masterpiece is done! You've just completed the single most unbiased service review in the history of the universe — without a hint of any subjective emotion.
你用手指拨开刚刚填好的反馈，发现底下还摞了厚厚一叠相同的纸卡。摆在你面前选择有几种……
You flip back the feedback card that you've just completed, and discover a thick stack of identical cards. You are faced with several options...
我写好了——再看一遍整体评价。
Finished — Now, go over the whole review again.
我后悔了…再重新填一张吧。
I regret everything... Let's fill out another card.
You rip the card to shreds.
不，它还不够*公正*，远远不够。你必须重填一次。
No, it's not *unbiased* enough. Far from it. You must fill out another card.
你收起已经填好的服务评价纸卡。
You put away the completed service evaluation card.
或许你该把它直接交给歌蒂——为了彰显你尊贵住客的身份。
Perhaps you should give it straight to Gertie — To demonstrate your status as a valued guest.
哟，今天忙完啦？我这儿正好做了锅蘑菇汤…你先歇会，晚点记得下来尝尝口味如何！
Yo, have you finished your work today? I just made a pot of mushroom soup... Take a break first and come try it later!
我填好了一份服务评价。
I filled out a service rating card.
是吗？那太好了！没想到你这样的大忙人还有空顾及这些，真是太感谢了。
Really? That's great! I didn't expect a busy bee like you to have the time. Thanks a lot, really.
那我就收下了——谢谢你嘞，{NICKNAME}！你的意见非常宝贵，我这小宾馆的服务质量肯定会因为你的反馈得到提升的。
I'll take that, then — thanks loads, {NICKNAME}! Your opinion is highly regarded, and your feedback will definitely help improve the quality of our service in this boutique hotel.
哦，对了，这些你拿着吧！你可别拒绝啊…都是些零碎的小礼品，一直囤在我这儿也送不出去。欢迎下次再来住呀。

Oh yeah, go ahead and have these! And I won't take no for an answer... They're just a few small things that have been building up around here, and I haven't been able to give them away. Hope to see you next time.
已经快要到集合时间了……
It's almost time for everyone to meet up...
小朋友嘟哝着，像是在等什么人。
A kid is mumbling something. She looks like she's waiting for someone.
你不清楚自己是否见过这位小朋友，但你觉得她十分面熟。在人生的某个时刻里，你确信自己曾见过这样一位把「狡猾」写在脸上的小孩子。

You aren't quite sure if you have seen this kid before, but she does seem very familiar. You are certain that, at some point in your life, you've also met a kid with a similarly sly expression written all over her face.
咦？这不是荣誉队员{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}嘛！你怎么在这里？
Huh? You're the honorary member, aren't you, {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}? What are you doing here?
哦…我知道了！一定是虎克老大叫你一起来玩捉迷藏！对吧？
Oh... I know! You are the person Boss Hook called to play hide-and-seek with us! Am I right?
那我们就一起在这里等其他人到齐吧！
Let's wait together here for the others to arrive!
Oh, it looks like everyone's here!
那我们先来猜拳，决定一下谁来抓人吧！
We'll decide who's it by rock-paper-scissors.
哼哼…没想到这次轮到我来抓人了！
Hehe... I didn't expect that I would be it!
看来要开启「认真模式」了……
Looks like it's time to go into serious mode...
Boohoo... The game's basically over already...
你们就拼命逃跑吧，找地方藏去起来！
Run as fast you can! Find somewhere to hide!
…但那都是没有用的！因为漆黑的虎克大人一定会把你们统统抓到！哈哈哈！
...But that's all pointless! For I, Pitch-Dark Hook the Great, will find every last one of you! Hahaha!
再说一遍——场地是这条岔路到后面的广场！藏到其他地方算犯规哦！
I'll say it again. The play area starts from this intersection all the way to the plaza! Hiding anywhere else is against the rules!
（在这片区域里找个合适的藏身处吧……）
(Find a good spot to hide in this area.)
One hundred and eighty, one hundred and seventy-nine, one hundred and seventy-eight...
你盯上了这条小巷。老实说，你老早就想进去一探究竟了，但你心底朴素的正义感始终没能让你踏出这一步。
You fix your eyes on this narrow alley. To be honest, you've been wanting to explore it for a while now, but the sense of justice in your heart forbids you from stepping into this place.
现在或许是个机会——以捉迷藏的名义。尽管你不太清楚这算不算犯规……
Perhaps now would be an opportunity to check it out for the purpose of hide-and-seek. You aren't sure if this is against the rules or not...
…但它真的很隐蔽。而且，它是条小巷，被封起来的那种。想在其中探索一番乃是人之常情。
...But it really is quite a hidden location. It's a small alley, the kind that has been blocked off. Naturally, anyone would want to go explore what's in there.
你迅速作出决定。想必这偌大一磐岩镇，绝对再找不出比这小巷更隐蔽的藏身处了。
You make the decision quickly. The way you see it, there's absolutely no way you would find a more secluded hiding spot in all of Boulder Town.
（还是找找更合适的藏身处吧……）
(Maybe I should look for a better hiding spot...)
如此想着，你挺身翻越生锈的栅栏，向黢黑的巷道深处走去。
With this thought in mind, you hop over the rusted fence, and make your way into the pitch-black alley.
你本以为这里会有什么不可思议的事情发生——比如，身材高瘦、四肢细长、穿着白色紧身衣、踩着高跷流窜作案的怪异强盗……

You had assumed that something incredible was going on here. Maybe there would be a tall, thin bandit with wiry limbs and wearing a white, skin-tight suit, wandering around on stilts while committing crimes...
又或者——身材魁梧、浑身漆黑、佩戴面具、身披黑色硬质斗篷，操着一口像被热地髓矿熏过的低沉嗓音，在磐岩镇的昏暗街巷中惩恶扬善的私法制裁者……

Or perhaps the alley would contain a burly figure wearing black from head to toe, with a mask and a solid black cape. Their voice would be deep, as if it was smoked by hot Geomarrow mines, and they would dispense justice in the dark streets of Boulder Town as a vigilante...
…可惜，这里什么都没有。你感到兴味索然，便兀自找了个堆满板条箱的墙角蹲了下来，等待虎克大人前来将你逮捕。
...Unfortunately, you find none of that. You feel disappointed and instead squat on a pile of crates in a corner, waiting for Boss Hook to catch you.
大家都躲好了吗？我要来抓你们了哦！
Ready or not, here I come!
哼哼…现在只差{NICKNAME}了——你藏在哪里了呀？让我好好找找你！
Hehe... The only one left is {NICKNAME}. Where are you hiding? I'm going to find you!
荣誉队员…你藏得也太好了吧！但我可不会善罢甘休的！
Honorary member... You've hidden yourself too well, but I'm not going to give up so easily!
…算了算了！今天就玩到这里吧——
鼹鼠党，解散！各回各家睡大觉！
Moles dismissed! Sleep well and see you tomorrow!
看来小朋友们已经准备回家了——尽管他们还没发现你。
Looks like the children are already set to go home, even though they haven't found you yet.
当然，这也有可能是他们引蛇出洞的诡计…毕竟，能得到虎克大人首肯、进入鼹鼠党的小朋友，肯定个个都不容小觑。
Of course, this could just be a ploy to lure you out... kids who manage to get recognition from Boss Hook and join The Moles are definitely anything but ordinary.
所以，你会怎么做？是跟着小朋友们一起回家睡大觉，还是向他们证明你根本不会上钩呢？
So, what are you going to do? Will you go home with the children and go to bed, or will you prove to them that you won't take the bait?
只是哄哄小孩子罢了，根本没必要上纲上线——你对自己如是说。
Just amuse the kids. You tell yourself there's no need to turn a game into a battle of wills.
于是，你高举双手，从小巷的阴影回到了灯火通明的街道……
With that, you raise your hands and walk out of the shadowy alley and into the lit street...
玩游戏就是要赢！继续蹲着！
Why play if you don't intend to win? Stay hidden!
玩游戏就是要赢，这可是职业玩家的基本操守——捉迷藏当然也不能例外了！
You play to win. That's the basic code of conduct for any professional player. Hide-and-seek is no exception!
于是，你闭口不作声，决心在小巷的阴影中继续潜伏……
And so, you remain silent, having decided to remain hidden in the darkness of the alley.
哇，{NICKNAME}队员！我们怎么也找不到你，都准备回家了！你也太会藏了吧！
Hey, {NICKNAME}! We can't find you. We're getting ready to leave! You've hidden yourself too well!
我怎么找都找不到！你到底藏在哪里了呀？
I can't find you! Where in the world were you hiding?
<size=36>Where in the world were you hiding?</size>
I was hiding in the alley.
哎…算了算了！是我漆黑的虎克大人没把规则说清楚…总之，荣誉队员——
Geez... Whatever! I, Pitch-Dark Hook the Great, did not explain the rules clearly... Anyway, honorary member...
虎克决定，这次算你赢！这是你的奖励，拿好了哦！
I, Hook, have decided that you win! Here is your prize. Take it!
哎…算了算了，不逼你了！不管怎么样，这次是你赢了哦！这是你的奖励，拿好了哦！
Geez... Whatever! I won't force you to tell! Anyway, you win! Here's your prize. Take it!
好啦，今天的捉迷藏游戏到此结束！各回各家睡大觉咯！
Alright. Today's game of hide-and-seek is officially over! Everyone, go home and get some sleep!
这是一辆贝洛伯格特产汽车，前机盖正散发着引擎开足马力运转过后独有的燥热。
This is a car specially made in Belobog. The hood is letting off a dry heat unique to an engine that's going at full throttle.
不、不好意思！我就是临时在这里停一下，马上就走！
S—Sorry! I'm just parked here for a bit. I'll move it right away!
请、请您千万别贴我罚单！
P—Please don't give me a ticket!
嗐…我把您当成银鬃铁卫了——误会，都是误会哈！不过您也是，没事在别人车跟前瞎转悠……
Ah... I mistook you for a Silvermane Guard. My mistake. Just a misunderstanding! But it's your fault, too, wandering in front of other people's cars like that without a reason...
眼前这位讪笑的居民似乎又小声嘟哝了些什么，不过你没听清。随后，这人便很快离开了现场，不知所踪。
The smirking resident in front of you seems to be muttering something, but you can't make out what it is. They then bolt from the scene without a trace.
你就这么跟铁卫说话的？
Is that how you talk to a guard?
哎呀，原来您是铁卫啊！早说嘛……

In a lightning-fast movement, this grinning resident casually stuffs credits into your hand, then bolts from the scene without a trace. That isn't what you mean at all...

房门紧闭。坚实的木板后，隐约传来窸窸窣窣的响动。想来这房间一定属于某位贝洛伯格居民。
The door is shut tightly. Behind the sturdy wood, you can vaguely hear a rustling sound. This room must belong to a resident of Belobog.
出于好奇，你将耳朵贴上门板，仔细辨认其中的声音……
Curiosity gets the better of you. You press your ear to the door and try to figure out what the sound is...
房间里充斥着击锤敲打辊筒的脆响。声音起初清脆悦耳，错落有致。然而，一段时间后，那声音愈发嘈杂浑浊——打字机的使用者显然遇到了创作瓶颈。

The crisp sound of hammers' striking against the roller of a typewriter fills the room. The sound is pleasant at first, plunking away irregularly. Then after a while, the sound becomes increasingly noisy and chaotic. The person in front of the typewriter clearly is experiencing some writer's block.
随后，那令人不适的喀喀声戛然而止，房间转而被某种阴沉的絮语填满：「只工作，不玩耍，聪明孩子也变傻……」
Then, the unsettling coughing stops all of a sudden. The room fills with a low, incessant muttering, "All work and no play makes Jack a dull boy..."
房门紧闭。坚实的木板后，隐约传来窸窸窣窣的响动。想来这房间一定属于某位贝洛伯格居民。
The door is shut tightly. Behind the sturdy wood, you can vaguely hear a rustling sound. This room must belong to a resident of Belobog.
出于好奇，你将耳朵贴上门板，仔细辨认其中的声音……
Curiosity gets the better of you. You press your ear to the door and try to figure out what the sound is...
房间里不时传来闷响。那是某种胶质硬物——很可能是某种球——砸在空心砖墙时特有的*砰*声。然后，那物体*咚*地落在木地板上，又骨碌骨碌地滚向房间深处。

You occasionally hear a muffled sound. It sounds like something hard and made of rubber — most likely some kind of ball. You hear a thunk that a ball would make hitting a hollow brick wall. Then there's a thud as it falls to the wood floor. The ball rolls quickly into the recesses of the room.
似乎有人将那球体拾起，然后再次抛出；又是一声*砰*，*咚*，然后骨碌骨碌；拾起，抛出，*砰*，*咚*，骨碌骨碌…如此循环往复，始终没有停歇的迹象。

It seems like someone has picked up the ball. They throw it again. There's that same thunk, thud, and roll. The person picks it up and throws it again. Thunk. Thud. Roll... And so it continues without any signs of stopping.
房门紧闭。坚实的木板后，隐约传来窸窸窣窣的响动。想来这房间一定属于某位贝洛伯格居民。
The door is shut tightly. Behind the sturdy wood, you can vaguely hear a rustling sound. This room must belong to a resident of Belobog.
出于好奇，你将耳朵贴上门板，仔细辨认其中的声音……
Curiosity gets the better of you. You press your ear to the door and try to figure out what the sound is...
房间里似乎正有一男一女高声争执着什么。你屏息凝神，努力捕捉着空气中传来的破碎词句——
There seems to be a man and a woman arguing loudly about something. You concentrate as hard as you can to pick up the fragments of sentences coming from the room.
「亲爱的，那只是个噩梦……」女性的声音稍显柔和，可男人却有些歇斯底里：「你根本不知道我梦到的东西有多恐怖！我拿着斧子，然后……」
"My dear, it was just a nightmare..." The woman says somewhat gently. The man is hysterical. "You could have no clue how terrifying my dream was! I was holding an ax! And then..."
「你醒醒，那只是个梦！」女性似乎带着哭腔，「你看看你，都把孩子吓成什么样了！」随后，两人的争吵便被幼儿尖锐的哭声彻底淹没。
"Wake up. It's just a dream!" The woman seems like she's sobbing. "Look how you scared our child!" The child's piercing cries drown out their arguing.
房门紧闭。坚实的木板后，隐约传来窸窸窣窣的响动。想来这房间一定属于某位贝洛伯格居民。
The door is shut tightly. Behind the sturdy wood, you can vaguely hear a rustling sound. This room must belong to a resident of Belobog.
出于好奇，你将耳朵贴上门板，仔细辨认其中的声音……
Curiosity gets the better of you. You press your ear to the door and try to figure out what the sound is...
「我去看过了，」男人的声音有些沙哑，「<unbreak>237</unbreak>号房间里什么都没有。他应该只是太无聊了，想引起我们注意，才故意把自己弄成那个样子……」

"I took a look there." The man says with a slightly hoarse voice. "There's nothing in Room <unbreak>237</unbreak>. The boy must just be bored and want us to pay attention to him. He's acting like that on purpose..."
房间里似乎还有一女性——她忧郁地叹了一口气，声音有些颤抖：「不，亲爱的。我们走吧，这酒店里一定有什么东西……」
There seems to be another woman in the room. She sighs sullenly. Her voice is trembling. "No, dear. Let's leave. There's something in this hotel..."
接着是一段令人不安的沉默。但很快地，暴跳如雷的男人将这片死寂彻底撕碎：「我绝不会离开这里！没人能让我离开这里！」……
After that, an unsettling silence falls upon the room. The man flies into a rage as he shatters the deathly silence. "I am absolutely not leaving here! No one can make me leave!"...
房门紧闭。坚实的木板后，隐约传来窸窸窣窣的响动。想来这房间一定属于某位贝洛伯格居民。
The door is shut tightly. Behind the sturdy wood, you can vaguely hear a rustling sound. This room must belong to a resident of Belobog.
出于好奇，你将耳朵贴上门板，仔细辨认其中的声音……
Curiosity gets the better of you. You press your ear to the door and try to figure out what the sound is...
房间里充斥着女性的啜泣声。她似乎正向某人恳求着什么。那声音实在是过于破碎，以至于根本无法分辨个中内容，但你确切地感受到了她的局促与惊恐。

The room is full of a woman's sobs. She seems to be pleading with someone else in the room. Her voice is far too strained, making it impossible to figure out what she is saying, but you can feel her unease and terror.
这时，一道粗哑且刺耳的怪异声音悚然响起：「丹尼不在这里，托伦斯太太。」
Then, a rough, unpleasant voice says hauntingly, "Danny isn't here, Mrs. Torrance."
女性似乎吃了一惊——因为她那不绝于耳的哭声竟骤然消失了。
The woman seems in shock. Her incessant cries abruptly stop.
你感到后颈处传来令人毛骨悚然的凉意，像是有人将锐利的刀尖抵上你的肌肤。
You can feel a frightening chill run down the back of your neck, as if someone puts the sharp point of a knife against your skin.
是的…你确信自己*感应*到了什么——在这宾馆的走廊尽头……
Yes... You are certain that you SENSE something at the end of this hotel hallway...
这对从头到脚都别无二致的女孩凝视着你。
Two utterly identical twins stare at you.
(Oh god... Was that just a dream?)
这是一把电吉他。或者，用机械屋主人的话来说——「超电磁流射演奏器」。
This is an electric guitar or, as a workshop master would say, a "super electromagnetic flux player."
你可以试着弹奏它看看。
You can try to play it.
好听！你可以继续弹奏它。
It sounds nice! You can keep playing it.
Maybe it's best not to make noise.
喔…希露瓦听到你这么说可是会很伤心的。
Oh... Serval will be hurt if she hears you say that.
咦？没想到你还挺有天赋的嘛！
Hm? I didn't realize that you got some talent!
我姑且问问啊，你有兴趣加入我们「机械热潮」乐队吗？
Let me ask you a question. Are you interested in becoming a member of Mechanical Fever?
哈哈哈…理解理解～毕竟是你们列车的最佳三人组嘛。
Hahaha... I get it. You are the top trio of the Express.
哎呀，我虽然什么乐器都会，但也不能一人分饰两角呀！要是你来了，乐队正好能补上贝斯的缺口……
Well, I can play any instrument, but I can't be a one-man band! If you join, the band will be able to have a bass player...
…哈哈哈，开个玩笑～知道你们列车组忙，我不会逼你的。
...Hahaha. I'm just kidding. I know the Crew is busy. I won't force you to join.
但无论如何，你让我欣赏了一场精彩的演出，我非得给你点回报才行。
Anyway. Thanks to you, I get to enjoy an awesome performance. I've got to give you something in return.
——来，拿着！这是姐姐我前些天画好的蓝图……
Here. Take this! It's a blueprint I made a few days ago.
我也不知道这东西能不能帮上你的忙…总之你就拿去随便用吧。
I don't know if this will be of any help to you... Anyway, just give it a try.
这窗户怎么看不清里边？
This window is frustrating. Why can't I see inside?
希露瓦大人…我的希露瓦大人……
你也是希露瓦大人的忠诚仆人，前来瞻仰她的盛世美颜，对吗？
You are a loyal servant of Lady Serval. You've come to admire her radiant beauty, right?
It's true. I am her fan.
啊！没想到竟能在这里遇见同好……
Ah! I never imagined to meet another fan here...
…尤其是像我一样喜欢扒在机械屋窗户上近距离无死角全天候一睹希露瓦大人芳容的同好！
...especially someone like me who enjoys climbing onto the workshop window to see Lady Serval's beautiful face up close all day long without any obstructions!
我是接到报案的银鬃铁卫。
I'm a Silvermane Guard, responding to a report.
不，不可能，你连制服都没穿！我就没见过哪个银鬃铁卫大白天穿着奇装异服闲逛的。
N—No way. You aren't even in uniform! I've never seen a Silvermane Guard who walks around during the day in weird clothes.
You must be a fan just like me...
…像我一样喜欢扒在机械屋窗户上近距离无死角全天候一睹希露瓦大人芳容的同好！
...someone like me who enjoys climbing onto the workshop window to see Lady Serval's beautiful face up close all day long without any obstructions!
那个…我看你艺高人胆大，可以拜托你一件事吗？
So... You strike me as a bold person. Can I ask you for a favor?
Umm. I think you've got the wrong impression...
什么误会？希露瓦大人的粉丝之间没有误会！
Wrong impression? There are no wrong impressions between the fans of Lady Serval!
喜欢希露瓦大人的粉丝，视力都不会太差！
Fans who enjoy Lady Serval all have pretty good discernment!
不会是想让我给她拍照吧…
You're not about to ask me to go take her picture, are you...?
你怎么这么聪明！不愧是希露瓦大人的粉丝！
You're so smart! Just what I'd expect from a fellow fan of Lady Serval!
其实…我就是想让你帮忙给希露瓦大人拍张照！
In fact... I was just about to ask if you could help take a picture of Lady Serval!
天啊，你真是个善良的人！
My goodness! You really are a good person!
So... I'll leave that to your capable hands!
This goes against public order and common decency...
天啊，你真是个善良的人！
My goodness! You really are a good person!
但你放心！为希露瓦大人拍照这种事，也是一种「存护」的体现！
Don't worry! Taking a picture of Lady Serval is just another form of Preservation!
(Better fulfill my promise and get that picture...)
（好像没拍到希露瓦。算了，我尽力了……）
(It seems like Serval wasn't in the shot. Whatever. I did my best...)
（拍到希露瓦了…拿回去交差吧。）
(I got a picture of Serval... Time to go back and deliver it.)
想和你聊聊狂热粉丝的事…
I wanted to talk with you about your maniac fans...
啊～你是说现在正扒在窗户外的那位吗？
Ah. You must be talking about the one that is outside the window, right?
我当然知道啦。毕竟我是贝洛伯格人气最高的摇滚明星嘛。
Of course. I'm the most popular rock star in Belobog after all.
总之…这位粉丝想要我的照片，对吧？
So basically... this fan wanted a picture of me. Did I get that right?
那就拜托你帮忙拍个照吧——记得找个好角度！
Then, help me take a picture. Make sure to find a good angle!
You're going to agree to this!?
当然了！粉丝的愿望，我一定会尽量满足的。
Of course! I do my best to make my fans happy!
Did you get the picture? Let me see...
咦，这照片怎么看不见我人在哪里……
Hmm? I can't see myself in the picture...
哈哈，你的水平还真不错！我都想请你替我拍杂志封面了呢。
Haha. You're not too bad! I want to get you to take my picture for a magazine cover.
总之，你先拿给她看看吧，不满意的话就来找我——我随时都有空！
Anyway, get that picture to her. If she isn't satisfied, then come back. I'm free anytime!
You really are a good person.
哈哈，必须的！毕竟我希露瓦嘛。
Aren't you worried she will hurt you?
伤害？怎么可能呢！虽然早就和家里断绝来往了，可我毕竟也是贝洛伯格有头有脸的公众人物，没人敢对我动手动脚的。
Hurt me? Impossible! I cut myself off from my family, but I'm still a prominent public figure in Belobog. No one would dare lay a finger on me.
你放心吧～我已经注意那位粉丝很久了——如果她图谋不轨，先前有的是下手的机会…何必特地让你跑一趟呢，对吧？

Relax~ I've been aware of that fan for quite a while now. If she had ill intentions, she has had more than enough opportunities to act on them. Why would she make you come here and take a photo, right?
那么，就拜托你替她圆梦啦～
Well, go and fulfill her dreams.
你拍到希露瓦大人的…玉照了吗？！
眼前的女性以极其夸张的姿态倒吸了一口冷气。
The girl in front of you takes a breath of air in an exaggerated pose.
Hurry... Hurry up and show me!
咦，我心爱的希露瓦大人在哪里？
Huh? Where is my beloved Lady Serval?
Sorry, I didn't get her in the picture.
只有聪明的粉丝才能看到。
Only a smart fan can see her.
哦…那一定是我还不够聪明。
Oh... Then it must be because I'm not smart enough.
匹配不上希露瓦大人天才的头脑！
I'm not worthy of Lady Serval's genius!
不过…没有关系！我依旧可以这样近距离关注她，貌美如花的希露瓦大人……
But... that's OK! I can keep seeing her up close like this. Lady Serval, she's as beautiful as a flower...
有缘再见了，我的同好！愿我们下一次相遇时……
Until we meet again, my fellow fan! I hope that the next time we meet...
<size=36>我们都能拥有希露瓦大人的玉照！</size>
<size=36>We all can have a picture of Lady Serval!</size>
希露瓦大人真的…太完美了！简直可以与大守护者相媲美……
Lady Serval truly is... just too perfect! She's as beautiful as the Supreme Guardian...
我只得庆幸此刻还活着！只因我能有幸看到如此完美的事物！
I'm so lucky to be alive now! I've had the opportunity to see something so perfect!
救命！我感觉…希露瓦大人已经令我心律不齐了…我要把希露瓦大人的玉照挂在我的床头…这样我就能天天看着我的希露瓦大人了！
Save me! I think... Lady Serval has caused my heart to skip several beats... I want to hang Lady Serval's picture on my headboard... That way I can see her every day!
有缘再见了，我的同好！我要回去静养了…愿我们下次相遇时……
Until we meet again, my fellow fan! I need to go and recover... I hope that the next time we meet...
<size=36>我们都能拥有希露瓦大人新的玉照！</size>
<size=36>We all can have a new picture of Lady Serval!</size>
So... I'll leave that to your capable hands!
多么完美的棋局，专业的棋手敢于下判断…你在干什么喀！？
What a perfect game. The professional player levels their judgement with courage and... what are you doing!?
红色方明明大好局势啊…我解说不下去了喀！
The red side clearly has a major advantage... I can't go on with my commentary!
这条路真是漫长啊喀。我已经连续爬了不知多久，却还是没到终点喀。
This pathway really does go on and on. I've been climbing goodness knows how long, but still haven't hit the end yet.
…传奇的旅途注定艰辛，看来我还得继续努力喀。
...Legendary voyages are destined to be difficult. Looks like I'll have to keep working hard at it.
年轻的战士啊，为何你要选择回头喀？难道说，你还有所留恋嘛……
Young warrior there: Why do you choose to turn back, crrk? Could it be you're still reluctant to leave...

无论昼夜，吾都将守望这神明垂迹之地，直到吾主回归的那天。
In light and darkness, I shall guard this sacred ground, until our master's return.
可发生了这么多事，吾主却还是没有动静…难道它抛弃我们了吗喀？
Yet despite everything, our master shows no sign... have they forsaken us, crrk?
这个地方不太好过来，对吧？一路辛苦了喀！不过请相信我，朋友，这历练于你百利而无一害——
Quite a trek to get here, eh? Tough climb! But believe me, friend, this trial will serve you well—
只有坚持强健体魄、砥砺技艺，你的灵魂才能如肉体般坚不可摧喀！
A strong body and sharp skills make for an unbreakable spirit, crrk!
Thrice daily I reflect on myself...
Ever watched a giant whale dance?
Still not sure. Need one more taste...
My master, when will you return...
哎呦！谁啊这么缺德，砸我干什么喀！
Ouch! Hey! Who's doing this? Why attacking me!?
已经把塑像调整到正确的状态了…回衣匠那里看看吧。
The statue has been adjusted to the correct state... Head back to the Garmentmaker and take a look.
据说在工业星球，甲虫会被外表亮丽的玻璃瓶吸引…而这只若虫更爱石头塑像。
It's said that on industrial planets, beetles are often attracted by beautiful glass bottles... But this nymph prefers stone statues.
一束莲花开在这座塑像前，长势不错，很难想象它是如何在没有水的土地上存活的。
A cluster of lotus flowers bloomed in front of the statue. They are thriving, and it's hard to imagine how they survived on land without water.
这座塑像正庇护着一小片鸟巢，鸟巢的周边做了装饰，显然经常有人照料。但鸟巢的主人已不知去向。
This statue is sheltering a small bird's nest, with decorations around it. It looks well taken care of. However, the owner of the nest is nowhere to be found.
这座塑像旁放着一本半掩的卷轴。或许在树庭尚且热闹时，学生们会聚在它的身边读书、学习，交换知识与思考。
There's a half-opened scrolled by this statue. Perhaps, when the Grove was still bustling, students would gather around it to read, learn and exchange knowledge and ideas.
这座塑像的附属品像是某种用来崇神的工具，现在已经失去了光泽。
This statue's adornments appear to be tools of worship. They have since lost their luster.
这座塑像旁边插着一柄短矛，矛尖之锋利远胜寻常礼器。或许在某个时刻，它的主人曾确实使用过它。
A short spear is stabbed into the ground beside this statue, its edge far sharper than any ordinary ceremonial weapon. Perhaps during a certain time, its owner actually used it before.
这座塑像的脚边放着一口彩陶罐，历经磨损仍不失光泽，并且看上去挺有艺术水平。
A colorful dolium is placed by the feet of this statue, its sheen undiminished even with the wear of time. And its artisanship is remarkable too.
金苹果有着许多象征，在崇尚智慧的树庭，它便代表着智慧；但这枚苹果只是一件装饰。
The golden apple bears many symbolic meanings. In the wisdom-worshiping Grove, it represents intellect. However, this apple is merely ornamental.
「他的荣誉随作品一同逝去」…不知他当初做出了怎样的作品。
"His honor faded with his works." ...One can't help but wonder what he once created.
「与蛮邦战至力竭身亡」…树庭的勇士并不比其他城邦少。
"Died from exhaustion during the battle against the barbarian states." ...The heroic warriors of the Grove are no fewer than those of other cities.
「用生命探索爱的真谛」…令人钦佩的精神。
"He devoted his life to uncovering the true essence of love." ...What an admirable spirit.
曾属于某位贤人的塑像，因妥善维护而保存至今。时光磨去了它的细节，却无法磨灭它背后的故事。
The Sage's Statue has been preserved to this day due to proper maintenance. The years have eroded its details, but the story behind it cannot be wiped away.
你战胜了生命中必然的「不幸」。你是真正的战士。
You've conquered the bad luck inevitable in life. You are a true fighter.
记住…不要轻视自己的选择。任何选择。
Remember... never forget the importance of your decisions. Any decision.
Aren't you worried about causing casualties!?
女人露出了一个狡黠的眼神…但她的眼角很快又恢复了平整。
The lady gives you a sly look... but her expression quickly returns to normal.
我说过。「幸」或「不幸」是绝对的私人体验。
I already told you. Good or bad luck is all a matter of personal experience.
经常和命运打交道的人，自有分寸。
People who often cross paths with fate have their own standard for the two.
我以为最多是往宝箱里放个臭气弹…
I thought the worst that would be in the chest was a stink bomb...
女人向你投来怜悯的目光…但她的眼角很快又恢复了平整。
The lady looks at you with pity... but her expression quickly returns to normal.
...You believed this to be a game.
你还没意识到自己战胜了命运的摆布。
You had no idea that you bested fate's design for you.
看你做选择相当有趣…过程值得我细品一番。
Watching you make decisions is fascinating... The process is worth savoring.
哦，那个装着「幸运」的箱子——现在归你了。
Oh, the chest that contains good luck now belongs to you.
你是真正的抗争者。这是你自己赢来的。
You are a truly defiant soul. You have earned this prize.
你只是一眨眼…那个神秘的女人就从眼前消失了。连一根发丝都没落下。
You blink and she's... gone. The mysterious woman has disappeared before your very eyes, vanishing without a trace.
This really was... an unusual encounter.
那个宝箱还在旁边，哪儿都没去。那个可能装着「幸运」的容器……
The chest is still there. It hasn't gone anywhere. There it is, a container that could be holding good luck...
…去打开它吧。如女人所说，这是敢于与命运抗争之人应得的回报。
...Open it up. The lady did say this is the reward for those who dare to defy fate.
你打开了小宝箱，木板腐朽的气味扑鼻而来。
You open the small chest. The smell of rotten wood pervades your nostrils.
宝箱内是一方黑暗，衬得角落里闪现的一簇光芒格外惹眼。
The inside of the chest is completely black, but in the corner of the chest's lining, you see a flash of light that particularly catches your eye.
你将颤抖的手伸入一片漆黑中，抓住了那个——不对，是那一堆——坚硬的、发光的东西。
Your hands tremble as you reach into the pitch-black darkness. You take hold of a single — no, a pile of rigid, shining objects.
你将手举到眼前，仔细端详掌心里那一撮五颜六色的晶石。
You bring your hand up to your eyes and closely examine the multicolored crystals in your palm.
——这小小的一捧，恰好代表了一人份的「幸运」。恭喜你，{NICKNAME}。
This small treasure represents enough good luck for one person. Congratulations, {NICKNAME}.
I'm holding a fistful of crystals...
啊？什么？你耳朵是不是不好，都说了我已经不鉴定……
Ah, what? Are you hard of hearing? I told you, I'm not an appraiser anymore...
啧啧啧，这可是…难得一见，实在是难得一见……
Tsk tsk, this is... A rare sight. Truly a rare sight, indeed...
唔…你那是什么眼神？反正你就是想拿这些宝贝换钱吧？喏，这些你拿走吧，石头我就收下了——记住，这件事你可不许跟别人乱说啊！

Uh... Why are you looking at me like that? All you want anyway is to just exchange these treasures for some money, right? You take this, and I'll take the stone... Remember, don't go snitching about this deal!
一名古怪的男性笔直站在寒冷的铁艺栅栏门后。他的笑容十分僵硬。
An odd man stands stiffly behind the frigid iron gate. His smile is a rigid one.
你似乎见过他——或者他似乎见过你。
You think you've seen him before. That, or he has.
You frightened the socks off me the last time...
您好！欢迎来到贝洛伯格的「后巷」！
His smile is stiff as a board.
我从未发生过任何事。「后巷」不会发生任何事。
I've always been all right. Nothing ever happens in the "back alley."
I thought you hated this place.
我从未讨厌过「后巷」。任何人都不会讨厌「后巷」。
I've never hated the "back alley." No one hates the "back alley."
His smile is stiff as a board.
那之前到底发生了什么？
What was going on before, then?
你不会是被那个东西给…
Could you have been... by the thing...
听我讲，{M#先生}{F#小姐}——「后巷」想要看看更大的贝洛伯格。
Listen to me, {M#mister}{F#miss}: The "back alley" wishes to see a bigger Belobog.
请为我们把这道铁门打开吧！
Please open the gate for us!
His smile is stiff as a board.
您可真是体贴！这道铁门的钥匙就在戍卫官手里。
You're a thoughtful one! The Captain has the key to this iron gate.
His smile is stiff as a board.
(I'd better send a message to ask Gepard...)
正当你全神贯注地盯着手机屏幕时，猛然察觉到铁门背后的男人似乎有所异样——
Your attention is focused on your phone screen when you suddenly feel something off with the man behind the gate...
是的，你很确定他向你露出了一个夸张无比、甚至可以说是惊悚的笑容。但当你终于抬头想要问清他「后巷」究竟是什么时，却发现这名怪异的男性竟在眨眼间消失了。

Yes, you're absolutely positive that he just flashed you an exaggerated, unnerving grin. But when you look up to ask him what exactly is going on with this "back alley," this eccentric man has already vanished.
在你的脑海中，关于「后巷」的一切记忆似乎正在快速消褪。你已经无法回忆起许多细节，但有一点你却无比确信——
In your mind, all memories of this "back alley" are seemingly being quickly purged. You already can't recall many details, but of one thing, you are certain...
His smile is stiff as a board.
当然，全凭您的意思！现在还不是时候……
Of course, it's all up to you! It's not time yet...
…但到了那时，您一定不会拒绝的。
...But when the time comes, you will surely not decline.
当你想要问清他「后巷」究竟是什么时，却发现这名怪异的男性竟在眨眼间消失了。
But when you raise your head to ask him what exactly is going on with this "back alley," this eccentric man has already vanished.
在你的脑海中，关于「后巷」的一切记忆似乎正在快速消褪。你已经无法回忆起许多细节，但有一点你却无比确信——
In your mind, all memories of this "back alley" are seemingly being quickly purged. You already can't recall many details, but of one thing, you are certain...
His smile is stiff as a board.
哦？你终于醒啦，小瞌睡虫。
你是不是说过同样的台词…
Have you said something like that before...
…有吗？也许吧。不论如何，我们得先聊聊你为什么会出现在这里……
...Have I? Maybe. Anyway, we need to talk about why you are here...
娜塔莎向你介绍了来龙去脉……
Natasha brings you up to speed.
…总之，桑博把你抬到诊所的时候，你已经奄奄一息了。我还以为是他又干了什么坏事呢……
...The point is, when Sampo brought you to the clinic, you were already on death's door. I thought he was up to no good again...
好在你只是三天没吃饭而已。现在看来恢复得也差不多了，恭喜你。
Luckily, it was just because you hadn't eaten for three days. It looks like you've pretty much bounced back. Congratulations.
JUST because I haven't eaten for three days?
一个人在那种暗巷里昏倒…这已经是最好的结果了哦？
If someone passes out in a dark alley... that's about the least concerning thing that could happen.
这只是医生职责所在罢了。要谢还是去谢谢桑博吧。
That's my job. If you want to thank someone, you should thank Sampo.
不管怎么样，下次陪虎克他们一起玩的时候，不那么上纲上线也可以……
Just remember, when you play with Hook and the others next time, you don't need to play like it's a battle of wills...
一定要照顾好自己的身体——记好了哦。
You need to take care of yourself. Don't forget.
你盯上了这座广场的正中央。老实说，这里根本没有办法藏匿任何东西，或者任何人。站在这里，你只能感到自己沐浴在众人的目光中，一览无遗……
You set your sights on the center of the plaza. To be honest, it's basically impossible to hide anything or anyone here. Standing here, you can feel everyone's eyes on you...
…但你就是喜欢*另辟蹊径*。最危险的地方就是最安全的地方——没准虎克就是发现不了你呢，对吧？
...But you enjoy THINKING OUT OF THE BOX. The most dangerous place is often the safest. Maybe Hook won't be able to find you, right?
你迅速作出决定。所谓「大隐隐于市」，这才是经验最老到的捉迷藏玩家会选择的藏身处…至少你是这么想的。
You make a snap decision. The most experienced of hide-and-seek players will choose to hide in plain sight... Well, that's what you imagine, anyway.
（还是找找更合适的藏身处吧……）
(Maybe I should look for a better hiding spot...)
你已经听到虎克那欢快的声音从远处传来。接下来会发生什么呢？你止不住地想，背上竟还兴奋地沁出汗来…也许，这就是捉迷藏的乐趣所在吧。

You can already hear Hook's cheery voice echoing from afar. What's going to happen now? You can't help but imagine it as sweat rolls down your back. This exhilaration must be the joy of hide-and-seek.
大家都躲好了吗？我要来抓你们了哦！
Ready or not, here I come!
那个…你是在演岩居蟹吗？
Umm... Are you pretending to be a Rock Crab?
Why aren't any of you saying anything?
你干嘛呀荣誉队员！吓死我了！
What are you doing, honorary member? You've scared me to death!
对不起，漆黑的虎克大人…
要是对不起有用，还要洞洞机做什么？
If sorry does anything, why would I need Diggertron?
荣誉队员，如果你不会玩捉迷藏，可以向我请教！虎克是不会嫌弃你笨的！
Honorary member, if you don't know how to play hide-and-seek, just ask me! I won't laugh at you for it.
但你现在这样，搞得虎克非常担心你的游戏体验！
But how you're acting now has me worried about your gameplay experience!
记住，下次一起玩的话，要向虎克问清楚规则！这次就先饶过你了！
Remember, the next time we play, ask me about the rules! I'll let you slide this time!
今天就先到这里——我们下次再一起玩吧！鼹鼠党，解散！各回各家睡大觉咯！
Time to call it a day. Let's play again next time! The Moles, dismissed! Go home and get some sleep!
自从你来了贝洛伯格，便发觉自己可能与垃圾箱结下了不解之缘。现在，在捉迷藏游戏的生死关头，你再一次盯上了它。

Since arriving in Belobog, you've felt as if there is an inexplicable connection between you and dumpsters. Now, at this critical moment during hide-and-seek, you find yourself staring at the dumpster.
它坐落在广场上，低调，隐蔽，藏在其中绝对出人意料——只要你肯捏着鼻子。
It's located in the plaza. It's low key and hidden. No one would expect someone to hide in there. All you need to do is hold your nose.
你迅速作出决定——玩游戏就是要赢——而你，为了赢，可以不惜一切代价！
You make a snap decision. You play to win, and no price is too high for victory!
（还是找找更合适的藏身处吧……）
(Maybe I should look for a better hiding spot...)
如此想着，你屏住呼吸，紧闭着双眼，翻身钻进硕大的垃圾箱，在充斥着黑暗与铁锈味的空间中蜷成一团。
With that thought in mind, you hold your breath, close your eyes, and dive into the huge dumpster. You curl up in this dark space that smells of rust.
居然没那么臭，你想，而且意外的舒适。会是这只枕头和这床被子的原因吗？可这里为什么会有枕头和被子？
It's not as smelly as you assumed. It's surprisingly comfortable. Is it because of the pillow and blanket? What are these doing in a dumpster anyway?
不太对…这是不是意味着你擅闯了他人的住所？可你管不了这么多了——因为你已经听到了虎克响亮的宣告！
Seems odd... Does that mean you've just barged into someone's home? No time to think about all that. You just heard Hook's loud announcement!
大家都躲好了吗？我要来抓你们了哦！
Ready or not, here I come!
老大，我觉得{M#他}{F#她}就在里面！
Hey, boss. I think {M#he}{F#she} is inside!
我已经听到{M#他}{F#她}的声音了！
应该不会有人躲在垃圾箱里吧……
No one would try to hide in a dumpster...
哼哼，让我试试就知道啦！
Heh heh. Let's see and find out!
<size=36>Hey, honorary member! Are you in there?</size>
Why aren't any of you saying anything?
但那可是独眼老奥的家呀！你这是擅闯民宅！
This is where Old One-Eyed Ollie lives! You've gone and barged into someone's home!
I was wondering why it's comfortable...
要是对不起有用，还要洞洞机做什么？
If sorry does anything, why would I need Diggertron?
还好他最近一直住在那个什么…机械聚落，不然肯定要对你发脾气啦！
Thankfully, he's been away at... what was it... oh, the Robot Settlement. If he were here, he would have given you an earful!
记住，下次一起玩的话，千万不要再随便钻进垃圾箱了哦！
Remember, the next time you play, don't ever dive into a dumpster!
今天就先到这里——我们下次再一起玩吧！鼹鼠党，解散！各回各家睡大觉咯！
Time to call it a day. Let's play again next time! The Moles, dismissed! Go home and get some sleep!
这是一顶无人问津的帆布凉棚。从此处堆积的板条箱来看，这或许曾经也是一处门庭若市的小摊，只是现在不知为何惨遭废弃。
This is just an ordinary canvas awning. Judging from the stacks of crates, it might have been a stall with heavy foot traffic, but for some reason, it has been abandoned.
这或许是个不错的藏身点…比较传统的那种。你可以躲在板条箱后、桌子下，或者如果你另有想法——全都由你决定。
This might be a good place to hide... a more traditional spot. You can hide behind the crates or under the table. Or, you might have something else in mind. It's all up to you.
你迅速作出决定。如果一切顺利，这顶凉棚将在接下来一段时间内扮演你最坚固的庇护所。
You make a snap decision. If everything goes well, this awning will act as a trusty shelter for the time being.
但诚如刚才所说，即便只是这样一顶凉棚，能够藏身的地方也足以让人仔细挑上一挑了。那么，选择哪里作为藏身处会更好呢？
But, like stated before, even a simple awning offers plenty of places to hide that you can afford to pick and choose. Well, what's going to be a better spot for you to hide?
不错，传统且高效。于是，你伛着身子偷偷摸摸地钻进灰尘横飞的板条箱堆中……
Not bad. Traditional yet effective. And so, you bend down and stealthily move in between the crates as dust flies everywhere...
你说真的？可那只是张毫无遮拦的桌子。站在这里还不如站在广场中间呢！
Are you serious? There's nothing blocking someone from seeing you down there. You might as well stand out in the middle of the plaza!
At least you won't get your clothes dirty.
不错，急流勇进。那么，你伛着身子，试图钻到桌子底下……
That's good. Rise to the challenge! You crouch down and try to get underneath the table...
啊哦——这地方对你来说还是有点太狭窄了。替桌子对你说声对不起。
Uh-oh. This space is a little too narrow for you. Here's an apology on behalf of the table.
看来你得换个藏身的地方才行。那么，哪里更合适呢？
Looks like you'll have to find another spot. What'll do the trick?
不错，传统且高效。于是，你伛着身子偷偷摸摸地钻进灰尘横飞的板条箱堆中……
Not bad. Traditional yet effective. And so, you bend down and stealthily move in between the crates as dust flies everywhere...
我可以伪装成一名商人…
I can pretend to be a merchant...
不错，思路清奇。于是，你挺起腰板，站到了桌子后……
Nice. That's some fresh thinking. So, you stand up and get behind the table...

板条箱小山真高！可惜还是挡不住你{M#魁梧}{F#高挑}的身材。你真希望自己能和虎克一般大，可你再也无法回到那无忧无虑的时光了。

This pile of crates is really high! Unfortunately, it won't provide cover for your {M#big}{F#tall} frame. You really wish that you were the same size as Hook, but you'll never be able to go back to those carefree days.
祈祷她不会发现你吧！因为你已经听到了她响亮的宣告——
Better pray she doesn't find you! You can already hear her counting down loudly.
大家都躲好了吗？我要来抓你们了哦！
Ready or not, here I come!
喔，不错嘛，荣誉队员！你藏得可真好！
Oh, not too bad, honorary member! You hid yourself excellently!
要不是你太大个了，我可能都发现不了你呢！
If it weren't for the fact that you are too big, I might not have spotted you!
It's true. I think so, too!
不愧是你！不过还是虎克更厉害一点！
I should have expected as much from you! Unfortunately, I'm just a bit more amazing!
你们迟早也会迎来这一天的…
There'll come a day when you...
嗐，没关系！等虎克长到这么大，肯定不会再玩捉迷藏的啦！
Heh. Don't worry! When I get as big as you, I won't be playing hide-and-seek anymore!
今天就先到这里吧——和荣誉队员在一起，我们都玩得很开心哦！
Time to call it a day. We all had fun playing with the honorary member!
鼹鼠党，解散！各回各家睡大觉咯！
The Moles, dismissed! Go home and get some sleep!
这桌子作为掩体还是差点意思——其实，有它没它根本没有任何区别。往来矿民都用疑惑的眼神看着你，这位一动不动愣在原地的木头人。
This table doesn't provide much in the way of cover. Actually, having the table won't even make much of a difference. The miners look at you with suspecting eyes as you stand frozen in place.
老实说，你这姿态着实有些奇怪…如果要扮演商人，你总该吼两嗓子，佯装叫卖一下吧？
To be fair, there's something off about how you're doing this... If you're pretending to be a merchant, you should have to hawk a bit — maybe act like you are selling something?
但遗憾的是，你手边也没有任何可以出卖的东西……
Unfortunately, you don't have anything on hand to sell...
Haha! This isn't going to end well.
现在躲到箱子后还来得及吗？
Is there enough time to hide behind some crates?
当然来得及！于是，你伛着身子偷偷摸摸地钻进灰尘横飞的板条箱堆中……
Of course there's enough time! You crouch down and stealthily move in between the crates as dust flies everywhere...
卖艺？什么…等等！你先别着急喊出来！
Busking? What... Wait! Don't shout that!
可惜晚了…你这一句发自内心的呼喊立刻吸引来众多诧异的目光——
Sadly, it's too late... The words rattling in your head got out and immediately attracted everyone's astonished gaze.
<size=36>喂！那不是拯救了下层区的大英雄吗！</size>
<size=36>Hey! You're that hero who saved the Underworld!</size>
你没有想过事态会向这个方向发展…最初的你不过想在捉迷藏游戏中另辟蹊径——可现在竟演变成一场轰动磐岩镇的「大英雄握手会」了！

You hadn't expected things to go this way... You were just hoping to take an unconventional approach in hide-and-seek. Now your attempt has turned into a sensational "Meet the Hero" event in Boulder Town!
一小时、两小时…你从没想过下层区竟然有这么多居民！他们支付信用点，满怀感激或敬意，又或是纯粹来凑热闹，排队捧起你的手，视之若珍宝，反复摩挲……

One hour, two hours... You had no idea there were so many people who lived in the Underworld! They paid in credit and came up to shake your hand, either due to being grateful, respectful, or just there to join the excitement. They viewed it as a rare opportunity and continually patted your hand...
而在「握手会」的第四个钟头，这场欢闹的盛会终于迎来了尾声——
The commotion finally wore down by the fourth hour of this "Meet the Hero" event.
人群散去。你打量着自己的双手：这对紧握球棍、历战无算的无情铁手，如今仿佛被里里外外仔细抛了光…很可能比大矿区的地髓还要亮。

The crowd has dissipated. You take stock of your two hands. These invincible hands have held on to the baseball bat and fought so many battles, but now they look like they've been carefully polished to shine... They might be even shinier than the Geomarrow in the Great Mine.
可鼹鼠党的捉迷藏游戏怎么办？你已经不是很在乎了——毕竟那帮小朋友也才和你握过手呢！
What about The Moles' game of hide-and-seek? You don't really care at this point — those kids just shook your hand too!
出于良心，你没有收他们的钱。友情可是无价的！
Out of the kindness of your heart, you opt to not take their money. Friendship is priceless after all!
你已经听到虎克那欢快的声音从远处传来，可你根本没有选好合适的藏身处！
You can hear Hook's excited voice from afar off, but you haven't chosen a suitable place to hide yet!
你感到恐惧，怔在原地。接下来会发生什么呢？你止不住地想，背上竟还兴奋地沁出汗来…也许，这就是捉迷藏的乐趣所在吧。

You feel afraid. You are frozen in place. What's going to happen now? You can't help but think about it. Sweat runs down your back as you get excited... This exhilaration must be the joy of hide-and-seek.
大家都躲好了吗？我要来抓你们了哦！
Ready or not, here I come!
那个…你是在演岩居蟹吗？
Umm... Are you pretending to be a Rock Crab?
Why aren't any of you saying anything?
你干嘛呀荣誉队员！吓死我了！
What are you doing, honorary member? You've scared me to death!
对不起，漆黑的虎克大人…
要是对不起有用，还要洞洞机做什么？
If sorry does anything, why would I need Diggertron?
这都什么跟什么呀！是你输了！
What are you even talking about? You lost!
荣誉队员，如果你不会玩捉迷藏，可以向我请教！虎克是不会嫌弃你笨的！
Honorary member, if you don't know how to play hide-and-seek, just ask me! I won't laugh at you for it.
但你现在这样，搞得虎克非常担心你的游戏体验！
But how you're acting now has me worried about your gameplay experience!
记住，下次一起玩的话，要向虎克问清楚规则！这次就先饶过你了！
Remember, the next time we play, ask me about the rules! I'll let you slide this time!
今天就先到这里——我们下次再一起玩吧！鼹鼠党，解散！各回各家睡大觉咯！
Time to call it a day. Let's play again next time! The Moles, dismissed! Go home and get some sleep!
你再一次站在地髓矿脉的面前——它哪儿也没去，就这么默默地等着你回来。令人感动。
Once more, you stand before the Geomarrow vein — it's right where you left it, silently waiting for your return. How touching.
你为自己争取到了又一次机会，新晋矿工{NICKNAME}。别浪费它。
You've earned yourself another chance, rookie miner. Don't waste it, {NICKNAME}.
You throw all of your strength into striking the rock.
维修一把矿镐可能很容易，但想重建人与人之间破裂的信任——不可能，简直难如登天。
It might be easy enough to mend a pickax, but trying to repair the broken trust between people is as impossible as touching the sky.
Touching the sky? Sounds easy enough...
别抖机灵，{NICKNAME}。你知道这是什么意思。
Don't get ahead of yourself, {NICKNAME}. You know what this means.
现在，冷静下来，放下你手里的矿镐…再选一次。乖。
Now, calm down and put down your pickax... Be good and pick a different option.
用*十分*适中的力气敲下去。
You use an entirely appropriate amount of strength when striking down.
——赞美琥珀王！你从来没干过类似的活，但这一击的力度简直完美如梦境…也许你天生就是干这行的料。
Praise the Amber Lord! You have never done anything like this, but you used the absolutely perfect amount of strength... Maybe you have found your life calling.
一块拳头大小的地髓结晶落在你的脚边。它的形状近似正十二面体，颜色橙红剔透，核芯周围甚至还反射出几抹靛蓝。

A Geomarrow crystal the size of a fist falls next to your feet. It has a shape similar to a dodecahedron, with a clear, orange-red color. There are even some shocks of indigo that radiate from the core of the stone.
不需要冗杂的鉴定步骤，你内心已经十分清楚——这下发财了。
A rock like this doesn't need complex appraisal. You know full well what this is — big money.
你抬头看着那片雄伟的矿脉…橙色的面容缓和慈祥。仔细聆听…它似乎对这次完美的挥镐发表了自己的看法。
You look up at the majestic vein... The orange surface has a warmth and kindness to it... Listening closely, you can almost hear it give its own take on your perfect swing.
你对着自然的伟大显像轻鞠一躬。现在，回去找那个女工头，让她帮忙鉴定这块地髓结晶的价值吧。
You give a slight bow to this marvel of nature. Now, it's time to find the supervisor and have her help appraise how much this chunk of Geomarrow crystal is worth.
「叮」——这就是全部了，没有下文。你在期待些什么？
"Ding." That's it. There's nothing else. What were you expecting?
你抬头看着那片雄伟的矿脉…橙色的面容缓和慈祥，但你还是觉察到了它藏在表面之下的嘲弄：
You look up and see the magnificent vein... Its surface gives off a warm, kind orange glow, but you still notice the mockery beneath its surface.
"You didn't eat a good meal, little one?"
你羞恼不已。再给你一次机会，你一定会给它点颜色瞧瞧。
You are embarrassed. If you are given a second chance, you'll teach it a lesson.
又见面了，外来者。怎么说，要谈生意，还是说你找我有事？
Hello again, outsider. What brings you here, business or something personal?
嗯？你挖到什么好东西了吗？给我瞅瞅。
Eh? Dug up anything good? Let me see.
看品相，这地髓结晶的纯净度应该至少在<unbreak>85%</unbreak>以上…这要是被直接扔进锅炉里烧成灰渣，可就太浪费了。
Judging by the appearance, the purity of this Geomarrow crystal has to be at least <unbreak>85%</unbreak>... Chucking it in the boiler and burning it down to slag would be too wasteful.
要我说，{NICKNAME}，你找到的这块东西，只要稍稍加工一下就能直接安到上层区的永冬铭碑上——一般人保准看不出区别！

If you ask me, {NICKNAME}, this thing you found just needs a little refinement before being put directly onto the Everwinter Monument up in the Overworld — Nobody would be able to tell the difference!
对了，你手上不是正缺钱吗？把这块结晶卖给我，怎么样？价格绝对公道。你去打听打听，磐岩镇还有比安东尼娜出手更大方的矿监吗？

By the way, aren't you low on funds at the moment? How about you sell me this crystal, huh? I'll give you a fair price. Go ask around, and you won't find a more generous supervisor around here than me!
痛快！我就喜欢跟你这种人做生意。来吧，一手交货，一手交钱。
Delightful! I love doing business with people like you. Come on then. You take the money, and I take the goods.
真不错呀，真不错…拿着，{NICKNAME}——很高兴跟你做生意。
That's nice, real nice... Take this, {NICKNAME}. It's been a pleasure doing business with you.
痛快！我就喜欢跟你这种人做生意。来吧，一手交货，一手交钱。
Delightful! I love doing business with people like you. Come on then. You take the money, and I take the goods.
真不错呀，真不错…拿着，{NICKNAME}——很高兴跟你做生意。
That's nice, real nice... Take this, {NICKNAME}. It's been a pleasure doing business with you.
嚯！你抬起价来倒是干脆。
Whoa! Easy for you to raise the price.
…行，那就<unbreak>10000</unbreak>，成交。来吧，一手交货，一手交钱。
...Okay, <unbreak>10,000</unbreak> it is. Deal. Come on then. You take the money, and I take the goods.
真不错呀，真不错…拿着，{NICKNAME}——很高兴跟你做生意。
That's nice, real nice... Take this, {NICKNAME}. It's been a pleasure doing business with you.
Let me think about it some more...
…我理解，你再好好想想吧。不过也别考虑太久…我做生意可不喜欢拖泥带水。
...I get that. Feel free to think about it, but not for too long. I don't like to drag things out in business.
Let me think about it some more...
…我理解，你再好好想想吧。不过也别考虑太久…我做生意可不喜欢拖泥带水。
...I get that. Feel free to think about it, but not for too long. I don't like to drag things out in business.
究竟是哪个没素质的家伙看完卷轴不好好放回原位喀！最好别被我逮到喀！
Which uncivilized fool left this scroll out of place? They'd better hope I don't catch them! Crrk!
真是的，让我瞧瞧…这个原本是放在哪里的喀……
Honestly now, let's see... which shelf did this belong on, crrk...
何其丑陋的花朵，简直不愿承认它是我们大大的造物喀！
Such an unsightly bloom. I can hardly believe it's our master's creation, crrk!
难以想象什么样的人会靠近它…难道是为了花蕊里的奖励吗喀？
Hard to imagine anyone approaching it... unless they're after the prize within, crrrk?
我跋涉千山、历经万难，终于抵达此处，只为一睹您神圣的尊容喀——
Through countless peaks and endless trials, I've journeyed here just to glimpse your divine presence, crrrk—
伟大的{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}！神秘的化身、永夜的星芒！只消看您这一眼，我此生便无憾了喀！
O mighty {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}! The incarnation of enigmas, starlight of eternal night! One glimpse of you fulfills my existence, crrk!
卷轴摆得太乱了，地毯歪歪扭扭，火盆里也堆积着许多灰烬……
The scrolls are arranged extremely messily, the carpet is crooked, and ash has piled up in the brazier...
得赶快收拾干净才行，不然对圣女大人的健康不好喀！
Need to tidy up fast for the Holy Maiden's wellbeing, crrrk!
得赶快收拾干净才行，小主人不知道什么时候就会回来喀……
Need to tidy up fast. The young master might come back any moment, crrrk...
话说回来，圣女大人…已经多久不曾回来了喀……
Speaking of Lady Holy Maiden... it's been so long since she came back, crrk...
嗨、朋友，你好喀！初次见面，相逢即有缘，陪我聊聊天喀！
Oh hey there, friend! What lovely luck running into you. Won't you stay for a chat, crrk?
这就对了喀！我和你说，我知道的可多了喀！小到祭司们的八卦、大到长老们的机密，都能给你讲讲喀！
Now we're talking! I've got so much to share! Everything from priestly gossip to the Elders' confidential matters, crrrk!
偷偷告诉你喀，这边的祭司好多都是大坏蛋，经常打着命运泰坦的旗号，用假的神谕骗钱！
Between you and me, these priests are mostly con artists! They make up phony prophecies claiming they're from the Fate Titans just to scam money!
不仅如此，还有更过分的喀！你猜怎么着——
And oh boy, that's not even the half of it, crrk! Guess what else—
好多人甚至在背后偷偷说圣女大人的坏话！是不是特别过分！你说是不是，喀！
Some of them are actually spreading rumors about Lady Holy Maiden! Can you believe how awful that is? Can you? Crrrk!
喀！你怎么就走了喀！真是的，好不容易遇到个能听我说话的喀……
Hey! Don't go! I thought I'd finally found a good listener, crrk...
喀！你怎么就走了喀！真是的，好不容易遇到个能听我说话的喀……
Hey! Don't go! I thought I'd finally found a good listener, crrk...
喀！你怎么就走了喀！真是的，好不容易遇到个能听我说话的喀……
Hey! Don't go! I thought I'd finally found a good listener, crrk...
有位贤人说得好：「偷懒一时爽，一直偷懒一直爽」…喀？怎么又到了写工作报告的时间了…完全不想干活喀……
A sage once said: "Why work hard when you can hardly work?" Crrrk... Oh great, another report deadline. I'm SO not feeling this right now, crrk...
…算了，这次也继续写「今日晴，无事」好了喀！
Forget it. I'm going with my usual "Nothing to report, business as usual"!
你也是来赏景的吗？那可真是来对地方了喀——这里人迹罕至、视野绝佳，之前一直是我的秘密基地来着喀！
Oh, you came for the view too? You're in luck, crrk! This spot's perfect — great view, no crowds — it's been my secret hideout!
瞧啊，群山绵延起伏，负世泰坦屹立于天地之间…每每看见这景象，我都不由感叹：大地何其壮阔、而虫何其渺小……
Behold! Endless mountain ranges, and the Worldbearing Titan towering between heaven and earth... Makes you realize how immense the world is, and how tiny we bugs are in comparison...
那帮目光短浅的家伙喀！凭什么我就不能当祭司——不就是遵循「命运」的指引作出预言嘛，我早晚也可以的！
Those narrow-minded fools, crrrk! Who says I can't be a priest? Following Fate's guidance to make prophecies — piece of cake! I'd nail it eventually!
它们一定是嫉妒我有潜力喀！与其信那些打击虫的鬼话，不如信我身后这堵坚硬的石墙会崩塌喀！
Ha! They're obviously just envious of my potential! I've got more faith in this wall crumbling than in their stupid criticisms, crrk!
我记得这里是列车着陆的地点…某种程度上讲，它的「预言」还挺灵验。
This is where the Express touched down... Ironically, that "prediction" wasn't far off.
有没有人！快来救虫啊——要、要掉下去了喀！
Help! Somebody help! I'm falling, crrk!
哈哈——开玩笑的喀！放心吧，我有特殊的登高技巧喀！
Haha, fooled you! Relax, I know all the climbing tricks, crrrk!
瞧啊，此番美景，真教虫不禁诗兴大发喀——
Ah! Such splendor before my eyes. I simply must wax poetic, crrk—
刻法勒啊，你真受累；雅努斯啊，你爱跑腿！
O Kephale, how you toil away. O Janus, always on your way!
欧洛尼斯，是机灵鬼；塔兰顿啊，可别得罪！
O Oronyx, how clever you be. O Talanton, none dare cross thee!
那边是不是落了些尘土？
Is that a speck of dust?
I want to be a poet...
霸，劲霸！燃！这只虫的热血已经沸腾，恨不得将扎格列斯的把戏尽数驱逐出去——如果它推得动的话。
Absolute domination! Unbridled fire! This worm's passion has boiled over and is hell-bent on thwarting all of Zagreus' tricky antics — if it can even move it in the first place.
Leave now, and nobody gets hurt!
One... It should be mid-way through the journey now.
不存在之数以任意彰显…这样应该就算是九了？
A number that doesn't exist, manifesting in any form... This should count as nine?
Six... It's probably done by now.
总感觉哪里有问题…好像不是这个顺序？
Something's wrong... Is this the correct order?
飞蛾总是向往光明，但一头扎进火里并非明智之举，实现梦想也得循序渐进！
Moths are always drawn to light, but diving straight into fire is not wise. Dreams should be pursued step by step!
每天靠近火苗一点点，一百天后，就算站在火焰里也不怕热了嗡~
Approach the flame a little more each day, and after a hundred days, you won't fear standing in it, buzz~
呼——今天的锻炼就到这里，剩下的明天继续嗡~
Whew — today's training ends here. The rest will wait for tomorrow, buzz~
人，向我倾诉你的忧愁和烦恼吧……
Human, pour your sorrows and troubles out to me...
但蝶会默默地祝福你，一直、一直默默祝福你嗡……
But I'll keep blessing you quietly, always and forever, buzz...
世上无难事，只要肯攀登。总有一天我要登上崖顶，和负日者肩并肩嗡！
Nothing is impossible if you keep trying. One day, I'll climb to the top of the cliff and stand shoulder-to-shoulder with the Sunbearer, buzz!
等等——你、你怎么会飞？！太作弊了嗡！
Wait — how... how can you fly!? That's unfair, buzz!
噢，我也会飞。那没事了嗡~
Oh, I can fly too. Never mind then, buzz~
我是响应吾主呼唤的骑士，寻觅着足以破除愚昧迷雾、阐明万物运行的真理……
I am the knight summoned by my master, seeking the truth that dispels the fog of ignorance and reveals the workings of all things...
请问这位过路的旅客…您是否承认吾主的智慧盖世无双？
May I ask you, dear traveler... Do you acknowledge my master's unparalleled wisdom?
无礼！你竟不遵守骑士礼仪，还未正式发起决斗就贸然出手，偷袭了我心爱的坐骑！
How rude! You disregarded the knight's code of conduct, attacking without formally issuing a duel and ambushing my beloved steed!
因为它很快就又刷新出来了嗡~
Because it will respawn soon enough, buzz~
跟上，水手！我们曾见过多少波涛，越过多少礁石啊——
Follow me, sailor! How many waves have we braved, and how many reefs have we crossed—
你一定还记得我们在桅杆上守夜的那些晚上，月色纯净，打在帆布上；船摇摇晃晃，掠过漆黑的海洋…那时候我甚至想成为一位英雄了，你是不是也一样？

Surely you remember those nights we kept watch on the mast, the pure moonlight spilling over the sails, the ship rocking gently as it glided across the dark sea... In those moments, I even dreamed of becoming a hero. Did you feel the same?
是的、是的…现在我们终于又要启航了。水手，你准备好了吗？
Yes, yes... and now we are finally setting sail again. Are you ready, sailors?
留步嗡，远道而来的旅客！
已经有一百位挑战者折戟于我的考验…你会是第一百零一个吗？
A hundred challengers have already failed my trial... Will you be the hundred and first?
赌上身为织者的尊严嗡，猜猜看吧，我在哪棵树后边？
For the honor of being a Weaver, buzz, take a guess: Behind which tree am I hiding?
答错了嗡！别灰心，能识破本蝶走位的人，屈指可数嗡！
Wrong, buzz! Don't be discouraged. Only a rare few can see through my moves, buzz!
竟然识破了我的走位！织者的尊严和连胜记录，都被打破了嗡……
You've seen through my moves!? My honor as a Weaver and my winning streak, both shattered, buzz...
答错了嗡！本蝶的走位，果然独步天下嗡！
Wrong, buzz! My moves are unmatched in the world, buzz!
这、这也是一种破局之道嗡！
Th-this is also a way to break the game, buzz!
直觉地感觉壁画里，多目的盲者头上缺几根羽毛啾！到底是为什么呢——
Something about that mural feels off. The many-eyed blind figure seems to be missing a few feathers, tweet! Why could that be—
是我家大大为我示现的启示，还是跨越时空的心有灵犀啾？
Is it a revelation granted by my master, or a connection beyond time and space, tweet?
据说在这里许愿时系上风铃，负日者就能听见我们的愿望。
It's said that tying a wind chime while making a wish here allows the Sunbearer to hear our desires.
希望明天还能有阳光，晒干我被露水打湿的翅膀。
I hope for sunshine tomorrow to dry my dew-soaked wings.
命运牵引着你，来到我的藏身处了嗡！
Fate has guided you to my hiding place, buzz!
命运如同吾主大大的绳结，又像吾主太太的丝线，它们缠绕编织，成为连结我们的羁绊——
Fate is like the knot tied by my master, or the thread spun by my lady. They entwine and weave to form the bonds that connect us—
就是它带领你找到我的嗡！
And it's these bonds that led you to find me, buzz!
我想沿着时光的河水逆流而上…可是，我既无力违抗瀑流的冲刷，又不甘随波逐流、就此放弃。
I wish to swim against the current of time's river... yet I cannot resist the torrents nor resign myself to drifting along and giving up.
最终，不得不僵持在路途的中央。
In the end, I am left stranded in the middle of the journey.
Perhaps, that's just the life of a butterfly...
再坚持，哪怕一会儿也好…
Hold on, just a little longer...
你知道的，蝴蝶都是我兄弟，我和它们很早就认识了，这些家伙强得不可思议嘤……
You know, all butterflies are my brothers. I've known them for a long time, and they're incredibly strong, eep...
我决定把我的天赋带到蝴蝶一族中去嘤！
I've decided to bring my talents to the butterfly clan, eep!
哎呀呀，看你失望的表情，难道是在找什么别的东西吗？阳光下才没有隐藏的宝箱呢嘤~
Aw, why the long face? Looking for something else? There are no hidden chests under the sun, chirp~
在那位{RUBY_B#欧洛尼斯}岁月编织者{RUBY_E#}的帮助下，周围的空间会呈现相反的时空嘤。
With the help of the {RUBY_B#Oronyx}Weaver of Time{RUBY_E#}, the surrounding space will reflect an inverted timeline, eep.
嘤嘤~我是女王大人的骑士，奉命于此守护宫殿——目前看来一切正常嘤。
Eep~ I'm the knight of the queen, tasked with guarding this palace — everything seems fine for now, eep.
话说回来…出征的黄金裔英雄们何时才会归来呢嘤？
That being said... when will the Chrysos Heirs return from their expedition, eep?
嘤，据说亡灵的堆积会变成冥河，听起来好可怕
Eep, it's said that the accumulation of the dead will turn into River of Souls... How terrifying is that!
旅行者哟，请问这条瀑布和千百年后的那条还是同一条吗？
Traveler, tell me — does this waterfall remain the same as it will be in a thousand years?
太好了嘤！它还是它，这条河流没有本质上的改变嘤。
That's wonderful, eep! It's still the same. This river hasn't fundamentally changed, eep.
这样嘛…没办法，毕竟人不能两次踏进同一条河流嘤。
Well then... What choice do we have? After all, one can never step into the same river twice, eep.
黑潮实在是太可怕了…远处那几个黑潮怪物，我更是拼尽全力也无法战胜嘤！
The black tide is terrifying... Those black tide monsters over there — I can't beat them no matter how hard I try, eep!
呃~静态视力为零，你该不会很不擅长指挥作战吧嘤？
Um~ With no static vision, maybe you're not the best at combat leadership, chirp~?
If there are monsters, that means I'm on the right track!
呃~你该不会有什么奇怪的受虐癖吧嘤？
Uh~ don't tell me you have some sort of weird masochistic tendencies, eep?
贤者曾说：「谨慎能捕千秋萤。」小心点准没错的嘤。
A wise person once said, "With caution, one can catch the most cunning glowworm." Being careful never hurts, eep.
我记得这宝库里曾经琳琅满目，为何现在空空如也嘤？
I remember this treasury used to be filled with treasures. Why is it empty now, eep?
难道说，那些人把宝贝借走之后…就不打算还回来了吗嘤！
Could it be that those people borrowed the treasures and... never planned to return them, eep!?
这里可不是只要带着架梯子就能随意出入的地方嘤！只有被女王认可的勇士才能继续前进。
This isn't a place you can just waltz into with a ladder, eep! Only warriors approved by the queen may proceed.
听说那样的勇士能用投石击中巨人的独眼，你行吗嘤？
It's said that such warriors can strike a giant's single eye with a sling. Can you do that, eep?
嘤嘤~既然你打败我了，这次就先睁一只眼闭一只眼吧…我可是个尽职的守卫嘤！
Eep~ Since you've beaten me, I'll turn a blind eye this time... But remember, I'm a dedicated guard, eep!
不过，这里的人都去哪儿了呢嘤？
Still, where has everyone gone, eep?
听说月亮上也有萤生活，它耀眼的光芒就是它们发出来的。真想上去和它们一起生活啊嘤~
It's said that glowworms also live on the moon. Its brilliant glow comes from them. I'd love to live with them up there, eep~
What a bright moon. So big, so round...
看到这炼金法阵了吗？据说它蕴含着强大的魔力，必须念对咒语才能发动嘤！
Do you see this alchemical matrix? It's said to contain immense magical power. You have to recite the spell correctly to activate it, eep!
一即是全，全即是一！见证吧嘤——
One is all, and all is one! Behold, eep—
没反应？好吧，或许是准备工作还不够嘤……
Nothing? Well, maybe the preparations aren't complete yet, eep...
你刚刚去了一趟｢死者的世界｣，经历了一场离别，对吧嘤？
You just visited the "World of the Dead" and experienced a parting, didn't you, eep?
闻到这空气中的花香了吗，那种花叫<color=#dbc291ff>安提灵花</color>…这安神的清香，我想我也该离开了嘤。
Do you smell the fragrance of flowers in the air? That's the scent of <color=#dbc291ff>Antila flowers</color>... This soothing scent reminds me that it's time to leave, eep.
我们的脚步总愿意在美曾经悲哀地生活过的土地上徘徊，好让我们意识到它并不属于尘世。
Our footsteps always linger on lands where beauty once lived sorrowfully, reminding us that such beauty does not belong to the mortal world.
这扇门后面飕飕冒冷风，都快要把我的屁股吹歪了，里面到底有什么东西啊嘤！
Cold wind is blowing out from behind this door, so strong it feels like it's twisting my backside — what's inside there, eep!?
哦…不对，我没有屁股，只有腹腔嘤~
Oh... wait, I don't have a backside, just an abdomen, eep~
I wanna join you all, chirp~
Sunlight reveals all, nothing stays hidden, chirp!
Where did all my precious go...
嘤嘤~竟敢攻击女王大人的骑士，难道你是来袭击这座宫殿的入侵者吗？
Chirp, chirp~ How dare you attack the Queen's knight! Are you an intruder here to attack our palace?
你等着，等出征的黄金裔英雄们归来之后，我一定让他们为我的坐骑报仇！
Wait till our Chrysos Heir champions return from battle. They'll make you pay for what you did to my mount!
曾经盘踞于此的若虫们…消失了。
The nymphs that once resided here... have disappeared.
这很反常。脱离了阿格莱雅的金丝，失去赐福的若虫难以长久活动…除非受到了某种感召。
This is unusual. Without Lady Aglaea's golden threads, the unblessed nymphs cannot remain active for long... unless they have been summoned by something.
你注意到平台上留下了一行印记：｢我们在西风尽头等你。｣
You notice a mark left on the platform: "We await you at the end of the west wind."
西风尽头…遐蝶也曾这样称呼过冥界。但这怎么可能？
The end of the west wind... Castorice once referred to the nether realm in the same way, but how is this possible?
或许我应该到最后和她分别的地方去看看。
Perhaps I should go to the place where I last parted with her.
这里和你记忆中的那片花海颇为相像，但又有些许不同……
This place resembles the sea of flowers in your memory, but there are some subtle differences...
眼前的景象似乎是一幅再现记忆的画卷，被某种力量从过往之河中打捞上岸。它不是真正的冥界，否则你早已失去呼吸。
The scene before you seems like a painting of memories, fished out from the river of the past by some force. It is not the true nether realm, or else you would have already lost your breath.
在安提灵花的香气中，你想起了她曾经最爱的诗句——
Amidst the fragrance of Antila flowers, you recall the verses she once loved most —
｢我给你破旧的玩偶、残存的诗句、枯萎的花朵。｣
"I give you my old doll, the remnants of poems, and withered flowers."
｢我给你一个久久地望着孤月的人的悲哀。｣
"I give you the sorrow of one who gazes at the lonely moon for too long."
嗡嗡——我们受到亡语蝶的邀请，前来观看它们的最后一舞嗡。
Buzz buzz — We were invited by the Eulogistic Butterflies to witness their final dance.
嘤嘤——我听过亡语蝶的故事，它们一定是应某人所托，将冥河彼岸的信息转述给生者嘤。
Chirp chirp — I've heard the story of the Eulogistic Butterflies. They must have been entrusted by someone to convey messages from the other side of the River of Souls to the living.
喀喀——如此美丽的舞蹈，是为了传递思念吧喀。
Crrrk crrrk — Such a beautiful dance must be meant to convey longing.
看样子这支舞还会继续跳好久，我们人间再见吧。
It seems this dance will continue for a while longer. Let's meet again in the mortal world.
这里是距那些亡语蝶最近的地方，仿佛能看见它们身上的鳞粉——<color=#dbc291ff>它们飞舞的轨迹似乎是八个字符？</color>
This is the closest place to those Eulogistic Butterflies. You can almost see the scales on their wings — <color=#dbc291ff>their flight path seems to spell out eight characters?</color>
就像听懂了你的话般，亡语蝶们果然开始散去……
As if understanding your words, the Eulogistic Butterflies begin to disperse...
This is fine as it is.
这里是那些亡语蝶休息的地方。如果在这里说些什么的话，它们一定可以听清。
This is where those Eulogistic Butterflies rest. If you say something here, they will surely hear it clearly.
Stop sleeping. Get up and fly!
就像听懂了你的话般，亡语蝶们果然开始飞上天空……
As if understanding your words, the Eulogistic Butterflies begin to fly into the sky...
This is fine as it is.
角落里的阴影开始汇聚，呈现出…巴特鲁斯的模样。
The shadows in the corner begin to gather, taking the form of... Bartholos.
桀桀桀…没想到你居然能解开这又臭又长的古老谜题，真是不可小觑。
Hehehe... I didn't expect you to solve such a long and tedious ancient riddle. You're truly not to be underestimated.
既然如此，我便向你揭露这座古城内隐藏的房间吧。
In that case, I'll reveal the hidden room within this ancient city to you.
打了这么久交道，你还不明白吗？这天底下就没有我巴特鲁斯钻不了的缝！
After all this time, you still don't understand? There's no crack in the world that Bartholos can't slip through!
你不会是预言请来的托吧？
You're not a plant hired by the prophecy, are you?
预言？什么预言？扎格列斯老祖想去哪儿就去哪儿，从来不被预言束缚，我也一样！
Prophecy? What prophecy? Old Zagreus goes wherever they please, never bound by prophecies. I'm the same!
桀桀桀，没见过吧？有一座房间被人藏在了「岁月」的水面之下，是我最先发现的。我称之为「聪明绝顶的巴特鲁斯发现的隐藏房间」。
Hehehe, never seen one before? There's a room hidden beneath the surface of "time," and I was the first to discover it. I call it "The Hidden Room Discovered by the Brilliant Bartholos."
不要问我为什么能做到——「诡计」的神偷甚至可以把你兜里的钱替换成破瓦片，只需要擦肩而过的一瞬，并且保准不露馅！
Don't ask me how I did it — the divine thief of Trickery can even replace the money in your pocket with a shard of pottery in the blink of an eye, without you ever noticing!
要是哪天刻法勒的火种被人偷走了，元老院还像群鸵鸟一样后知后觉，我也完全不意外。
If one day the flame of Kephale is stolen, and the Council of Elders remains oblivious like a bunch of ostriches, I wouldn't be surprised at all.
…嘛咪嘛咪哄！好了，我已经帮你拨开了帷幕，快去见识见识吧。
...Eeny, meeny, miny, moe! Alright, I've pulled back the curtain for you. Go and take a look.
吼吼，你要进入「聪明绝顶的巴特鲁斯发现的隐藏房间」吗？
Hoho, are you going to enter "The Hidden Room Discovered by the Brilliant Bartholos"?
…嘛咪嘛咪哄！好了，我已经帮你拨开了帷幕，快去见识见识吧。
...Eeny, meeny, miny, moe! Alright, I've pulled back the curtain for you. Go and take a look.
How did you manage to find it?
{F#丫头}{M#小子}，不要小看了贼神的力量——「诡计」的神偷甚至可以把你兜里的钱替换成破瓦片，只需要擦肩而过的一瞬，并且保准不露馅！

{F#Lass}{M#Boy}, don't underestimate the power of the Thief God —the divine thief of Trickery can even replace the money in your pocket with a shard of pottery in the blink of an eye, without you ever noticing!
要是哪天刻法勒的火种被人偷走了，元老院还像群鸵鸟一样后知后觉，我也完全不意外。
If one day the flame of Kephale is stolen, and the Council of Elders remains oblivious like a bunch of ostriches, I wouldn't be surprised at all.
Alright then. Go play somewhere else.
哟哟，你要离开「聪明绝顶的巴特鲁斯发现的隐藏房间」吗？
Yo yo, are you leaving "The Hidden Room Discovered by the Brilliant Bartholos"?
桀桀桀…不知道。我是「贼灵」巴特鲁斯，不是「侦探」巴特鲁斯。
Hehehe... I don't know. I'm "Spirithief" Bartholos, not "Detective" Bartholos.
不过要我猜的话，这里可能是斯缇科西亚覆灭前的房间，被人用某种方式保留至今。
But if I had to guess, this might be a room from before the fall of Styxia, preserved by some means until now.
我从来没见过美丽的斯缇科西亚。它变成这幅破烂模样的时候，我还没出生呢。
I've never seen the beautiful Styxia. It was already in ruins by the time I was born.
Alright then. Go play somewhere else.
I'm the only one guarding the door.
我也想和它们一起飞翔~
I long to soar with them as well~
This must be someone's deepest wish.
I have arrived at the end of my pilgrimage...
这只若虫趴在散发着神圣气息的圆台上，似乎在祭拜——又或是在打碟。
The nymph rests upon a sacred, glowing pedestal, as if in worship — or perhaps it's spinning some tracks.
我记得那只若虫唱过一段旋律…好像不是这个顺序？
I remember this nymph once sang a melody... though it doesn't seem to be in this order?
「Mi」…好像听到了什么声音，是乐声？
"Mi"... I think I hear something... is that music?
「Re」…我似乎在哪里听过这旋律，它应该是第二个音。
"Re"... I feel like I've heard this tune before, it should be the second note.
「Do」…这应该是第三个音。难道只有我能听见吗？
"Do"... this must be the third note. Am I the only one who can hear it?
「Mi」…这应该是第四个音。到底是什么旋律？
"Mi"... this is likely the fourth note. What melody is this?
"Re"... this should be the final note.
On my back rests the entire world...
这只虫托举着一个石球，仿佛在扮演「负世」的刻法勒。只要稍微不小心，这球就可能从它身上滚落……
This little creature bears a stone ball, playing the part of the "Burden of the World" Kephale. One slip, and the sphere could fall...
"The first to disappear were his hands that worked tirelessly"...
"Then, his legs that measured the earth"...
"Until his torso that had held his body together shattered..."
「他的头颅仍在呢喃」。这应该就是谜题的答案？
"His head continued to murmur." Is this the puzzle's answer?
总感觉哪里有问题…好像不是这个顺序？
Something's wrong... Is this the correct order?
The path I was meant to take has already been walked...
How I long for the sunlight to never fade...
请允许我占用一点时间…
Please, allow me a moment of your time...
介绍伟大的天父刻法勒…
Let me introduce the mighty Sky Father Kephale...
若虫们的鸣叫声连成一片，仿佛夏日池塘中的青蛙——可惜翁法罗斯没有青蛙。
The chirping of the nymphs fills the air, blending together like the croaking of frogs in a summer pond — if only Amphoreus had frogs.
当若虫们填满这片柜台时，会有什么事情发生呢？
What will happen when the nymphs fill this counter?
我看到许多人往前去了嗡！持剑的卫兵，运送军备的公民…他们神色匆匆，有的身上还带着伤痕……
I saw so many people heading forward! Sword-wielding guards, civilians hauling supplies... They were in a rush and some of them were even wounded...
这里原本有个穿着粗俗的大高个，听见号角呼喊就匆忙走了。或许无论陪伴多久，我们都还是要奔赴属于各自的方向吧……
There was a big, burly guy here, dressed uncouth. Took off the second he heard the horn. Maybe no matter how long we travel together, we all have our own paths to follow in the end...
希望那些黑潮怪物，不要弄脏他原本就很土气的衣裳啊。
Hope those black tide monsters don't mess up his already-scruffy clothes.
嗡~浴场突然空荡下来，静悄悄的，难道今天浴池被本蝶包场了吗？
Hmm~? The baths are suddenly empty and silent... Did I just get a private spa day?
可是，总感觉有些孤独嗡……
But... why does it feel so lonely?
咕嘟咕嘟，头好晕，意识远去了，思绪模糊了，烦恼和忧愁也都通通融化了……
Bloop bloop... My head's spinning, my thoughts drifting, my worries and sorrows melting away...
是不是这样，白昼的快乐时光就能一直继续下去嗡？
If I keep this up, will the happy moments of the day last forever?
你也想喝嗡？那可不行，你不能在这里耽搁，你可是肩负使命的英雄……
You wanna drink too? No can do. You've got a hero's duty to fulfill.
啊——是啊！我也肩负着我家太太交付给我的使命呢。必须得启程了嗡！
Ah, right! I have a mission from my dear wife too. Time to get moving!
奇怪，怎么完全不觉得热呢？我明白了——一定是我的耐热训练终于见成效了嗡！
Weird... why don't I feel the heat? Oh, I know — it's proof my heat resistance training finally worked!
你说什么？是因为火炬已经熄灭了…？那种话本蝶听不懂啦。
What did you say? It's because the torch has been extinguished...? Nah, I don't know what you're talking about.
嗡嗡…天怎么阴沉下来了嗡，那些会偷偷闲聊，会互相蹭脸颊的大地兽们都去哪儿了嗡？
Grumph... Why's the sky turning gloomy? And where'd all the dromas go — the ones who used to rub each other's faces?
不行，不能哭。我已经是一只成熟的蝶了，我要像红土一样坚强嗡。
No, I can't cry. I'm a mature butterfly now. I'll be strong, like redsoil.
万物本是一，一生二，二生三；太阳为父，月亮为母；父母在，不远游……
All things are one, from which comes two, which splits into three. The sun is the father, the moon the mother. Wander not from filial duty...
世界能在转瞬间崩塌，但真理将继续长存嗡~
The world can crumble in an instant, but the truth will always endure~
别、别吃我，本蝶还很年轻，还有很多梦想没有实现…唔，原来你不是黑潮怪物！真是吓死蝶了！
N—No, don't eat me! I'm still young, with so many dreams left to chase! Oh... you're not a black tide monster? You nearly scared me to death!
记住，以后别再穿一身黑了嗡！
Listen, don't ever wear all black again!
迷糊姐姐的圣兽真的很抢手嗡。刚才大家逃难的时候，第一时间想到的竟然是把柜子上的小海豹们一起带走……
Miss Daze's divine beast is really popular. Even during the chaos of the evacuation, the first thing people thought of was to grab those little seals from the shelves...
也难怪啦，没有可爱的东西相伴，我们怎么能在这个世界上活下去嗡？
Can't blame them. How could we survive in this world without something cute to hold onto?
昔日簇拥在太太身前的先辈们，看到我们一次次竭尽全力，最终却只能换回虚无缥缈的未来，会作何感想呢？
The elders who once stood before the lady... if they saw us fighting with all our might, only to exchange it for an empty and bleak future, what would they think?
如果你们能说话，真想好好问问你们嗡……
If only you could speak, I have so many questions for you...
我一步一步，跨过浓浓的黑暗、孤独和寒冷，终于抵达了巅峰——现在，我谁都不放在眼里了！
Step by step, I climbed through darkness, loneliness, and cold. Finally, I reached the peak — And now? No one else matters to me!
因为这里根本就没有人了嗡。
Because there's no one left here.
黑潮来势汹涌，家人们都被冲散了，不知何时才能再度相见……
The black tide came crashing in, scattering my family far and wide. Who knows when we'll see each other again...
不过我一点也不怕！衣匠姐姐手里的剑，会保护蝶和其他若虫们的…对吧？
But I'm not afraid at all! Miss Garmentmaker's sword will protect me and the other little nymphs... right?
刚才在这儿讲课的讲师，压根不懂黄金时代的历史嗡。
The lecturers speaking here earlier didn't know a thing about the Golden Age.
要是他们真的懂，就会明白现在逃跑也无济于事了嗡……
Otherwise, they'd know running away now won't change anything...
你也是来听水漫琴的嗡？他们都忙着逃跑，除了你和我，似乎没有人愿意停留了嗡……
You're here for the water lyre too? Everyone else is too busy fleeing... Seems like it's just you and me who are willing to stay...
真是不解风情呀，欣赏这样一场绝唱的机会，我愿意用生命交换嗡。
Such a lack of appreciation... I'd trade my life for the chance to witness an unprecedented performance like this.
紧张刺激的逃亡时刻，没有灯照明前路怎么能行？就让本蝶来当此重任吧！
How can we escape in this thrilling moment without lights illuminating the way forward? Leave that to me!
这样才算一场完美的逃生之旅嗡~
Now this is what I call a perfect escape!
Zzz…唔，不小心打了个盹…我睡了多久？
Zzz... Huh? Dozed off for a sec... How long was I out?
嗯嗯？什么叫「新的纷争半神回到了他忠实的悬锋城」「树庭贤人在公民大会激昂陈词」「黄金裔即将揭开再创世的新篇」？！

Wait, what? The new demigod of Strife has returned to his loyal Castrum Kremnos!? The Sage of the Grove delivered a rousing speech at the citizens' assembly!? Chrysos Heirs are about to unveil the next chapter of Era Nova!?
Just how many episodes did I miss!?
原本我有个更叛逆的名字，但之前我比较怂，一直没敢说出来…事已至此，也没什么好害羞的了——
I used to have a much more rebellious name, but I was too much of a coward to say it out loud... Now at this point, there's nothing to be shy about—
你把第一个字去了看看。
唉，参天大树耗费多少年月才长出这样的枝桠，难道就要这样毁于一旦吗……
*sigh* How many years did it take for that towering tree to grow those branches... And now, it's all about to be destroyed...
真怀念我们的大大…如果它还在，一定能想出办法嗡。
I miss our boss... If it were still here, it would've come up with a solution, for sure.
是不是觉得我能穿墙很奇怪？是不是已经想要打开石板上的问题反馈面板？且慢！
You think it's weird that I can phase through walls? You're already reaching for the bug report panel on the slate, aren't you? Hold it right there!
你要记住，先别管记住什么但你记住——在这个世界里，是什么都可以发生的嗡！
You must remember this, it doesn't matter if you can't remember anything else. In this world, anything can happen!
嗡嗡，有对情侣之前老在这说着天长地久的誓言，本蝶都快听腻了。
Hmph... There used to be a couple here, always whispering vows of eternal love. I heard them so much that I was sick of it.
在这末世里，他们会共渡患难，还是大难临头各自飞呢？真想一探究竟嗡！
Now at doomsday, will they stick together through thick and thin... or flee in different directions when disaster strikes? I'd love to find out!
或许，这也是一种职业病吧……
Maybe that's just my occupational habit...
Heh, think you can catch me?
幽邃的黑夜里能有一盏篝火驱散寒冷，是多么一件幸福的事啊…让人想要把那火光紧紧抱在怀里，融进自己的身体里嗡……
In the deep, dark night, what a blessing it is, to have a bonfire to chase the cold away... Makes you want to hold onto that flame, press it close, let it melt into you...
现在你们懂得我们不顾一切也要扑向火光的心情了吧！
Now you understand what it feels like to be a moth to the flame!
人，你现在一定很迷茫，很痛苦吧…蝶…帮不了你。
Human, you must be lost and in pain right now... But I... I can't help you.
但你一定有那样的时刻，在你的童年时光，在旅途中，或者只是再普通不过的一瞬间，某一句话、某一道风景、某一个笑颜，让你觉得自己依然能够活下去。
But there must have been a moment — whether in your childhood, during your travels, or just an ordinary instant — when a word, a scene, or a smile made you feel like you could keep going.
想想那一刻吧，但愿它能为你带来一些安慰……
Think of that moment. May it bring you a little comfort...
好惊险，刚才脚下的拱环忽然变成了蓝色的虚影，害得本蝶差点摔下山崖嗡！
That was close! The arch under my feet suddenly turned into a blue phantom, and I almost tumbled off the cliff!
看得见碰不着，飞到里头也没有特别的感觉，好奇怪的玩意嗡……
One can see it, but can't touch it. Even flying through it feels like nothing special. What a strange thing...
我是响应吾主呼唤的骑士，寻觅着足以破除愚昧迷雾、阐明万物运行的真理…可邪祟的势力太过猖狂，连我也不得不暂避锋芒嗡！

I am the knight summoned by my master, seeking the truth that dispels the fog of ignorance and reveals the workings of all things... But the forces of fiendlings are too rampant, and even I must momentarily retreat!
无礼，这种危急关头，你竟不遵守骑士礼仪，偷袭了我心爱的坐骑！
How rude! At such a critical moment, you disregarded knightly etiquette and ambushed my beloved steed!
但是无妨——我将秉承吾主的意志，和邪祟势力战斗到底嗡！
But it doesn't matter — I shall uphold my master's will and fight against the forces of fiendlings to the very end!
水手，你还未曾见过这样的惊涛骇浪吧？
Sailor, have you ever seen waves like these before?
乌云像山峰一样倾倒，狂风要把长帆撕破。四周只有无边无际的黑暗，你感觉整个世界都把你抛弃了，简直不知道往何处去……

The storm clouds topple like mountains, the raging winds threaten to tear the sails apart. Nothing but boundless darkness surrounds you, and it feels as if the whole world has abandoned you. You have no idea where to go...
扯足帆，左满舵。打起精神来水手，别让桅杆碰着你的头——我们要迎向那浪潮！
Full sail, hard to port! Chin up, sailor, and mind your head — we're heading straight into the waves!
因为怕痛就全点了速度！现在我的战绩是，躲过了十颗陨石，甩掉了二十只怪物！
I maxed out my speed because I hate pain! So far, I've dodged ten meteors and shaken off twenty monsters!
可是…速度再快，又怎么能逃得过命运呢……
But... no matter how fast I am, can I really outrun fate...?
勇士啊，恭喜你顺利征讨了多目的盲者啾！我也该回去报告这个喜讯了啾！
