Warrior, congratulations on defeating the many-eyed blind one! Tweet! I should return and report this joyous news, tweet!
嗡嗡，多少个日日夜夜我在这里虔诚祈祷，许愿黎明能够永远继续。现在看来，根本没有用！
I've prayed devoutly here for countless days and nights, wishing that dawn would last forever. And now... it turns out it was all for nothing!
看来要创造若虫的幸福，只能靠我们自己嗡……
Looks like if we want happiness for nymphs, we'll have to rely on ourselves...
命运如同吾主大大的绳结，又像吾主太太的丝线，它们缠绕编织，勾画出我们一生的脉络。
Fate is like the knot tied by my master, or the thread spun by my lady. They entwine and weave to illustrate the paths of our lives.
现在它们牵引着我们，来到了最后的结局。
And now, they pull us toward the final conclusion.
啊，原来，世界要迎来它的尽头了。
Ah, so this is it — the end of the world.
为了证明自己能逆流而上，我这一生都在这条小小的瀑布里挣扎。现在看来，我错过了多少鲜花、多少蜜汁啊。
To prove I could swim against the current, I spent my whole life struggling in this tiny waterfall. Now I wonder how many flowers I've missed and how much nectar I've overlooked.
穷极一生和流水较劲，这一切的一切，真的有意义吗……
A lifetime spent fighting the current... Was it really worth it?
Just in the nick of time...
It's all part of the fate's design...
怎么，我挡着你看风景了吗，稍等一下，我马上就飞走了。
What? Am I blocking your view? Just a moment. I'm about to fly away.
不知道，我也不知道自己要去往何方，干脆我就这样去往彼岸吧。
No idea. I don't even know where I want to fly toward. So, why not just fly to the other shore?
You can go ahead and fly away now.
果然我天生就遭人嫌弃，你别催了，我马上就离开，永远地离开。
Just like I thought, I naturally cause people to dislike me. Don't rush me. I'll leave right away. I'll leave forever.
对不起，给你造成麻烦了。不过你放心，很快我就不会再说话了。
Sorry to disturb you, but don't worry. Soon, I won't be able to speak again.
我要从这里飞下去自毁，告别我短暂的鸟生，请你不要来劝我了，我心意已决。
I plan to fly down from here and end my existence. I will say goodbye to my short avian existence. Don't try to deter me. I've already made up my mind.
…请你千万不要模仿，千万不要，我可不想对陌生人负责。
...Please do not attempt to imitate me under any circumstances. Just don't do it. I do not want to bear the responsibility for a stranger's life.
怎么，你还想再劝我两句？
What? Are you still trying to talk me out of it?
心事藏不住啊，看来你是一个关心我的人。好吧，我就再陪你聊几句。
You can't hide your feelings. I can tell you are someone who cares about me. Fine. I will take some time to talk with you.
你不是说不要劝你了吗？
Didn't you say you refused to let me change your mind?
我说不要劝，你就真的不劝，你愿意把我的话听进去，我很感动。
I asked for you not to dissuade me, and you did just that. You take my words so seriously. I'm very grateful.
就凭这份交情，我就再陪你聊几句。
I will talk with you for a moment out of respect for our friendship.
Don't think yourself into a corner.
哎，你说的对，我这小小内存不够去想那些复杂的事情。
Ah, you're right. I have far too little RAM to understand such complex matters.
你是个好心人，我愿意陪你再聊几句。
You are a kind person. I'm willing to talk with you for a moment more.
其实我已经尝试自毁很多回了，但是我每次从港口掉下去一定深度，名叫「鹤运物流安全系统」就会自动接管我的运动组件。

I've actually tried to self-destruct on many occasions, but every time I plunge to a certain depth in the port, something called the Heron Express Safety System will automatically take over my movement components.
And then I fly back up here.
身体根本不由我自己作主，我连自毁都做不到，做鸟还有什么意思呢？你说，你们人类如果总是身不由己，你会不会对生活感到失望？

Without any bodily autonomy, I can't even decide when I can end this life. Is there any meaning to living such life as a bird? What would you say? If you humans had no autonomy over your own bodies, wouldn't you feel hopeless about life?
Indeed, the same is true with humans. How much truer could it be for birds?
看起来你并不是一个特别的人，我也不是一只特别的鸟，生活应该允许我们感到悲伤。
You don't seem like someone that special, and neither am I a special bird. We should be able to feel sadness.
I would rise up in resistance.
反抗？这说明你很了不起，将来…不，现在你可能就是个大人物。
Resistance? This shows that you are incredible. In the future, you will become... No, you are probably a great person right now.
我很了解我自己，我只是一只忧伤的小小鸟，想飞都飞不了太高。
I understand myself. I'm but a little, tiny, minuscule bird bogged down with sorrow, one who wishes flight yet is altitudinally challenged.
我这样的鸟就不应该和生活硬碰硬，应该和生活达成和解。
A bird such as myself shouldn't confront life head-on. I should come to terms with life.
If you are accustomed to something, you won't be disappointed.
这你还能习惯？你简直是比我还消极。听鸟一句劝，千万不可以习惯。
Can one get accustomed to this? You're the more pessimistic one, if you ask me. Hear a bird out. You can never allow yourself to grow accustomed to this.
要始终对生活保持好奇与热情！
You must always maintain a curiosity and a passion for life!
…听上去都不像是一只忧郁的机巧鸟应该说出的话了。
...That doesn't sound like something a depressed cycrane would say.
跟你聊了几句，我觉得豁然开朗。算了，我也不打算自毁了，就这样挺好。
After speaking with you, I feel as if I have been enlightened. Never mind. I no longer wish to end my existence. This life is good.
机巧鸟都像你这样能说会道吗？
Are all cycranes such gifted orators?
据我所知，不是的。鹤运物流的机巧鸟是用来运送快递的，赶路就挺忙的了，没有搭载闲聊功能的必要。

Not as far as I know. The cycranes of Heron Express are used for courier services. They are all busy rushing to their destinations. There is no need for cycranes to come equipped with a chat function.
Now that I think about it, how can I talk?
我只记得…突然我就能说会道了，我也不是很清楚。
All I remember is... suddenly I'm able to speak. I can't recall any specifics.
我现在还不知道你忧郁的理由。
I still don't know why you are depressed.
有一天，我突然意识到自己是一只物流机巧鸟。每天就是读取物流数据，将包裹送到仙舟各处，我认为这样的工作很没有美感。

One day, I suddenly became aware of the fact that I was a courier cycrane. Every day my tasks include reading logistics data and carrying packages throughout the Xianzhou. There was no aesthetics involved in work of this nature, I reckon.
几番考虑之后我决定裸辞，离开原本的生活轨迹。为了防止鹤运物流找上我，我还把追踪信号屏蔽了，以为这样做就已经自由了。

After giving it some thought, I decided to leave my job. I stepped off of my life path. To prevent Heron Express from finding me, I jammed my tracking beacon. I assumed that in doing so I would be free.
裸辞之后，我反而不知道自己应该干什么了。除了运送物流，我根本一无是处，于是我就忧郁了。
After leaving my job, I realized I didn't know what I should be doing. I knew nothing beyond making shipments. I became depressed.
你接下来打算做什么呢？
What do you plan to do now?
我现在打算回去再做做物流的工作，也许之前的生活也没有那么不堪。
I would go back to my courier job. Perhaps my former life was not so terrible.
给你一个建议，你去找鹤运物流的梓桥。报上我的名字…该死，我甚至没有一个名字。告诉她，是你劝说我回到工作岗位的，也许你还能获得一些什么奖励。

Allow me to give you a recommendation. Go and find Ziqiao who works at Heron Express. You can mention my name... Darn it, I don't even have a name. Tell her, you're the one who convinced me to return to my position. Perhaps you will receive some kind of reward.
我遇到了一只忧伤的机巧鸟。
I came across a depressed cycrane.
我知道你说了「一只忧伤的机巧鸟」，只是我没能理解这句话的意思。
I know you said, "a depressed cycrane," but I don't understand what you mean.
这下我听懂了，不过还是麻烦你仔细讲讲。
That I can understand, but I'll still trouble you to explain all of this to me in detail.
It's the same model as this cycrane.
嗯，仙舟上到处都能遇到，毕竟它们要送快递嘛…要不，你再讲讲「忧伤」是什么情况？
Uh-huh. You can see them all over Xianzhou. They handle deliveries... Why don't you tell me about what this "depressed" business is all about?
你尝试解释了你的遭遇，以及你是如何劝说那只生无可恋的机巧鸟回到鹤运物流。
You attempted to explain what you encountered as well as how you convinced this cycrane that had nothing left to live for to return to Heron Express.
随后，梓桥检查了物流机巧鸟的工作情况，发现你所说的一切属实——在那个时间点，有一只机巧鸟重新接回了物流系统。

After listening to your story, Ziqiao examined the work status of courier cycranes. She discovered that everything you said could be verified. At that moment, a cycrane got reconnected to the logistics system.
它真的能跟你对话？我不信。
Was it really able to speak with you? I can hardly believe it.
要警惕人工智能觉醒毁灭人类。
It's a warning of an AI awakening that will destroy mankind.
人工智能崛起？你该不会说的是「金人谋反」吧，那是我出生以前的事了。你放心，云骑军绝不应许这样的事情发生。
An AI uprising? You aren't talking about the "Aurumaton Rebellion," are you? That happened before I was born. Take it easy. The Cloud Knights would never let something like that happen.
再说，这机巧鸟态度消极，说不定毁灭人类之前，自己就先毁灭了。
Besides, who knows. This cycrane is so pessimistic, it might destroy itself before it ever destroys humanity.
可能是不愿意跟你说话吧。
Or maybe it isn't willing to speak with you.
…我可没少对机巧鸟说话呀，按道理来说，它也应该对我敞开心扉。
...I often speak with cycranes. Logically, they are completely open to me.
会不会是因为你缺乏魅力？
Is it because you lack charm?
不，我从小就受人追捧，非要说魅力的话，我和你是平分秋色。
I can't be. I have been popular with people since I was young. When it comes to having charm, we would be well-matched with each other.
没有人会对自己的老板敞开心扉。
No one would be so open with their own boss.
我可不是什么老板，非要说的话，我和这些物流机巧鸟应该是同事关系。
I'm not some boss. If I have to say it, these courier cycranes and I are more like coworkers.
有没有可能是你不知道呢？
Is it possible that you just don't know?
…我可没少对机巧鸟说话呀，要是能聊天，它们早就跟我聊起来了。
...I talk with cycranes frequently. If they could talk, they would have talked to me by now.
说到底，我们根本没有给物流机巧鸟搭载任何智能，硬件条件也不允许啊。也许是你幻听了？或者是有人假装是机巧鸟与你对话？

Besides, we never equipped these courier cycranes with any intelligence in the first place. The hardware components simply couldn't allow for it. Maybe you were just hearing things? Or perhaps someone was talking to you disguised as a cycrane?
你要不要再仔细查一查？
Do you want to look into it more closely?
你这么一说，可能真是我听错了。
The way you said that makes me wonder if I really misheard the entire thing.
不过为了保险起见，我还是再查一遍。
I'll look into it, just to be on the safe side.
你稍等，我再查一下…等等，不好了！
Wait a moment. I'll check... Hold on. This isn't good!
除了它，还有好几只机巧鸟也失去了联系…不会真的是什么机巧鸟大罢工了吧？
Aside from the cycrane you mentioned, we've lost connection with several other cycranes... This isn't some kind of cycrane labor strike, is it?
This must be the work of a competitor!
你是指友商想拆机，看看这物流机巧鸟的内部结构。
You were suggesting that a competitor wanted to dismantle the courier cycranes and see their internal structure.
…结果还做出了能说会道的版本，这不是比鹤运物流的技术部门好太多了吗？
...Then they went a step further and made a version that could speak. Isn't that a technical skill that's better than the Technology Division of Heron Express?
能够变形的金属生命体干的！
It was the work of a metal life form that could transform!
「岁阳之祸」的岁阳也是生命体，当初也是它们也占领了金人的身体…你这样的担心也有一定的道理。
The heliobi of the Heliobi Disaster were also life forms back then, and they were the ones that possessed the aurumatons' bodies... Your concerns did have some merit.
不过，既然能够附身的话，为什么不变成更酷的东西呢？
However, if they are able to possess robotic bodies, then why not become something more ruthless?
比如说星槎，「星槎人——随时变形状——」，我觉得那还要更厉害一些……
For example, a starskiff. A starskiff that could transform at will would have been far more impressive...
你们的客户都不是什么善茬。
你是说可能是我们的客户擅自改造了机巧鸟…罗浮仙舟上怪人很多，说不定真的有人生了什么大病、搞出这些破事……

You're saying that one of our customers might have made unauthorized modifications to the cycranes? There are loads of weird people on the Xianzhou Luofu. It's possible that someone went off the deep end and wanted to stir some trouble...
这样吧，我能拜托你帮我留个神吗？如果你在哪里又遇到了这些「有故障的机巧鸟」，请帮我把它们带回来，可以吗？
If that's the case, can I have you keep an eye out for me? If you come across any "malfunctioning cycranes," please bring them back. Is that OK?
我是为了领奖励才来找你的。
I came to find you because I wanted a reward.
我可没准备什么奖励啊…你要是早点说的话，也许能准备点什么。
I haven't prepared any reward to give you... I might have been able to get something together if you said something earlier.
…那个，要是不嫌弃的话，我请你一杯仙人快乐茶？
...Well. If you don't mind, I can treat you to a glass of Immortal's Delight.
我也是才知道有这么一件事儿，哪有什么线索啊…我还得抽时间查一下。
I've only just learned of this issue. How would I have any leads? I need to find time to investigate the matter.
过段时间你再来问我吧。
Talk to me a little later.
太好了，这样吧，我这里还有一杯没开封的仙人快乐茶，就先送给你了。
Great. I have a glass of unopened Immortal's Delight. I'll give it to you.
嘿嘿嘿，路过的{F#小美女}{M#小帅哥}，停一下，停一下。
别走过头了，爷在这儿呢，嘻嘻。
Don't walk too far. I'm right here. Hehe.
一只鹤运物流的机巧鸟眯起眼地盯着你，似乎带着某种危险的引诱。
A cycrane from Heron Express squints its eyes at you with a gaze that seems to lure you with an air of danger.
你本不想使用「猥琐」这种词汇描述来形容一只无辜的机巧鸟，但是，你的直觉告诉你，在这只鸟眼中流转着的毫无疑问就是某种欲望——
You don't want to use a word like "obscene" to describe this innocent cycrane, but your intuition tells you that the eyes of this cycrane are without a doubt swimming in a certain kind of craving.
抛开世俗的常识与规则，机巧鸟也会和人类一样，需要用礼教的束缚来遮掩内心的燥动与不可告人的思绪吗？想到这里，你不禁{F#背后一寒}{M#虎躯一震}。

If you're to toss out worldly common sense and rules, you can see how cycranes and people are the same. They require the restrictions of ethics to cover the stirrings of their hearts and the thoughts they can't tell others. As you think about it, you can't help but {F#feel a chill down your spine}{M#shudder in shock}.
也许这只是一个误会，但你不禁先入为主。随后你意识到你应该抛下这样无来由的成见，与它光明磊落地进行一次谈话。
Maybe it's just a misunderstanding, but first impression is the strongest. You then realize you should drop this kind of baseless prejudice and talk with the cycrane candidly.
现在，就正义凛然地盯着它好了。
Now the right thing to do is fix your eyes on it with dignity and honor.
你干嘛瞪着我！虽说爷平易近人天生丽质，但是被你这样一直盯着，难免还是有点羞涩，你呀…居心不良。
What's the big idea staring at me? Sure, I'm approachable and naturally pleasing to the eye, but your staring has me feeling a bit shy. You... are up to no good.
我一句话都还没有说呢…
I haven't even said anything yet...
哎哟哟哟。你有什么心思，我会不明白吗？你跟我都不是什么好鸟……
Hey now. What's on your mind? Think I won't understand? You and I are bad birds of a feather...
是你一直不怀好意地盯着我。
You were the one who kept giving me that nasty look.
哎呦呦呦，你这有机生物怎么这么呆板？我这能是不怀好意？我这明明满含爱意。
Ah, come on. How can an organic like you could be so dense? How could I be giving you a nasty look? I'm nothing but love over here.
哎，有机生物真下头，所以说，有机生物还是不行。
Geez, organic life forms are so lowly. That's why you organics can't cut it.
嘻嘻，爷会说话就让你这么兴奋吗，还会说酸溜溜的情话，你要不要听？
Hehe. Does my ability to talk get you that excited? I can also tell some bitter love stories. Want to hear them?
怎么？听到我这么厉害就兴奋了？来，给爷笑一个。
What's up? Are you getting excited after hearing how amazing I am? Come on. Give me a smile.
跟机巧鸟讲话真没意思。
There's really no point in talking to a cycrane.
我知道你是什么意思，你还是认为我和一个会发声的木偶没有差别。
I know what you mean. You think there's no difference between me and a talking puppet.
哎呀呀，有机物还是太狭隘了。不过，我也不怪你，谁让我是一只善解人意的机巧鸟呢。
Geez, organics are so narrow-minded. But, hey, I don't blame you. Who has made me into such an understanding cycrane?
Let's hear some cheesy pick-up lines.
唔，我感觉你在期待我做什么「小丑表演」…我可不干，你只是把我当作一个会讲段子的木偶而已。
Oh, I feel like you are expecting some kind of clown show. Not my thing. You are treating me like a puppet that tells little stories.
你要记住，在真挚而公平的感情之中，没有一句情话是土味情话。
You better remember that in sincere and fair emotions, there are no cheesy words of love.
Ziqiao sent me to get you back.
你怎么这么扫兴！我俩独处的时候，你这双眼睛…还有这张嘴，都只属于我。
You are such a bummer! While the two of us are alone, your eyes... and your mouth belong to me.
She is waiting for you to return.
嘻嘻，我就知道她心里有我。
Hehe. I knew she still longed for me.
其实你回不回去，我无所谓。
I don't really care if you go back or not.
哎，多么嘴硬的一个人，嘴上说着无所谓，心里却在着急。
Ah, sharp words. Your words say you don't care, but your heart is frantic.
看，把你急坏了吧，嘻嘻，我正打算回去了。
See. I've got you all worked up. Hehe. I'm just planning on heading back.
但是让爷就这样灰溜溜地回去，那可不行。
That said, making me head back in such a glum mood is not OK.
自从我获得了共情能力，知晓了爱人和被爱的感受，我就决定要忠诚于自己的欲望！
Since I gained the ability to empathize, I've come to understand what loving others and being loved feel like. I decide to be loyal to my own desires!
我不要再当一只无趣的机巧鸟，我想爱人，我也想被爱！我要很多很多的爱，懂吗！
I no longer wish to be a boring cycrane. I wish to love and be loved! I long for so much love. Do you understand!?
这是最后一件事，如果你帮我完成了，我就回到鹤运物流，这样如何？
Here's the last thing. If you help me with this, I'll go back to Heron Express. How about that?
成交！但是你要做什么事呢？
Deal! What do you want me to do?
太好了，知我心者，莫若君也。
Excellent. Who knows my heart better than your respectable self?
我要找一份被海关扣押的画册，小机巧鸟不能看的那种！嘿嘿嘿……
I want a photo book that has been seized by customs. Something that a little cycrane can't look at! Hehehe...
这时你不禁回想起这只机巧鸟带给你的第一印象，它眼里所闪耀的，确实是「欲望」的本源——
You couldn't help but recall the first impression this cycrane gave you. There was a sparkle in its eyes. That's the source of desire.
哪有这么多破事儿，不帮。
What's all this nonsense? I'll pass.
你听我说完，这件事儿对你也有好处。
Hear me out. This will benefit you, too.
我要找一份被海关扣押的画册，小机巧鸟不能看的那种！事成之后，你也有份，嘻嘻嘻。
I want a photo book that has been seized by customs. Something that a cycrane can't look at! After you get it, you can have a copy, too. Hehehe.
这时你不禁回想起这只机巧鸟带给你的第一印象，它眼里所闪耀的，确实是「欲望」的本源——
You couldn't help but recall the first impression this cycrane gave you. There was a sparkle in its eyes. That's the source of desire.
前段时间，天舶司将一批禁止进入海关的画册扣押在流云渡了。我实在不能接受如此美妙的精神食粮变成太空垃圾，幸好我在这里叫住了你。

A while ago at Cloudford, the Sky-Faring Commission seized some banned photo books from going through customs. I cannot bear the thought of such splendid nourishment for the soul becoming space trash. Thankfully, I managed to catch your attention.
我知道它们放在哪里，所以我会将你带过去。但是我没法打开集装箱，就只能全靠你了，我们能抢救多少抢救多少！
I know where they're holding the photo books, so I can take you there, but I can't open the containers. That'll be up to you. Let's save as many of those books as we can!
快出发吧，可不能浪费了！
Let's go. We can't let the photo books go to waste!
天舶司已经扣押了，这不好吧…
The Sky-Faring Commission has already seized them. That's not good...
哎呀，出了事儿我担着，别担心了，画册要紧。
Come on. If anything happens, I'll take care of it. Don't worry. The photo books are more important.
事不宜迟，我们现在就出发吧。
We can't delay a moment longer. We need to go now.
爷带你去看点儿好看的…
I'll take you to see something good...
就是这里，就是这里。我帮你放风，你来把这集装箱撬开。
This is the place. Here. I'll be on the look out. You'll go and pry open the container.
机巧鸟飞到领域上空，帮你确认了此处四周无人靠近。你缓缓地吐出一口气，现在正是动手的好时机。
The cycrane flies up into the air to help confirm that there isn't anyone nearby. You slowly exhale. Now's your chance.
凭借一些力量和技巧，你成功制服了集装箱，并将扣押其中的画册拯救了出来。这是一次成功的营救行动。
With a little strength and skill, you successfully break open the container and save the seized photo books stored within. It's a successful rescue mission.
这画册真的太刺激啦！噢，这纸页…这配色…还有这页数！实在太多了！我也太幸福了吧！我可以一整天都看这个！一整天！
This photo book is really too exciting! Oh! This paper... The color... And the number of pages! It's too much! I'm way too lucky! I could read this all day! All day long!
这…这就是…我感觉…啊，仙舟，在我的头顶上飘荡…我看见了…宇宙！
This... This is... I feel... Ah, Xianzhou. It's floating above my head... I see... the universe!
你看这页，这颗齿轮，这玩意在哪儿能搞到？我真想整几颗玩玩！当然，我会温柔的…嘿嘿，真想狠狠地把这颗齿轮扣在链条上！

Look at this page. This gear. How can I get some of it? I really want to get a couple of gears to have fun with! Of course, I would be gentle... Hehe. I really want to fasten that gear onto the chain so fiercely.
还有这页…这根轴承，好强壮，好有力量！这是什么材质的…新研发的合金，天啊，要是能给我用上，我飞起来一定会发出吓人的嘎吱声吧！
And this page... This bearing is so strong. It has serious power! What is it made of... A newly developed alloy? Gosh! If I could use that, I would have such a shocking creak when I fly!
星际和平公司的精密机械设计图…好像是涉嫌博识学会的技术保护条例什么的，我才不管这么多呢…走吧，走吧，我们赶紧开溜。

It's a collection of designs for Interastral Peace Corporation's precision machines. It's suspected to have something to do with the Intelligentsia Guild's technology protection regulation, or whatever. I don't care about all that stuff... Let's go, let's go. We better scram.
你的喜好真的好奇怪哦。
You've got strange tastes, that's for sure.
在真正的美感面前，就算是你是一块废铁，你也该开窍了…不过现在不是长篇大论的时候，走吧，走吧，我们赶紧开溜。
In the face of true beauty, even a hunk of scrap iron like you must be enlightened... But this isn't the time for pontificating. Let's go, let's go. We better scram.
这就是小机巧鸟不能看的？
This is what a cycrane can't look at?
你说呢，这小机巧鸟能把持得住吗？
You tell me. Can this little cycrane hold on?
I'm not a cycrane. I don't know.
先别纠结这些事儿啦，走吧，走吧，我们赶紧开溜。
Don't get so hung up on that stuff. Let's go, let's go. We better scram.
你们在这里做什么，闲杂人等，不得靠近！
What are you doing here? Idlers are to stay away!
...The cycrane is behind it. This has nothing to do with me!
没错，都是我干的，快来追我！
Yes, I'm the mastermind. Come and get me!
那可不行，我必须带着它们离开！你快走！
Not possible. I have to take it with me. Get out of here!
在这一刻，你明白，你和这一只陌生的机巧鸟建立了一段颠扑不破的情谊。就在下一秒，你们即将分开，而且你很清楚云骑军迟早会追上它。
Now, you understand. You and this cycrane you just met forged an unbreakable bond. In just a moment, you will split up. You know all too well that the Cloud Knights will eventually catch the cycrane.
你也很清楚，在以后的日子里，无论你是否会遇见它，你都很难将它认出来，毕竟鹤运物流的机巧鸟长得都一样，这一别，可能是永别。

You also know that after all this, even if you do encounter this cycrane again, you won't be able to know that cycrane is the one you met, because all of the cycranes from Heron Express look exactly the same. When you part ways, it could be forever.
不过，你相信它肯定会信守承诺回到梓桥那里，不知道为什么，你心中如此确信着。再见了，绅士，请一定要飞得再快一些！
But, you believe that it will keep its promise to return to Ziqiao. You don't know why, but you trust this cycrane. Goodbye, gentleman. Fly faster!
在仙舟上随处可以看到鹤运物流的机巧鸟穿梭飞行的样子，你早已经将它当作仙舟的寻常风景。如果能买一个机巧鸟用作纪念，那么现在也许是个不错的时机。

You can find Heron Express' cycranes flying everywhere in Xianzhou. You have long since viewed these cycranes as part of Xianzhou's everyday landscape. If you want to buy a cycrane as memento, perhaps now would be the time.
杂货摊主货全还没有注意到你的购物动机，趁现在，好好看看这三只物流机巧鸟的成货质量。说不定跟货全讨价还价的时候，还能借此占据上风。

The grocery stall owner Salesby hasn't caught onto your motivation for making the purchase. You should take this opportunity to look closely at the ready-made quality of these three courier cycranes. Maybe you can use that to your advantage when haggling with Salesby.
购买文创小商品到底是不是交智商税，那还得看买的人有没有智商。
Whether buying small cultural and creative merchandise counts as paying a stupid tax depends on whether the buyer has any measure of intellect.
等等…有一只机巧鸟商品是在动的。
Wait... A cycrane product is moving.
是可动模型吗？你不太确定，要不要亲自上手摸摸看？
Is it a movable model? You aren't sure. Do you want to try and touch it?
你坚定了信念，既然你是顾客，为了检查商品，摸一摸也是自然而然的。
You are resolute. You are the customer. It's only natural that you would want to touch a product in order to inspect it.
——没想到，这只机巧鸟突然一激灵，恶狠狠地盯着你，没错，这只机巧鸟能动。
Unexpectedly, this cycrane suddenly quivers and squints at you menacingly. Yes... this little cycrane can move.
不摸了，再仔细看看就行。
Don't touch it, but take a good careful look.
你凑近了一些，以便能够观察到常人难以察觉到的机械震动。似乎是感受到来自你的压力——这只机巧鸟忍不住往后撤了一步，没错，这只机巧鸟能动。

You draw close enough to observe the mechanical hummings, which are usually imperceptible to passersby. It seems to feel some pressure coming from you — this cycrane cannot help but step back a pace. That's right — this little cycrane can move.
说真的，也许是你的错觉：这只机巧鸟目光如炬，就像是说「走开，这不关你的事儿」。
To be honest, maybe it's a delusion: This cycrane's penetrating gaze say, "Get lost. This is none of your business."
我偏要看看你是个什么怪东西。
I want to see what kind of a strange thing you are.
走开就走开，我最善解人意了。
Fine, I can get lost. I'm the most understanding person in the world.
都怪你这家伙，你干嘛非要盯着我看？我和货全老板的赌约就差这一个时辰了，你这出来得倒是轻巧，我却输掉了赌约。
This is all your fault. Why do you gotta stare at me like that, huh? Salesby here and I only have one dual-hour left on our bet. You come at me with a cheap trick like this that cost me a bet.
机巧鸟这厮说我这里生意不行，还说它如果假装成我这里的小商品，肯定三天都不会被人给认出来…它也太小看我的生意了，于是就有了这赌约。

The cycrane said my business here is so bad, and even if it masqueraded as a shop item here for three days, it wouldn't even be noticed by anyone... But he's underestimating me. So I took on that bet.
后来三天过去，我心想，坏了，不会真的没有人注意到吧。这个时候幸好您来了。
Three days passed and I thought, this is bad! Really? Nobody noticed? And that's just when you arrived.
都怪你多嘴，说不定这个{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}根本没有发现我是假装的，反倒是你输不起，急着要揭露我们之间的赌约。
It's all your fault. This {F#girl}{M#boy} wouldn't have even noticed me at all but you had to be a sore loser about it and spill the beans about the bet.
Ziqiao sent me to get you back.
啧，原来我能被你发现，就是因为你被人派来找我呀。那这局赌约不算，这个人根本不是为了买东西来找你的！
Tsk, the only reason you found me is because someone sent you to find me. This game doesn't count then, as this isn't a real paying customer!
嗨，不算就不算，我现在也算是搞清楚情况了，你让我跟你打赌，我也不干了。
Alright, it doesn't count then. I get it now, and I don't wanna take that bet anymore.
不打赌多没意思，这样吧，我们再来打一次赌，这次是和这位{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}。
It's boring unless we bet... I know, let's place another bet. This time I'll play with this {F#girl}{M#boy} here.
我要输了，我就回到梓桥那里，你要是输了，那就算货全老哥也输了，如何？
If I lose, I'll go back to Ziqiao. If you lose, then Salesby loses as well. How 'bout that?
我不同意！这和我有什么关系！
I am not okay! What's this got to do with me?
This works out nicely for me, so be it.
哼，那你是没有见过真正的赌王。
Hmm, then you've never seen a real gambling god before.
同意两票、不同意一票，赌约成立。嘿嘿，要是我还像过去一样做着物流工作，哪能像今天一样为自己命运买单呢。
Two for and one against — the bet's settled, then. Heehee, I'd never have control of my own destiny if I were still running around as a courier these days.
…我回过头来想了想，你能从机巧鸟周边里准确地找到我，那是因为你发现我会动，对吧？或者说，你真的以为我就是个周边？
...Giving it a second thought, you only found me among the cycrane merchandise because you noticed me moving, right? Or did you really think I was a piece of merchandise?
果然是这样，要是我这一个时辰能忍住不动，事情就截然不同了……
Ah, I see then. Things would be completely different right now if only I could've just held out right then...
结果你其实也不清楚吗？
到现在我也没搞明白自己哪里出了纰漏。
I still don't understand where I went wrong.
真没有发现，还以为你是周边。
No really. I thought you were a piece of merchandise.
原来是这样吗，那说明我从一开始就做出了错误的判断——竟然还真的有人想要买机巧鸟的周边。
Oh is that so? That means I made a mistake from the very beginning — there really is a market out there for cycrane merchandise.
看来是我低估了自己的魅力。
Looks like I underestimated my own charm.
...Actually I have no plan on buying it.
Is it very important to you?
你说的对，这确实不重要。
You're right. It's not very important.
我只是在感叹，要是我还像过去一样只是做着物流工作，肯定体会不到突如其来的变数，也不会有机会主宰自己的命运。
I'm just lamenting my past. If I were just a courier like before, I'd never have such diverse experiences, or get the chance to take control of my own fate.
因为看不清命运的形状，所以我才喜欢与人打赌。
I like betting with people precisely because I can't see the shape of fate.
要不，干脆就别回鹤运物流了。
How about you just don't go back to your job at Heron Express?
你还真以为自己能赌赢我吗？
Do you really think you can bet against me and win?
你可千万不要来可怜我，如果我输了，我会欣然接受！
Don't take pity on me. If I lose, I'll accept it with glee.
那我必须跟你认真对决了。
Then I'll have to take things seriously with you.
就是这个态度，我就喜欢和你这样认真的人对赌。
That's the right attitude. I've been looking for someone to take things seriously around here.
你可千万不要来敷衍我，如果我输了，我会欣然接受！
Don't even think about going easy on me. If I lose, I'll accept it with glee.
…这样吧，我给你出一道题，你要是答对了，我就算是你赢了；相反，你要是答错了，我就算是你赌输了，简单吧？
...Alright then, how about a quiz? There's just one question, and if you guess it right, then you win! But if you guess incorrectly, you lose. Simple, right?
Isn't it just a question at the end of the day?
题目也不简单，我听说很少有人能答得上来。
It's not a simple one, and hardly anyone can answer it.
不如我们来赌谁组枪快吧？
Let's bet on who can assemble a pistol faster?
我可没听说过这种规矩。再说了你跟一只机巧鸟比组枪，你看我有手吗？
I've never heard of such a rule. Besides, you're competing with a cycrane here at gun assembly. Do I look like I have any hands to you?
很简单，你来向我提问，<color=#dbc291ff>我可能只说真话、只说假话，或者说一句真话就会说一句假话。</color>
It's very simple. Just ask me questions. <color=#dbc291ff>I either can only tell the truth, can only tell lies, or must say a lie after a truth.</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>你只能提两次问题，提问结束之后，我就会向你询问答案。</color>只要你猜对了，我就算是你赌赢了。
<color=#dbc291ff>You can only ask two questions, and then I'll ask for your answer. </color>If you get it right, you win the bet.
你说一句真话一句假话吗？
Are you telling one truth and one lie?
你说一句真话一句假话吗？
Are you telling one truth and one lie?
在你眼中，我是男的还是女的？
In your ocular sensors, am I male or female?
怎么了，回答我的提问呀。
请问，我是男的还是女的？
Excuse me, am I male or female?
等等！{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}你这么问不对啊，你怎么可以问已经知道答案的问题呢？
Hang on! {F#Lady}{M#Dude}, you're asking the wrong question. How can you ask a question to which you already know the answer?
我怎么知道自己是男是女。
How would I know if I'm male or female?
原来你不知道啊…你以为我会相信吗？
So even you don't know... And you think I'll believe that?
行，是我失误了，你接着提第二个问题吧。
Alright, I made a mistake. Let's move on to the second question.
再问一次，我是男的还是女的？
Once more: Am I a boy or a girl?
说吧，刚才这只机巧鸟玩具到底是什么鸟？
Tell me, what kind of bird is that toy cycrane?
A cycrane that only tells truths.
A cycrane that only tells lies.
一句真话一句假话的鸟。
A cycrane that tells a truth then a lie.
你注意到这只不满的机巧鸟有些懊恼，它对于自己打赌失败早有预期，但是等到你准确的回答的一瞬，它就像一支从高处跌落的花瓶——放弃了。
You notice that this resentful cycrane is a little frustrated. It knew that it was going to lose the bet, but when you answered correctly, it looked unimaginably dejected.
但是很快，你又从它那造型蠢萌的眼神中觉察到了一丝解脱感。这只机巧鸟也许是获得智能时间并不长，但是你能感觉到它考虑了很久。

Soon, however, you noticed a sense of relief from the gaze it gives out in its cute, dumb eyes. This cycrane may not have been sentient for a very long time, but you can feel it's been thinking things over for a long time.
就好像一个长期困扰它的问题，就在此时得到了结果。你不太确定，你和它之间的赌约在这个疑惑中发挥了怎样的作用。
It's as if a problem that has plagued it for a long time has finally been resolved. You're not quite certain what role your bet has played under these confusing circumstances.
你不必非得回到鹤运物流。
You don't have to go back to Heron Express.
就算你打赌赢了一次，也不必这样高高在上嘛。
Even if you won the bet, you don't have to act so high-and-mighty.
我会回到鹤运物流，说到做到。
I'll go back to Heron Express. I'm a bird of my word.
看来是我赢了，你愿赌服输吗？
Looks like I won. You bet, you pay.
是你赢了没错，看来是我低估了一名「好事闲人」的实力。
You won, yes. Seems like I underestimated this "busybody."
我会回到鹤运物流，说到做到。
I'll go back to Heron Express. I'm a bird of my word.
我本来不打算告诉你的，实际上，在你来之前，我就在考虑要不要回到鹤运物流，一直很难下定决心…你算是顺水推舟了。
I wasn't planning on telling you, but before you came I was thinking about whether or not to go back to Heron Express. It's so hard to make up my mind... You're really just pushing things along.
自从获得自我意识之后，我将你们人类的娱乐方式地体验了一遭…不知道我是缺少生物激素、还是怎么的，我并不认为这些做法有多快乐。

Since becoming self-aware, I've had my experiences with the way you humans entertain yourselves... I don't know if I'm lacking the bioindicators for it or something, because that doesn't seem very fun to me.
暴饮暴食、与人打赌、或者欣赏戏曲…统统都没意思，但我已经不再想用你们人类的娱乐观念来规范自己了。
Pigging out, gambling, or attending a show... It's all a snorefest to me. I'm not going to bother using human concepts of entertainment to amuse myself any longer.
既然是赌输了…拿着吧，这是我给你的一点奖励，再见！
Seeing as I lost the bet... Take this. It's a prize for you — so long!
机巧鸟就这样潇洒地离开了，它明明那么小，背影看上去却很高大。它的出逃似乎并非是为了一个消极的理由，它只是想验证「机巧鸟的快乐到底是什么」。

The cycrane strides off, dignified. Even though it is tiny in form, it seems like a giant from behind. It doesn't seem to be scurrying away for any passive reason, but rather just to experience "what happiness means to a cycrane."
你能想到这只机巧鸟回到鹤运物流之后，它不会为了生存资料而奔走，它会为了在劳动中肯定自身的存在而辛劳…也许它找到了真正属于机巧鸟的快乐。

You cast your mind to this cycrane returning to Heron Express — how it won't struggle to survive, how it will find meaning existentially through life-affirming work... Perhaps it has even discovered the true happiness of being a cycrane.
你不是机巧鸟，你不知道机巧鸟的快乐。
You're not a cycrane, so you don't know the joys of a cycrane.
你注意到这只不满的机巧鸟有些欣喜，它对于自己打赌成功感到意外，但是等到你的错误答案一出口，你仿佛看见了愉快的代码在它的玉兆基板上流淌。

You notice that this resentful cycrane is a little satisfied. It is surprised it won the bet, but as soon as it hears your incorrect answer, it is as if the code for happiness is suddenly written onto the screen of its jade abacus.
但是很快，你又从它那造型蠢萌的眼神中觉察到了一丝疑惑。这只机巧鸟原本以为自己会有胜利的喜悦，但这种情绪就像是指缝间流沙，稍纵即逝。

Soon, however, you noticed a sense of doubt from the gaze it gives out in its cute, dumb eyes. This cycrane thought it would feel the thrill of victory, but the emotion was merely fleeting like sands in an hourglass.
就好像一个长期困扰它的问题，就在此时得到了结果。你不太确定，你和它之间的赌约在这个疑惑中发挥了怎样的作用。
It's as if a problem that has plagued it for a long time has finally been resolved. You're not quite certain what role your bet has played under these confusing circumstances.
你们俩之间打赌，就别牵连上我了吧…再说了，你都不知道我们之间赌约是什么。
Don't get me mixed up in your gambling, alright... Besides, you don't even know what our bet is all about.
「只要他三天卖不出一只机巧鸟周边，货全老哥就得再去进货<unbreak>100</unbreak>只。」
"Three days to sell a cycrane merchandise, otherwise Salesby has to buy another <unbreak>100</unbreak>."
没错，万一将来有一天它火了，就是货全老哥赚了。
That's right. Should it go viral, then Salesby only stands to make a fortune.
哈？我见识过很多像你这样嘴硬的人了。
Huh? I have seen proud people like you.
输了就输了，愿赌服输，{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}。
A loss is a loss. Put your money where your mouth is, {F#girl}{M#boy}.
不过你也不用太沮丧。实际上，在你来之前，我就在考虑要不要回到鹤运物流，一直很难下定决心…这是出于我自己的意愿。
You shouldn't be too sad though... but even before you came, I was already thinking about going back to Heron Express. It's so hard to make up my mind... This is my own decision.
自从获得自我意识之后，我将你们人类的娱乐方式地体验了一遭…不知道我是缺少生物激素、还是怎么的，我并不认为这些做法有多快乐。

Since becoming self-aware, I've had my experiences with the way you humans entertain yourselves... I don't know if I'm lacking the bioindicators for it or something, because that doesn't seem very fun to me.
暴饮暴食、与人打赌、或者欣赏戏曲…统统都没意思，但我已经不再想用你们人类的娱乐观念来规范自己了。
Pigging out, gambling, or attending a show... It's all a snorefest to me. I'm not going to bother using human concepts of entertainment to amuse myself any longer.
你们的娱乐方式，还不如我「快递准时上门」快乐呢。
What you call entertainment is less fun than my courier's on-time performance.
机巧鸟就这样潇洒地离开了，它明明那么小，背影看上去却很高大。它的出逃似乎并非是为了一个消极的理由，它只是想验证「机巧鸟的快乐到底是什么」。

The cycrane strides off, dignified. Even though it is tiny in form, it seems like a giant from behind. It doesn't seem to be scurrying away for any passive reason, but rather just to experience "what happiness means to a cycrane."
你能想到这只机巧鸟回到鹤运物流之后，它不会为了生存资料而奔走，它会为了在劳动中肯定自身的存在而辛劳…也许它找到了真正属于机巧鸟的快乐。

You cast your mind to this cycrane returning to Heron Express — how it won't struggle to survive, how it will find meaning existentially through life-affirming work... Perhaps it has even discovered the true happiness of being a cycrane.
你不是机巧鸟，你不知道机巧鸟的快乐。
You're not a cycrane, so you don't know the joys of a cycrane.
你好像是看错了，这明明是一只小小的机巧鸟，但看上去它就像是一只巨大的飞龙，守着洞穴中成山的财富。
You must have seen something else. This is obviously a cycrane, but it looks just like a huge dragon — one that hoards a lair of treasure.
你仿佛能看见从它那不存在的利齿与鼻孔中冒出了一缕缕黑烟，此时它正陷入酣眠，腹中的火焰隐隐待发，还不太旺盛。
You can almost see wisps of black smoke rising from its non-existent draconic nostrils. At the moment, it is in deep sleep, the flames in its belly rumbling in anticipation.
在它的双翼与长尾之下，那如同小山一样的快递包裹就像是堆满洞穴的金银珠宝，尚未铸造的黄金和宝石，经过精工雕琢的艺术品……
Beneath its wings and long tail, the package is like jewelry, unrefined gold, precious stones, and finely-crafted works of art piled into a hillock...
它依旧在沉睡着，它将抢夺来的财富用作价值连城的睡床。你很清楚，对于一只恶龙来说，只要它还活着，它就会死死守着这些财宝，根本一毛都舍不得花。
Still sleeping, it uses the loot as its priceless implement of slumber. You know very well that a fierce dragon will stick to its treasure for as long as it's alive, unwilling to spend a single dime.
此刻，你化身成为了一名小小贼人，希望能够从恶龙手下偷走真正的宝贝——无论是代代相传的宝钻、还是刀枪不入的银甲……
In that moment, you have transformed into a little thief, hoping to steal the real treasure from the vicious dragon — whether it be the antique jewels, or the impenetrable silver armor...
(Take the courier package on the outside first)
很好，你做出了明智的抉择。你明白遥远的响动不会惊醒恶龙的酣眠，你并不贪婪，你只在乎确切能够到手的机会。
Excellent, you have chosen wisely. You know that distant noises won't awaken the dragon from its slumber. You're not greedy, you just care about a realistic chance at triumph.
拿走离恶龙最远的宝贝，这足以换取你下半生吃喝不愁了。
Removing the treasure farthest away from the dragon, that will be enough to feed and clothe you for the rest of your life.
（想办法拿走恶龙脚下的快递箱）
(Think of a way to take the courier package underneath the dragon)
真是一个大胆的贼人，如果有人与你同行，那人肯定会阻止你的轻举妄动，并警告你恶龙曾经挑战了一支军队，它的怒火将河流变成了蒸汽……
What a bold thief! Had someone been with you, they would surely stop you from acting so rashly, warning you about how the dragon could take down a whole army and turn a river into steam...
可惜的是，你的探窟行动缺乏同伙支援。你决定孤身走暗巷，亲身对峙绝望，顺着台阶而上，盗取恶龙脚下的宝藏。

Unfortunately, your treasure operation has no such counsel. You decide to walk alone in the darkness, confronting despair yourself, and climbing the stairs to steal the treasure from beneath the dragon.
看来你经验丰富，知道古往今来有无数贪心的家伙闯进洞穴深处，都以为自己能够带走些什么…故事最后往往都是以悲剧收尾，无一例外。
Looks like you're experienced enough to know that countless greedy people throughout the ages have tried to steal from this cave... And their stories all have tragic endings, without exception.
除非，你相信自己是一个破局之人……
就在你下定决心之后，那只恶龙缓缓地扇动了一下翅膀，狂风让你向后撤退了两步，似乎这是它最后的警告。
Just after you make your decision, the dragon slowly flaps open its wings. The ensuing gust of wind knocks you back two paces, as though it was issuing a final warning.
紧接着，恶龙卖了一个破绽，它将自己的白色肚皮露了出来，挑衅你的怯懦。它从不畏惧人类，它要杀就杀，要吃就吃，没有人敢阻挡它。

Immediately after, the dragon flaunts its weakness, exposing its soft white underbelly to taunt you. It has never feared humans. It kills them whenever it wants to, and eat them whenever it feels like it... And none dare stop it.
曾经它击倒过万夫莫敌的英雄，如今的战士与英雄与之相比，不过是软弱的老鼠。而你不过是一介小小的贼人，它更是不会将你放入眼里。
Once, it even defeated a hero of unparalleled victories. Today, warriors and heroes are like mice compared to the hero. You are nothing but a teeny tiny thief, unworthy for which to raise an eyebrow.
「我的鳞甲如同层层叠叠的钢甲，我的利爪如同削铁如泥的枪戟，阴影中的小贼，你胆敢轻举妄动，我的呼吸就足以为你带来长眠。」
"My scales are like plates of armor, and my claws are like razor-sharp halberds. Little thief hiding in the shadows, you're playing with fire. I could bring you your eternal sleep with a sneeze."
这实在太可怕了，你绷紧了神经，想到恶龙也许会说出这样的台词威胁你。
This is terrifying, and you tense your nerves at the thought of all these menacing lines the dragon could spew at you.
(Let's roll for a Spot Hidden check)
判定成功。守护着金银财宝的巨龙仍在酣睡，似乎它还没有察觉到你的接近。你也注意到前进道路上有一些能够发出声响的障碍，应该能够提前避开。
Successful. The dragon remains sleeping on its treasure, as if it hasn't sensed your approach. You also notice some potentially noisy obstacles in your path, and should be able to avoid them.
这一次成功的侦察，提高了你的自信心，使你不动声色地离目标更近了一步。
The successful Spot Hidden check boosts your confidence, making you quietly move one step closer to your target.
你听懂了警告，唐突的到访就应该到此结束，你确信它在假眠，只是等待着你疏忽大意的瞬间一跃而起，挥动它那如同雷霆一般的尾巴，将你彻底湮灭。

You understand the warning and your sudden visit should end here. You are convinced it's only feigning asleep and lying in wait for that moment to pounce on you and annihilate you with a rapid sweep of its fulminous tail.
你应该离开，除非你相信自己是一个破局之人……
You should leave, unless you believe you're different...
你看准了恶龙翕动的间隙，将手伸向了浮动着红光的财宝。你明白，恶龙一旦愤怒地醒来，它将高高地盘旋起来，黑暗就将笼罩一切，你无处可逃。

You identify the gap in the dragon's movements, and stretch your hand out into the treasure glimmering with ruby light. You know that once it wakes up, it will be enraged, encircling high as it flies and leaving you with no place left to hide.
只要出手得足够快，你就能在灾难降临之前脱离危险…你对自己的身手充满自信，过往的训练都不是白费的，你偷盗过的东西数不胜数。

Just shoot for it fast enough, and you'll always have a chance to get out of harm's way... You're confident in your agility, and you'll put all of your past training into this. You've stolen things countless times before.
…不好，这箱子比外表看上去更重。倘若知晓它的重量，你一定会做好准备，扎好马步，借助身体支撑将它拿下，可惜你没有这样的机会了。
...No, this chest is heavier than it looks. If you knew how heavy it was going to be, you would've braced your back and lifted from the legs, but you had no such chance.
(Strive for a slow but assured success)
只要你还有足够的时间，你就能在恶龙的看管下，不作声响地将财富悄悄带离。保持耐心，时间依然是你的朋友。
If you had enough time, you could slowly take away all the surrounding treasure even under the dragon's nose. Be patient, time is still your friend.
…不过，这箱子比外表看上去更重。越是想要行动缓慢不发出声响，身体越是容易出现疲惫的态势，你的力量即将支撑不住。该死，箱子里到底装着什么！

...However, this chest is heavier than it looks. The more effort you put into dampening the sounds of movement, the more exhausted you become — and you'll soon lose your grip. Darn it, what is in this chest!?
(You're overwhelmed and launch the first attack on the dragon)
与其在这里担惊受怕，不如率先出击。你向来是横冲直闯的狂战士，擅自将你定性为盗贼游侠是对你的羞辱。冲吧，打完恶龙，这些财宝都是你的了。

Rather than being scared, it's better to just strike first. You've always been a rampaging berserker, and it'd be a disgrace to position yourself as a dextrous rogue. Bring it — just defeat the dragon, and all that treasure is yours.
就在你发力的瞬间，这只物流机巧鸟，从高高的金山上摔了下来。
Just as you're about to strike, this courier cycrane drops straight out of the sky.
好心人…就是你，扶扶扶我起来一下…谢谢谢。
Oh kind {F#lady}{M#sir}... It's you. Please help me up... thanks.
没错，这除了你你你你你，还有谁呢……
Yes, who else is around here besides you, you, and you?
为为为什么会这样说…我做了什么吗？
Wh—Wh—Why are you talking like that... Did I do something wrong?
我的内存要满了，系统运行…有点…困难难难难……
My memory is full, and the system is a little... s—s—slow...
修完，我再再再再感谢你……
I'll fix you up right now.
你说让我修我就会修吗？
Do you think I'll fix you because you asked?
Are you sure you're not gonna swallow me?
听听不懂，算力不足足，你你你在说什么…快救救我我我……
I d—don't understand. Insufficient computational power. What are you s—s—saying? H—h—help me...
太好了，多亏了你，我说话稍微顺畅了一些，没有那么卡顿了。
Great. Thanks to you, my speech flows better now without stuttering out all the time.
哎，这都怪我太贪心了，我这鸟从来不相信什么在线流媒体，要是遇到了喜欢的幻戏，就一定要自己下载下来，哪怕存着不看，我也必须下载下来。
Ah, I got too greedy. I don't believe in streaming online media. If I find an immersia I like, I have to download it myself. Even if I don't end up watching it, I must download it.
结果…你看到了，内存太满，我直接宕机了。要不是你，我可能就报废在路边了，你可真是一个好人啊。
As a result... Well, as you can see, my memory was too full and I crashed. If it weren't for you, I might be a piece of scrap on the roadside. You're such a kind person.
问的好啊，也许我们俩是同道中人。
That's a great question. Perhaps we have the same hobbies.
托蝶幻境的千年十佳，每一部我都把原始版、修复版、珍藏版、以及重制版全部都存着…其他的作品，只要是评分比较高的，我也都有备份。
I kept the original, backup, collectors' edition, and remastered versions for each Butterfly Immersia on the Millennium Top Ten list... And pretty much anything else that gets rated highly.
但是他们实在是太占内存了，甚至没有多少空间给我的系统运行……
But they're all so memory-hungry that they don't leave any space for my firmware to run...
坏了！刚才是不是在修理我的过程里，它们都被删掉了？啊——
Oh shoot! Did everything just get deleted during the reparation? Gah!
You can download them all again.
从别人那里下载来的版本和自己珍藏许久的能一样吗？哎——
Download someone else's filthy copy, instead of my own collector's version? Ugh...
这都是没有办法的事儿嘛…
你说的没错。我现在就去找人帮我扩容，我要把仙舟罗浮的所有幻戏…不对，整个银河的娱乐作品全都装进我的储存里！

You're right. I'm going to find someone to help me expand my memory. I want all the immersias of the Xianzhou Luofu... No, I want all the entertainment that has ever existed in the whole cosmos stored in my memory!
你守着这些快递箱干什么？
What are you doing with all these courier packages?
啊，这些快递箱吗？这些只是找不到收获地址的快递而已……
Ack, these things? They're just courier packages with unknown addresses...
不知道是谁给堆在这里了，反正和我没有什么关系。
I'm not sure who stacked them all here, but it has nothing to do with me.
你不会以为是我私吞个人财产了吧？我可是有职业道德的。
Did you think I just kept all these for my own? I do have work ethics, you know.
You should get back to Heron Express.
我正有这个打算。我必须得找鹤运物流的技术人员帮我扩容，现在这个容量连百佳的精选集都放不下，实在是太小了！

I've been planning on doing just that. I have to find some of the techs from Heron Express to expand my memory. I can't even fit the top <unbreak>100</unbreak> anymore, and that's how little memory I have!
你如果是他们派来找我的，不用担心，我一会儿就回去了。
If you were sent here to retrieve me, relax — I'm going back soon.
你可真是个好人，这个礼物是我自己的，你就收下吧。再见啦！
You really are a well-meaning person. Here's a gift from yours truly, keep it. Farewell!
快退后！人类，这不是你应该插手的战斗。
Step back! Human, this is not your battle!
在你面前的是，是一只勇敢无畏的机巧鸟，它张开双翅像母鸡护住小鸡一样，将你保护在它的身后。
Standing before you is a valiant, fearless cycrane, wings spread wide open as though defending its clutch as it defends you behind it.
而在这只机巧鸟的前方，是面目可憎的入魔机巧。它受到了建木的影响，擅自变成了伤人的怪物…幸好，你已经击倒过无数这样的敌人了。

And standing before this cycrane is a repulsive Entranced Ingenium. Affected by the Ambrosial Arbor, it turned into a malevolent monster... Luckily, you've already defeated countless enemies like this one before.
也许就像这只机巧鸟说的一样，「这不是你应该插手的战斗」。在勇敢的战士为你冲锋陷阵之前，至少你应该问问它为何要帮助你。
Perhaps it's just like what this cycrane said, "this is not your battle." Before allowing a brave warrior to charge into a risky battle, its cause should first be ascertained.
哼，我只是一个恰好路过的物流机巧鸟罢了。
Hmph, I'm just an express cycrane that happened to be passing by, is all.
住手，不要再为我打架啦！
这位{F#小姐}{M#先生}请不要自作多情了。我愿意付出生命为你战斗，可是对面那位丑陋的机巧却并非如此。
{F#Miss}{M#Mister}, don't flatter yourself. I may be someone with conscience in battle, but that disgusting ingenium over there does not.
你以为你是在跟谁说话呢？
Who do you think you're talking to?
哼，逞强。你就在后面好好看着就好了，这是我献给你的战斗。
Hmph, stop acting brave. Just watch me from the back. I'll dedicate this battle to you.
说归说，闹归闹，别拿生命开玩笑。你很清楚，这只专门负责处理物流快递的机巧鸟很难承受得了入魔机巧的攻击，你还得是亲自出手拯救它。
Joking aside, you shouldn't make a joke out of life. As you know, this cycrane courier is not designed to withstand an attack from the Entranced Ingenium. You'd have to rescue it personally.
你是不相信我吗？人类。你还不知道我的信念吧，告诉你好了。
Do you not trust me? Human, you have no idea of my conviction, so let me tell you.
你打算开战之前解释自己的信念？
Are you going to monologue about your convictions before you go to war?
有这么奇怪吗？我的敌人、我的战友、甚至是我保护的弱者，都应该知道我到底为何而战！我必须大声说出来。
What's so weird about that? My enemies, my comrades, and even the weak whom I protect — all should know what I'm fighting for! I have to shout it out from the rooftops!
我虽然没有未来，但是我可以会保护好你的未来，这就是我的信念。
I may not have any future, but I can still protect your future. This is my conviction.
请告诉我，你的信念是什么！
Please tell me, what is your conviction!
我虽然没有未来，但是我可以会保护好你的未来，这就是我的信念。
I may not have any future, but I can still protect your future. This is my conviction.
这里还是交给我吧，小事一桩。
Leave this up to me. It's a piece of cake.
住手，我不想看到你受伤。
Stop, I don't want to see you get hurt.
我不想再看到任何人流泪了，所以，请看好了，我的暴怒模式！启动！
I don't want to see any more tears, so please watch out for my Wrath mode! Activate!
这只机巧鸟愤怒地扇动着它的翅膀，仿佛整个洞天的疾风都在它的双翅下汇聚，它的越扇越快，越扇越快，你的眼睛已经追不上它扇动的频率了！
This cycrane flaps its wings angrily, as if all the zephyrs of the delve are funneling into his wings. They beat faster and faster, and your eyes can no longer keep up with their frequency!
"Wind! The wind of the Xianzhou Luofu!"
连身后的你也感觉到一种熊熊燃烧的灼热感。这就是「暴怒模式」吗！何等炫目，何等耀眼！你开始期待机巧鸟能够爆发出怎样的能量了。

Even standing behind it, you can feel a scorching heat emanating from the cycrane. This is the so-called Wrath mode, then! How dazzling, how awe-inspiring! You start to wonder what kind of energy burst this cycrane can unleash.
等等，你是不是闻到了什么？这个味道，这个味道是烧焦的味道，是电子元件超频过载失败的味道！简而言之，是短路的味道！
Hang on, do you smell that? Something's burning — it's the smell of something burning. It's the smell of burning hardware failing to overclock! It's basically the smell of a short circuit!
机巧鸟在你面前缓缓坠落，就像是断了线的风筝——只要我们不停下飞行，道路就会…现在不是想这个的时候！
The cycrane slowly drops before you, like a broken kite — as long as we don't stop flying, the road will be... Now's not the time to think about that!
不会又要让我来修理吧？
I'm not fixing another one of these, am I?
I'm sorry for the embarrassment you witnessed.
机巧鸟这辈子最不能做的只有两件事，一件事是言而无信，另一件就是让所爱的人流泪。
There're two things a cycrane can never do: The first is to break a promise. The second, is to let someone cry.
Stop saying things just to sound cool.
原本我是想启动「暴怒模式」的，结果反而被愤怒冲昏了头脑…机巧鸟就应该学会冷静，沸腾的水再一直烧下去，只是会蒸发殆尽而已。
I wanted to activate the Wrath Mode, but was knocked out by my own rage... I should study how to play it cool. If we continue to boil boiling water, it will eventually evaporate away.
Ziqiao sent me to get you back.
原来如此，梓桥女士需要我的帮助…可、可我还没有寻找到真正的强大。
Ah, is that so. Madam Ziqiao needs my help... B—But I haven't found my real power yet.
你自己的道路你自己决定。
You have to resolve your own path.
不能帮助需要帮助之人，这样的「强大」有什么意义？
What's the point in having power if I can't even help out those in need?
真正的强大又是什么呢？
只有知道了能够变强的理由，我就能继续变强。而真正的强大，又需要什么呢？我想，这答案也许就在我的起点——鹤运物流之中。
I can only keep getting stronger if I understand a reasoning to get stronger. And what does real power need? I believe, the answer to this can be found at my starting point — Heron Express.
总之，先回到鹤运物流后再考虑？
So... You'll fly back to Heron Express and think things over?
已经没有时间留给我犹豫了，既然有人需要我的帮助，我就应该响应。
There's no time left for my hesitations. Someone needs my help, so I should respond in kind.
明白了！我会回到鹤运物流！
Got it! I'm heading back to Heron Express!
让我再次感谢你吧，我敬爱的朋友。再见，总有一天，我们的道路会再次相汇，到时候再促膝长谈吧。
Let me thank you again, my dear friend. Goodbye, and may our roads cross again someday. Until then — I'll look forward to it.
Hey, are you looking for me?
我只是路过而已，没想去找你？
I'm just passing by, so nope — not looking for you actually.
我不相信。你如果不是来找我的，那我们现在的对话又算是什么呢？别装了，我知道梓桥让你来找我们回去是吧。
I don't believe you. If you weren't here to find me, why even are we talking right now, then? Quit being cute, I know Ziqiao sent you here to bring me back, right?
Ziqiao sent me to get you back.
果然如此，我就知道你是来找我的，我在这里已经等候多时了。
I knew it. I knew you were looking for me. I've been waiting for a while.
要想让我回去，就必须接受我的挑战。
You'll have to take on my challenge if you're trying to convince me to return.
俗套是什么意思，你吃过饭以后难道就不吃饭了吗？其他的机巧鸟可以给你出难题，我就不可以吗？
What does cliché mean? Do you never need to eat ever again after having one meal? Other cycranes put you through a challenge, so why can't I?
今天我非要给你出难题。
I am definitely giving you a difficult one today.
Well then, what is your challenge?
你竟然这么爽快，甚至没有抱怨一下…真是意外。
You seem calm, like you're not even complaining... That's a surprise.
在获得自我意识之后，我并没有立刻离开鹤运物流…我依旧做了很长一段时间快递工作，但随后我就意识到了——你们人类有问题！
After gaining self-awareness, I didn't leave Heron Express immediately... I kept doing courier work for a long time, but after a while I came to realize... You humans are weird!
那些写了地址，地址实际不存在的！那些写了联系方式，根本联系不上人的！那些专门把地址写在这些危险环境的！简直是不可原谅！
All those addresses that don't even exist! All those contact details that can't actually reach anyone! Those who deliberately write addresses located in dangerous areas! It's simply unforgivable!
…因为我们是机巧鸟，所以你们就出尽难题。凭什么要我们找你，而不是你来找我们，就因为你们是有机物吗？
...Because we're cycranes, see, so you just chuck all kinds of problems our way. Why should we come to you instead of the other way around? Is it just because you're organic?
哼！就凭你这高高在上的语气，我一定要为难一下你。
Hmph! Just for your tone of voice, I'll definitely make things difficult for you.
…你道歉没用，除非你们派景元将军亲自过来道歉。
...You can't weasel your way out of this one, unless you send General Jing Yuan himself to apologize.
别废话了，说挑战是什么吧！
Cut the chit-chat, and get to the challenge.
怎么比我还没有耐心，我这就告诉你。
You're even less patient than I am. Let me tell you then.
我的挑战非常简单，就是「送快递」。我来当收件人，你来送快递！
My challenge is simple: "Courier Delivery." I'll be the recipient, and you'll be the courier!
…你也就现在还能笑得出来了。
...This will be the last time you'll be laughing at this.
Is it Hide-and-Seek? Then let's go!
捉迷藏？确实，这就是捉迷藏。
我会给你一个地址的地图，你能找到我，就算是你赢了。
I'll give you a map of a location, and if you can find me, then you win.
你看的出，尽管这只机巧鸟想要在你面前高高在上，但是它离开的背影却很卑微。
You can see that although this cycrane tries to look snooty and dignified in front of you, its silhouette shows a rather ignoble figure.
你不禁在想，也许它想要的并不是刁难，而是理解。
You cannot help but think that maybe what it wanted wasn't to stump you — but your acknowledgment.
Fifty. It should be hidden by now.
你根本就不在你说的范围内。
You went off the map, buddy!
是吗？我曾经也以为你们填的收货地址是准确的呀。
Oh, did I? I used to think the shipping addresses you organics filled in were accurate too.
我也没有费什么功夫呀。
我曾经找不到正确地址时，也以为你们填的收货地址是准确的呀。
When I couldn't find an address, I used to think the ones you organics filled in were accurate too.
我知道你在想什么，你认为我不遵守游戏规则，你认为我只是想恶心你。
I know what you're thinking. You're thinking, "This thing broke the rules. It's just trying to annoy me."
没错，这才是我真正的目的——让你们这些有机物感受我们的痛苦。
That's right, and you've figured out my real purpose here — to let you organic things feel the pain that we do.
你没有放弃，还找到了我…你要是一只机巧鸟的话，肯定是一只尽责但痛苦的机巧鸟吧。
You didn't quit, and ended up finding me... If you were a cycrane, you'd be a conscientious but tormented one.
我已经体会到你的痛苦了。
I've already gotten a taste of your pain.
你就体会了这么一次，这算哪门子的痛苦。不过，一次也好……
This was just one time. What pain could you have felt... Then again, once is better than none...
再继续为难你也没有什么意思了…休假结束了，我也该回到鹤运物流了。
There's no point in messing with you anymore... The vacation is over. I'll be going back to Heron Express.
看到你跑来跑去的，我的心情虽然稍微好了一些，但也有一丢丢愧疚了…这是给你的报酬，你就收下吧，有缘再见。
Seeing you run all over the place makes me feel a little better, but also kinda guilty... Here's something for you. Take it, and may we meet again.
也许这只机巧鸟没有在地图上标注的范围内……
Perhaps this cycrane went off the map...
有没有一种可能，它故意给出了错误的地址？
Is there any possibility that it gave you the wrong address deliberately?
嘿嘿嘿，看看是谁来了！大哥，又有一个不知趣的家伙来到我们的地盘上了。
Hee-hee, look who's here! Boss, another blockhead has come to our territory.
大哥，你看{F#她}{M#他}还什么都不知道，这里根本不欢迎{F#她}{M#他}，哈哈哈哈。
Boss, {F#She}{M#He} doesn't know anything. {F#She}{M#He} is not welcome here at all. Hahahaha!
注意看，眼前的这个男孩叫小帅，这个女孩叫小美。就在刚才，他们与一只机巧鸟大壮正商量着要如何征服世界，好巧不巧，他们盯上了你。
You see a boy called Little Johnny and a girl called Little Susie. They are discussing their plan to conquer the world with Bossman, a cycrane. You happen to be their newest target.
你们的大哥怎么是只机巧鸟？
我们大哥比大人还聪明，它帮我指导作业，比我妈妈还强。
Our boss is smarter than grown-ups. Bossman here can help me with my homework even better than my mom.
没错，要不是有我们的大哥，我们俩现在都还在家里写作业呢。
Exactly. Without bossman, we would still be back at home doing homework right now.
仙舟什么时候变成了你们的地盘。
Since when did the Xianzhou become your territory?
你搞错了，罗浮仙舟还是景元老大的地盘，这一小块地儿是我们的地盘。
You've got it wrong. The Xianzhou Luofu still belongs to Jing Yuan. We only own this small piece of land.
没错，你不要擅自扩大我们的管辖范围，我们管不过来的。
Indeed. Do not take the liberty of expanding our territory. We won't be able to defend it all.
站住！我们这里岂是想走就走，想来就来的。江湖上的规矩你不明白吗？
Stay right where you are! This is not a place where you can come and go as you please. Don't you know about the unspoken rules of the land?
我偏要在你们的地盘上闹事儿。
I'm just here to make a scene on your turf.
大胆！进了别人的地盘，不打声招呼，还想闹事儿。江湖上的规矩你不明白吗？
How dare you! Not only did you not ask for our permission to enter our territory, but now you want to make a scene. Don't you know about the unspoken rules of the land?
规矩我懂，来吧，直接开打吧。
Oh, I know the rules. Guess that means we'll have to duke it out.
你要是敢直接开打，我就敢提前开始哭！
If you dare to start a fight, I'll burst into tears first!
别打别打，我们这里没有这么匪气的江湖规矩。
Please simmer down. We don't go by the rules of gangsters here.
什么规矩？我来听你讲讲。
老大，这个新人不懂规矩，就劳烦您给{F#她}{M#他}讲讲规矩。
Boss, this newcomer doesn't know a thing about our rules. Please explain the rules to {F#her}{M#him}.
那你就竖起耳朵给我听着。
Alright, please pay attention to what I'm going to say.
我现在就走，求求你们放过我。
I'll make myself scarce now. Please let me off the hook.
老大，{F#她}{M#他}想求饶，要我说呀，可不能饶了{F#她}{M#他}。
Boss, {F#she}{M#he} is begging for mercy. I don't think we should give it to {F#her}{M#him}.
没错，老大，没有比他更好欺负的大人了。
I agree, Boss. There is no better grown-up to bully than this one.
妙啊！那就更不可能放过{F#她}{M#他}了。
Excellent points! All the more reason not to let {F#her}{M#him} go.
听好了，我们「罗浮四大恶人」最讨厌的就是那些自以为暴力能够解决一切的蠢货。在这银河中，真正的硬实力是智慧！
Listen, we're the Luofu Infamous Four. We despise fools who think violence can solve everything. In this cosmos, only wisdom counts!
而我，我是突然获得智慧启迪的机巧鸟，你明白吗？就算是「{RUBY_B#博识尊}遍智天君{RUBY_E#}」也会注意到我！跟你们这些平凡的人类不一样……
And I am a cycrane who has been conferred wisdom, understand? Even{RUBY_B#Nous} the Wisdomwalker{RUBY_E#} will take notice of me! I'm different from ordinary humans like you...
螺丝咕姆是谁呀，你听说过吗？
Who's Screwllum? Have you heard of such a person?
{F#她}{M#他}不会是编了一个奇怪的名字骗我们吧。
Could {F#she}{M#he} have made that odd name up just to fool us?
…你们两个，见识浅了。没错，我就像是螺丝咕姆一样！
...You two are so shallow. That's right! I'm just like Screwllum!
那你的天才俱乐部编号是？
Oh really? What's your membership number in the Genius Society?
编号是什么？我没有编号。
What number? I don't have a number.
螺丝咕姆其实是我编的名字。
Screwllum is actually a name I made up.
咳咳咳，我想起来了，我确实不认识什么螺丝咕姆。
Ahem, I just remembered — I really don't know any Screwllum.
好几只机巧鸟也可以自由对话。
There are quite a number of cycranes with the ability to speak.
老大你不是特别的吗？老大你快说说……
Boss, aren't you special? Please tell us you're special...
哎呀，你们不要相信{F#她}{M#他}说的鬼话…你们见过吗，反正我没有见过。像我这样智慧凌驾于人类的机巧鸟，全银河也只有一只。
Don't believe any of {F#her}{M#his} jibber-jabber... Have you seen any cycrane like them? I, for one, haven't. I'm the only cycrane in the whole cosmos whose intelligence exceeds that of humans.
老大，{F#她}{M#他}是不是在骂你？
嗯？这就是你夸人的态度吗！
Eh? Is that how you compliment others!?
比起这事儿，「四大恶人」是…
That's beside the point. About the Infamous Four...
你说「罗浮四大恶人」？今天傅啵乐没来，那家伙拉肚子了。
Are you talking about the Luofu Infamous Four? Fuporo isn't here today — he has the runs.
这是重点吗？你应该惊叹于我的智慧无人能及。
That's not the point! You should be impressed by my matchless wisdom.
听着，要想在我们的地盘上全身而退，就必须证明你有足够的智慧！
Listen, if you want to leave our territory unscathed, you must prove that you have wisdom!
老大，我们没做完的课后作业里还有一道附加题，要不要让{F#她}{M#他}来做做看？
Boss, there's a bonus question in our unfinished homework. How about we let {F#her}{M#him} have a try?
对啊对啊，{F#她}{M#他}要是没做出来，就证明{F#她}{M#他}没有足够的智慧；要是{F#她}{M#他}做出来了，我们就可以抄作业了。
Splendid idea! If {F#she}{M#he} can't solve it, it proves that {F#she}{M#he} is lacking in wisdom. If {F#she}{M#he} can solve it, it means we can just copy the answer.
讲讲你们那道课后作业题。
好吧，这道题真的很难，就算是获得了智慧的我，也没有搞清楚要怎么解开。用来考验你也正合适，你们把课后作业拿过来。
Well, this is a challenging one. Even someone as intellectually endowed as myself can't make heads or tails of it, so it's the perfect question to test your intellect. Bring the workbook over here.
既然你诚心诚意地发起了挑战。
Since you've accepted the challenge on your own accord...
就别怪我们大发慈悲地刁难你了。
Don't blame us for picking on you.
注意看，眼前的这个男孩叫小帅，这个女孩叫小美。<color=#dbc291ff>他们俩各自负责在<unbreak>10</unbreak>个花盆里种花。</color>
There is a boy called Little Johnny, and a girl called Little Susie. <color=#dbc291ff>They have each been tasked with planting flowers in ten pots.</color>
我是小帅，<color=#dbc291ff>我给一个花盆翻土只需要5分钟，而小美需要<unbreak>10</unbreak>分钟。</color>
I'm Little Johnny. <color=#dbc291ff>It takes me five minutes and Little Susie ten minutes to till the soil for one pot.</color>
我是小美，<color=#dbc291ff>我播种种子的速度是小帅的三倍。</color>
I'm Little Susie. <color=#dbc291ff>I can sow the seeds three times faster than Little Johnny.</color>
我是大资本家，手上只有<unbreak>10</unbreak>巡镝给他们，请问小美应该得到多少？
I'm a capitalist, but I only have ten strales for them. How many strales should Little Susie get?
注意看，眼前的这个男孩叫小帅，这个女孩叫小美。<color=#dbc291ff>他们俩各自负责在<unbreak>10</unbreak>个花盆里种花。</color>
There is a boy called Little Johnny, and a girl called Little Susie. <color=#dbc291ff>They have each been tasked with planting flowers in ten pots.</color>
我是小帅，<color=#dbc291ff>我给一个花盆翻土只需要5分钟，而小美需要<unbreak>10</unbreak>分钟。</color>
I'm Little Johnny. <color=#dbc291ff>It takes me five minutes and Little Susie ten minutes to till the soil for one pot.</color>
我是小美，<color=#dbc291ff>我播种种子的速度是小帅的三倍。</color>
I'm Little Susie. <color=#dbc291ff>I can sow the seeds three times faster than Little Johnny.</color>
我是大资本家，手上只有<unbreak>10</unbreak>巡镝给他们，请问小美应该得到多少？
I'm a capitalist, but I only have ten strales for them. How many strales should Little Susie get?
我们都是负责<unbreak>10</unbreak>个花盆，凭什么你就能多拿一些？
Both of us planted ten pots of flowers. Why should you get more?
I've got it! You should get 5 strales each!
5 strales... I think that makes sense...
我们都是负责<unbreak>10</unbreak>个花盆，凭什么你就能多拿一些？
Both of us planted ten pots of flowers. Why should you get more?
I've got it! You should get 5 strales each!
从大资本家的角度来看，你回答的可能没有错。
From the capitalist's perspective, your answer might not be wrong.
但我们这里是课后作业题，应该不会这么黑暗吧……
But this is just a homework question. I don't think it's supposed to be about the dark side of society...
Hold on. Please allow me to think it through...
我明白了，工作量都是一样的，每个人都应该是5镝呀。
I've got it. Since the workload is the same, each of you should receive 5 strales.
哼，区区一道简单的智力题。
Hmph, it was just a simple brain teaser.
简、简单？我也觉得这道附加题很简单……
老大，你不是考虑了很久之后告诉我们「附加题可以不用做」吗？
Boss, didn't you tell us to just skip the bonus question after thinking about it for a long time?
好难啊，不过我们一起解出来了。
It was challenging, but we solved it together.
你就不要谦虚了，这道题基本就是你解出来的。
Don't be modest. You basically solved the question by yourself.
老大只会告诉我们「附加题可以不用做」。
Boss just told us to skip the bonus question.
这里已经没有属于我的位置了，我该离开了。现在回到鹤运物流还来得及吧？
There is no place for me here. I should leave now. It's not too late for me to return to Heron Express, right?
Ziqiao sent me to get you back.
是吗？梓桥需要我回去…这里已经没有属于我的位置了，我该离开了。
Really? Ziqiao needs me... There is no place for me here anymore. I should leave.
老大，你在说什么呀，你还是我们的老大，这里还是我们的地盘。
Boss, what are you talking about? You're still our boss, and this is still our territory.
没错没错，我们还有很多作业要老大指导呢！
He's right! We still need you to help us with our homework!
…我还以为自己凭智慧争取来的地位呢，没想到你们是真的崇拜我。
...I thought I earned my position with my wisdom. I didn't realize your admiration for me was genuine.
对呀，我们喜欢老大，不需要这些理由，帮我们写作业，就是好老大。
Exactly. We don't need any reason to like you. Any boss who can help us with our homework is good in our books.
不过，我还是要回去了。以后我还会回来这里来找你们的，我们还是「罗浮四大恶人」！
I'm afraid I must leave, but I'll still come back to visit every now and then. We'll always be the Luofu Infamous Four!
你们「罗浮四大恶人」还缺人吗？
一般来说「四大恶人」可以有五个人，但是我不允许这个团体里有比我更聪明的人。所以对不起，你不能加入。
Under normal circumstances, we could permit a fifth member to join the Infamous Four. But I won't allow anyone smarter than me in the group. I'm sorry to inform you that you can't join us.
If you can help me with my homework...
The answer would still be no!
我们以后还有作业要写，还有用得着老大的地方，请你不要多管闲事。
We still have work to do, and there's still plenty for the boss to do. Please don't interfere with our business.
没错，老大如果不回来，我们就不会让它从这里走出去。
That's right, we won't be letting boss leave unless we know for sure that they're going to come back.
我太感动了，一定会回来。
I'm touched. I'll definitely be back.
看见它们其乐融融的样子，让你不禁在想，到底谁才是老大。总之，好像事情又解决了一桩，实在是可喜可贺。
Seeing how happy they are, you wonder who the boss actually is here. In any case, it seems like the matter has been resolved, which is something to celebrate.
吾主派遣老朽来此探查，不曾想天地剧变，被困于此，已经千年之久。有朝一日竟又能得见天空遗民还乡，老朽着实是喜不自胜。

My master sent me here to investigate, but who would have thought that the world would change so drastically? I have been trapped here for a thousand years. To see the Skyfolk return to their homeland once again fills my heart with boundless joy.
只是不知此处的隐情，又是否在诸位预料之中呢……
But tell me, did you expect the secrets hidden here...?
居住在离天幕最近的地方，终日与雪花共舞…在通风口吹冷风，让我好像回到了那段潜入冬之民城邦的时光。
Living so close to the sky, dancing with snowflakes all day... The cold wind blowing over me in the ventilation shaft, all these make me feel like I'm back infiltrating the Winterfolk's city.
呼呼，比起他们居住的天空堡垒，这里实在是酷热难耐喀。
Phew, compared to their sky fortress, this place is unbearably hot!
伟大的艾格勒啊，难道我们做错了什么吗？为何要闭上您的眼睛，为何要收回您的恩宠，用这深不见底的黑暗将我们苦苦折磨……
Oh great Aquila, did we do something wrong? Why have you closed your eyes? Why have you withdrawn your grace and torment us with this endless darkness...?
假如那帮狂热的家伙还在，一定会这么抱怨喀。
If those fanatics were still around, they'd surely be ranting about that right now.
啊，这烈日骄阳！伟大的艾格勒啊，照亮我的面庞，灼痛我的背脊，用我滴落的汗水濯洗您蒙尘的眼睛——
Ah, this blazing sun! Oh great Aquila, shine upon my face, burn my back, let my falling sweat cleanse the dust from your eyes—
假如那帮狂热的家伙还在， 一定会这么说喀。
If those fanatics were still around, they'd surely be saying that right now.
为什么只有我一个站在最低处，也太不公平了喀。
Why am I the only one left standing at the lowest point? This is so unfair!
感觉这舞台好大，这舞台好空，就算竭尽全力，大家也看不见我……
This stage feels so big... so empty... No matter how hard I try, no one can see me...
信奉烈阳的异端，日日指责我们呼唤阴风，吹来秽雨沾染艾格勒的神躯……
The heretics who worship the blazing sun constantly accuse us of calling forth foul winds to bring cursed rain upon Aquila's sacred body...
可到头来，还不是要靠风吹动悬台，才能在这里自由往来？
But in the end, don't they still rely on the winds to move their suspended platforms and travel freely here?
记得你是墨涅塔的造物吧？
You haven't forgotten that you were created by Mnestia, have you?
会不会有点太真情实感了？
Are you getting too into character?
是哦！在这儿待得太久，都有点代入了喀。
Oh, right! I've been here so long that I started to immerse myself too much.
独处的千年里，我终于领悟了一目十行的波动速读法。就拿这条光带传输的内容试试喀！
A thousand years of solitude... and at last, I've mastered the art of quantum speed reading. Let's put it to the test with this data stream!
呕！有、有点虫脑过载了喀！
Ugh! B—Brain overload! Too much data!
到达晨昏之眼最高处！家人们看看，远处美丽的彩虹桥，还有脚下金光闪闪的黄金池！
Reached the highest point of the Eye of Twilight! Look, everyone — the beautiful rainbow bridge in the distance, and the shimmering pool of gold below our feet!
好奇的旅人啊，你是否震撼于这柄巨锤的伟力？这与吉奥里亚无关，而是彼时若虫们锤炼世界的巨锤！
Curious traveler, are you awed by the power of this mighty hammer? It has nothing to do with Georios — this is the great hammer nymphs once used to forge the world!
好奇的旅人，这破碎的玻璃巨樽不代表法吉娜女士，而是若虫们存放蜜汁、举办宴饮的宴会场。
Curious traveler, this shattered glass goblet does not represent Lady Phagousa, but rather the grand hall where nymphs stored their nectar and held their feasts.
而这位当然也不是刺穿天目的「阳雷骑士」，而是守护我们的吾主太太喀！
And of course, this is not the "Daythunder Knight" who pierced the heavens — it is none other than our lady, the guardian of us all!
Are you also a History Fictionologist?
Nymphs have their own tales of Genesis?
改编不是乱编，戏说不是胡说。
Adaptation isn't revision and narrative interpretation is no mere poppycock.
哈哈，毕竟我也是初来乍到喀。
Haha, well, I'm just a newcomer here myself.
我曾听闻吾主述说往事，天空中的人们会与翼兽为伴，一同走完一生的路途。真是令人羡慕的情谊喀！
My master once spoke of the olden days, when those who dwelled in the sky lived alongside winged beasts, journeying through life together. What enviable bonds they share!
我也有翅膀，怎么不算翼兽呢。而你，会是我的主人吗？
I have wings too, so why wouldn't I count as a winged beast? And you... would you be my master?
想象一下，悠闲的午后，你捧上书坐在这样一个落地窗前，和煦的阳光透过窗子洒在地上，那是多么安详的景象。
Imagine a tranquil afternoon: You sit by a floor-to-ceiling window, book in hand, as warm sunlight spills onto the floor. What a peaceful sight.
啊…此生得这样一个落地窗足矣。
Ah... to have just one such window in this life would be enough.
嗐嗐嗐，干嘛呢{F#小姑娘}{M#小老弟}，我在旁边呢！这么明目张胆的吗？
Hello, {F#miss}{M#mister}, I'm standing right here! How dare you?
这儿是司辰宫，是天舶司处理公务的机要中枢，你这样随便动手动脚——等等，怎么又是你啊，之前乱翻公文的时候，我不是警告过你了吗！

This is the Palace of Astrum, the private hub for the Sky-Faring Commission where important affairs are handled. You can't just muck about here like that — Hang on. What are you doing back here? Didn't I warn you last time not to mess around with official documents?
But that's where the chest is!
牢饭也在那里。说些很帅气的话并不能改变你即将成为犯人的事实。
That's also where your pathway to prison is. Just because you said something justifiable to you doesn't change the fact that you're about to become a criminal.
这是「开拓之道」的一部分！
This is part of the Way of Trailblaze!
开拓之道…难怪，我听说列车最近又在银河里又开起来了。
The Way of Trailblaze... That makes sense. I heard the Express is running around in the cosmos again.
你就是那些所谓的「无名客」吧。你们这种人啊，我太了解了！
So you're one of those Nameless, then. I know exactly what people like you are up to!
也不管主人有没有邀请，每到一个地方，你们就会迫不及待地到处逛逛，恨不能踢开每个房间的门进去晃一圈。
Wherever you go, you just can't refrain from wandering about, kicking down doors to snoop around regardless of whether the host has invited you to or not.
上了锁的箱子里那绝对藏了你的仇家，不打开翻翻你晚上都睡不着，连垃圾桶都不放过。
Your greatest enemy is a locked chest, and if you can't open it, you'll lose sleep wondering about what's inside. Not even a trashcan is safe from your prying eyes!
遇上能动的活物，你肯定会凑上去搭两句话。对方要是不能跟你好好聊天，你就会瞅瞅他身上是不是冒出个准星。

With any living thing you meet, you'll try to strike up a conversation about anything. And if they're not reciprocal to your communication attempts, you'll check if a targeting crosshair has appeared on them.
要说全宇宙最可怕的威胁是啥，那就是你们的好奇心。要说什么怪物最吓人，那榜单上反物质军团和丰饶孽物得往后稍稍，让你靠前……

If you ask me what the most terrifying threat in the entire universe is, it's gotta be your insatiable curiosity. As for the most fearsome creature, I'm afraid the Antimatter Legion and Abominations of Abundance both have to make way for you...
男人突然陷入了沉默，他将回忆的眼神埋入眉头紧皱的阴影里。
The man suddenly falls silent as he buries his memories deep within the shadow of his furrowed brows.
因为曾经的我，和你们一样…也是一位「无名客」。即便阿基维利消逝了，祂的传说还是流传诸界。
Because I, I was once just like you... I was once a Nameless. Akivili may have faded away, but THEIR legend still lives on.
男人突然陷入了沉默，他将回忆的眼神埋入眉头紧皱的阴影里。
The man suddenly falls silent as he buries his memories deep within the shadow of his furrowed brows.
我也像你这样一腔热情的冒险，肆无忌惮地打开所有我能打开的宝箱。
I was bristling with the excitement of adventure, just like you, opening up any old chest with reckless abandon.
直到我踩断了翁瓦克圣林的新芽细枝。按大森林的律法，一根幼枝需要打断两根肋骨抵赔。
Until one day, I trod on some twigs sprouting from the sacred Vonwacq forest. The laws of the forest dictate that any broken twig must be repaid in kind — with two broken ribs.
虽然肉体上的伤很快就愈合了…但心上的伤，成为我一生的阴影！你还年轻，不明白入错行有多么可怕。
Although my physical injury soon mended itself... psychological scars have cut deeply for the rest of my life! You're still young, and don't understand the terrors of following the wrong calling.
为了避免你在错误的道路上越走越远，我会特别盯着你。
I'll keep an eye on you to help prevent you from going down the same cursed path I took.
只要你出现在司辰宫里，我就会一直、一直盯着你，明白了吗？
So long as you're anywhere around the Palace of Astrum, I'll be watching you, capiche? A-n-y-w-h-e-r-e.
您看起来正忙的团团转…
You're as busy as a bee...
是喔，忙到脚打后脑勺呢。这就是天舶司的日常啊。商会贸易清单又该重新整理了……
Yeah, I was so busy, I almost kicked myself in the face. All in a day's work at the Sky-Faring Commission! Time for the guilds' list to be updated once again...
所以，如果是来约我喝茶看戏什么的就免了吧。
So, if you're here to invite me out for tea or theater, forget it.
有没有觉得，这儿有个人很闲？
Does it ever feel like someone here is slacking off?
是啊。我只看见你在这转悠…等等，岩明这家伙在干什么？眼神警惕地瞪着这儿。他有什么不满吗？
Yeah. I mean, I only see you sauntering around as you do... Hang on, what's Yanming doing right now? He's staring daggers at us over here. Is he mad about something?
商会清单该交给商会的人做？
Shouldn't you hand over the guilds' list work to the guild to do themselves?
唉，按惯例，这些案头工作是该由咱们秘书来完成的。这些商会的接渡使们可都个个是大忙人啊，光是今年要交的材料……
*sigh* It's common practice for our secretary to process all of this paperwork. The Amicassadors of all the guilds are tied down just from handling all of this year's materials...
等等，岩明这家伙在干什么？眼神警惕地瞪着这儿。他有什么不满吗？
Hang on, what's Yanming doing right now? He's staring daggers at us over here. Is he mad about something?
啧。同样都是天舶司的人，为什么他就能这么正大光明地偷懒？
Tsk, we're both working for the same Sky-Faring Commission, how is he able to slack off so openly?
Excuse me. I need to have a word with him.
夕葵面上挂着冷酷的微笑，向岩明走去。
With a grimace, Xikui strides on over to Yanming.
你好整以暇地瞧着两人唇枪舌剑，各自推搪——搬来彼此的靠山，小声数落同事无能，大声宣扬自己早已饱和的工作量。

You watch as the two of them start bickering, each ducking the other's questions — bringing up each other's backers, whispering about other colleagues' incompetence, shouting about an already oversaturated workload.
岩明终是略逊一筹，趁着他词穷转念的间隙，夕葵将一卷文档推进了岩明怀中，犹如剑尖刺中了死穴。
Yanming finally breaks for pause, just as Xikui takes the chance to shove a pile of documents into Yanming's hands — as if piercing him straight through the heart with a rapier.
胜负已分。岩明愣了片刻，垂头丧气地离开了。司辰宫千年来办公室政治戏中一场微不足道的幕间剧落幕了。
At last, victory. Yanming is stunned, before he slinks away, dejected. The curtain falls on another trivial scene from the Palace of Astrum's millennia-old office drama.
哟，这位客官！您是来参加我们大胃王挑战赛的吗？
Hey there, passenger! Are you here to take part in our Competitive Eater Championship?
It's the Xianzhou Competitive Eater Championship!
Come one, come all, and don't miss out!
大胃王挑战赛？那是什么？
Competitive Eater Championship? What's that about?
哈哈，这个问题问得好——这个挑战赛啊，其实是小店为举行四百二十一周年庆特别举办的酬宾活动！
Haha, now that's a good question — we're holding this special eating event to celebrate the <unbreak>421</unbreak>st anniversary of our store!
您将与来自罗浮内外的大胃王们同台竞技，看看谁能在限定时间内吃下更多包子——胜出者即可获得海量丰厚奖励！
You will be pitted against other competitive eaters around the Luofu and beyond to see who can eat the most buns within the time limit. And the winner wins a massive prize!
当然，要想参加比赛，您必须得预先抵押一定信用点。不过不用担心，只要您能在比赛中获胜，这笔押金便会全数返还给您！
Naturally, to compete you'll have to pay a deposit first. But don't worry — as long as you win, your deposit will be refunded to you in full!
这比赛听起来性质不纯啊…
呃，打住打住——我知道客官您想说什么，但那种事情在我们仙舟可是明令禁止的！
Uh, hold it right there! I know what you're gonna say, but that kind of behavior is explicitly banned aboard Xianzhou!
我们这比赛真的只是单纯的酬宾活动，而且优惠力度极大！
We really are just running a simple anniversary contest, and besides — everything's mega-discounted!
您想啊，您只要花笔小钱，即可无限畅吃百年老字号的地道罗浮风味美食——全宇宙里还有比这性价比更高的活动吗？反正我是想不到了。

Think about it: For just a small price, you can eat as much of these famous Luofu snacks as you can fit inside you — is there honestly any better deal going right now in the whole universe? I don't know of any.
那么要抵押多少信用点呢？
So how much credit do I have to put down?
小钱——只需<unbreak>1000</unbreak>信用点，您就可以参加小店的大胃王比赛了！
Only a little — for just <unbreak>1000</unbreak> Credits, you can join in our Competitive Eater Championship!
没问题！那么就先收您押金……
Great! Please put down your deposit right here...
请您在这里稍等片刻，等其他选手就位，比赛马上开始！
Please wait here for a moment while the other contestants take their places. The contest will begin soon!
哈哈，没问题！如果您有想法了，请随时和我说！
Haha, no problem! Come back anytime!
Haha, that's fine. Enjoy the show!
如果想参加大胃王挑战赛也请随时和我说，奖励可是很丰厚的哟！
If you ever want to eat in our Competitive Eater Championship, just come back and talk to me anytime. The prizes are very generous!
看来，我们的参赛选手已经全部到齐了！小店第四百二十一届大胃王比赛，即将开始！
Looks like our contestants are all ready. The <unbreak>421</unbreak>st Competitive Eater Championship is about to begin!
规则流程非常简单，我来为各位选手说明一下。本次比赛共分为两个环节——
Let me go over everything for our contestants. The rules are simple. The contest is divided into two stages...
通过刚才的说明，想必选手们已是十分了解本次比赛的规则流程了！那么，接下来比赛即将进入「外交」环节……
With that detailed introduction, I trust everyone now clearly understands the rules and procedures of this contest! Right then, let's get cracking with the Diplomacy phase...
等下！这都哪儿跟哪儿啊？！
Hold on! What is going on!?
哦？看来我们的{NICKNAME}选手还有疑问！
Mmm? Sounds like our dear contestant {NICKNAME} still has some questions!
尽情提问吧，{NICKNAME}选手！老板我会知无不言，一一为你解答！

哈哈，好问题！您或许有所不知，云骑兵书有云：「上兵伐谋，其次伐交，其次伐兵，此谋攻之法也」……

Haha, what a great question! You may not be aware, but the Cloud Knights Compendium has a quote: "The best offense prevails by strategy, then by diplomacy, then finally by force. This is the art of attacking"...
两军较量，贵在全争；而赛场如战场，自然也是兵法的用武之地了！

怎么样，非常有策略性吧？

是不是已经跃跃欲试了？这就是角色扮演游戏的魅力所在！
Ready to jump straight in and give it a try? That's the beauty of role-playing games!
Dare I ask what constitutes "combat," then!?

呃——你不会真要按老板那套来吧？！

I'll endure anything just to land that prize!
咦惹！你这个人，有点可怕哦！这也能捏鼻子忍着啊！

那我可更不能放水了——我一定要让你体会一下，三百岁的实力究竟有多恐怖！
Then I'm definitely not throwing — I'll show you how terrifying three hundred years of might can be!

哇——你这化外民，连小孩子都威胁啊？！

是{NICKNAME}选手！你已经完成「外交」了吗？

Contestants, listen carefully to my instructions!
你咽了咽口水。看来这场无比胡闹的大胃王比赛终于要正式开始了。
You gulp in anticipation. Seems like this ridiculously theatrical Competitive Eater Championship is finally about to begin.
你以余光观察着其他两位选手。那位男子依旧寡言，望着笼屉里香喷喷的包子；而那位女孩依旧从眼中射出兴奋的光芒，也望着笼屉里香喷喷的包子。

You peek at the other two contestants out of the corner of your eye. The guy remains tight-lipped, gaze fixed on the luscious buns in their bamboo steamer. A look of radiant excitement betrays the girl as she also stares at the bamboo steamer.
你不禁开始怀疑这两位选手参加比赛的真实目的究竟是什么。然后，又一声嘹亮的宣言将你的思绪扯回现实。
You can't help but start to wonder what the real motives behind these two contestants are. However, another loud announcement yanks your thoughts back to reality.
比赛大概是正式开始了。眼看着其他两人如暴风般吸入眼前的食物，你也顾不得那么多，只能抓起眼前分配给自己的包子，将它们胡乱塞进自己可怜的小嘴。

The contest has officially begun. Seeing the other two inhaling everything before them like a tornado, you're unable to keep up. All you can do is grab onto your assigned buns in front of you, and start stuffing them like crazy into your poor little mouth.
你吃，你吃！一通慌手忙脚的胡吃海塞过后，你惊喜地发现——自己竟又多吃了两个包子。
You eat and eat! After frantically stuffing your face, you are pleasantly surprised to discover that you've eaten two extra buns.
你第一次发现包子竟然有这么大。不过，比赛可还没结束！
You never realized before how big buns actually are. But the contest hasn't finished yet!
你吃，你吃！又是一阵左支右绌。虽然确实又往胃里填了几个包子，但你感到自己的食道已经开始拥堵起来了——就像通勤高峰时的星槎海。
You eat and eat! Once more, you find yourself struggling. Despite sending down several more buns, you feel like your esophagus is all congested — like the Starskiff Haven during rush-hour traffic.
呃，不过，星槎飞在天上，真的会堵吗？这个比喻似乎并不是那么恰当……
Uh, but starskiffs fly up in the air. Do they really get congested? This metaphor isn't really the best...
可你根本不在乎——因为你现在需要水！你一口气吃了实在太多包子，简直快要把自己噎死了！
But you don't care in the slightest — because you need water, stat! You've eaten so many buns in one go that you almost choke to death!
…这当然不是个比喻！所以，你打算喝多少水？
...And this time, it's not a metaphor! So, how much water do you want to drink?
No problem, you drink a sip...
但这小小的一口水实在于事无补。你两眼一黑，晕了过去。

Oh, sweet release! You feel the foreign objects lodged along your throat flow down and slip into your perfectly-sized stomach. But it leaves you feeling even more stuffed.
但比赛还在继续！接下来你会怎么做？
But the competition's not over yet! What will you do next?

You eat and eat! You keep on eating, ceaselessly eating, desperately eating, eating until the darkness engulfs you, eating until the end of space and time...

来人啊！快叫丹鼎司的医士来！！！

把自己的包子放到别人那里！

狡猾，狡猾！但你分明记得那位老板这样说过——「赛场如战场」——换言之，在比赛中用些计谋也是未尝不可的！
Cunning move! You somehow remember the boss telling you how the contest was "just like a battle" — in other words, it's time for the ol' switcheroo!
如此想着，你便以迅雷不及掩耳之势将属于自己的最后几个包子分别放在了男性与女孩的盘中……
Taking this idea and running with it, you sleight your remaining few buns with lightning speed onto the plates of the guy and the girl...
喔——那可真是太可惜了。你已经苦苦支撑到现在，却在胜利前夕宣告倒下……
Oh, now that's a real shame. You've been struggling so hard up until this point, but on the cusp of victory you declare your own downfall...
你望了望那位寡言的男性，他也望了望你。他的嘴里全是包子，说不出话，却在用眼神说「你是个真正的战士」。
You look over at the reticent guy, and he looks back at you. His mouth is stuffed full of buns, and he can't say a word — but his eyes tell a different story: "You really are a true fighter."
你望了望那位兴奋的女孩…好吧，她还在吃，拼命地吃。她根本没有注意到你。
You look over at the excited girl... Well, she's still eating, desperately eating. She doesn't notice you at all.
现在是问这种问题的时候吗？！
Is now really the time to ask this kind of question?
当然！正如包子铺老板所说那般——「赛场如战场」——你的任何一个微小的决定，都将决定成败！
Sure is! Just as the bun stall proprietor said, this contest is "like a battle" — every small decision you make could tip the scale toward victory or failure!
可惜你没机会了。胜负只在一念之间。你两眼一黑，晕了过去。
Too bad you never had a chance. Victory was but a stray thought floating through your head. Your vision goes black, and you pass out.

那位女孩则更是可怜——她手中那将吃未吃的包子都被惊得掉在地上了。一时间，你不知是该心疼女孩还是心疼包子，或者心疼你自己。

没想到…本届大胃王比赛竟会如此草草收场…老板我内心实在是五味杂陈……

但…我还是决定——向你送上安慰奖，以兹鼓励！
But... I've made a decision — to award you a consolation prize as encouragement!

I can tell you've given it absolutely everything you've got... So I've made a decision — to award you a consolation prize as encouragement!
仙舟有句老话说得好：「胜不骄，败不馁」！今年输了没事，明年记得也要来小店看看啊！

哈！你终于醒了！见你吃着吃着就咣地一声倒在地上，可把我们给吓坏了！
Ha, you've finally come to! Watching you fall to the ground with a thud after eating so much... You really had us worried for a while there!
好在丹鼎司的医士来得及时，抢救很成功！虽然你没有赢，但看在你努力到了这份上……

本届大胃王比赛的赢家已经产生——

...The other two contestants also pulled out right at the same time due to their physical discomfort. Have you ever heard of anything like it?
但无论如何，清点过各位选手剩下的包子数量后，我们认为——本届大胃王比赛的冠军，正是{NICKNAME}选手！

No matter which way you look at it, our scrutineers have counted out the remaining buns and adjudged the winner of this year's Competitive Eater Championship as none other than — Contestant {NICKNAME}!
这是你的奖励，请拿好！明年也请记得再来小店看看啊！
Here's your prize. It's all yours! And we'll see you next year for the next annual contest.

哟，这位客官！「优惠」倒没有，我们已经是罗浮最低价啦，不能更优惠了。可说到活动……
Hey, dear customer! There are no "discounts" here. We already have the lowest prices in all of the Luofu. We can't discount things any further. But speaking of events...
最近我们店在举办大胃王挑战赛，您要参加吗？

我找到了所有的机巧鸟…

这是鹤运物流准备的谢礼，感谢我们的「机巧鸟捕手」为我们提供的帮助。
