当然，之前您说过这些机巧鸟都搭载了智能一事——我们确认过了，是真的。每一只机巧鸟都能说会道的，我们也很惊讶。

Of course, you've mentioned before that these cycranes are actually equipped with intelligence — we've verified that this is indeed true. Every cycrane can produce coherent speech. It's quite astonishing.
你们不会抹除了它们的智能吧？
You won't wipe their intelligence, will you?
你把鹤运物流当成什么了，我们才不做这么不近人情的事情。
Who do you take us for here at Heron Express? We'd never do anything of the sort.
它们被要求去参加新员工培训了，只要不违反法律、不影响正常工作，机巧鸟有智能就智能呗…再说了，星际和平公司很多机械都有智能。

They're required to undergo recruit training and as long as they don't break the law and can handle everyday work, who cares if cycranes have a little intelligence? I mean, lots of bots at the IPC have intelligence these days.
第一只回去之后你们就该发现了。
You must have realized that the first time one of them flew back.
嗯，当时有很多同事没见过机巧鸟说话，一直去找它说话，给它聊抑郁了。
Yes, but back then many of us had never even seen a cycrane speak before. We kept chatting with it until it became depressed.
它有很长一段时间不说话，直到其他的机巧鸟回到系统里，我们才算是终于确信。
Then it didn't speak for a long time, and it wasn't until the other cycranes came back to the system that we were able to verify everything.
后来，我们通过比对它们失联之前的工作轨迹，找到了几个重合的对象…再用上一些排除法之后，其实就只剩下一名可疑的对象了。
We analyzed the missing cycranes' flight trajectories prior to losing contact. Once all the other flight paths were accounted for, there was only one suspicious trajectory left.
我们其实尝试联系了几次，对方根本不愿意回应。
We tried getting in touch many times, but it wasn't willing to respond at all.
你们不会是去索赔去了吧？
Did you go and make a claim for a refund?
多亏了你，我们实际没有蒙受什么损失，所以我们并不打算索赔。
Thanks to you, we didn't even end up suffering any damage — so we didn't need any compensation.
不过，大家也觉得不能就这样好像什么也没有发生过…归根结底，就是想问问那个人，为什么要给物流机巧鸟加上智能。

But everyone still felt that they couldn't just act as if nothing had happened... In the final analysis, we just wanted to ask their designer why courier cycranes had been imbued with the gift of intelligence.
既然那个人不愿意回应我们，我们就想到了你……
Since the designer was unwilling to give us a reply, we thought of you...
这种事直接上报地衡司！
Report this kind of thing to the Realm-Keeping Commission, ASAP!
我们并不打算把这件事闹到地衡司，毕竟多亏了你，我们实际没有蒙受什么损失。
We're not keen on involving the Realm-Keeping Commission here. And thanks to you, we didn't even end up suffering any damage.
不过，大家也觉得不能就这样好像什么也没有发生过…归根结底，就是想问问那个人，为什么要给物流机巧鸟加上智能。

But everyone still felt that they couldn't just act as if nothing had happened... In the final analysis, we just wanted to ask their designer why courier cycranes had been imbued with the gift of intelligence.
既然那个人不愿意回应我们，我们就想到了你……
Since the designer was unwilling to give us a reply, we thought of you...
你们不会是又想找我来吧？
Don't tell me you're asking for my help once more?
您猜的没错，我们第一时间想到了你。
You guessed correctly. You're the first person we thought of.
我们只是想问问那个人，为什么要给物流机巧鸟加上智能。
We just wanted to ask the cycrane designer why courier cycranes had been imbued with the gift of intelligence.
有些事情还是不要知道比较好。
Some things are better off left unknown.
不行，我感觉我的好奇心在折磨我。
No way. My curiosity is going to torment me until I find out.

「为了捣乱」也行…我只是想要一个确切的答案。
"Just wanted to troll us," sure — I would be okay with that. I just want a definite answer here.
我希望你能以「机巧鸟捕手」的身份去写一封信问问那个人。当然，出于保护用户隐私，我们不会透露用户的个人信息…但是信是能寄过去的。
As the ace cycrane catcher, I'd like you to write them a letter asking why. Of course, we'll protect any private information from being disclosed... But for sure we'll send the letter over.
梓桥展示了鹤运物流准备好的信件，如同梓桥所说，信件内容真诚恳切，并没有任何追究责备的意思…看上去就差一个署名了。
Ziqiao presents a letter prepared by Heron Express. As Ziqiao said, the contents are sincere with no intent of placing any blame... All it's missing is a signature to sign off.
(Come up with an epic nickname for yourself)
你们准备得太周全了吧！
You all have really thought this through this to the smallest detail!
…其实你要是拒绝署名的话，我们是打算以「机巧鸟捕手」的身份给那人寄过去。
...Actually, if you refused to sign it, we're planning on sending it from the "Ace Cycrane Catcher".
Well then, are you going to sign it?
(Come up with an epic nickname for yourself)
不署名了，你们随便写吧。
I'm not signing it. You guys write whatever you want.
行吧，有好消息的话，我会告诉你的。
Alright, I'll fill you in if there's any good news.
我好像有份礼物在你那里。
I think you've got one of my gifts over there.
没错，我们的那位用户给你寄过来的。事情的前因后果，我们也了解了。
Correct, one of our users has sent it over for you. We know how everything's gone from start to end.
没想到，还有这样的事情。
Well, that's something I didn't expect.
我猜，仙舟上还有很多这样足不出户的人…这么想来，要不是鹤运物流支撑着他们，他们肯定会更加不容易吧。
I guess the Xianzhou has lots of homebodies who never leave the house... In this case, there're many people whose lives would be far more difficult without the help of Heron Express.
…好像对自己的工作更加有成就感了。
...Sounds like it makes the job even more worthwhile for you.
你放心，那七只机巧鸟也了解了原因，它们表示，如果有空也会去拜访那位客户的。
Don't worry. Those seven cycranes know the reason, and they'll stop in on that customer whenever they get the chance.
哦，对了，这是客户寄给你的谢礼，收下吧。
Oh yeah, this is a gift from one of our customers. Hold onto it.
呼哧呼哧，竟然还没等我爬到，这个悬台的发动机就已经被修好了！
Huff... huff... I was still climbing, and they already finished repairing the engine of this suspended platform!
难道…这就是所谓的饱和式救援喀！
Could this be what they call oversaturated rescue?
知道天底下所有的秘密，想问我问题的人能从云石天宫排队到悬锋城。为了图个清净，我只好躲起来。
I know all the secrets under the sky. The line of people wanting to ask me questions could stretch from Marmoreal Palace to Castrum Kremnos. For a bit of peace and quiet, I had no choice but to hide.
我就不信还有人能追到这里喀……
I don't believe that anyone could track me down here...
有人知道自己知道，有人知道自己不知道，有人不知道自己知道，有人不知道自己不知道。不过还有一种人，他们知道自己不知道自己不知道——那才是最厉害的。
Some know they know, some know they don't, some don't know they know, and some don't know they don't. But the most impressive are those who know they don't know they don't know.
我的话已经是最简洁的了，真没法再缩减了喀。
I've already made it as simple as possible — can't possibly trim it down more, you know.
总有过路的旅人提醒我，我混淆了正反，走在了颠倒的路上。
Travelers passing by always remind me that I've mixed up my directions, walking an inverted path.
可这个世界如此扑朔迷离，你们怎么知道，生活在颠倒的世界中的不是自己喀？
But in a world where there's so much more than meets the eye, how do you know that you're not the one living in an inverted world?
力场状况如何？引擎是否就绪？
How's the status of the force field? Engines ready?
系好安全带，伙计们。我们将探索未知的新世界，探寻未知的文明，前往前所未至之处——
Strap in, everyone. We are about to explore uncharted worlds, seek out unknown civilizations, and venture where none have gone before—
The final frontier of the universe!
我向吾主起誓，再休息一刻钟，就一定去打听多目盲者的秘密。忽然间就电闪雷鸣，劈在了跟前的石柱上！

I swore to my master that after just one more quint of rest, I would go and investigate the secrets of the many-eyed blind one. And suddenly, lightning flashed, striking the stone pillar right in front of me!
看来吾主也是有脾气的喀……
Seems my master has quite the temper...
作为一个温泉爱好者，绝对不能错过每一处温泉~
As a devoted hot spring enthusiast, I absolutely cannot miss a single one~
啊…这温度…这温度…真是恰到好处喀！
Ah... this temperature... is just perfect!
喀…刚出门就被掉下来的砖头砸中，未免也太倒霉了。
Argh... I step outside, and the first thing that happens? A brick falls on my head. Just my luck.
不过话又说回来了，为什么不砸别的虫，唯独只砸我呢？一定是吾主对我的考验喀！
But then again, why me? Of all the bugs around, why did it have to hit me? This must be my master's trial, crrk!
虫的一生难免遇到分岔路，当面对熙熙攘攘的坦途和人迹罕至的小径，应当如何选择自己的虫生？我曾无数次考虑过这个问题。
A bug's life is full of crossroads. When faced with a bustling avenue and a secluded path, which should one take? I've pondered this question time and time again.
可一路走来，却一条岔路都没有…难道说，虫的一生其实根本没得选喀？！
And yet, after all my travels, I've never once encountered a fork in the road... Could it be that a bug's fate was never ours to choose, crrk!?
吨吨吨…若是喝下这最纯粹的金血，一定就可以成为黄金裔，为吾主分忧了吧？
Glug, glug, glug... If I drink this purest golden blood... then maybe I'll ascend as a Chrysos Heir and share my master's burden.
吨吨吨…这股汹涌而来的感觉是…是——嗝。
Glug, glug, glug... This overwhelming surge of power... This is— *burp*
悬台来得实在太慢，我都要迟到了喀！
The suspended platform is so slow! At this rate, I'm going to be late, crrk!
早说过了，错峰搭乘，特定楼层限停，不要每层楼都按按钮喀！
I told you — off-peak rides only, limited stops for designated floors! Stop pressing every single button, crrk!
老朽受吾主之命前来探查，却被困于此。千年的等待如同一梦，如今，老朽的使命结束了。英雄们，你们也要踏上归途了吗？

By my master's decree, I came to investigate... only to be trapped here for eons. A thousand years passed like a fleeting dream, but now, my mission is finally over. Heroes, are you too setting out on your journey home?
此处的谜团已经揭开，不知这最后的真相，诸位是否满意呢？
The mysteries of this place have been unraveled... but tell me, does the final truth bring you peace?
刺耳的巨响，熄灭的灯光…冬之民的天空堡垒在暴风中迷失之前，也有这样的前兆。
A piercing roar, darkness swallowing the light... Before the Winterfolk's sky fortress was lost to the storm, the same ominous signs appeared.
难道这里也要重蹈当年天上诸邦的覆辙了吗？
Are we about to repeat the fate of the fallen celestial realms?
曾被晖之民顶礼膜拜的天象画壁，决定了多少生死，牵引了多少仇怨。恐怕谁也想不到，它有朝一日竟然也会坍塌吧。

Once revered by the Sunfolk, the celestial mural had dictated countless destinies — deciding who lived, who died, and stirring endless feuds. But who would have thought that one day, it too would collapse?
假如那帮狂热的家伙还在， 一定不敢相信自己的眼睛喀！
If those fanatics were still around, they wouldn't believe their own eyes, crrk!
虽然总是作为陪衬存在，但大难临头，已经顾不上去想谁是主角、谁是配角了。只有同心协力，才能赢得一线生机！
I've always been a background figure, a mere supporting role... but when calamity strikes, does it really matter who's the lead and who's the extra? Survival demands unity — nothing else matters now.
这一刻，我就是自己的主角喀！
At this moment, I am the hero of my own story, crrk!
我引以为傲的风扇涡轮被毁了喀！
My precious fan turbine... shattered to pieces, crrk!
被歧视、被诬蔑、被抛弃…难道，这就是我们雨之民注定要经历的命运喀……
Discrimination, slander, abandonment... Is this truly the fate we Rainfolk were born to suffer, crrk?
记得你是墨涅塔的造物吧？
You haven't forgotten that you were created by Mnestia, have you?
会不会有点太真情实感了？
Are you getting too into character?
是哦！和他们一起生活太久，都有点代入了喀。
Oh, right! Living among them for so long... I guess I got a little too into character, crrk.
独处的千年里，我终于领悟了波动速读法。就拿这条光带传输的内容试试喀！
A thousand years of solitude... and at last, I've mastered the art of quantum speed reading. Let's put it to the test with this data stream, crrk!
里面竟然…什么也没有写！
Wait a second — there's nothing here!?
是数据流突然断了，绝对不是我的问题，你一定要相信我喀！
The stream must have been cut off! I swear it's not my fault — you have to believe me, crrk!
呼，还好你及时赶到，不然我就要被那怪物捉住，以身殉道了喀！
Huff, good thing you got here in time! Another second later, and that monster would've had me for a martyr's sacrifice, crrk!
有你在，我就放心多了喀！
With you around, I can finally breathe easy, crrk!
这柄巨锤不是吉奥里亚的造物，而是吾主根系盘结成的巨锤！被它锤一下脑袋，智慧就会源源不断地涌出…是不是很想试试呢？

This isn't some ordinary hammer forged by Georios — this colossal weapon is woven from my master's very roots! A single blow to the head, and wisdom will flood into you like an unstoppable tide... Tempting, isn't it?
嘘！我在给黑潮怪物们讲解历史。有教无类，是吾主留下的教导之一喀！
Shh! I'm in the middle of giving the black tide monsters a history lesson. Teaching without discrimination — that's one of my master's sacred teachings, crrk!
我曾听闻吾主述说往事，天空中的人们会驾驭翼兽，一起冲破乌云和风暴的阻碍。
My master once spoke of the olden days, when those who dwelled in the sky rode winged beasts, cutting through storms and breaking past the clouds.
我也有翅膀，怎么不算翼兽呢。别害怕，我也会带你逃出生天！
I've got wings too. So why shouldn't I count as a winged beast? No need to be afraid — I'll carry you to freedom myself!
怎么突然天旋地转，地板都坍塌了？！
The whole world's spinning! The ground is caving in!
千万要擦亮眼睛，别像多目的盲者一样挑到不靠谱的地产商——这简直是豆腐渣工程喀！
Keep your eyes open! Don't be like the many-eyed blind and fall for a shady real estate scheme — this whole place is a disaster, crrk!
There's nothing that escapes my sight...
The final frontier of the universe!
Time to hang up my boots...
History repeats itself again and again...
A moment that will go down in history!
奇怪，为什么里面没有路径？难道和那些创生若虫有关？
Weird, why is there no path inside? Could it have something to do with those Creation Nymphs?

有什么声音从硬盘…不，从那些泛着蓝光的大型结构中传了出来。
I hear something coming from the hard drive... no, from those large structures with blue light.
喀喀喀…我就是寄宿在神机体内的魂灵，是谁胆敢亵渎晨昏之眼的圣物？
Crrkrrk... I am the spirit dwelling in the divine machine. Who dares to defile the divine object of Eye of Twilight?
勿要以为{RUBY_B#艾格勒}千目之神{RUBY_E#}的目光会有死角，这里的一切风吹草动都无法逃过它的注视。
Don't mistakenly think that {RUBY_B#Aquila}God of the Thousand Eyes{RUBY_E#} has blind spots. Everything here is under their watch. Every little movement doesn't escape their gaze.
赶快离开，否则我就要用阳雷将你轰！杀！成！渣！
Get out of here, or I'll blast — you — to — pieces with Daythunder!
该死！你在做什么？你不怕我阳雷的吗？
Damnations! What are you doing? Aren't you afraid of my Daythunder?
…难道你是在故意挑衅我？不行，我可不上套。现在离开，我还能饶你一命。
...Are you deliberately provoking me? No way, I'm not falling for that. Leave now, and I might spare your life.
阳雷！我都说了，阳雷啊！你这家伙，难道不怕死的吗？
Daythunder! I've told you, Daythunder! Aren't you afraid of dying?
不许再打了啊！赶快离开，听到没有？
Stop it already! Get out of here, you hear me?
我忍不了了！事到如今，只能采取最后的手段了——
I can't take it anymore! I'll have to use my last resort!
我投降！求求你，不要再打了喀！
I surrender! Please, don't hit me anymore!
Aren't you waiting for Aquila to help you?
那些都是骗人的，{RUBY_B#艾格勒}千目之神{RUBY_E#}平时根本不会管这里发生了什么，我也劈不了什么阳雷。我其实信扎格列斯——不然这里怎么会有扎格列斯之手？

It's all lies. {RUBY_B#Aquila}God of the Thousand Eyes{RUBY_E#} never cared about what happens here, and I can't really summon any Daythunder. In fact, I trust in Zagreus — otherwise, how could there be the Hand of Zagreus here?
这是我这些年来搜集的的全部家当，你都拿去吧。放心，艾格勒不知道。
This is everything I've collected over the years. Take it all. Don't worry. Aquila won't find out.
这只若虫与飞天坛递相视而立，仿佛在无声地沟通。
This nymph faces the Flying Amphora, as if they are communicating silently.
西风会把我们带往何方？
Where will the west wind take us?
这只若虫趴在沧桑的雕像表面，散发出无言的悲伤。
This nymph rests on the worn statue's surface, exuding a silent sorrow.
一切会在何时迎来终结？
When will all this come to an end?
这只若虫意气风发地站在金属手掌上，仿佛要驾着它驶向天外。
This nymph stands proudly on the metal palm, like it's ready to ride the palm beyond the sky.
这只若虫端详着面前的罗盘，似乎是想参透其中的秘密。
This nymph inspects the compass in front of it, seemingly trying to decipher its secrets.
Don't look down at the earth!
Don't look directly at the blazing sun!
If you want to figure this thing out...
得问问其他玩这游戏的。
You'll have to ask other players who've played this game.
Don't touch that thing, it's got bugs!
You won't crack it by yourself!
Unless you check the guides on the web...
What about making a post on the web?
我都说了，我一个人连上这金人没用的，我的神识根本承受不住金人符箓的冲击…你还得给我再找一个测试者。
I've told you, I can't activate this aurumaton alone. My consciousness can't withstand the impact of the aurumaton talisman... You'll have to find another tester for me.
我知道，我知道，我也向神策府的青镞大人打听过，有没有云骑军或者飞行士的志愿者愿意来参加测试，就是没人回应嘛。
I know, I know. I even asked Madam Qingzu at the Seat of Divine Foresight if there were any volunteers from the Cloud Knights or pilots willing to participate in the test, but no one responded.
再说了，你没有父母、也没有血缘相近的兄弟姐妹，甚至没有长时间一起生活的恋人，能和你连心同调的人也不好找啊。
Besides, you have no parents, no siblings with whom you share blood ties, and you don't even have a long-term cohabiting lover. It's not easy to find someone who can resonate with you.
…你以为我是为什么没有恋人啊？
... Why do you think I have no lover?
What are you two talking about?
我叫森森，他叫雷力，你是青镞大人找来的金人测试者吗？
I'm Sensen, and this is Leili. Are you the aurumaton tester that Madam Qingzu sent over?
我带来了一台古早型号的金人「平戎」丙型。师傅说，在古老年代里，仙舟上的金人是被允许自行其是的。
I brought an old aurumaton model designated Pingrong Type-C. Master said that in ancient times, the aurumatons on the Xianzhou were allowed to act on their own.
但不知为什么，它们最终却对人类大开杀戒。所以后来的日子里，先祖们对所有金人施加了符箓，这些家伙就变得又钝又笨，抽个不停。

However, for some reason, they eventually turned against humans and went on a killing spree. So our ancestors put talismans on all the aurumatons in the ensuing years, making them dull, clumsy, and constantly twitching.
我选的毕业课题打算让金人恢复灵智。当然并不是解除对他们的禁令，而是试着把人的神识与金人接上。越是心有灵犀，金人的动作就越精确，就像情侣一样，哈哈。

My thesis topic is to restore the intelligence of the aurumatons. Not to lift the ban on them, of course, but to try and connect human consciousness with aurumatons. The more in sync their minds are, the more precise the aurumatons' movements will be, just like a couple of sweethearts, haha.
不成不成！我每次接上那家伙，就感觉自己被装进了一个铁棺材里，感受到的东西也远超自己平时看到听到的极限，要不了一刻钟，脑袋就烫成一锅粥了。

This won't work! Every time I connect to that thing, it felt like I was put inside a steel coffin, and I can perceive stimuli far beyond my usual limits. I think my brain will melt into a pot of gruel within minutes.
这不是已经有一位测试者了吗？
Don't you already have a tester here?
你也看到了吧，雷力这家伙一接上，要不了多久就哭爹喊娘地脱离了控制。
You saw it, didn't you? Once Leili connects to it, it doesn't take long for him to cry and scream and give up control.
所以我想着找一个更能扛事儿的人来帮他一起分担。两人协同连接，应该能搞定…吧。
So I was trying to look for someone more resilient to share the burden. With two people, it should work... I think.
Wouldn't it be like having two left feet?
所以测试者最好能和雷力有共同生活的经验。两人心有灵犀，齐心协力。
That's why testers need to have experience living with me, So that both of us have an understanding and can work together.
Feels like a hot-blooded teenage story.
哈哈哈哈，其实我也这么觉得。
Haha haha, I think so too.
你要是觉得真恶心，我估计咱俩接不到一起。
If you really think that's disgusting, I'm guessing we won't have high compatibility.
你放心，只要连心同调，两位会觉得自己好像是同一个人。
Don't worry, as long as you both resonate well, you will feel like you're the same person.
我？我有试过啊。我比他坚持的时间还短呢。而且我一接进去，雷力这家伙就直呼心脏受不了。几次三番也只好作罢。
Me? I tried. I lasted even shorter than him. Also, the second I connected, Leili complained about how his heart can't take it. So after a few tries, I gave up on that idea.
如果咱们三个心连心，要想让金人动起来可就更困难喽。
If the three of us connect at the same time, it would be even more difficult to make the aurumaton move.
眼下没人应征测试员，所以也就没得好挑啦，就等你了。
Since there's no other tester applicants, we don't have any other choice. It's all up to you.
Well then, chop-chop, let me in!
你找错人了，我只是路过而已。
You've got the wrong person. I'm just passing by.
还以为是来做金人接入测试的呢…不好意思啊。
I thought you were here to help with the aurumaton integration test... Sorry about that.
别急，我必须先瞧瞧你和雷力能不能合拍。麻烦你们两位一起过来一下。
No worries. Let me see if you and Leili are compatible. Please step over here.
森森在你和雷力的肢体关节处贴上了符纸，符箓上光纹流转，以相同的频率闪动着。
Sensen attaches some talismans to the joints of both your and Leili's limbs, and the talismans glow with shimmering patterns and pulse at the same frequency.
吾有一术，号曰「同心」。天符俱设，神魂相属。金铁有灵，禀受驱遣！
This technique hereby, have I named Hearts Aligned. With talismans bestowed by the heavens, thy spirits and soul are combined. Spirits of gold and metal, shall now obey thy commands!
连心率<unbreak>79.9%</unbreak>。没有失控现象哎！
Synchronization rate <unbreak>79.9%</unbreak>. Still in control so far!
Do you want to continue testing?
前进得到二，后退得到一。
To move ahead is to gain. To run away is to lose.
Mustn't run away, mustn't run away...
Maybe I should just give up.
现在你们俩随便动一动吧。
哇哦，你俩再试一遍，我再测试一下。
Wow! Do it again, I wanna test something.
嗯，再做一些稍微复杂的动作。
Uh-huh. Now do something slightly more complicated.
你们俩到底是什么感觉？
A little nauseated. I think I'm gonna hurl...
你确认你不是在模仿我吗？
Are you sure you're not just emulating me?
难道你不是在模仿我吗？
Aren't you the one emulating me?
身体不由自主地动了起来…
My body moved on its own...
是这样的吗，我可以控制你吗？我倒是自己想怎么动就怎么动了……
Is that so? I can control you? I just thought of a movement, and it moved...
等等，我好像开始浮现我不曾拥有的记忆了……
Wait, I suddenly have memories that aren't mine...
那个粉色头发的姑娘，戴眼镜的帅气大叔，沉默寡言的黑发青年，还有一名优雅的红发女士…这不会都是你的记忆吧？
That lady with pink hair, the older gent with glasses, the silent black-haired young man, and the classy lady with red hair... Are these your memories?
确实这些都是我的记忆。
这就是同心相联的副作用啦，坚持住！
This is just a side effect of synchronization. Keep it up!
我都在记忆里看到你了，这就是你的记忆。
I saw you in the memory. They are totally your memory.
我看到你…你、你曾经控制过某个山一样大的金人！
I saw that y—y—you used to control an aurumaton as large as a mountain!
一头铺面而来的兽…那个流着金血的家伙…他、他看向了你…他是谁？他是谁？！
A beast charging toward you... A man dripping with golden blood... H—He looked at you... Who is he? Who is he!?
你发现某些陌生的情景开始浮上你的心版，你眼角的余光总是控制不住瞥向森森，每次注视着她就会心跳加速。
You notice some unfamiliar memory emerging in your mind. Your gaze keeps darting toward Sensen, and each time, you find your heart rate rise.
你坐在父亲宽厚的肩膀上看向玉界门…舌尖滑过母亲烹制的鸣藕糕熟悉的滋味…你接到云骑讣告的那天，泪如雨下……

You stared at the Jade Gate as you sat upon your father's wide shoulders... Your tongue tasted the familiar songlotus cake that your mother made... The day you received the Cloud Knights' obituary notice, your tears flowed down like rain...
你凝神屏息，放开了弓弦，然后箭矢击中了教习…你拼命在校场上奔跑，追着天空中掠过的星槎之影…你无力地跌倒在行军床上，对未来一片茫然……

You focused your mind and held your breath, loosed the bowstring, and the arrow hit the instructor... You ran desperately on the drill ground, chasing the shadow of the starskiff passing over the sky... You fell powerless on the bedroll, feeling lost about the future...
你确信，雷力也意识到你知道了什么，他拼命向你递眼神，企图让你闭嘴。
You are sure that Leili realized that you have obtained some newfound knowledge. He keeps making faces at you, hoping to make you understand and zip it.
Uh, um... That's not my memory!
我知道啊，这也不是什么秘密。
I know that. It's not a secret.
You train your body a lot.
这都是什么乱七八糟的。
(You read the room and keep quiet)
好极啦，你们俩的连心率接近<unbreak>87%</unbreak>！接下来，我会把同心符接到金人上。
Great! Your synchronization rate is close to <unbreak>87%</unbreak>! Next, I will connect this Hearts Aligned talisman to the aurumaton.
你听到电磁波涌动的美丽图景，你看到血肉之躯的焦灼剧痛，你嗅到了金属躯壳的无情森寒。你被看不见的咒符所系，每一条律令刺入你心，咆哮着要你俯首听命。

You hear the beautiful scenes of electromagnetic waves surging, you see the scorching pain of flesh and blood, and you smell the ruthless coldness of metallic shells. You are bound by invisible talismans, every commandment pierces your heart, roaring for you to bow down and obey.
短暂黑暗过去，你的视野开始恢复，呼救的声音越来越清晰。
The temporary black-out passes and your vision begins to recover. The sound of calling for help is getting clearer.
金人、金人失控了！谁来救救雷力！
The aurumaton — the aurumaton went out of control! Somebody help Leili!
拜托你，切断他们之间的连接！
你可千万不能有事啊，雷力——
谢谢你，我得赶快把雷力送去医馆。
Thank you. I have to send Leili to the apothecary now.
没想到接上金人是这么危险的事。公输师傅已经警告了我很多次，都怪我偏要一意孤行。我已经开始后悔了……
I didn't think connecting to aurumatons was so dangerous. Master Gongshu had warned me many times, but I didn't heed his warning. I'm starting to regret it...
Maybe heed his warning next time...
谢谢你，也许我该换个课题。
Thank you. Maybe I should change my research topic.
找个厂上班吧，你不适合研究…
Maybe find some work at a factory. You're not cut out for research...
对不起，我…我也许确实改放弃这个课题。
I'm sorry. I... maybe I should give up on this topic.
别放弃…别放弃…我还能陪你继续做测试……
Don't give up... don't give up... I can continue to test with you...
我不想让你受伤，你先好好躺着，这件事咱们后再谈谈。
I don't want you to get hurt. Just rest for now. We'll talk about it later.
It's my fault for being too hasty.
无论如何，谢谢你，这是你应得的报酬，我该带雷力去医馆了。
No matter what, I want to thank you. This is the reward you deserve. I should take Leili to the apothecary now.
Thank you, we shall meet again.
（危险的包裹…是说先前捡到的「小型中子辐射炸弹」么？）
(A dangerous parcel... Is that the mini-neutron bomb I picked up earlier?)
「波月古海」，持明神圣而不可秽染的神圣水域，今日也依旧风平浪静。
The Lunarescent Depths, the sacred and incorruptible holy waters of the Vidyadhara, remain calm and peaceful even today.
相传，古海之水具有特殊药性，不仅可被导入丹炉炼制药物，还可作抗爆剂，抑制淬炼过程中发生的爆震——理论上，你可以在这里销毁那只危险的包裹。

It is said that the water of this ancient sea has special medicinal properties. Not only can it be used in the elixir crucibles to refining medicine, but it also serve as an antiknock agent that suppresses the shocks and popping during the quenching process — In theory, you can destroy the dangerous package here.
你是认真的吗？！这只包裹里装着的可是「小型中子辐射炸弹」啊！
Are you serious!? That package contains a mini-neutron bomb!
是，虽然这波月古海是有阻燃防爆的功用——但这片水体更是仙舟持明族的生命之水、是他们的古老信仰的象征！

Yes, the waters of Lunarescent Depths have flame-retardant and antiknocking properties — But this body of water is also the sacred water of life for the Vidyadhara people, the symbol of their ancient beliefs!
难道你就忍心用一枚大规模杀伤性武器去亵渎他们的信仰吗？你忍心打破这片宁静吗？
Do you have the heart to desecrate their beliefs with a weapon of mass destruction? Are you willing to break this peaceful tranquility?
不，你绝不能这么做。这件事实在是太不道德了。
No, you can't. This is too immoral.
如果你一定想在这里销毁那枚炸弹——<color=#dbc291ff>六个崇高道德的赞许</color>，一个也不能少。懂吗？
If you insist on destroying the bomb here, you need <color=#dbc291ff>six Praises of High Morals</color>. Nothing less than six. Do you understand?
我像是没道德的人吗？拿去吧！
Do I look like an immoral person? Take them!
什么？！你竟然真的拥有六个崇高道德的赞许……
What!? You actually have six Praises of High Morals...
…好吧，已经没什么好说的了。一诺千金——去做你想做的事吧。
... Alright, there's nothing else I can say. A promise is a promise. Go do what you have to do.
But, remember this: Do it at your own risk!
可这么做在理论上是安全的。
In theory, it should be safe.
理论是理论，实践是实践。你能保证这片水体能将炸弹爆炸产生的能量全部吸收吗？
A theory is just a theory without being put in practice. Can you guarantee that this body of water can absorb all the energy generated by the explosion of the bomb?
不，你不能。如果你一定要这么做，你就必须支付<color=#dbc291ff>六个崇高道德的赞许</color>——这件事太危险了，容不得讨价还价。
No, you can't. If you insist on doing it, you must fork up <color=#dbc291ff>six Praises of High Morals</color>. This is too dangerous. There's no wiggling room.
什么？！你竟然真的拥有六个崇高道德的赞许……
What!? You actually have six Praises of High Morals...
…好吧，已经没什么好说的了。一诺千金——去做你想做的事吧。
... Alright, there's nothing else I can say. A promise is a promise. Go do what you have to do.
But, remember this: Do it at your own risk!
真的不能再讨价还价了吗？
Are you sure that I can't haggle?
当然不能。你以为这句话是在开玩笑吗？
Of course not. Did you think I was joking?
哈，太好了。还是按景元将军说的，让十王司来处理它吧。
Hah, great. Just listen to General Jing Yuan and let the Ten-Lords Commission handle it.
你要不要听听自己在说什么？
Are you listening to what you're saying?
听起来你还不明白——这片水体是持明族的圣地，是他们重要的精神寄托。如果你要在这里放个大烟花，那可是世界上最不道德的事之一了。

Sounds like you're still not getting it. This body of water is the Vidyadhara's sacred site and their important spiritual symbol. If you were to set off a big firework here, it would be one of the most immoral things in the world.
听好了：如果你一定要这么做，你就必须支付<color=#dbc291ff>六个崇高道德的赞许</color>，明白吗？
Listen, if you insist on it, you must fork up <color=#dbc291ff>six Praises of High Morals</color>. Understand?
什么？！你竟然真的拥有六个崇高道德的赞许……
What!? You actually have six Praises of High Morals...
…好吧，已经没什么好说的了。一诺千金，去做你想做的事吧。
... Alright, there's nothing else I can say. A promise is a promise. Go do what you have to do.
But, remember this: Do it at your own risk!
求你了！我就扔这么一次。
Please! Just let me toss it once.
你还想扔几次？不行就是不行！
How many more neutron bombs do you want to toss? No means no!
哈，太好了。还是按景元将军说的，让十王司来处理它吧。
Hah, great. Just listen to General Jing Yuan and let the Ten-Lords Commission handle it.
哈，太好了。还是按景元将军说的，让十王司来处理它吧。
Hah, great. Just listen to General Jing Yuan and let the Ten-Lords Commission handle it.
哈，太好了。还是按景元将军说的，让十王司来处理它吧。
Hah, great. Just listen to General Jing Yuan and let the Ten-Lords Commission handle it.
你将疑似装有「小型中子辐射炸弹」的包裹沉进了波月古海……
You sink the parcel likely containing the mini-neutron bomb into the Lunarescent Depths...
什么也没发生。不然呢？难不成你还想把丹鼎司洞天乃至仙舟罗浮开个大洞吗？
Nothing happened. What did you think was going to happen? A massive explosion blasting a gigantic hole on the Alchemy Commission delve or even the Xianzhou Luofu?
当然没了。你还想看到什么？看到自己用大规模杀伤性武器把丹鼎司洞天乃至仙舟罗浮开个大洞吗？
Of course. What were you expecting to see? Your weapon of mass destruction making a massive explosion, blasting a gigantic hole on the Alchemy Commission delve or even the Xianzhou Luofu?
能看着它就这么不声不响地沉进水里，充其量再冒那么几个泡泡意思一下，这对你而言已经是最好的结局了，不是吗？
The best outcome for you would be to watch it silently sink into the water, and maybe see a few bubbles rise up at best. Isn't that enough?
Thank the Aeons it didn't actually explode.
天啊！没想到你的人性中还留存了一丝良知。
Dear me! Look who's retained a hint of conscience in their humanity?
「欢愉」的阿哈肯定会同意你的观点，但那「巡猎」可未必了。
Aha the Elation might've agreed on your perspective, but The Hunt would not have.
But this is not how script's supposed to go!
哪有什么剧本？别傻了，你的人生没有剧本——除了编剧，任何人的人生都没有剧本。
What script? Don't be silly. There is no script in your life. No one's life is scripted, except the scriptwriter's.
好了，这件事就到此为止吧。看在结局不算太糟的份上，还你<color=#dbc291ff>三个崇高道德的赞许</color>好了。
Alright, let's just leave it at that. Considering the outcome wasn't too bad, I'll return <color=#dbc291ff>three Praises of High Morals</color> to you.
别客气，应该的！非要感谢就去感谢持明族的人吧——感谢他们没来找你麻烦。
You're welcome. It's nothing! If you really want to thank someone, go thank the Vidyadhara — thank them for not having a bone to pick with you.
（应该已经处理妥当了…按景元将军说的，去向青镞汇报吧。）
(It should be done... Like General Jing Yuan said, update Qingzu regarding this.)
我把危险的包裹销毁了。
好的好的，我知道了。我去转交告十王司，也感谢你对神策府工作的大力支持。
Okay, thanks for letting me know. I will relay the message to the Ten-Lords Commission, and thank you for your support for the Seat of Divine Foresight's cause.
No need to thank me. It's the least I can do.
我就知道你会这么说，你人真好。
I knew you would say that. You're such a nice person.
另外，为了表彰你的见义勇为，我个人专门为你准备了丰厚的奖励。
With that said, to commend your bravery, I personally prepared a generous reward for you.
奖励？哦，你不说我都忘了。
给，拿去吧——别客气，这是我应该做的。
Here you go, take it. Don't be polite. It's the least I could do.
I feel like you're just humoring me.
这肯定是你的错觉，你看看奖励就知道了。
You must be overthinking it. Look at the reward I gave you.
Does that parcel really contain a bomb?
我不知道。包裹不是你亲自销毁的吗？
I don't know. Didn't you destroy the bomb yourself?
你要是实在好奇，就把它找回来拆开看看吧——这次就不用来告诉我了。
If you're really curious, you can always get it back and open it to have a look — no need to tell me this time.
好了，我还有工作，先失陪了。再次感谢你对仙舟罗浮的贡献！
Alright, I have some more work to complete, so I shall take my leave. Once again, thank you for your contributions to the Xianzhou Luofu!
景元让我把这个交给你。
Jing Yuan told me to give this to you.
好了，我知道了。小型中子辐射炸弹是吧？我去转交给十王司的人。感谢你对神策府工作的大力支持。
Okay, I understand. A mini-neutron bomb, is it? I'll pass it over to the Ten-Lords Commission. Thank you for your support for the Seat of Divine Foresight's cause.
完成了，剩下的交给我们就好，你可以走了……
That's all. Just leave the rest to us. You may take your leave...
可它好像离开我就会爆炸…
But it felt like it will go off once I leave...
真的吗？你把它给我试试。
Really? Can you give it to me?
感谢你的配合！剩下的交给我们就好，你可以走了……
Thank you for your cooperation! Just leave the rest to us. You may take your leave...
肯定炸不了，不信我演示给你看——
It won't. I can demonstrate for you—
（刚才发生了什么事？炸弹爆炸了吗？）
(What happened? Did the bomb go off?)
（好家伙…都把我炸飞到这里来了？！）
(Dang... I was blown all the way here!?)
丹鼎司。刚才你好像在神策府吓晕了，青镞连忙联系我赶过去救人呢！
The Alchemy Commission. It sounds like you were scared unconscious in the Seat of Divine Foresight, so Qingzu contacted me to rush over to save you!
炸弹把我炸飞到这儿了？！
The bomb blew me all the way here!?
炸弹？噢，你说那个惊吓箱吧！青镞和我大概说明了一下状况……
Bomb? Oh, you meant the prank scare box? Qingzu explained most of the situation to me...
重生？你又不是我们持明！怎么还在说胡话呀…让我再给你电两下——
Reborn? You're not one of us Vidyadhara! Why are you talking nonsense... Maybe you need more electrotherapy...
哎，别逃别逃！我开玩笑的啦。还是先聊聊刚才发生的事吧？
Hey, don't run away! I was only kidding. You want to talk about what happened just now?
所以，到底发生什么事了？你为什么会被一只惊吓箱吓晕过去啊？
So, what happened exactly? Why were you knocked out by a prank scare box?
Prank scare box? I don't know.
啊，这…看来你也不知道啊。
Hm... Looks like you don't know either.
哦，对了！青镞小姐把箱子里的字条留给我了——你看看，兴许有印象呢？
Oh, right! Qingzu left the note inside the box for me. Take a look. Maybe it will jog your memory?
这是你的熟人吗？居然会搞这么复古的恶作剧，这人看起来也不简单啊。
Is this someone you know? To pull off such an old-school prank... this person doesn't seem ordinary at all.
哦，差点忘了这个…青镞小姐还让我把这些交给你——她的原话是：「感谢你对神策府工作的支持，顺便报答你拯救了仙舟罗浮所有人。」

Oh, yes, almost forgot... Qingzu also asked me to give this to you. Her exact words are: "Thank you for your support of the Seat of Divine Foresight's work, and also for saving everyone on the Xianzhou Luofu."
你就收下吧！另外，身体要是还不舒服，记得随时来找我呀。
So, keep it! By the way, if you still feel under the weather, come find me anytime.
你是？难道…咳咳，听好了，「做一休五好福利」？
Who are you? Could you be... ahem, listen, "One day of work, five days off, comes with good benefits"?
What does that mean? I don't understand...
别装傻了，是你本人就直说，别磨叽。
Don't play dumb. If it's really you, just say it. Don't beat around the bush.
It's dangerous here. Get down from there!
什么呀？我又不是来寻短见的，我只是累了坐下来歇会儿。
What? I'm not here to off myself. I was just tired, so I sat down to rest.
不对啊，卦象明明说「纯路人」此时此刻定在附近。
That's not right. The hexagram said Pure_Passerby will definitely be around here during this time.
你老实交代，你到底是不是「纯路人」？
I really am just passing by.
我也不知道我算不算是…
I don't know if I am...
嗐，浪费我时间，我还以为你就是那家伙呢——就是个前几天追着我回复的，取了个阴阳怪气的名字叫什么「纯路人」的混账。
Tsk, what a waste of my time. I thought you were that person who was harassing me a few days ago with a weird username called Pure_Passerby.
搞了半天你只是个真路人啊，真没劲儿！亏我在这里等了这么久……
But it turns out you're really just a passerby. What a let-down! I waited for so long...
看你的样子，你应该是个化外民吧——行，那我跟你说说倒无妨。
You look like an outworlder. Fine, it shouldn't hurt if I tell you.
前几天我打开玉兆随便看看，发现有个刚成年的小老弟在问是报考太卜司好，还是去工造司好。

A few days ago, I was browsing randomly on my jade abacus, and there was a young man who just turned adult. He was asking if he should apply for the Divination Commission or the Artisanship Commission.
我是过来人，我就给他分析了工造司的优点——你想啊，里面的匠人都是靠手艺吃饭的，有门技术傍身安多好啊！

I've been there before, so I gave him a brief breakdown of the pros of the Artisanship Commission. You see, the craftsmen earn their living with their craftsmanship. Wouldn't it be great to have a skill you could always rely on?
咱们仙舟上谁不知道，工造司主持的项目多，只要你老实干活，赚得也多。要是运气好，发明了个什么机巧物件，把专利卖出去……

Everyone on the Xianzhou knows that the Artisanship Commission oversees many projects, and as long as you work hard, you can earn a lot. If you're lucky enough to invent some kind of mechanical device and sell the patent...
嚯，虽说专利过了保护期就不能收费了，但满打满算，怎么说也能躺在专利费上舒舒服服地混上几十年。
So, although you cannot collect fees after the patent protection period expires, if you're smart about it, you can still comfortably live off the patent fees for decades.
再说了，工造司里都是些匠人，一切凭手上的本事说话，同僚们行事直爽，年轻人过去定不会吃亏。
Besides, everyone in the Artisanship Commission is a craftsman. Over there, skills speak for themselves. There's no office politics, so young people won't be at a disadvantage if they join.
What was he chewing you out about?
哎，我说什么他就骂什么，骂得可难听了。
Eh, he lambasted me on almost every point I made.
就是啊，人心不古，世风日下！
Exactly! Humanity is on a sharp decline nowadays!
他逐一驳斥了我举出来的那几条「工造司的好处」，骂得可凶了，还说什么现在仙舟上最吃香的就是太卜司。

He refuted the advantages of the Artisanship Commission I raised one by one, and gave me a fierce tongue-lashing, saying that the most popular workplace on the Xianzhou now is the Divination Commission.
嘿，我寻思我就是太卜司的，我怎么不知道还有这事呢！他这信口胡诌，不是教坏小孩嘛！
Meh, I'm from the Divination Commission myself, why didn't I know about this? The nonsense he spouts is going to lead the kid down a wrong path!
当然，我也不是什么懦夫，我和他吵了几天，感觉也没什么意思，就干脆约他出来，咱们当面论道论道。
I'm not a coward either. We argued for a few days, but it didn't seem to lead anywhere, so I suggested we meet in person and have a face-to-face discussion.
「你来工造司最大的货运星槎上，咱俩当面论道论道」这条回复是我公开发的，他看到了，大家也看到了，他还答应要来呢！
"Come to the largest freight starskiff on the Artisanship Commission, let's talk face-to-face." I posted this publicly, so he and everyone should have seen it. He even said he'll be here!
他跟我说自己是工造司的，我当然不信了，什么年代了，不会真有人自报家门吧？
He said he's from the Artisanship Commission, so of course I didn't believe him. In this economy, why would anyone reveal their true background?
所以我就选在他们最大的货运星槎上咯，往来的匠人那么多，他要是敢来…我就可以当场揭穿他，把经过再发出去，嘿嘿……

So I chose to have it at the largest freight starskiff they have. With so many craftsmen coming in and out, if he dares to show his face, I'll expose all of his fake wisdom and post it online. By then, heheh....
So why haven't we seen him?
我也不知道啊，我跟他说得清清楚楚呢，「工造司最大的货运星槎上」，你看这里不就是吗？可能是这个冒牌货心虚不敢来吧！
How would I know? I told him very clearly to meet at "the largest freight starskiff in the Artisanship Commission." Isn't that here? Maybe this impostor is too scared to come!
这个冒牌货真是没品，来都不敢来，枉我一大早就打了星槎过来…哼哼，这几天拜访工造司的人太多，停泊口都按单双号来管制了。

This impostor has so little integrity, he didn't even show up. I came all the way here early in the morning by starskiff... Hmph, there have been so many visitors to the Artisanship Commission in the past few days, the dock has implemented an odd-even number restriction system.
多亏我来得早，单号航道口可是工造司里最繁忙的停泊点，再晚点可没位置了……
It's a good thing I came early. The odd-numbered lane is the busiest docking point in the Artisanship Commission. If I came any later, there wouldn't be any space left...
对了，你要是见着疑似这家伙的人了，还请来与我知会一声！要真是他，我定会准备些薄礼好好报答你！
By the way, if you happen to come across someone who looks like this guy, please let me know! If it's really him, I'll prepare a small gift to thank you!
你是哪位？我见你方才看了我好几眼，难道……
Who might you be? You were looking at me for quite a while over there, perhaps...
噢，那应该是我认错人了。
Oh, then I probably got the wrong person.
哈哈，巧了，从某种意义上来，我也算是个「路人」。
Haha, what a coincidence. In some ways, I'm also a "passerby."
那没事了，我还以为你就是那个扬言要揍我的家伙呢。
That's good then. I thought you were the person who threatened to beat me up.
也是，你明明就是个化外民，怎么可能是你…也怪我，刚刚没动脑子。
Also, you are clearly an Outworlder. How could it be you... I guess it's my fault for assuming earlier.
Who wanted to beat you up?
Who did you think I was?
就是一个叫「摆烂真舒服」的家伙，你听听这名字，显然就不是什么正经人。
Someone called ComfortablySlacking. Just listen to that handle, it must not be someone serious.
前不久我看这个家伙到处吹嘘工造司怎么怎么好，鼓动不懂事的年轻人来报考。
Just a while ago, this person was hamming up about how good life at the Artisanship Commission is, and was trying to strong-arm a naive young 'un to apply with us.
我就一口气写了三十条回复揭穿他，惹得他极生气，到处放话说要和我碰一碰。
So I responded with thirty replies to expose his lies. He was so riled up, he openly threatened to meet me face-to-face to have a fight.
我心想谁怕谁啊，我在工造司这上百年可不是吃素的，他要是敢来，我指定给他个教训！

I thought to myself, who's afraid of whom? I've been in the Artisanship Commission for over a hundred years, and I didn't get to where I am by being a pushover. If he dares to come, I'll be sure to give him a lesson he won't forget!
所以你都说了些什么呢？
噢，没什么的，他不是吹嘘工造司多好多好嘛，我就摆证据讲事实给辩驳回去。
Oh, nothing. He was boasting about how working for the Artisanship Commission is good, so I just told him some facts as a retort.
他说工造司项目多，挣的钱也多。哼，说是这么回事，可跑项目的，成天派驻在外，常年离家，这钱挣了有啥用啊？

He said the Artisanship Commission oversees a lot of projects and earns a lot of money. That part is accurate, but those who are in charge of projects are always stationed away from home. What's the point of earning so much?
还有什么靠机巧发明一夜暴富的事，那都是老掉牙的事情了。这么多年下来，殊不知那些自诩天才的想法，早就被前人做了个遍。

And that point about overnight wealth from inventing ingenia... those are all old-fashioned stories. Over the years, those ideas from self-proclaimed geniuses have been done over and over again by past generations.
要我看，年轻人还是去太卜司舒服。就待在仙舟上喝喝茶算算卦，坐着刷刷玉兆就把钱挣了，多舒服啊！

In my opinion, young people should go to the Divination Commission for an easy life. Just stay on the Xianzhou, drink some tea, do some divination, and earn money by scrolling on the jade abacus. It's so comfortable!
可这人偏要出来造谣生事，「无脑选工造司」？我说哥们儿，这种事骗骗自己就算了，坑害别人可不好。

But this person insists on spreading rumors, something about "Don't overthink, choose the Artisanship Commission." I mean, if you want to deceive yourself with such things, that's on you, but it's not good to harm others.
但这家伙非说我在冒充匠人，缠着要我和他来工造司最大的星槎上碰一碰。笑了，也不知道是谁给他的底气！

But this guy keeps insisting that I am impersonating a craftsman and keeps asking me to meet him on the largest starskiff of the Artisanship Commission. It's ridiculous. I don't know who gave him the confidence!
Then why do you agree to it?
当然啊，在自家地方谁怕谁啊？再说了，我又不是什么莽夫。
Why wouldn't I? I'm on my home turf. Why should I be afraid? Besides, I'm not a reckless person.
此事我早向云骑举报过了，我说有人埋伏在这儿扬言要教训我。哼，只要他敢动手，只要我高呼一声，定有埋伏好的云骑将他当场逮捕！

I've already reported the incident to the Cloud Knights. I told them someone was threatening to "teach me a lesson." Hmph, as soon as he tries anything, I'd yell, and the ambushed Cloud Knights will arrest him on the spot!
没有，我估计是还没到吧。不过没关系，他迟到是他的事，反正我提前跟云骑打过招呼了。
No, I guess he's not here yet. But worry not. Him being late is not my concern. I already did my due diligence by informing the Cloud Knights.
他们派了人来保护我，就埋伏在附近呢，可惜…可惜这怂包一直不敢露面！
They sent people to protect me. They're just lying low nearby. What a shame this coward doesn't dare to show his face!
最近咱们工造司的货运流量太大，搞什么星槎单双号限行了，我估计他还在排队等星槎吧。

Recently, the cargo flow in our Artisanship Commission has been too high, and they have implemented a system of odd-even number restrictions for starskiffs. I think he's probably still waiting in line for a starskiff.
毕竟他又不像我，身为工造司的匠人，能享受免费和免排队搭乘工造司星槎的「内部福利」。
After all, he's not like me. As a craftsman of the Artisanship Commission, I can enjoy free and prioritized travel with Artisanship Commission starskiffs. An internal benefit, you see.
哎，说是「福利」，实际上磕碜得很。你别看这里往来的货运星槎络绎不绝，但大部分都是问天舶司借调的，属于咱们工造司的星槎，屈指可数！

Well, they call it benefit, but in reality it's pretty shabby. Don't be fooled by the constant stream of freight starskiffs coming and going here. Most of them are borrowed from the Sky-Faring Commission. The number of starskiffs that actually belong to our Artisanship Commission can be counted on one hand!
所以这「内部福利」，也只能在这几艘星槎上享受…偏生这星槎还经常晚点，老是让我一顿好等……
So this "internal benefit" can only be used on a select few starskiffs... But starskiffs are always delayed, I often had to wait so long...
仙舟时下最火热的那个争论啊——在讨论六大司部哪个最适合年轻人就职。
The hottest topic on Xianzhou, of course. The one about which of the six major commissions are most suitable for new workforce members.
某位自称是卜者的和自称在工造司干活的家伙吵了起来，还闹着要在工造司门口约架。
Some guy who claims to be a diviner was having a feud with some guy who claims to work for the Artisanship Commission, and they even wanted to have a fight-off in front of the Artisanship Commission.
其实争论来争论去…要我看，这六大司部都不行，带出来的人也不行在，啧啧。
Actually, all this arguing back and forth... in my opinion, none of the six major commissions are any good, and the same applies for the people who work there. Tsk tsk.
You're so young. How can you be so sure?
嘁，你懂什么，别看我还小，但我可比这种白活了几百年的大人聪明多了。
Tch, what do you know? I may look young, but I'm so much smarter than these adults who have lived for centuries.
你什么眼神呐，你可别不信——我就这么说吧，单单这约架的事，我可是从中赚了个盆满钵满！
What's that look for? Don't believe me? Let me tell you, just from this fight alone, I made a ton of money!
左一个卜者右一个匠人的，嘁，还不是被我玩得团团转！不过如此！
They might be a diviner and a craftsman, but they are no match for me! They're so easy!
Please elaborate and help me understand.
So what exactly did you do?
哈哈！没什么，就是…那个「我明年要成年了，六大司部该报考哪个啊？」，这玩意儿是我发的，没想到吧！
Haha, nothing! Just... that whole "I'll be an adult next year, which of the six major commissions should I apply for?" That's me! Bet you didn't expect that, did you?
我看到有人吵架，就去借我兄弟的玉兆煽风点火，这么简单操作几下，就引来了许多人关注。接着就冒出一对傻蛋儿，说要约架。

I saw them going at it, so I borrowed my buddy's jade abacus and started fanning the fire. It was so easy. Before I knew it, it's gone viral. And then these two fools challenged each other to a fight!
哎哟不行了，怎么会有这么好笑的大人呐。我看他们发了地点，就一连租了好些星槎，专门接送看热闹的好事之人。
I can't... these adults are too hilarious! I saw that they posted the location, so I rented multiple starskiffs specifically to shuttle the spectators who came to watch the fun.
结果来的人太多，搞得工造司都分单双号限行了，哈哈！现在我这载客专线火爆得不行！真是多亏了他们！

In the end, so many people came for the fun that the Artisanship Commission had to implement odd-even license plate restrictions. Haha! Now my passenger transport hotline is booming! I really have to thank them!
Doing things like this at this tender age...
什么叫小小年纪，我只是看起来小，你看不起谁呢！
Who are you calling tender!? I only look like a child. Are you patronizing me!?
It's not good to instigate flame wars like this...
「钓鱼」讲究的是自愿，我又没逼他们吵架，愿者上钩，能怪谁呢？
It's all about voluntary participation. I didn't force them to argue. If they're willing participants, how can I be blamed?
看热闹的人闻着味儿就来了，结果这俩傻蛋儿连面都没见着，就知道在那儿狂刷玉兆放狠话。
People who wanted to watch the show came on their own. Those two fools only knew how to brag and talk big using the jade abacus, but they didn't even manage to meet face to face.
我估摸着…他俩八成是被单双号分开在两艘星槎上，所以才见不着咯。
I'm guessing... they must've been separated on two starskiffs by the odd-even plate restriction, so they couldn't meet up.
哈哈哈，不过说真的，他们见不见面都无所谓了，反正我这钱是挣够咯！一整年的「快乐茶」和点心钱，嘻嘻！
Hahaha, but to be honest, it doesn't matter if they meet at this point. I've earned enough to afford an entire year's worth of Immortal's Delight and snacks, hee-hee!
为了点钱你就这么狠毒…
Such cruelty just for so little money...
哎呀呀，你别乱骂人，呜呜，我妈妈都没有骂过我。
Hey, don't scold people like that! *sniffle* Not even my mom has scolded me before.
炒作的事都给你玩明白了。
You're a master at viral marketing.
啊？难道你不知道可以这么做吗？那还真是可惜，没有聪明的头脑，注定令人惋惜的童年…哎，你错过了多少赚钱的大好机会啊。
Huh? Don't you know that's something that can be done? What a shame. Without the smarts, you will live a pitiful childhood... You missed out a great earning opportunity.
学堂里的先生说过，「是时势造就英雄，而非英雄造就时势」，可我偏不信。
The abecedary in the lyceum always say that "it's the era that builds heroes, not heroes that build the era." I don't believe it.
我琢磨了大半年，别的道理我还没悟出来，不过这「时势」可真有意思，只要势头起来了，英雄不英雄的先不说，这财源反正是滚滚来了。

I've been pondering for half a year, and I haven't figured out other truths yet, but this "era" thing is really fascinating. As long as the momentum is up, it doesn't matter whether the person is a hero or not. The money just keeps rolling in.
嘻嘻，我看他们活了几百岁，怕不是活到机巧鸟身上去了。你要是想看热闹，就去货运星槎上找找吧，说不定能见到这两个蠢蛋呢！
Hee-hee, look at them, living for centuries in vain. If you want to see some fun, go check out the freight starskiffs. You might even see the two dolts!
你要看热闹，就找他们本人去吧，一个在我家<unbreak>49783</unbreak>号星槎上，一个在我家<unbreak>49784</unbreak>号星槎上，你要去看就自己去吧！

If you want to watch the show, go find them yourself. One is on starskiff <unbreak>49783</unbreak> and the other is on starskiff <unbreak>49784</unbreak>, both of which I rented. If you want to watch, go by yourself!
呃，又是你？怎么说，你有那家伙的下落了？
It's you again? How was it, did you find out the other guy's location?
(Tell him the location of the craftsman)
什么？原来他在另一边？我就说怎么没见到他……
What? He's on the other side? I was wondering why I didn't see him...
好哇，居然还设下局等我，这厮竟然如此阴毒。哼，我这就酝酿一下，得好好写篇檄文将他的龌龊行为公之于众！
Wow, he even set up a trap for me to fall into. He's so despicable. Hmph, I shall be ready and write a denunciation to expose his dirty deeds to the public!
而且他是个小屁孩？这、这实在，我、我不能接受……
And he's just a little twerp? This, this is... I can't take this...
我得静下来好好想想——不不不，我得冷静下来，卜一卦看看接下来该怎么办……
I have to calm down and think... No no no, I have to calm down, and divine my next steps...
咦，是你？你找我有什么事吗？你该不会…知道那家伙在哪儿了吧？快说快说，急死我了！
Oh, it's you? Are you looking for me for something? Could it be... did you find out that oaf's location? Tell me, tell me, I can't wait!
(Tell him the location of the diviner)
岂有此理！这家伙只知道在玉兆上狂磨嘴皮子，这么大个人连自己在哪艘星槎的事都说不清，还反过来怪我！
That nitwit! Only knows how to talk nonsense on the jade abacus. At his age, he still can't even communicate clearly which starskiff he's on, and still blames me!
等着瞧好了，我这就过去…等我先找个趁手的…咦，我的扳手呢？
Just you wait, I'll go meet him myself... Wait, let me find a suitable one first... Hm, where's my wrench?
这小家伙才多大啊，心思怎么这么弯弯绕绕的，想想就吓人……
This little guy's thoughts are already so twisted and convoluted... it's scary to think about...
唔，我得跟附近的云骑兄弟们说一声，我倒要看看他家长怎么收拾他。
Hmm, I need to inform the nearby Cloud Knights. Let's see how his parents will deal with him.
所以我就好心回复，建议那孩子去报考工造司，结果就被这个叫「纯路人」的家伙追着咬，骂得我狗血淋头。
I responded with a well-meaning piece of advice for that kid to apply for the Artisanship Commission. Then, this Pure_Passerby guy chewed me out just for that.
算了，不说这些了。我看你从其他地方赶过来，若是有这家伙的下落，劳驾你再来知会我一声，拜托了！
Let's not talk about this anymore. Since you come from other places, if you manage to spot this guy, please let me know, thank you!
I need to change the title...
啧啧，你也是来看笑话的吧？不过你看起来有些面生啊，看起来像是化外民，难道他们约架的事传这么广了？
Tsk. You're here for a laugh too, aren't you? But you don't look familiar. I think you're an outworlder. I didn't think these fights were known to so many people?
嘿，就是你，哈努兄弟在看着你！
Oh hey, it's you. Brother Hanu has been watching you!
想要和哈努兄弟一起惩奸除恶吗？现在正是时候，匹诺康尼需要你。
Wanna vanquish evil together with Brother Hanu? Well, now's the time: Penacony needs you.
拿上你手边的风衣，戴上你兜里的墨镜，你也可以成为哈努兄弟——不要忘了帅气的绅士帽。
Just grab your coat, wrap on your shades, and you can be just like Brother Hanu. And don't forget that charming hat of yours.
争做哈努兄弟，传递哈努精神。快快行动起来吧！
Be the best Brother Hanu you can be, and spread the good word of Hanu. Get moving, pronto!
不知怎的，你感觉一股莫名的正义感充斥了全身。是时候做些热血开拓者会做的事情了。
You somehow feel a strange sense of justice surging through your body. It's time to do whatever a hot-blooded trailblazer has to do.
一旁的加长飞车愤怒地按起了喇叭。
A premium flying limousine honks its horn in a rage at you.
喂，你怎么把我的粉丝们给打跑了？
Hey, what are you doing driving away all my fans like that?
是啊，惊梦剧团拜服在光明飞车的耀眼魅力之下，这情况很难理解吗？
Sure — can't you see how the Dreamjolt Troupe admires the dazzling charm of Radiant Speedster in awe?
唉，没了这批粉丝，之后不知要过多久才会有人欣赏我的光辉了。
If it weren't for these fans of mine, who knows how long it'd be before anyone discovered me in all my glory?
视野绝佳的观景台，几乎能将整个筑梦边境的景色尽收眼底。
The observation deck with breathtaking views. You can almost see the entire Dream's Edge at a glance.
这确实是个不容易发现的地方。向你介绍这里的人一定非常珍视你们的关系，才会把这幅美景与你分享。
It's not an easy place to find. The person who introduced it to you truly values your friendship by sharing this view.
你回想起和那个女孩共度的时光。你们曾创造过许多值得珍视的记忆，但最让你难以忘怀的，是她揭露真身时的那缕复杂情感。
You think back to the times you spent with her. All those cherished memories... but the one you'll never forget was the complex whirl of emotions when she first revealed her true identity to you.
…她过去的模样只是伪装吗？被怪物刺穿时的流泪是演技吗？那个浑身浴火、带着热浪战斗的家伙，才是真实的她吗？
...Was her past identity all just a ruse? Were those tears when she got stabbed all just an act? Is that being... that thing which fought while being covered in heated flames... who she really is?
怀疑与混沌包裹了你的脑海。说到底，在这片梦里究竟什么是真、什么是假，可远比看上去要模糊许多……
Doubt and confusion leave you discombobulated. After all, the line between what's real and what's false in this dreamscape is far more blurred than it seems...
望着眼前的高楼，你陷入了沉思。
Gazing up at those tall towers before you, you lose yourself deep in contemplation.
当你靠近时，承载甜品的托盘突然开口说话了——
As you draw closer, the tray carrying the desserts somehow suddenly speaks to you:
来吃点甜甜圈吧，梦里不会有负担！
Come try a donut, and ease those dreamy burdens of yours!
不不，还是来吃蛋糕吧，烘焙食品更加松软可口！
Wait, no, how about a slice of cake instead? The baking's so fluffy and scrumptious!
只要你喜欢仓鼠球骑士，我们就是好朋友！
So long as you like Hamster Ball Knight, we'll be great friends!
哈努钟表不拆不逆，对家勿扰！什么？无差——无差也不行！
Don't break or wind back Hanu's clock! Don't touch a thing! What? It's the same... It can't be the same, either!
克劳克影视乐园的导览图，文图简洁生动、一看就懂，适用于各类人群。
The map of Clock Studios Theme Park is bright, simple, obvious at a glance, and suitable for all types of people.
乐园的三大主题区彼此独立。想要在板块之间穿梭，你必须借助「气泡弹珠」。
The three themed areas stand independently of each other. If you want to scoot between each, you'll have to use a Bubble Pinball.
「欢迎来到克劳克影视乐园，愿您在这里度过美好的一天！」
"Welcome to the Clock Studios Theme Park. We hope you enjoy a wonderful day here!"
导演用于监控拍摄现场的闭路电视，可惜这里没有导演，也没有演员。
A closed-circuit monitor is used by the director to keep an eye on-set. Unfortunately, there is no director here — nor any actors.
每个人的一生都在被镜头记录着，有时是监控摄像，有时是他人的双眼。
The entire life of each and every person is captured by a lens — be it closed-circuit cameras or the eyes of others.
影视乐园里，就连电视都总是成双成对……
In this theme park, even the TV sets all come in pairs...
看什么看，没看过现充啊？！
What are you looking at? Never seen anyone living a fulfilling life before?
既然总是播放相同的画面，为什么还要特意放两台电视呢？
Why would anyone ever set up two screens like this if they're both going to be playing the same thing?
影城内设的店铺，出售纪念品和小零食。
There's a shop inside the theme park selling memorabilia and snacks.
略显冷清的店铺，货架上还摆着微笑的钟表小子小人。
Smiling Clockies lines the shelves of a slightly cold and sterile store.
出租角色装扮道具的小屋，提供哈努兄弟面具和高帽。不过大部分人无法驾驭这套衣服。
There's a hut renting out character props with Hanu masks and top hats, despite most people being incapable of pulling off such an outfit.
店铺位置极佳，旁边就是打卡点。可惜现在除了你，大概就只有惊梦剧团会光顾了。
The location of the store is fantastic, right next to the famous photo spot. It's a real shame that apart from you, the only ones who'll ever get to visit would be from the Dreamjolt Troupe.
《寻星顽童》，在匹诺康尼颇受欢迎的童话故事，曾被翻拍过多个版本。
Urchin Starhunters, a popular fairy tale in Penacony, has been remade several times.
《寻星顽童》，艺术鉴赏家百大必看之一。如果想衡量一位导演的艺术水准，只需要看他如何评价这部作品就够了。
Urchin Starhunters is a must-see masterpiece for serious aficionados. If you want the measure of a director's talent, all you need to know is how they rate this work.
《仓鼠球骑士冒险谭》，匹诺康尼最经典的系列IP之一，已经推出了百余部续作。
The Adventures of Hamster Ball Knight is one of Penacony's most classic IP series, launching over a hundred spin-offs.
《仓鼠球骑士冒险谭》，老少咸宜的合家欢电影，屹立不倒的摇钱树——只要敢拍就有人看。
The Adventures of Hamster Ball Knight is great for the whole family, and a real cash cow — it'll always have an audience so long as you're bold enough to shoot it.
《黑衣哈努》，全年不间断放映中。
Hanu in Black is screening all year round.
见识一下吧，哈努兄弟无敌的——哈努哈努回旋加速喷气式哈努哈努炮！
Come witness the invincible Brother Hanu and his Hanu-Hanu Tornado Speed Jet Hanu-Hanu Cannon!
不用太羡慕，或许某天你也能拥有这样一把帅气的武器呢。
Don't be too jealous now — one day, you might be able to get your hands on such an awesome weapon.
这辆斯坦威游隼把灯光开得巨大，足以让站在面前的人短暂失明。
The Steinway Falcon turns its headlamps up bright enough to temporarily blind anyone standing in front of it.
在我面前，即使黑暗也无所遁形！
Before me, even the darkness has nowhere to hide!
灯光毫无迟滞地射向前方，就像这辆飞车绝不犹豫的正义感。
The light shines on in unimpeded brilliance, just like the car's own unflinching sense of justice.
隐约间耳边似乎传来一阵低喃：「谁在这种地方开远光灯啊，真没素质！」
There's a faint mumble off to one side: "Who uses high-beam lights in a place like this? How trashy!"
乐园正在筹备中的大型项目，内置了高楼追逐、街角枪战等数个场景，足以让游客们完整体验哈努兄弟大战坏人的全过程。
There's a huge project still under construction featuring high-rise chase scenes and urban gunfights that'll give tourists the complete experience of Hanu taking down the bad guys.
哈努兄弟主题的密室逃脱店，可以提供风味十足的换装服务。开业时间尚不确定。
The Hanu-themed escape room offers stylish dress-up services. The opening hours have not yet been set.
介于这里目前的状况，这家店不知道还有没有开业的机会……
Based on how things are currently going here, whether or not this store even gets a chance to open up remains to be seen...
这些豪车的门连接着一个个私密观影包厢，顾客只需拉开车门就能进入影院落座——在高峰时段，一辆车甚至可以同时服务上千个顾客。

The doors of these limousines are all connected to individual private viewing booths. The audience just needs to open the car door to enter the cinema and sit down — One limousine can even simultaneously service thousands of customers during peak hours.
安装了传送装置的豪车，通往位于口袋梦境的包厢，给人以最为私密的观影体验。
A limousine with teleporters that are directly connected to pocket dimension Dreamscapes, providing one with the most private cinema experience.
这不是豪华飞车，这是家族的观影包厢。在广阔的银河系里，一个私人包厢大概是对逐梦客来说最有用的东西了。
This isn't a luxury speedster but The Family's private cinema box. In the vast Cosmos having a personal box is pretty much the most useful thing for a Dreamchaser.
原本是专门为皮皮西人设立的包厢，不过事实证明其它种族的需求和皮皮西人没什么不同。
This box was originally designed for a Pepeshi, however, it seems that the requirements of other species are not so different from the Pepeshi.
水，是生命的源泉，文明的摇篮…就在你的眼前，一颗颗水珠正缓慢地滋润着地面。
Water is the source of all life and the cradle of civilization... It is soaking the dry ground below, drip-by-drip, right before your eyes.
在许多年以后，有的星星变冷，有的星星诞生，这块小小的湿润之地，也会迎来独属于它的生命。
As the years pass, some stars will be extinguished and others will be born. This small and moist patch of land will also see life bloom — life that only belongs to this place.
当水洼里的科学家追溯历史，抬头仰望，是否会感慨这源于失修水管的奇迹。
When the scientists of this small puddle come to trace their history and look up to the heavens, would they be moved by the miracle that originated from a single broken water pipe?
到那时，这根水管里的水必然被尊为圣物，千金难求。
When that time comes, the water in this pipe is sure to be heralded as a divine object and become almost impossible to obtain.
既然如此，不如现在就去接一滴下来，几亿个琥珀纪后，你也能成为百万富翁。
If that's the case, why not take a drop for yourself now? In a few Amber Eras, it could make you a millionaire.
在此偏僻的一角，你发现了故人的踪迹。
In this remote corner, you discover traces of an old friend.
画还挺像，有鼻子没眼的，两根指针更可谓神来之笔。
The picture is pretty accurate, with a nose but no eyes, and the two clock hands are almost masterfully drawn.
当然，也不排除只是用涂鸦替代了路标和指示牌，希望把来到此处的旅者引向某个秘密之地。
Of course, you can't rule out that the graffiti has been used to replace road signs and signposts in hopes of luring travelers to some kind of secret area...
井盖下的热气喷涌而出，仿佛一个新生的火山口，以炙热的咆哮鞭笞世界。
Hot steam bursts forth from under the manhole cover, lashing at the world with a fiery roar like a newly-birthed volcano.
没错，它就是著名的七井盖之一，毁灭之井盖！
That's right, this is one of the famous Seven Manhole Covers, the Manhole Cover of Destruction!
井盖下的热气升腾而起，迅如雷电，像是追逐着什么，笔直地向更高处散去。
The hot steam from under the manhole cover bursts upwards like lightning, as if it is chasing something, before dissipating straight up into the heavens.
是的，它正是伟大的七井盖之一，巡猎之井盖！
Indeed, this is one of the great Seven Manhole Covers, the Manhole Cover of The Hunt!
井盖下的热气温柔地呼出吐息，白雾轻吻行人的脸颊，将温暖无私地赠予。
The hot steam from under the manhole cover rises gently like a slow exhalation. Kissing the cheeks of passers-by, it selflessly donates its warmth.
哇哦，这难道是传说中的七井盖之一，丰饶之井盖！
Wow, could this be one of the legendary Seven Manhole Covers, the Manhole Cover of Abundance!
井盖下的热气以高效且均匀分布的状态散去，如同早已写好的程序。
The hot steam under the manhole cover dissipates evenly and effectively, like a program that was written long ago.
可以确认，这便是故事里的七井盖之一，智识之井盖！
You can be certain that this is one of the Seven Manhole Covers from the stories. This is the Manhole Cover of Erudition!
井盖下的热气将你笼罩，你是谁？你要去哪儿？生亦何苦？死亦何哀？
The hot steam from under the manhole cover envelops you. Who are you? Where are you going? What pain is there in life? What suffering is there in death?
它就是那神秘的七井盖之一，虚无之井盖！
This must be one of the mysterious Seven Manhole Covers, the Manhole Cover of Nihility!
井盖下的热气无声无息，它的庇佑使所有寒气都从你身边逃离。
The hot steam from under the manhole cover is silent and unstirring. Its protection banishes all cold from around you.
真好，它便是神奇的七井盖之一，存护之井盖！
Wonderful, this must be one of the mystical Seven Manhole Covers, the Manhole Cover of Preservation!
井盖下的热气齐唱着歌谣，每一颗水分子都手牵着手，分享彼此的喜悦。
The steam from under the manhole cover is united in song. Each water molecule is sharing their joy, hand-in-hand.
呱，想必它就是无敌的七井盖之一，同谐之井盖！
Ah, this must be one of the incomparable Seven Manhole Covers, the Manhole Cover of Harmony!
恭喜，你已集齐了神圣的七大热气井盖之加护，你的威名在井盖界无盖不知，无盖不晓。
Congratulations, you have collected the blessings of the sacred Seven Manhole Covers. Now your great name is known by all throughout the world of the manhole covers.
你问井盖的加护有什么用？这你就问到点上来了。
You want to know what the blessings of the manhole covers do? You're hitting the nail on the head.
店长听到一些小小的声音，希望他能把节目换成《钟表小子》和《折纸小鸟历险记》。
The shopkeeper overheard some faint voices asking him to change the channel so that they could watch Clockie and Origami Bird Adventures.
坏脾气的店长当然不会允许，这些东西可是用来卖的，他们来凑什么热闹？
Of course, the grumpy shopkeeper wouldn't allow this. He was trying to make a sale. What were these kids doing here causing him trouble?
于是孩子们趴在橱窗前，补完了整整六部的《钟表小子》，直到他们长大。
So, the children sat in front of the store window and watched all six parts of Clockie until they became adults.
「人潮分外拥挤，世界光怪陆离，而我唯独爱你。」
"Though the streets are crowded and the world has so much to see, you are the only one for me."
情侣们总是在打卡后配上这样一句文案，还在单身的广告牌先生对此嗤之以鼻。
Couples always post a phrase like this when they take pictures here. Mr. Billboard, who is still single, can't help but turn his nose up at the words.
在破损以前，广告牌先生是这条街上最靓的大众情人。
Before he was broken, Mr. Billboard was the biggest paramour on this street.
但他所爱的那位女士追着黄金的繁华而去，只留下悲痛欲绝的绿光。
But the woman that he loved left in search of fortune and prosperity, leaving only the green glow of grief behind.
广告牌先生还记得刚开张的那天，花瓣撒满街头，美梦化成的鸟儿在巷子里歌唱。
Mr. Billboard still remembers the day he was posted... Petals were scattered across the streets, and birds woven from dreams sang their songs throughout the alleyways.
哪怕是后来叱咤风云的「钟表匠」，也对这里的风景赞不绝口。
Even the soon-to-be all-powerful Watchmaker could not praise the scenery here enough.
《光荣之梦》，以群像剧的形式，展现了五大家系将监狱星改造成盛会之星的壮阔历史。
Dreams of Glory is an ensemble drama that tells the magnificent history of how the five lineages transformed a prison world into the Planet of Festivities.
——从这鲜红的颜料中可以看出，这片在流梦礁的评分不会太高。
...Judging from this bright-red paint, it does not seem that it scored a particularly good reception at Dreamflux Reef...
已经有段年岁的电影海报，在艺术风格上颇具匹诺康尼特色。
The aged movie poster has some classic Penaconian characteristics in terms of its art style.
只是不知道，这些红色的涂鸦和弹孔，是否也是艺术的一部分？
You're just not quite sure if the red graffiti and bullet holes are part of the art style, too?
有人说《光荣之梦》过度美化了家族在历史中扮演的角色，甚至许多情节都是杜撰捏造。
Some people say that Dreams of Glory overly idealizes the role that The Family played in history and that many of the storylines are completely fabricated.
当然，这只是很少一部分人，很少，很少。
Of course, it's just a small number of people. Very small.
这个巨大的钟表小子是这条街引以为傲的地标，其他街区的孩子都向这里投来艳羡的目光。
The giant Clockie here is this street's proud landmark. Children from other neighborhoods all look upon it with great envy.
对雕像进行清洗和修补，居民们把这视为生活的一部分，巨大的钟表小子也一定把这视为自己生活的一部分。
The citizens see cleaning and maintaining this statue as a part of their lives. The giant Clockie must see this as a part of its life, too.
噩梦锈蚀之下，美梦终将人去楼空，但钟表小子的笑容永恒。
Beautiful dreams are always sure to fade away under the corrosion of nightmares, but Clockie's smile is eternal.
在不少电影和游戏的情节里，这样的雕像最后都会站起来，与你发生一场激烈的战斗。
It is a common plot in a lot of movies and video games that a statue like this will rise up and face you in glorious battle.
钟表小子的手指指向了天空，但流梦礁的天空被美梦的灯火遮蔽。
Clockie's finger is pointing towards the sky, but the skies of Dreamflux Reef are obscured by the lights of dreams.
他是想让你仰望美梦的美好？是在嘲笑美梦的虚伪？还是在指引你向上寻找此处的秘密？
Does he want you to look up in admiration of the beauty of the dreams? Or is he mocking their hypocrisy? Or, perhaps he's guiding you upwards in search of the secrets of this place?
广告牌小姐优雅地躺在货架先生的怀里，他们沉浸在彼此的坚硬身躯中，挡住了你的去路。
Miss Billboard is gracefully laid in the embrace of Mr. Shelf. They have lost themselves in each other's hard, unyielding bodies and are blocking your path ahead.
这边是垃圾袋爵士，他辞别了温暖的垃圾桶，只为护得广告牌小姐周全。
Over here is Sir Trashbag. He has bid farewell to the warmth of this trashcan to protect Miss Billboard.
后面是货架先生，他抱着从天而降的广告牌小姐。他们刚刚发生了一场激烈的邂逅，这份桃花让两人不由得有些狼狈。
Behind is Mr. Shelf. He is holding Miss Billboard, who fell from the sky, in his arms. They have experienced quite an intense encounter and the romantic situation has left them a little flustered.
猩红的门后世界，像极了葛瑞迪影业的限制级电影会出现的场景，可能是恐怖片，也可能是……
The world behind the scarlet door is similar to what one might find in a Grady Films R-rated movie. It could be a horror film, or perhaps...
这扇门的一丝缝隙似乎是故意留下的，渗出的红光一定是某种邪恶之物的邀请，为了你的灵魂，请遏制住不必要的好奇心。
The slight crack in this door has been intentionally left open. The red light that spills forth must be an invitation from some evil entity. You must control your curiosity for the sake of your soul.
门后是什么呢？呜呜伯、龙、绝灭大君、某位星神本尊…梦中的每扇门后都藏有无限的可能，还是不要轻易打开为妙。
I wonder what's behind the door? A Wubbaboo? A dragon? Lord Ravager? A great Aeon...? Every door inside the Dreamscape holds unlimited possibilities, it would be best not to go opening them lightly.
鉴于它总是发出「滴答」的声音，有学者认为，这根水管极可能是钟表小子的粉丝。
Some scholars believe that this leaky water pipe must be a fan of Clockie, as it maintains a steady "ticking" rhythm.
文学家认为，水管日复一日的哭泣，或许是在哀悼因战争而逝去的恋人。
Literature scholars believe that this water pipe cries day after day, perhaps in mourning for a lover lost in war.
生态学家认为，持续地保持地面湿润，应该是水管用于标记领地的一种方式。
Ecologists believe that keeping the ground constantly wet is likely a way for water pipes to mark their territory.
看，一台长得像垃圾桶的探照灯——也可能是会发光的微型垃圾桶。
Look! There's a searchlight that looks like a trashcan!... Or maybe it is a miniature trashcan that lights up?
钟表小子和指引方向有什么关系呢？这个问题的答案或许就藏在此处。
What is the relationship between Clockie and the directions indicated? Perhaps the answer to this question is hidden nearby.
尊敬的旅客，为保障您的人身安全，请勿在上升途中逗留。
Dearest passenger, please do not stop during your ascent for your own personal safety.
集齐所有标记能召唤钟表小子吗？难说。
Can you summon Clockie by collecting all of the marks? Who knows.
还在播放动画片的老旧电视，黯淡的橱窗里写满了物是人非。
There is an old television that is still playing cartoons. The dark, dim window makes it clear that no one has been here for some time.
所有的电视机都已老去，只剩下一台，还在循环数年前播出的《钟表小子》。
All of these televisions have broken from age, except one that is still playing an episode of Clockie that was aired years ago on repeat.
"Tick-tock, help me! I've been locked inside a television!"
刚才是钟表小子的台词吗？你肯定是听错了。
Was that really Clockie's line? You must have misheard...
想要气球吗？我这儿有各种颜色的，它们都和我一样，静静地漂浮着。
Do you want a balloon? I have all different colored balloons here, floating silently like me.
据说，在广袤的云端之上，生活着一群气球人，它们一生都在上浮，直到炸开。
Apparently, there is a group of balloon people that live high above the vast sky. They spend their whole lives floating upwards until they eventually explode.
也许它们不是气球，而是被坏魔法师抓住的灵魂，在漫长的时间里等待新的替罪羊。
Perhaps they aren't balloons at all, but souls that were captured by an evil sorcerer, suspended in the depths of time, awaiting a new scapegoat.
在气球上画画可是个技术活，一不小心，笔就会打滑，然后引发孩童无限的遐想。
Drawing on a balloon is a true art. One slip of the pen, and it will glide across the surface, leading children to imagine all sorts of things.
「梦境不是家族的宠物，请停止驯化美梦，还睡眠以自由。」
"The Dreamscape is not The Family's pet. Stop taming the beautiful dreams and unchain sleep!"
「橡木脑子像木头，夜鸫只懂搬石头；鸢尾有脸没有皮，苜蓿插在钱眼里；猎犬良心不如狗，家族像个烂皮篓。」

"The Oaks' brains are made of Oak, the Nightingales only know how to move stones, the Iris have status but no shame, the Alfalfa only knows the money game, the Hounds have less morals than a dog, the entire Family is a disgusting bog!"
「近期受匹诺康尼冲击影响，流梦礁街头迷因出现频率抬升，日常出行时请尽量远离边缘区域。」
"The appearance of memes across Dreamflux Reef has increased lately due to Penacony's impact. Please make sure to steer clear of the outskirts during your daily travels."
「生活无望，梦中无趣，想要一场刺激的狂欢？快来试试小罗特的违禁忆泡，都是未经家族审核的狠货，让你爽到醒！」

"Life is hopeless and dreams are dull. You want a carnival of excitement? Come and try Li'l Lottie's banned Memory Bubbles! They're all hardcore products, unapproved by The Family. They'll make you feel so good you wake up!"
这是广告牌，也可能是一把流落到原初梦境的忆域圣剑，哪怕像你这样的银河大侠也没法将它拔出。
This is a billboard, but it may also be a sacred Memory Zone sword that fell into the Primordial Dreamscape. Even a cosmic hero like yourself has no way of drawing it.
你不觉得，扛着一块广告牌大杀四方是件很酷的事吗？
Don't you think it would be awesome to run around slaying your enemies with a billboard?
仅仅是多看了一眼，你就已经为它想好了五种名字和二十一种必杀。
With just one more glance, you've already come up with five potential names and twenty-one finishing moves for this great weapon.
看得出，广告牌的原主人已经很尽力地把它塞进来了，但冰箱里确实装不下大象。
Clearly the original owner of this billboard has tried their hardest to squeeze it in here, but you cannot fit an elephant in a fridge, can you?
一股奇异的香味钻进你的鼻子，带着五分美梦、三分惊悚和两分燃烧的快意。
A strange aroma penetrates your nostrils. You sense <unbreak>50%</unbreak> beautiful dreams, <unbreak>30%</unbreak> horror, and <unbreak>20%</unbreak> thrill of something burning.
就像有位邪恶的美食家，把苏打豆汁儿、苏乐达和岩烧洞螈搅拌到了一起。
It's as if some kind of evil gourmet has mixed mung bean soda, SoulGlad, and stone-grilled olm together.
无论管道的另一端是谁，他的品味都很难让人认同。
I don't care who is on the other side of this pipe, their taste is questionable.
粗暴的涂鸦将过去的文字覆盖，愤怒与不满从殷红的色彩中溢出。
Rude graffiti covers what was written here before. A sense of rage and resentment emanates from the bright red paint.
在有限的墙壁上，醒目的颜料互相攻伐，有如一场基于色彩的帮派战争。
On the wall's limited space, the striking paints clash for supremacy, like some kind of rainbow gang war.
好一双涂鸦圣手，好一杠霸道的红！只添上一笔，便让同谐的标语成为了一件讽刺艺术，哪怕是朋克洛德最朋克的骇客也当甘拜下风。

This graffiti artist of this piece stands out among their contemporaries through their Aeonic skill! The red is so domineering! With a single stroke, they have turned Harmony's slogan into a work of satirical art. Even the most punk of the Punklordian hackers would have no choice but to bow to their rebellious superiority.
阴冷的梦得不到恒星的照耀，但稚嫩的画笔仍能创造自己的太阳。
A gloomy dream will never feel the illumination of the stars' light, but the simple brush can create its own sun.
这里是梦境，如果大家都怀有一颗童心，在未来某天，涂鸦也会变成真正的太阳。
This is the Dreamscape. If we are able to keep within us the innocence of a child, perhaps someday in the future, the graffiti can become an actual sun.
「把我最喜欢的太阳送给大家，请大家多多照顾爸爸妈妈的生意。」
"I shall gift my beloved sun to everyone. Please, I hope you will help my parents' business."
发皱的纸上，满是渴望太阳之人的抚摸。
The paper is wrinkled from the caress of someone who longs for the sun.
危险的无护栏设计，哪怕是在梦境，也属于典型的反面教材。
Even inside the Dreamscape, dangerous designs like missing guardrails are classic examples of what not to do.
在原初梦境，从高处坠落可能没有美梦中那么好运，请注意安全。
Inside the Primordial Dreamscape, you may not be as fortunate when falling from a great height as you would be in a dream. Be cautious.
挣脱护栏的束缚，俯瞰城市的美景——请务必推荐给你的恐高症朋友。
Break free from the shackles of the guardrails and take in the beautiful vistas of the city... Make sure you share this advice with all of your friends that are scared of heights!
从理性角度分析，这应该是张地图，只是充满了梦境的抽象特征。
The logical conclusion would be that this is a map... But it is filled with abstract Dreamscape characteristics.
这是流梦礁的地图，没有人比它更懂流梦礁，可惜也没有人懂它。
This is a map of Dreamflux Reef. No one understands Dreamflux Reef better than this map. Just a shame that no one understands this map.
有个钟表，两栋很高的楼——好吧，你并没能理解这张地图到底想表达什么。
There's a clock and two tall towers... Alright, you have no idea what this map is trying to tell you.
事到如今，再回看地图上的这对大楼，的确让人印象深刻。当年，「钟表匠」也是从它们的夹缝中窥探出了这场梦的未来吧。

Seeing how things are now, the sight of these two towers on the map leaves quite the impression. Back then, the Watchmaker must have peeked through the crack between them to glance at the future of this dream.
你想起了安眠于楼宇之上的三位无名客，方便的话，多回去和他们分享你的开拓之旅吧。
You suddenly remember the three Nameless resting atop the building. If you get time, you should go back and share stories of your trailblazing expedition with them more often.
纵使它已蒙受多年的尘埃侵蚀，纵使它被掩埋在美梦之下，纵使它失去了自己的主人，从这张图纸中，你仍能感受到本属于这座城市的那份壮丽。

So what if it has suffered years of dust and corrosion? So what if it has been buried beneath a dream? So what if it has lost its original master? From this blueprint, you can still sense the majesty that once belonged to this city.
I used to be with the Alfalfa...
The emotional appeal of organic beings...
别想那么多，来一杯再说。
No need to overthink it. Have another drink.
该死，成色上好的货，被那群家伙半道截了。
Darn it, those were darn good products and the robbers took 'em all!
都怪我疏忽大意，否则也不至于中了这么简单的陷阱。
I was too careless. I shouldn't have fallen for such an obvious trap.
人还在就好，梦泡可以想办法再制一批。
It's fine as long as our people are still around. We can find a way to produce another batch of dream bubbles.
该是我们的，总有一天会让他们加倍奉还。
One day, we'll have them pay back everything that belongs to us... Twofold!
看着是新面孔啊，小哥你是怎么过来的？
Now there's a fresh face! How did you come to be here, young man?
这是很久以前的事了…当时，我在巷子里偶遇了一位美丽的迷因。无数动人的眸子，富有美感的流线型利爪，让我的引擎飞速地转动。
It was a long time ago now... Back then, I came across a beautiful meme in an alleyway. It had countless eyes and beautiful, streamlined claws that got my engine racing.
我走向它，为它诵念古代无机生命的情诗，于是它也是羞涩地来到我身边，一把抱住我。
As I walked towards it, I began to read an ancient inorganic being love poem to it. Hearing this, it shyly approached me and grabbed me close.
「钟表匠」已经不在了，没人再庇护我们了，要不咱们也离开吧？
The Watchmaker is gone. There is no one to protect us anymore. Don't you think we should leave?
凭什么我们走？要走的是那群贪得无厌的家伙！
Why should we leave? It's those insatiable thugs that should leave!
放任他们侵蚀这里，总有一天，这座城市连一个梦泡也不会剩下。
If we let them keep corrupting this place, one day there won't be a single dream bubble left in this city!
必须抓紧机会反攻匹诺康尼，不是他们死，就是我们亡！
We need to seize the moment and counterattack Penacony. At this point, it's either their death or ours!
不是说好了？电梯门一开，你去吸引注意，我去敲闷棍？
I thought we agreed on this? When the elevator door opens, you go and distract them and I'll knock them out?
大哥，不是我胆小，这人我实在不敢抢。
Bro, it's not that I'm a coward. I just really don't think I should try robbing that person...
有什么怕的，看我给你演示——嘶，看着不像善茬啊…
What are you so scared of? Look, I'll give you a demonstration... Man, they sure look kinda tough...
Maybe we should just forget it?
要我说，在苜蓿草工作，绝对是我这辈子做过最蠢的事。
If you ask me, working as an Alfalfa is the stupidest thing I've ever done.
我们那儿甚至有个赌局，赌下个月能跳多少人！反正在梦里，谁在乎你？
We've even got a gamble going on over there to see how many people are gonna jump next month! It's a dream after all. Who cares about anyone else's well-being?
谁不是呢？我们鸢尾花，看起来多光鲜啊，大明星名歌手。
Tell me about it. Look at us in the Iris family. We all look like glamorous stars and famous singers...
可几个人能成大明星？我们这些小演员，餐厅里那些服务生，可从来没人关心。
But how many of us can actually become big stars? No one ever cares about us supporting roles or the attendants in the canteen...
是啊，还是这儿过着舒坦。
Yeah, life here is way more comfortable.
感觉还是缺点什么，没法表达出我那堪比中子炸弹爆炸余波的复杂情感。
I still feel like something is missing. I've got so many emotions boiling up that it feels like the aftermath of a neutron bomb. I just can't express it properly.
Can we pack up for the day?
自由，奔放，这才是我追求的终极艺术！让家族的约束统统见反物质军团去吧！
Freedom! Being truly unrestrained! This is the ultimate form of art that I pursue! Let all constraints imposed by The Family be given unto the Antimatter Legion!
所以…有人听我说话吗？什么时候才能收工啊？
So... is anyone listening to me? When can we pack up?
我最近换了个好工作，很快就要永远离开这片梦境了。
I got a great new job recently. I'll soon be able to leave this Dreamscape forever.
真的？想不到我们几个里最早熬出头的是你小子…果然梦终归都是要醒的。
Really? I never would have thought you'd be the first of us to make it, kid... I guess every dream has to end with waking up eventually.
可得把大伙都叫来，好好地欢送你一波。
We have to call everyone together and give you a good send-off!
越是危险的区域，反倒越对它着迷，这就是有机生命说的情调吗？
The more dangerous a place, the more they are fascinated by it. Is this what organic beings mean by "emotional appeal"?
从生理角度看，跨越危机才能抵达的美景，会为他们提供更多的正反馈。
From a physiological point of view, a beautiful end that they must traverse a crisis to reach is more likely to provide them with more positive emotional feedback.
况且，这片空间扭曲本就很美，它以一种巧妙的精度维持着自身稳定，并呈现出光滑的特质。
What's more, the distortion of this space is inherently beautiful. It maintains its stability with remarkable precision and exhibits smooth and sleek properties.
原来如此…谢谢你，我对有机生命的了解又增加了不少。
I see... Thank you, my understanding of organic beings has increased considerably.
最近梦里不怎么太平啊，家族大乱，「钟表匠」也走了。
The Dreamscape hasn't been a peaceful place lately... The Family is in chaos and the Watchmaker is gone.
万一公司趁乱接手了这里，咱们以后的日子可就难过喽…
If the IPC takes this opportunity to seize this place, times ahead will be tough for us here...
想这么多干什么，反正也不是你我能改变的。
What are you doing thinking about all that? It's not like it's something either of us can change.
千愁万悲，都不如先喝上这里的一杯。
Why drown in sorrows when you can drown yourself with a good drink!
总算不用打工了！什么打卡什么绩效，全都滚吧！
I finally don't have to work anymore! Clocking in? Performance assessments? You can all do one!
但我们的钱从哪儿来？存款迟早会花光的。
But where will we get money? Our savings will run out eventually...
过一天算一天呗，你看那些偷渡客，没打工不也活得好好的吗？
We'll take it a day at a time. You see those stowaways over there? They're not working and they seem to be doing just fine, don't they?
没活下去的偷渡客，也不会让我们看到吧…
Well, they're not going to let us see the stowaways that didn't survive, are they...
Now this is a real drink...
Finally I can get a good drink in!
This place is bigger than my house...
人生就是一段上不去的楼梯。
Life is a flight of stairs that you can't climb.
Darn it, the goods got robbed.
Don't worry about the goods. It'll work out as long as the people are all still here.
戒了这杯酒，她就会回来么…
If I quit drinking, will she come back?
我向一位美丽的迷因表白…
I confessed my love to a beautiful meme...
The Watchmaker is gone, we should...
We have to... take over Penacony.
Bro, I'm scared to rob them...
This place used to be so busy...
The shopkeeper... was still here last year.
I keep feeling that something's missing...
我追求的艺术就是这个！
This is the art I'm pursuing!
It's never too late for a good song.
我就要永远离开梦境了。
I am about to leave the Dreamscape forever.
真的？那可得欢送你一波。
Really? Then you need a good send-off!
I am the observer in the cracks...
Looking down upon this city in silence...
There are still people over here.
The Family is about to fall apart!
All of their lies will be exposed!
I told you... you're not a good drinker...
Harmony doesn't understand rock 'n' roll at all...
But where will we get money?
Let's take it a day at a time.
这就是有机生命的自由…
So this is the freedom of organic beings...
我逐渐开始理解他们了。
I am gradually starting to understand them.
A toast to the Dreamscape, stranger!
May its lies never be exposed!
破破烂烂的站牌，带着一个几乎不可见的投币孔。
A dilapidated sign with an obscure coin slot.
「前有隐藏区域，请按秩序候车。注：本站仅支持艾迪恩游戏币进行支付」，你眯着眼，在投币孔下面发现了这行小字。
"A concealed area is up ahead. Please line up to wait for your ride. Note: This stop only accepts Aideen Tokens." You squint your eyes and notice this line of fine print below the coin slot.
你不信邪地塞了枚普通的硬币进去，不到一秒就被它吐了出来…看来，这居然还是个挑食的家伙。
Refusing to relent, you shove some ordinary coins in it — they are spit out right away... Looks like this one's a picky eater.
没办法，只能忍痛牺牲你的游戏币了。
No choice but to heart-wrenchingly sacrifice your tokens.
随着游戏币咕噜噜地滚进站牌的肚子，整个站台也开始发出咔咔咔的声响，有什么东西就此连接了起来，前往下一站的班次也已准备就绪。

As your tokens roll into the sign's belly with a rattling, the entire stop also starts to emit clanking sounds. Something sounds like it got connected, and the ride to the next stop is ready and waiting.
前面的区域，请您继续探索吧。
Please continue exploring the area up ahead.
对不起，本站不提供免费的交通服务，请下次再来吧。
Sorry, this stop does not provide free transportation services. Please come back next time.
已经荒废的列车轨道，梦境的仁慈让它得以逃脱杂草丛生的命运。
An abandoned railway — the Dreamscape's magnanimity has allowed it to escape the fate of being invaded by overgrowth.
可尽管如此，你仍能隐约听见，来自隧道彼端的阵阵轰鸣。
Even if that is the case, you can still faintly hear a constant roaring from the other side of the tunnel.
仿佛下一刻，就会有辆诡谲的列车缓缓进站，将你带向不存在归途的黑色世界。
It's as if in the next moment, an eerie train will slowly pull into the station, to take you to a dark world of no return.
你毫不犹豫地选择了留下，谁能拒绝一辆神秘莫测的列车呢？
You choose to stay without hesitation. Who could resist a mysterious train?
不知不觉间，你的身边似乎多出了许多人，虽然看不见他们，但你知道，大家都是来等待那辆列车的乘客。
Before you realize it, many people seem to have appeared around you. Though you can't see them, you know that they are all passengers waiting for that train.
好吧，列车或许在途中遭遇了什么事故，比如被星核挡住了轨道，用不了一会儿，它就能清理掉障碍，悠哉游哉地行驶到你的面前。
Okay, the train might have run into some issues on its way here, like a Stellaron blocking its way. It won't be long before it can remove the obstacle and swimmingly arrive before you.
来都来了，这时候走，就有点不太礼貌了。
It's already here. It'd be rude if you left now.
你深吸了一口气，侧耳倾听乘客们的交谈，他们说，列车上有免费的甜点，他们说，列车就要来了。
You take a deep breath and listen in on the passengers' banter. They are saying that the train has free desserts, and that it's arriving.
乘客们叽叽喳喳的喧闹将整个车站填满，有了这些想象朋友的陪伴，你开始考虑要不要再等一次？
The passengers' murmuring buzz fills the entire station. With these imaginary friends accompanying you, you're starting to consider if you should wait for the next one?
在比遥远还遥远的地方，列车正满载着戴帽子的猴子、穿鞋子的蜘蛛和会跳舞的蠕虫飞驰而来。
In a place unfathomably far away, the train is speeding here, loaded with monkeys wearing hats, spiders with shoes, and dancing worms.
列车将它们的嬉笑声留在原地，穿过天鹅绒和红宝石铺成的海洋，奔向它在梦境的下一站。而现在，便是它的到站之刻！
The train leaves their mirth where it is, piercing through an ocean paved in velvet and rubies, rushing toward the Dreamscape's next stop. And now, it is the moment of its stop!
嗯…什么都没有发生，难道是因为你没有买票？它载走了那些无形的魂灵，却唯独将你留在原地。
Hmm... nothing happened. Is it because you didn't buy a ticket? It left with those formless spirits, leaving only you in place.
看来是时候未到，你如此告诉自己——想象力太丰富，有时候也并非是件好事。
It's probably not your time, you tell yourself — sometimes, it's not necessarily good to have an active imagination.
以后还是别自己吓自己了。
No point in scaring yourself silly.
所谓的列车，不过是环境影响下的心理作用罢了，你反复告诉自己。
This so-called train is just the environment affecting my senses — you repeat to yourself.
那大概只是隧道的风声而已，你反复告诉自己。
