It's probably just the wind from the tunnel — you repeat to yourself.
不知为何，你忽地被这张沙发吸引住了眼球，像是在雨夜里发现了一颗星星。
This sofa suddenly catches your attention for some unknown reason, like spotting a star on a rainy night.
可是为什么？明明它只是一张平平无奇的沙发，既没有炫酷的螺旋喷射系统，也没有热血的合体变形装置，除非…它是一张能坐的沙发！
But why? It's obviously just a plain old sofa without a flashy spiral spray system or an awesome compound transformation setting, unless... it's a sofa that you can sit on!
快坐下吧，快坐下吧，快坐下吧…沙发向你发出催促。
Sit on me, sit on me, sit on me... The sofa calls out to you.
Then don't mind if I do.
你迫不及待地瘫倒在沙发上，一切的烦恼都在此刻消散作云烟。
You hastily plop yourself on the sofa, all your troubles dissipating away like smoke in an instant.
如果能一直坐在这儿就好了，恍惚间，有什么东西在你身旁耳语道。
If only you could just keep sitting here... Momentarily, something whispers in your ear.
There must be some trick to this.
出门在外，凡事还是谨慎一些为好。
It's always best to be cautious when on a trip.
朋友，旅途辛劳，休息也是必不可少的一部分，要来坐坐吗？
My friend, you've traveled long. Rest is an imperative part of a journey. How about a seat?
你懒散地瘫倒在沙发上，享受起人生的片刻清闲。
You lounge lazily on the sofa, basking in the idyllic moments of life.
There are other things to do.
这是一场试炼，一座难以翻越的「高山」横亘在你的面前。
This is a test. An impregnable "mountain" towers before you.
如此空旷的制高点，站在那里，你将横扫一切敌人，成为世界的中心。
Standing over this vast highland, you sweep away your enemies, becoming the center of the world.
说到底，箱子被堆成了这个形状，不让人爬上去，简直天理难容。
To be fair, these boxes have already been piled up. It'd be a disservice not to climb on atop them.
好欸，居然真的爬上来了！如此美妙的位置，真想把鞋底都涂上胶水，永远地粘在这里——不过，你很快发现，自己好像真不知道怎么下去。

Nice, you actually climbed to the top! Such a gorgeous vantage point... You just want to slather your soles with glue and be stuck to this place forever... But, you quickly realize that you have no idea how to get down.
可恶，这一定是假面愚者的陷阱！
Darn, this must be a trap created by a Masked Fool!
你望着身下，不断祈祷这个世界没有坠落伤害，然后纵身一跃。
You look down, praying that this world has no fall damage, and then take a leap of faith.
How fun, I'm coming back next time.
恭喜，你克服了内心深处的冲动，重新回到了成熟稳重的大人世界。
Congratulations, you've overcome the impulse deep in your heart and returned to the mature, sensible world of adults.
因忆质流失产生的类黑洞结构，贪婪地吮吸着这个已然凋敝的世界。
A black-hole-esque structure spawned from the loss of memoria is ravenously feasting on an already-destitute world.
原本空洞无物的它，在梦中却呈现出引力坍缩的样貌，真是颇为讽刺。
Thought devoid of any substance, it still exhibits the appearance of gravitational collapse in the dream — what irony.
在久远的过去，筑梦师们常常聚集在这里，无数曼妙的想法自谈笑间呱呱坠地。
In the distant past, the Dreamweavers used to gather here, myriad wondrous ideas conjured among cascades of jovial banter.
那些最杰出的人因它而死，那些最伟大的灵感也因它而生。
The most outstanding people died for it, and the most brilliant of souls were born because of it.
一轮满月悬浮于美梦的倒影中，一位稚子在虚假的月光沐浴下安眠。
A full moon cycle hovers over the dream's reflection, a child slumbering beneath the false moonlight.
无论刀剑如何继续交锋，「同谐」的微光依旧愿为熟睡的稚子撑起银色的罗帐。他的梦太长太长，就连列车的汽笛声都再也无法令他惊醒。

Disregarding the clash of mettle, the Harmony's faint light continues to uphold the silver curtain that shades the sleeping child. His dream is long. So long, not even the train's whistle could rouse him from his slumber.
万籁俱寂。无人搅扰的夜色里，一切纷争好像就这样短暂地落定了。
Silence reigns supreme. In the untouched night with nary a soul, it's as if all conflict has come to a standstill in this reprieve.
你听到《谐乐颂》自远方的光芒中传来，如此恢弘壮丽的协奏在深海之下也仿若摇篮曲。
You can hear the Odes of Harmony from the distant light — even the most glorious concerto is akin to a lullaby in the watery abyss.
宁静的赏月地。不知那位老人遥望月光时，脑海中会闪现何种思绪？
A serene moongazing spot. When that old person stares at the moonlight, one wonders what thoughts shimmer in his mind?
昔日的夙敌向老人投以柔和的光芒，一如既往。
A nemesis of old casts warm radiance on the old person, as always.
大剧院如同青色的茧房，悬于梦中遥远的天空。可即便「同谐」的蝴蝶终将飞渡银河，人世间的一切纷争便能止息了么？
The Grand Theater hangs like a cyan-colored cocoon, suspended in the distant sky of dreams. But even if the Harmony's butterflies finally fly across the cosmos, will the conflict of humanity cease?
三位无名客的纪念碑。英雄们的名字横卧于小小的石头上，几近无法辨认。
A monument for three Nameless. The heroes' names are etched nigh illegibly across small steles.
左侧的碑面上镌刻着拉扎莉娜•简•艾丝黛拉。她向往群星，最终归于群星。
Carved on the left flank of the stele's surface, is Razalina Jane Estella. She reached for the stars, eventually returning to them.
右侧的卧碑属于博雷克林•铁尔南。这位常伴硝烟的牛仔燃烧自己至最后一刻。
The right flank of the stele belongs to Breukelen Tiernan. This cowboy, often accompanied by gunpowder smoke, burned bright till his final moments.
中间的无字碑属于美梦的奠基人「钟表匠」。匠人的指针终将垂降，永远落在指向前方的十二点。
The nameless stele in the middle belongs to the founder of dreams: The Watchmaker. The maker's needle finally counted down, pointing forever toward the path forward at twelve o'clock.
你闭上双眼，颔首致意。敬不再沉默的历史、热烈而勇敢的奔赴、通往群星的旅途，匹诺康尼的过去、现在、未来，和稚子至死不渝的梦。

You close your eyes and nod in silent reverence — to a history that stays silent no longer, to the fervent and brave journey ahead, toward a voyage among the stars, to Penacony's past, present, and future, and to the child's dream that does not wane unto death.
你想起帕姆说的位置，根据帕姆的规划，你确定电视机应该摆在这里。
You recall the location Pom-Pom mentioned. According to Pom-Pom's plan, you're sure that the television should be placed here.
Never mind. I'll sit on it for a bit.
你将辛苦扛来的电视机卸在此处，再三研究后接通了电源。
You put down the television you worked so hard to carry over. After studying it carefully, you connect it to a power source.
电视机正常开启，正常播放，只是当前并无节目可播。
The television turns on without any problems. It's working as per normal, except that there are no programs available right now.
依照匹诺康尼和《小小哈努行动》策划格莱西的标准评判，电视机的运作是正常的——但它无法播放其他电视节目，这或许需要别的手段。

By Penaconian standards — and according to Graysen, the developer of Hanu's Adventure — the television is working properly, even if it can't play other television programs. You might need to try something else.
但就现阶段而言，它只能用来玩《小小哈努行动》。
For now, you can only use it to play Hanu's Adventure.
Never mind. I'll play it next time.
贴心的你瞬间想到，你的同伴们或许还没游玩过惊险刺激的《小小哈努行动》呢！
Being the kind and considerate person you are, you instantly recall that your companions might not have played the thrilling and exciting Hanu's Adventure yet.
热心的你毅然放弃了这次唾手可得的游玩机会，你坚持将机会留给有需要的朋友！
Being the warm-hearted person you are, you resolutely give up this chance to play. This opportunity should be given to a friend who needs it instead.
扑满的鼻子扬了扬，你怀疑它发现了你。这是怎么做到的？你有点搞不懂，正如你搞不懂扑满是如何跨越次元的一样。
The Trotter raises their nose. You suspect that they have noticed you... But how? You don't understand, just like how you don't understand how Trotters can cross dimensions.
你试图与扑满交流，但只发出了几声很酷的*哼*，扑满并没有理你。
You try to communicate with the Trotter, but all they do is snort aloofly at you a few times. The Trotter pays you no attention.
很酷的扶手椅，坐垫只能容纳一位乘客的屁股。看上去很有气势，适合很酷的你。
This is a cool armchair that has space only for one passenger to sit on. There's a majestic air to it, a perfect match for a cool person like you.
你仔细打量了它的高度，根据你的精准计算，你或许能*跳*——严格来说是某种攀爬技巧——总之你应该或许大概勉强能上去吧？

You study its height carefully. According to your precise calculations, you should be able to jump — well, more like climb, you suppose — onto it. In any case, you should be able to get up there... Right?
你站在高高的坐垫上，睥睨车厢，发出了一声轻蔑的*哼*
Standing on the cushions up high, you look disdainfully at the carriage down below and let out a contemptuous snort.
过了一会儿，你感到无聊…甚至有些恐高，你决定——
After a while, you start to feel bored... and a little acrophobic. You decide to...
跳下去吧！以你的勇敢，冲击未知的高度——但…都怪这墨镜，害你看不清脚下的路……
Let's jump down! Not knowing how high up you are is no challenge to one as intrepid as you! ...Except you can't even get a clear look at the ground below because of your sunglasses.
你尴尬地顺着椅子扶手滑了下去。
You awkwardly slide down the armrest of the chair.
Stand here for a little longer.
你独自欣赏着这片不一样的风景，你深深地吸了一口气，决定继续看下去。
You enjoy this special scenery alone. Then, you take a deep breath and... decide to keep enjoying the view.
Never mind. Better not climb up there.
这种无聊的行为无法激起你的挑战欲，你发出一声很酷的*哼*，彰显你的大人物身份。
Something this boring is no challenge to you. You let out a cool grunt to show just how much of a big shot you are.
你大步流星地迈入了丹恒的房间，以一种大人物巡逻般的姿态。
You stride into Dan Heng's room like a big shot on patrol.
小小哈努努的尊严实在太沉重了，按照过往的经验，他的膝盖被压至硬化，无法跳跃。
Little Hanunue's dignity weighs too heavily. Based on experiences, his knees have been rendered too stiffened to be able to jump.
但现在…你简直不敢相信你的眼睛，这是怎么做到的？登上台阶的一小步，却是足以载入匹诺康尼史册的一大步！
But now... you can hardly believe your eyes. How was this achieved? A small step onto the stage, yet a giant leap worthy of the Penaconian history books!
丹恒的书架，在不忙的时候，你会把你平日冒险所得的资料也一并添加进来。
This is Dan Heng's bookshelf. When you aren't busy, you would add all the information obtained during your daily adventures to this bookshelf.
你抬起头，只看得见书脊的颜色，完全看不清上面写了些什么。
You look up, but all you can see is the color of the book's spine. The text is a blur to you.
有趣的栏杆缝隙，这个角度看向丹恒的床铺，你只看得清变幻的水流图案。
This is an interesting gap in the railing. If you look at Dan Heng's bed from this perspective, the only thing you can see is the ever-changing flowing water pattern.
换作平时，以你的个头一定挤不进来…好吧，凡事也没那么绝对，你身手灵活，应该是得挤得进来的。
Any other time, given your size, you'd never be able to squeeze in here... But never say never. You're nimble, so it might very well be possible, after all.
…但就算挤进来了，多半会被栏杆卡住头，你开始想象大声呼叫然后被帕姆或丹恒所救的尴尬场景。

...Still, even if you do manage to squeeze in, your head will probably get stuck in the railing. You start to imagine how embarrassing it would be if you had to call for help, and Pom-Pom or Dan Heng had to rescue you.
你大步流星地迈入了三月七的房间，以一种大人物巡逻般的姿态。
You stride into March 7th's room like a big shot on patrol.
能爬上去看看吗？你有点想尝试，但你与生俱来的道德感制止了这个决定。
Can you climb up and have a look? Part of you itches to try, but your innate sense of ethics stops you.
你无法在穿衣镜里看清自己现在的模样，这令你倍感失望。
Unable to see yourself clearly in the full-length mirror, you feel extra disappointed.
因为就在刚才，在看到镜子边挂着的帕姆衣服的时候，你萌生了一种跃跃欲试的想法。
Why? Because you saw Pom-Pom's outfit hanging by the mirror just now, and you were dying to try it out.
门被锁住了，你试图开门，但任你如何叫门，它纹丝不动。
The door is locked. You try to open it, but it wouldn't budge, no matter how much you call out for somebody to open it.
你时刻铭记着自己现在的身份——小小哈努兄弟，所向披靡勇猛无敌——你试图探索一切未知的区域。
Bearing in mind your current identity at all times — Brother Hanu Story! Undauntable, untouchable, and unbeatable! — you attempt to explore all the uncharted territories.
但你已离电视机太远，信号渐弱，你隐约间看到了《小小哈努行动》游戏标题的退出按钮。看来你无法再向前迈出半步了。

However, you are too far away from the television. The signal is fading. You can vaguely see the "Exit" button in the title of Hanu's Adventure. It looks like you won't be able to move any further ahead.
丹恒的床铺，严格来说是「地铺」。
Dan Heng's bed. Strictly speaking, just a bedroll on the floor.
以前朝下看还不觉得，此刻你望着粼粼波光的地面，感觉自己像在海上漂泊。忽有眩晕感袭来。
You didn't feel this when you previously looked down. Right now, as you gaze at the shimmering waves on the floor, you feel like you're drifting on the ocean's surface, and suddenly feel dizzy.
持明一族也会晕船吗？你无法克制自己的好奇心…或许回头可以问问丹恒。
Would Vidyadhara get seasick? You find it hard to contain your curiosity... Maybe you can ask Dan Heng later.
We wish you a pleasant journey!
Keep up the great work, captain!
Every time the captain walks past...
Their entire person just disappears into thin air...
Looking for the answer to the universe, huh...
I shall look forward to it...
Don't remind me. There's dirt in my shoe...
When are you heading back to the Palace?
Do you think it really works?
I heard there's a discount for the fruits...
Child, it's good to be thrifty.
你好，你也是来租大地兽的吗？
Hello, are you also here to rent a dromas?
我们这儿驮兽拼团差一位…
Our pack beast bulk sale group is short of one person...
我东西少，价格再便宜点呗。
I'm not buying much. Can you give me a lower price?
爸爸，今天可以打水仗吗？
Daddy, can we have a water fight today?
Sure, but you have to keep it down.
你得学会尊重神圣的水域。
You have to learn to respect the sacred waters.
Also, take note of your safety, don't mess around.
Have you taken a dip in the cold pool before?
听说那是法吉娜的试炼。
I heard that's part of Phagousa's trial.
Try it a few times. It's good for your health.
Not today... Promise I'll do it next time.
Tired from soaking? Want to eat something?
Let's finish listening before we leave.
What would you like to drink?
There's freshly squeezed juice. Would you like some?
诸位听众，今日我们讲述艾格勒的故事。
Dear audience, today we'll be telling the story of Aquila.
伟大的光明之神，创造了昼夜！
The mighty God of Light created day and night!
愿祂的光芒永远照耀我们！
May THEIR light shine upon us forever!
This story sounds a little familiar.
应该是从叙事诗里改编的。
I think it's based on an epic poem.
噢，我就说这情节很熟悉。
Ah, no wonder I found the narrative familiar.
艾格勒的故事嘛，早听腻了。
It's the story of Aquila. I'm already bored of it.
I wanna be high up like that too!
But, can you give a speech?
Let me tell you, Cerces is...
Oronyx... Please give me your guidance...
浴场今天好像有新的表演。
There seems to be a new show at the baths today.
I think it's some storytelling show.
Why aren't you attending the show?
I'm all grown up. These are all so childish.
My splashes are higher than yours!
She probably takes after her parents...
Aren't you coming in to have fun?
I'm even taller than Kephale now!
Why didn't you block that ball then?
I soaked for too long. Better stand for a while.
You're finally here. You all right?
How did you even lose your way here?
兄弟，你看着又壮了一圈。
Bro, you look stronger than before.
Hush... Don't take their name in vain.
I want to listen some more...
Mm... Where is the water cup...
只要坚持一天喝十罐水。
Just drink ten vats of water a day.
The trial of Talanton is so hard...
Thank you for the food you give us.
What plans do you all have for later?
I just got here. I'll follow you.
今天要不去凉点的池子？
How about a cooler pool today?
I want to try the hot water there!
Do you remember where you put it?
I think... it should be... I don't know...
别急，我们慢慢找就是了。
Since we're here, we might as well try.
You guys better not overdo it.
I feel like I'm gonna fall apart...
悬锋城的事，你应该知道吧。
You know what happened in Castrum Kremnos, right?
早做准备，你也该锻炼一下了。
Never hurts to prep early. You should start training.
So much water, and it's so hot...
It's all thanks to the power of Phagousa.
感觉像在被艾格勒注视…
Feels like I'm being watched by Aquila...
Look at all this hot water!
尼卡多利的试炼要来了~
The trial of Nikador has come!
Bring it on. I'm... I'm not afraid!
As long as I endure the tempering of the waterfall...
I will become a hero too!
This is washing your hair, at best...
This place is so different from Castrum Kremnos!
Good thing we came here, eh?
妈妈，我们还要继续走吗？
Mommy, are we going to keep traveling?
不了，以后就在这儿住下吧。
No, we'll be living here in the future.
...But I can only see him in my dreams.
This is the sacred beast of Phagousa!
It's so cute. I don't believe it.
今天的水果看着不够新鲜……
Today's fruits don't look fresh enough...
I want to head back for another soak.
注意到了吗，最近大浴场…
Did you notice? There seem to be more...
...more guests in the grand baths lately.
People want to bathe more when they're more stressed.
Even children are... Is this really okay?
Mm, I mean, I really mean it.
Shh, we're going to get discovered.
What a nice way to live...
I wonder how long this will last.
Calendars are a kind of metaphysical concept...
毕竟它是刻法勒规定的。
After all, it was what Kephale dictated.
又一篇「艾格勒的启目集」…
Faith can dispel the black tide!
Here we go again, the same old shtick...
I prefer it here than inside.
真不愧是黄金裔英雄们。
They're not called the Chrysos Heirs heroes for nothing.
To think something like this would happen...
法吉娜保佑，法吉娜保佑…
O Phagousa protect me, Phagousa protect me...
Ooh, all right... Thanks for the hard work.
I wonder if the heroes are around?
I have to organize the files quickly...
要对吉奥里亚保持敬畏。
You were saying not to eat the fruits?
I meant to say don't waste food.
刻法勒是我们的敌人吗？
The Fate Titans made no such claim.
I'm here for prophecies, not for you.
我的话语即是泰坦意志。
My words carry the Titan's will.
Holy fruit with the Maiden's blessing...
A gift for you and your friends.
This way for the pilgrimage tour—
Do I have to pay to enter?
请勿大声喧哗，别走散了！
Quiet please, and keep with the group!
This group tour was worth every coin.
朋友，你相信欧洛尼斯吗？
My friend, have you faith in Oronyx?
我们的相遇是有意义的。
Our paths crossed for a reason.
说不定在某个平行时空里。
But my faith lies with Zagreus.
Our prayers build the path to ascension...
What lies ahead... where I must go...
Great Fate Titans, hear my voice—
那为什么你长得比我高？
So how come you're taller than me?
The Fate Titans show our path...
Because... time no longer waits for me.
要进行祭司选拔考试了…
Time for the priest selection trials...
I'm going to make it this time!
我已经内定下任辅祭了。
They've already picked me internally as the next acolyte.
I saw the Holy Maiden yesterday!
I heard her hair is blue...
是不是特别地温柔善良？
Is she as kind and gentle as they say?
We have so few records about the Maiden...
The priests say that's restricted information!
I'll be departing for there soon.
这是命运泰坦的神谕吗？
Have the Fate Titans ordained this journey?
No, I chose this path myself.
塔兰顿能衡量它自己吗？
Does Talanton weigh their own weight?
信仰先于理解，我的孩子。
Faith comes before understanding, my child.
最近求神谕的人有点多…
Many come seeking prophecies these days...
See the priest for your waiting number.
所以才叫你刻在石板上。
That's why stone tablets are better.
圣女大人正在请求神谕。
The Holy Maiden is receiving her prophecy.
If only I could become the Holy Maiden...
命运圣城，我们终于到了…
At last, the Holy City of Fate...
Let's go see the Holy Maiden!
If you're not used to Dawncloud...
I'm fine. I'll get used to it.
The Council of Elders plans to cut costs...
省下的都应该交给祭司。
All the savings should be handed over to the priests.
投票前还有些时间犹豫。
I still have some time to hesitate before voting.
It's full of sophistry. I can stand it no more.
你知道树庭发生的事吗？
Do you know what happened in the Grove?
Ah, don't mention it. It's so sad.
便注定要在人世间灭亡。
One must inevitably perish in the mortal realm.
美丽的旧世界，如今在何处？
O beautiful old world, where are you now?
传说的黄金世，快回到人间！
O legendary Era Chrysea, return to the mortal realm!
What about the promise the Council of Elders made?
The results of the citizens' assembly have been determined!
If I believe you, I'll be...
Have you heard of the Theater Festival?
Can you tell me more about it?
Alas, all that's left of that warmth...
种质库的内容必须备份！
The Gene Bank must be backed up!
But how do you take it with you?
不能回头看，也不能向前…
No looking back. No moving forward...
We'll reunite in the new world, right?
我不要新世界，还我姐姐！
I don't want a new world — give me back my sister!
Almost there... Just a little longer...
Do some good before the Era Nova.
Who cares about you? Who cares about me?
Will we be born as women?
As long as I don't turn into a dromas, I'm good.
我父亲的遗物还在家里！
My father's keepsakes are still at home!
What matters more — your life or the keepsakes?
I'll leave both to you then!
Is it possible an accident has happened to them?
We've got rations for fifteen daybreaks, tops...
Someone must head to the warehouse.
It's even darker than the outside world...
Kremnoans never leave debts of gratitude unpaid.
在新世界，我们还会相遇吗？
Will we meet again in the new world?
If you don't find me, you're dead meat.
Was all of this just a lie?
How do we treat the Mountain Dweller's wounds...
有没有吉奥里亚祭司啊？
Is the priest of Georios around?
Have I been soaking for too long?
Monster, don't even think about taking another step.
Come closer, and I'll introduce you to my fists.
Get us out of the city now!
That's... a lot of big ones.
Not as big as the ambrosia bottle, hehe.
We need to fall back to somewhere safe!
There are things we have to take with us...
不然活着还有什么意思！
Otherwise, what's the point of surviving?
便注定要在人世间灭亡。
One must inevitably perish in the mortal realm.
便注定要在人世间灭亡。
One must inevitably perish in the mortal realm.
The monsters are quiet... Does that mean...
我们已经在新世界了吗？
We're already in the new world?
No one around? Guess I'm swimming a few laps!
The new world is almost here!
新作的原稿，该给谁看呢…
This new manuscript... who should I show it to first?
Oh no oh no oh no. The black tide has consumed everything...
Looks like the Nousporists were right...
Stop arguing and help with the evacuation!
So this is a black tide monster...
The latest volume of One Punch God...
That's what I'm talking about! Is that all Aquila's got?
Seeds should be shared with everyone!
作物种子也要开源才是！
Even crop seeds should be free-for-all!
这下我的最新研究总算派得上用场了。
My latest research is finally being put to good use.
She turned crimson right before my eyes...
My friend's still in the baths...
The disaster relief fund I donated...
They ran off with the money ages ago!
They were all swallowed by the black tide!
There are still people trapped in the Council Square...
We'll never let go of each other's hands.
How do we escape a situation like this...
Why isn't this covered in your book!
She even threw her life away!
Don't let her sacrifice be in vain.
At least I didn't miss it this time.
星槎海的码头一如往常，星槎起起落落，成就了一片喧闹的景观。
The docks at the Starskiff Haven are the same as always, with the starskiffs coming and going creating a bustling scene.
你面前是一艘公共客运星槎。人们搭乘这种星槎，可以用相当便宜的价格在不同洞天之间航行。
Before you is a public transport starskiff. People catch this kind of transport to sail between different delves for a relatively low price.
这本应只是星槎海上司空见惯的景观，直到一道银白色的闪光飞过你的肩头，落在那艘星槎的尾翼上，发出一声脆响。
It was just another day at the Starskiff Haven, until a silvery flash shoots over your shoulder, landing on the tail of the starskiff bus with a crisp clang.
哎…瞧我这准头儿，怎么又没扔进去……
Darn it... how did I miss that shot?
不好意思，你能让一下吗？你这个站位有点妨碍我瞄准。
Excuse me, can you step aside? You're blocking my aim.
我在祈福啊。你看见星槎后面那个圆圈了吗？那东西是星槎的引擎，叫做「玦轮」。
Why, I'm making a prayer. See that circle behind the starskiff? That thing is its engine — a jade wheel.
只要将硬币投入玦轮，就可以让接下来的旅途平安顺利。看我——丢！
Just toss a coin into the jade wheel and the upcoming journey will go completely smoothly. Check it out — unf!
好嘞，麻烦你了。你看见星槎后面那个圆圈了吗？那东西是星槎的引擎，叫做「玦轮」。
Oh, thanks for that. See that circle behind the starskiff? That thing is its engine — a jade wheel.
只要将硬币投入玦轮，就可以让接下来的旅途平安顺利。看我——丢！
Just toss a coin into the jade wheel and the upcoming journey will go completely smoothly. Check it out — unf!
You just slammed me in the kidney. I'll need some reparations.
你是什么款式的人类？肾长肩膀上？况且我扔个硬币而已，能造成多大伤害啊？
What kind of person grows a kidney on their shoulders? Besides, all I did was toss a coin. How much damage could that possibly do?
别闹了，让开让开。你看见星槎后面那个「玦轮」了吗？只要将硬币投入玦轮，就可以让接下来的旅途平安顺利。看我——丢！
Quit whinnying and get outta my way. See that jade wheel behind the starskiff? Just toss a coin into it and the upcoming journey will go completely smoothly. Check it out — hah!
女人再次丢出一枚硬币，那硬币划出一道弧线，打在「玦轮」的边缘，落入了天空球之中。
The girl flings another coin, tracing an arc through the air as it hits the rim of the jade wheel and clunks down into the middle of the skybox.
哎呀呀呀，哎呀！怎么又没扔中？我还有急事要去一趟永狩原呢，我那些伙伴们还等着我一起去放生呢……
Ahh, good grief! How'd I miss again? I'm gonna be late to the Ever-Hunt Plains, all my friends are waiting for me for the life-release ceremony...
Must you toss in a coin before you go anywhere?
那必须的必啊！星槎能顺利飞行，都是靠神明的庇佑，不好好做这些敬礼神明的仪式，是很容易出事故的！
Yes, for sure! Starskiffs rely on the blessing of the gods to sail smoothly. It's way too easy for accidents to happen — unless I pay proper homage to the gods through ritual!
你懂个…不行，我要与人为善、我要与人为善…你要明白，星槎能顺利飞行，都是靠神明的庇佑，不好好做这些敬礼神明的仪式，是很容易出事故的！

What do you kn— No! Thou shalt be kind, thou shalt be kind... You must understand that Starskiffs rely on the blessing of the gods to sail smoothly. It's way too easy for accidents to happen — unless I pay proper homage to the gods through ritual!
Don't lose faith. Give it a few more tries.
唉，敬礼神明这种事，能不能成功，主要看内心是否澄澈。我这接连失败，想必是因为内心不够澄澈，还沾染了些许污垢吧。
Ack, the success of this ritual mainly depends on the purity of your heart. I keep failing at this because my heart isn't pure enough, must've been stained by impurities.
而且我只剩下三枚硬币了。这是伙伴们专门铸造的，用于敬礼神明的专用硬币…每年的配额都很有限，用完了就没了……
And I've only got three coins left on me. These are special coins minted by my friends to pay homage to the gods... Because they're limited edition, once they're gone, they're really gone.
危险？不扔才危险呢！星槎能翱翔于天际，就是凭借着星神的注视啊。唉…懒得和你解释，让开让开，让我再投一次。

Dangerous? It's dangerous if I don't throw it! Starskiffs are only able to soar through the skies thanks to the blessing of Aeons. *sigh* I can't be bothered explaining it to you. Just get out of my way, I'll do one more try.
你为了阻止女人继续投币，冲上前去攥住了她的双手。她大声呼喊，终于引来了地衡司的执事。
You rush forward and grab both her hands to prevent her from tossing the coin. She cries out and makes a scene — attracting the attention of officers from the Realm-Keeping Commission.
面对执事的问询调解，你们各执一词，争辩不休。围观的人越来越多，执事不得不将你们都被带到了地衡司公廨。
As the officers begin interrogations, each of you argues your position. As the crowd of onlookers grows and grows, the officer is forced to take you both down to the Chancery.
嗯…我想到一个好主意，可以增加祈愿成功的概率…一次直接扔三枚硬币！乱枪打鸟，总归能命中。
Hmm... I just thought of something that can increase the chance of being blessed... Just toss three coins at a time! Even a broken clock is right twice a day!
女人屏息凝神，手腕发力，将三枚硬币抖了出去。那三枚硬币如狂风骤雨，击打在星槎的尾翼上，无一命中目标。
The woman holds her breath, concentrates intently, and hurls three coins. They scatter and ping the tail of the starskiff, but not a single one hits their mark.
哎…算了，给伙伴们发个短信请假吧。看来这次放生我是去不了了。不过没关系……
Tsk, forget it... I'll message my friends and tell them I can't make the life-release ceremony. I'm sure it'll be fine...
伙伴们都说，只要祈愿满三百次，下一次祈愿必然应验。现在算来，应该也快到我的大保底了。
My friends all say that if I prayed <unbreak>300</unbreak> times, the next prayer is sure to come true. By my estimations, my guaranteed prayer should be coming up soon, then.
Give me a coin. I'll help throw it for you.
哦？这么有自信吗？来，三枚都给你了，你来试试看。敬礼神明是大功德啊，我将这个机会让给你，你可不要浪费啊。
Oh, you're optimistic! Here you go, take all three and give it a try. Paying homage to the gods is indeed a great virtue. I'll be generous and give you this chance — so don't waste it.
你接过三枚硬币，瞄准玦轮的正中心。
You take the three coins, and aim at the center of the jade wheel.
屏息凝神，来，回想一下三月七是如何拉弓射箭的。投掷与射击，在瞄准的感觉上也许大体一致。
Hold your breath and focus. Come on! Remember how March 7th draws and shoots her bow. Throwing, shooting — they both rely on accurate aim.
(Aim at the center of the jade wheel.)
哎呀，真可惜。差点就能命中目标了。女人看着你，似乎对你的能力产生了怀疑。
Shoot, what a shame. You almost hit the bullseye. The girl gives you a look that says she doesn't really trust in your abilities.
硬币都没沾到星槎的边，径直落入了天空球中。女人在一旁毫不掩饰地嗤笑。
The coin doesn't even hit the side of the starskiff, and falls straight into the skybox. The woman doesn't bother concealing her schadenfreude.
真是一记精准的射门！硬币准确地命中了玦轮的中心！
What an incredible throw! The coins land dead in the center of the Jade Wheel!
好啊，没想到你真有两把刷子！这下咱俩的功德可都积攒了不少啊。那么下次再见吧，我要去永狩原了。
Alright, I didn't see that coming — you actually did it! Now, we've both guaranteed our sacred virtue. I'll see you next time. I have to shoot off to the Ever-Hunt Plains.
喂！你们两个！在干什么呢！
Hey, you two! Whaddaya think you're doing!
糟了！条子来了！咱们快撤！
Rats, it's the cops! Let's get outta here!
咱们分头行动！你跑左边，我跑右边！山高路远咱们后会无期了！
Let's split up! You go left, and I'll head right. It's a big scary world out there, and I'm sure our paths will never cross again!
分头跑就想甩掉我？我这么多年执事是白干的？谛听！分头追！
Think you can shake me by splitting up? Did you think I was born yesterday? Diting! Let's go!
别别别别，你这谛听怎么还会咬人！
No no no, this guy Diting is really vicious!
你是不是左右不分啊！说好的分头行动呢！
Can you not tell left from right? I thought we were gonna split up!
一起逃？太好了，正好将你们一网打尽。
Fleeing together, are you? Great, two birds with one stone then.
谛听，看着这位嫌疑人。我去追另一位。
Keep an eye on this perpetrator, Diting. I'm going after the other one.
啊啊啊！这条子跑得也太快了！
Ahh nooo! This cop is super fast!
这帮「投币祈愿」的家伙…也不知道是从哪儿听来了一大套迷信的说辞，非要往玦轮里面扔东西。
This wretched clique of Coin Zealots... Who knows where they got their superstitious ideas from, but they insist on throwing stuff into jade wheels.
您说说，这多危险啊！要万一硬币被卷进发动机再甩出来，速度可比旧式火铳的子弹都快。虽说比不上现代武器，但给人打个透心凉可是绰绰有余。

Isn't that utterly dangerous!? If a coin somehow got stuck in the engine and spit out, its velocity would be faster than a speeding bullet. Modern weapons are far scarier, of course, but its impact is still enough to shoot through flesh and bone.
幸亏您阻止了她，真不愧是仙舟的贵客啊。
Thankfully, you stopped her. No wonder you're an esteemed guest of the Xianzhou.
刚才路过的执事不明真相，把您也带进了公廨，真是不好意思。请收下这些吧，权当是见义勇为的谢礼了。
That officer just then didn't understand the situation and shouldn't have brought you here. I'm sorry about that. Hold onto this, and consider it thanks for doing what's right.
我说，{NICKNAME}啊，不是我说您…您好歹是仙舟的贵客，怎么还能掺和进这种违法活动中去？
I didn't want to tell you this, {NICKNAME}... You're a guest here on the Xianzhou. How did you get caught up in this kind of illegal activity?
这帮「投币祈愿」的家伙…也不知道是从哪儿听来了一大套迷信的说辞，非要往玦轮里面扔东西。
This wretched clique of Coin Zealots... Who knows where they got their superstitious ideas from, but they insist on throwing stuff into jade wheels.
多危险啊！您命大才没出事，要万一硬币被卷进发动机再甩出来，速度可比旧式火铳的子弹都快。虽说比不上现代武器，但给您打个透心凉可是绰绰有余。

How dangerous! You're lucky that nothing happened to anyone. If a coin somehow got stuck in the engine and spit out, its velocity would be faster than a speeding bullet. Modern weapons are far scarier, of course, but its impact is still enough to shoot through flesh and bone.
那位我们已经抓起来，念在您是初犯，还是仙舟的贵客…给您两条路吧，要么交一万信用点罚款，要么去参加社区服务。您怎么选？

We've already apprehended the other one, and seeing as you're a first-time offender, as well as a guest of the Xianzhou... We'll give you a choice. Either pay a <unbreak>10,000</unbreak>-credit fine, or complete community service. Which one is it going to be?
行。那这笔罚款我就收下了啊。往玦轮里面扔东西是非常危险的，下次请您做事之前三思而行。
Okay, I'll take that then. It's incredibly dangerous to throw objects into a jade wheel. Please, think twice before you act.
You might as well lock me in...
…哎，怎么说您好呢。您好歹也是景元将军的客人，我也不好真给您抓起来。这次就这么算了吧……
*sigh* How should I drill this into your brain... It's a good thing you're a guest of General Jing Yuan, otherwise you'd be arrested already. You're off the hook this time...
总而言之，往玦轮里面扔东西是非常危险的。以后不要再做这种事了。
Whatever it is, it's extremely dangerous to chuck coins into a jade wheel. Please do not do things like this ever again.
说罢，女人默默地离开了。
After talking, the woman walked off quietly.
列车长今天心情似乎很好？
The conductor seems to be in a pretty good mood today?
嗯哼～听丹恒乘客说，你们在「罗浮」的事务都处理完了帕？
Uh-huh~ I heard Dan Heng say that you got everything taken care of on the Luofu, right?
返航之后，是不是忘了些重要的事帕？
Since coming back, is there anything important that you've forgotten about?
哎，就知道你们忘了这事……
*sigh* I knew you'd forgotten about it...
…丹恒乘客、三月七乘客他们没跟你说过吗？
...Didn't Dan Heng and March 7th tell you about it yet?
之前和丹恒乘客他们说过的呀，仙舟「罗浮」上有不少有好吃好喝的东西呢！你们答应过我要带一些回来——
I told Dan Heng and them before that the Xianzhou Luofu has so many delicious snacks! You all promised to bring me back something...
这种事情都不记得了吗？没想到{NICKNAME}是这样子的人……
Don't you remember? I never thought you'd be like that, {NICKNAME}...
Don't cry! I'll go buy some for you now.
Can't I buy some for you?
之前拜托三月七乘客带了几份美食给我，有什么「烤鸟翅」，还有「糖球炒视肉」，感觉口感都有点奇怪。
I asked March 7th to bring me a few snacks, like "roasted wings" and "sugarball-fried viscorpi," they both have a weird texture.
帕姆觉得这次还是喝点饮料算了，对了，{NICKNAME}你有什么推荐的吗？最好是有「罗浮」风味的那种，这样才算不虚此行嘛！
I thought it would be nice to have something to drink this time. Oh yeah, {NICKNAME} — can you recommend anything? Hopefully it's something Luofu-style to make our trip worthwhile!
Is mung bean soda authentic enough for you?
我听三月七乘客提起过，是挺有「罗浮」特色的。
I've heard March 7th mention that before. It's a Luofu special.
喝茶吧，烈焰浓茶很劲道。
How about a cup of tea? Flaming Potent Tea is pretty strong.
唔，听起来还蛮适合我这种成熟疲惫的列车长帕。
Ooh, sounds like just the thing for a mature and exhausted conductor like me.
热浮羊奶吧，有助于长高。
Steamed puffergoat milk, it'll help you grow taller.
...There's no need to make jokes about my height, I'll have you know!
仙人快乐茶，绝对够快乐。
Immortal's Delight will make you happy.
名字很有意思帕，是喝完就能成仙人的意思吗？
What an interesting name. If I drink it, can I become immortal, too?
那就拜托{NICKNAME}乘客啦，快去快回吧！
If you could please help me out with that then, {NICKNAME}. Make a quick trip!
啊，这么快，辛苦{NICKNAME}乘客了。快让帕姆尝尝！
Wow, that was fast, {NICKNAME}. Let me have a sip!
这真的是能喝的东西吗？噗噗噗！不行不行我要去漱口！
Is this really something they drink? Ptooey! No no no, I have to gargle now!
口感挺不错，虽然有点点火辣。
Nice texture, but just a teeny bit spicy.
呜…好奇怪…有点想唱歌是怎么回事？
Ooh, strange... Why do I suddenly feel like singing?
甜甜的，热乎乎的，哇这玩意儿喝完浑身都好舒畅是怎么回事？
It's sweet, and it's piping hot, wow! Why does my whole body feel so loosey goosey right now?
帕姆对这个什么奶特别满意！
I really like this puffy-whatsit milk!
呜，好好喝…可是…可是帕姆看到它的配料表上……
Ooh, delicious... but... I just saw its ingredients and...
怎么会有这么多糖啊！帕姆一不小心就全部喝完了，好想再来一瓶啊，但是这热量…呜呜！
How can they put so much sugar in it! I just casually slammed the whole thing and really want another, but think of the calories... A-boohoo!
What are you staring at? What's up?
{NICKNAME}乘客，我看你们都收拾东西回列车上了，仙舟的事务想必也解决得差不多了吧。
{NICKNAME}, I noticed that you've all packed your things up and moved them back on the Express. Those affairs on the Xianzhou must be all good and sorted now, hmm?
帕姆左顾右盼地四处张望，确认没人看向自己这边后，这才松了口气，使劲压低着自己的声线。
Pom-Pom glanced around and, once sure nobody was looking in that direction, let out a sigh of relief. They lowered their voice.
三月七乘客回来以后，有好几次看到我就捂着嘴偷笑，还说什么「星芋啵啵和帕姆很配嘛」之类的怪话…就连瓦尔特乘客也对着我笑。
Several times since March got back, she covered her mouth and laughed when she saw me, saying something about "startaro bubble tea suits you"... Even Welt was smirking at me.
还有丹恒，丹恒乘客回来之后感觉有点点奇怪…所以说…你们几个在仙舟上到底发生了什么帕？快跟列车长汇报一下帕！
And also, things have felt a bit weird with Dan Heng since he got back... so I was wondering... what actually happened over on the Xianzhou? Give your conductor a quick update!
(You ever-so-slightly let on a tiny bit about Dan Heng's secret)
呜哇呜哇，刚刚怎么就睡过去了——{NICKNAME}乘客，你刚刚在说什么来着？
Wow, ahem sorry, I just dozed off there — {NICKNAME}, you were saying?
Your acting is over the top...
咳咳咳，帕姆刚刚是真的睡着了！才不是演的！
Ahem, I really did just doze off then! I wasn't acting!
你注意到帕姆挺直了身板，突然严肃了起来。
You notice Pom-Pom suddenly grow stern as their posture straightens.
这些事…等丹恒乘客想说的时候，他自然会说的。帕姆见过不少有故事的乘客…过去的事就让它们过去吧。
All that... Let Dan Heng tell Pom-Pom himself when he's ready. I've met many a passenger with stories to tell... Let bygones be bygones.
只要{NICKNAME}乘客乖乖的，那就还是帕姆最喜欢的{NICKNAME}乘客！帕你我今天所说的话，就让它烂在帕姆的肚子帕。
As long as {NICKNAME} is well-behaved, then {NICKNAME} is still my favorite passenger! Pom-Pom shall carry the secret to the end of time.
帕姆将视线转向远方，似乎不愿再与你交谈下去。
Pom-Pom gazes off into the distance, as if they don't want to talk to you.
（解释神探三月七的推理过程）
(You explain "genius detective" March 7th's process of deduction)
呜哇！原来你们是这么看待帕姆的？！列车长怎么会是干这种事的人帕！
Wow! So that's what you think of Pom-Pom!? Would a conductor behave this way?
我们这不是尊敬您老人家帕。
Isn't this actually done out of respect for your seniority?
你好好说话，不要学帕姆说帕！
Speak properly, and don't imitate Pom-Pom!
列车长就是我们的头儿！
这种奇怪的想法…难怪三月七乘客会偷偷笑，好啦，现在列车长知道你们在仙舟干的「坏事」了。
What a strange thought... No wonder March 7th was laughing like that. Alright, now I know about all that "bad stuff" you got up to on the Xianzhou.
以后可不许当面喊我这个！我会生气的帕！
You can't call me that to my face! I'll get angry next time!
（讲述你在仙舟作战的英勇事迹）
(You describe your heroic deeds aboard the Xianzhou)
你详尽地向帕姆讲述了你在仙舟上的英勇事迹——走到哪儿，球棒就挥舞到哪儿。无论对方是魔阴身孽物，又或是可怕的绝灭大君，再惊险的战斗，都成为你话语间的笑谈。

You tell Pom-Pom in great detail about your heroic deeds aboard the Xianzhou — how swashbuckling you were with the bat. Whether faced with a mara-struck abomination or the dreadful Lord Ravager, even the most thrilling of battles were reduced to a joke in your eyes.
还好是瓦尔特乘客带着你们，要不然帕姆可不放心…这么惊险的战斗，你怎么能当个笑话一样呢？不把自己的性命当回事，这样…这样不好。
Luckily, Welt went with you, otherwise I'd have been worried... How can the most thrilling of battles be reduced to just a joke? You should take your own life seriously. This... this is not good.
「罗浮」上是不是有位龙女？前些日子她托人送来了一些应急药物，说是答谢列车的诸位。我还觉得奇怪呢…原来是这么回事……

Did you meet the Dragon Lady aboard the Luofu? She sent someone with emergency medical supplies to the Express, saying that she wanted to express her gratitude toward us. I thought it was strange... So that's how it went...
{NICKNAME}乘客，你回来之后就好好休息吧，以后出门在外的，没有帕姆照顾你，你可要多加小心呀。
{NICKNAME}, now that you're back, please rest up good and proper. Pom-Pom won't be around to look after you when you are away, so take care.
帕姆极为担忧地望着你，湿漉漉的小手戳了戳你的腰，又不放心地检查了你的四肢，发现没有什么大碍后这才松了口气。

Pom-Pom looks at you with extreme concern, poking you in the back with their clammy hand while nervously checking over your limbs. They let out a sigh of relief upon realizing nothing serious has happened.
你看着帕姆满头大汗的样子，这才意识到，方才那湿漉漉的触感全是帕姆掌心流的汗。
You look at how sweaty Pom-Pom's face has become and finally realize that the clammy sensation was entirely due to Pom-Pom's sweaty palms.
(Tell Pom-Pom about some riveting encounters you experienced)
听起来都是好有趣的事帕。
帕姆笑眯眯地看着你，眼神里似乎有某种欣慰。
Pom-Pom looks at you with a smile, their eyes seeming to betray some form of gladness.
{NICKNAME}乘客…这么短时间，你就长大了…啊不对，你的身高倒是没有变动帕。总之就是…变化好大帕。
{NICKNAME}... you've grown up so quickly... Uh no, your height hasn't actually changed. But all-in-all... you've changed a lot.
在外面都认识这么多朋友了，帕姆想你刚来星穹列车的时候，那会儿还是谁也不认识呢。
You've met so many friends out there. Pom-Pom thinks back to when you first came aboard the Astral Express, and you didn't know a soul.
至于你提到的那几位朋友，帕姆觉得人都蛮不错的，有空的话你可以喊他们到列车上坐坐。
As for those friends you mentioned, Pom-Pom thinks they're pretty neat people. If you get the chance, invite them to come aboard the Express.
好了好了，帕姆问完啦，谢谢{NICKNAME}乘客帕！
Alright, that's all from me. Thanks, {NICKNAME}!
让列车长看看…{NICKNAME}乘客，你已经不是帕姆最开始认识的你了！
Tickets, please! ...Oh {NICKNAME}, you're not the same person Pom-Pom first met! What's happened to you?
I had a really fast growth spurt.
The only thing that's changed is your opinion of me.
列车长的眼光是不会出错的。{NICKNAME}乘客，现在的你，已经不再是过去的你了！
A conductor's eyes never lie. {NICKNAME}, you are not the same person that you were!
三月七乘客最开始在外冒险的时候，也发生了这样的转变。帕姆不知道怎么说比较好…感觉，更加成熟？更加稳重？
The same thing happened to March 7th when she first went out trailblazing. How can Pom-Pom put this... It feels like you're more mature? More stable?
嗯…就是更加靠谱了帕！这是来自列车长的肯定。
...More reliable! Pom-Pom is sure of it.
作为成长的奖励，我给你准备了一些小小的礼物。别客气，尽管收下帕。

充足的食物与衣物、应急药物与设备，还有应付恶劣环境的护甲装置…在外冒险的话这些东西都是必不可少的。
Adequate food, clothing, first-aid kit and medical equipment, protective gear for harsh environments... These are all essential items whenever you're venturing out.
Where can I buy all of that?
在不同星球上能买到当地特产，但我还是推荐你在列车里就提前准备好！列车长可不会乱收费。
You'll find local specialties on different planets, but by Pom-Pom's recommendation, you should just get everything here on the train! The conductor doesn't rip off passengers.

…{NICKNAME}乘客怎么和三月七乘客一样…不过出门在外，的确得带够食物，以免饿肚子。
...{NICKNAME}, you're just like March 7th... But really, please take enough food out with you, otherwise you'll get hungry.

{NICKNAME}乘客，你就陪陪帕姆好吗？放心放心，不会累到你的！
Passenger {NICKNAME}, can you stay here with me? Don't worry. I won't tire you out!
{NICKNAME}乘客，我已经做好准备了，接下来就辛苦你听一下规则吧！
Passenger {NICKNAME}, I'm ready. Now, please bear with me as I explain the rules to you!
书上说，进行全身有氧运动是最适合的，而在列车中最方便的有氧运动，就是跑步啦！
According to the book, full-body aerobic exercise is the most suitable for me. Jogging is the easiest sport I can do on the Express!
但是单纯地跑步难免有些单调，所以帕姆选择趣味跑步法！喏，这个球球你拿着。
Yet, jogging can be boring, so I've decided to use a fun jogging method! Here, take this ball.
接下来，{NICKNAME}乘客就负责把球球扔出去，然后帕姆把球球捡回来！一来一回，也算是有氧锻炼啦！
Now, {NICKNAME}, I need you to throw the ball out for me, and I'll retrieve it! Doing a few rounds of this can be considered good aerobic exercise!
There's something odd about the method...
很简单的规则，试一试就会很快上手的，放心吧！
The rules are very simple — I'm sure you'll quickly get the hang of it!
现在就把球球扔出去吧！帕姆已经做好准备啦！
Throw the ball now! I'm ready!
你将球球扔了出去，帕姆很快捡了回来。如此这般重复了许多次……
You throw the ball, and Pom-Pom gets it back quickly. The process is repeated many times...
感觉有点累了，呼呼…稍微休息一下帕！
I'm a little tired, huff... Let's take a break!
嘿嘿，毕竟我可是列车长！诶不对…总感觉你说的话怪怪的。
Hee-hee, don't forget I'm the conductor! Wait a minute... Your comment sounds odd to me.
下次可以把那个叫佩佩的家伙叫过来，咱们比一比就知道了！诶不对…总感觉佩佩这个名字我听过。
You should invite Peppy over next time to see who's better! Wait a minute... The name rings a bell.
我知道了！你是把我和狗狗作比较了对吧！{NICKNAME}乘客太过分了！
I get it! You're comparing me to a dog! {NICKNAME}, you're awful!
这可是很科学的有氧锻炼方法！帕姆可是在书里看到的！不信你自己搜，书名是《成为人类好朋友的<unbreak>100</unbreak>种方法》！
This is a scientifically proven aerobic exercise I learned from a book! If you don't believe me, you can read it yourself! The title of the book is 100 Ways to Be a Good Friend to Humans.
诶…人类的好朋友…啊！原来一直是这个意思…
Hmm... A good friend to humans... Oh! The book's meant for dogs...
{NICKNAME}乘客，请注意抬脚！帕姆正在打扫卫生！
Passenger {NICKNAME}, please keep your legs up! I'm cleaning the floor!
Is it necessary to clean the floor every day?
The floor is turning into a mirror...
细菌都是看不见的！空气中有那么多浮尘，日积月累下来就会有一层灰了！
Bacteria are not visible to the human eye! There are many dust particles in the air! There will be a layer of dust after a while.
尤其是现在…车厢里的湿度这么低，空气这么干燥，如果不多加打扫的话，乘客也是很容易生病的。
Now that the humidity in the coaches is low and the air is dry, cleaning is especially important, or the passengers will fall sick easily.
要是可以有谁帮帮帕姆就好了…你说是吧，{NICKNAME}乘客？
It'd be great if someone could help me... Don't you think so, {NICKNAME}?
哼，可别想跑！列车长已经选定你啦！过来帮我搭把手吧！加湿器还没修好，只能手动洒水了。
Hmph, don't think of running away, as I have chosen you! Please give me a hand! As the humidifier is still broken, I have to resort to sprinkling water manually.
{NICKNAME}乘客，要注意，洒太多不行，洒太少也不行哦！
Passenger {NICKNAME}, please make sure you sprinkle just the right amount of water!
等你洒好水了，帕姆就来拖地，在此之前我就先休息一下帕……
After you've done that, I'll mop the floor. I'll rest while waiting for you...
你注意到列车的通风系统正在运作，你决定多洒些水，以免蒸发得太快。
Noticing that the ventilation system is working, you decide to sprinkle more water so that it doesn't evaporate too quickly.
诶，{NICKNAME}乘客就已经搞定了吗？呜…帕姆才刚刚开始做美梦呢！
Eh, {NICKNAME}, have you finished sprinkling already? Ugh... I've just started a nice dream!
让我检查一下…呜哇！怎么地板这么湿了！难道{NICKNAME}乘客把水壶打翻了吗？
Let me check... Woah! Why is the floor so wet? Did you flip over a kettle or something, {NICKNAME}?
呜呜，这下子清扫起来可就麻烦了…不过也怪帕姆没有给你说清楚，剩下的工作就交给我帕……
Oh, no! Cleaning this up will be a lot of work... It's my fault for not giving you clear instructions. Just leave the rest to me...
哎，打扫起来就没完没了，要是能解放双手就好了……
Ugh, so much cleaning to do. If only I could free my hands...
这不就是列车长的工作？
Isn't cleaning the job of the conductor?
列车长的工作可不仅仅是保洁这么简单。
The conductor's job is more than that.
Just think of it as exercising.
想不到{NICKNAME}乘客还挺会苦中作乐的。
You sure do know how to make the best out of a bad situation.
What's that look in your eyes?
听说艾丝妲给空间站买了处理杂务的机器人，要是能借一两个到列车上来就好了。
I heard that Asta bought some robots for the space station to handle chores. It would be great if I could borrow one or two for the Express.
对了，{NICKNAME}乘客，你和空间站关系不是挺好的吗？既然你现在有空，帮我去问问吧？
By the way, passenger {NICKNAME}, aren't you close to the space station? Since you are free now, would you do me a favor and go borrow some robots for me?
实在找不到相关负责人的话…直接问艾丝妲也行！就说是「列车长的请求」！
If you really can't find the person in charge... You can just ask Asta directly! Just say it's a request from the conductor!
Pom-Pom wants to borrow some little robots...
诶，帕姆想要小机器人吗？啊，我上次的确说过这事……
Oh, they do? Ah, I did mention the robots to them that last time...
不过…这批机器人虽然是我定制的，但总感觉不太好用。在科员们的满意度调查里，它的得分很低。
Well... Although these robots are customized by me, they don't feel very good to use and scored very low in the staff satisfaction survey.
哎，{NICKNAME}，麻烦你跟帕姆解释清楚吧，不是不借，实在是不好意思坑你们。
{NICKNAME}, please tell Pom-Pom, it's not that I don't want to lend them, it's just...
I want to borrow some little robots...
痴迷这种劣质机械的多少有点…咳咳…你是来聊工作上的事啊，抱歉抱歉。
People who are obsessed with this kind of inferior machinery are a bit... Ahem... Oh, you are here to talk about work, sorry.
你说这种小机器人，艾丝妲站长之前就下了命令，让我收回所有机器人，准备联络售后呢。
You mean this kind of robot? Asta has ordered me to withdraw all of them and contact the after-sales service.
这玩意儿总是时不时自动关机，要不然就是导航报错。我研究过了，它的底层逻辑一塌糊涂……
These little robots always shut down automatically from time to time, and also report errors in navigation. I've researched them, and their underlying logic is a mess...
总之我劝你还是打消这个念头算了。
It's best not to use them.
{NICKNAME}乘客，机器人的事情有着落了吗？
哎…看来是帕姆的运气不太好……
*sigh* It seems that Pom-Pom doesn't have the best luck...
算了，就算没有小机器人，帕姆也能搞的定！
Forget it. Pom-Pom can handle this even without those robots!
——毕竟眼前的大活人可比机器人方便多了！
After all, a living person is much better than a robot!
{NICKNAME}乘客，喏，扫把给你！都是列车上的一份子，替列车长分忧也是应该的嘛！
{NICKNAME}, take the broom! As part of the Express, you should share the worries of the conductor when the time comes!
I have other things to do. See you later.
I am busy with something else.
我就知道{NICKNAME}乘客会这么说！
Pom-Pom knew you would say that!
算了，你去忙你的吧！这种事情我一个人也能解决！
Forget it. Go and do your work! Pom-Pom can handle this kind of thing alone!
为了下次的冒险…要保证充足的补给，就得要……
For the next adventure... To ensure sufficient supplies, you have to...
I will lead the way in cutting spending...
想不到{NICKNAME}乘客还有这样奉献自我的决心，帕姆很高兴！
Can't believe you have such altruistic dedication, {NICKNAME}. Pom-Pom is very happy!
不过你不用担心，一切都在帕姆的计算之中。
But don't worry, everything is under Pom-Pom's control.
You want to send me out hunting?
你在想什么奇怪的事？这可是星穹列车帕！
What are you thinking? This is the Astral Express!
I'll just make you our emergency food.
你听听你说的还是人话吗？！怎么可以这么对待你的列车长！
Listen to yourself! How could you do that to your conductor?
{NICKNAME}乘客可能还不了解帕！为了保证星穹列车的正常运转，需要准备的物资五花八门……
You may not know this, but various materials are needed in order to ensure the normal operation of the Astral Express...
不过之前我们和空间站交情不错，姬子和艾丝妲达成了某种「资源补给协议」。
But before we had a good relationship with the space station, Himeko and Asta reached some kind of resource supply agreement.
一些基础物资可以直接去找对应科室要～当然，太过贵重和麻烦的东西还是不要麻烦他们了。
For some basic supplies, we can go directly to the corresponding department to ask for them. Well, but don't ask for things that are too expensive and troublesome.
正好{NICKNAME}乘客在，我跟艾丝妲打过招呼，她已经知会过对应科室的负责人了，就麻烦你代我跑一趟帕！
Since you are here, I have told Asta, and she has already informed the person in charge of the corresponding department, why don't you run the errand for me this time!
噢，正巧「种子岛」新研发了一批代餐食品。稍等，我需要在终端上走一下流程。
Oh, it just so happens that the Seed Isle has newly developed a batch of meal replacement foods. Hold on, I need to get the process done on the terminal.
找到了，请在这里签一下字。因为是代理领取资源补给，需要把你和委托人的名字都写上。
Found it. Please sign here. Since you are taking the resource supplies for someone else, you need to write down both your name and your client's name.
代理人{NICKNAME}，委托人帕姆。好的，识别通过。之后我会安排科员把你们需要的东西运输过去。
Agent: {NICKNAME}, Consignor: Pom-Pom. OK, identification passed. I will arrange for staff to transport the things you need for you later.
「资源补给协议」…哦哦！艾丝妲站长之前和我说过！这点小事，明德肯定给你办妥，只要小友日后别忘了明德就好！
Resource supply agreement... Oh right! Lead Researcher Asta told me about it before! I'll get this trivial matter done for you, as long as you don't forget this favor in the future!
之后我会安排科员把东西送过去的，就不劳烦小友亲自搬运了！
I will arrange for staff to deliver the things, so you don't need to carry them yourself!
哼，我们地概科的资源都这么紧缺了，你还好意思来找我们拿东西？
Hmph, we at the Department of Cosmic Geography are also short on resources. Where do you find the nerve to come to us for things?
等等…「资源补给协议」…艾丝妲站长好像说过这事，那没事了。
Wait... The resource supply agreement... Lead Researcher Asta seems to have mentioned this.
别在这儿干等着了，户外勘测的装备，我一把老骨头还能给你现在就拿过来不成？待会儿我会叫个小年轻给你直接送到月台！
Don't just wait here. Are you expecting me, an old man, to bring the equipment for an outdoor survey to you? Later, I will get a youngster to send them directly to the railway platform for you!
哦…我知道了，是和星穹列车相关的协议吧？我们密卷科的确弄到了一批有意思的文献……
Oh... I see, it's an agreement related to the Astral Express, right? The Department of Insight has indeed obtained a batch of interesting documents...
不过我现在有点事走不开，我待会儿会让人把资料给你们传输过去的。
But I have something to do right now, I'll have someone transfer the information to you later.
哦，想不到真的有一天会启动这项协议。毕竟咱们法政科，能提供的资源不算多。
Oh, never imagined that this agreement would actually be activated one day. After all, we at the Department of Galactic Geopolitics do not have many resources to offer.
好了，年轻人，审批流程中涉及我这边权限的，都已经通过了。之后会有专门负责人完成资源交接的。
Alright, everything that involves my authority in the approval process has been passed. There will be a person to take care of the handover of resources later.
哈…医疗补给申请需要静候三到五个工作日，我们会以邮件的形式进行答复……
Ha... The application for medical supplies needs to wait for three to five working days, and we will contact you through mail...
等等，「资源补给协议」？哦，我想起来了，那个走特殊流程的啊。
Wait, resource supply agreement? Oh, I remember, the one that requires a special procedure.
好了，流程审批已经搞定，之后会有对应人员送过去的，你回去等着吧。哈欠——
Well, the approval process has been completed, and the corresponding personnel will send it over later. You can go back and wait now. *yawns*
和之前一样，常用零件都给你们准备好了，一会儿就安排小机器人给你们配送过去。
As before, the common parts are ready, and a little robot will be arranged to deliver them to you in a while.
对了，到时候记得给我们的机器人配送服务打个好评啊！
By the way, remember to give our robot's delivery service a good review!
{NICKNAME}, are you also here to listen to music?
留声机摆在这儿，就是给大家听歌用的，当然欢迎。
The Phonograph is here for everyone to listen to music, of course you are welcome to use it.
I just want to see what you're doing.
我来检查下留声机，顺便听听歌。
I am here to check the Phonograph and listen to the music.
可惜这里没有我喜欢的歌…
It's a pity that there is no song I like here...
留声机是用碟片的，想听什么你自己找不就好了。
The Phonograph uses discs. Just find the disc of the song you want to hear.
现在列车上收藏的碟片并不多，你要是有什么特别想听的音乐，可以先跟我说。
There are not many discs on the train now. If you have any music you want to listen to in particular, you can tell Pom-Pom.
I want to listen to some rock music...
摇滚啊，帕姆对摇滚了解的不多，你要是有什么精于此道的朋友，可以问问他们能不能给你搞到几张经典专辑？
Rock... Pom-Pom doesn't know much about rock. If you have any friends who love rock music, you can ask them if they can get you some classic albums?
这样的朋友…我还真认识！
只要有碟片，一切都好说。
As long as they have discs.
摇滚？那你可问对人了，我们乐队…啊不对，说到专辑的话，唔…恐怕不行。
Rock music? You've come to the right person. Our band... ah no. I'm afraid I can't help you.
哎，说来话长了，这和乐队的成员变动有关。
It's a long story. Our band is undergoing some changes.
和钱没有关系，我要是有就直接送你了！
It's not about money. If I have any discs, I will give them to you directly!
怎么说呢，以前是有发售的，不过数量不多，贝洛伯格就这么大，平时有巡演就够了。
How should I put it... We used to sell our albums, though the quantity was not that large. Belobog is not that big, so usually a tour is enough.
后来嘛…有些人员变化——邓恩的事你是知道的。再还有贝斯手这些老大难的问题……
Then... There were some personnel changes, you know with Dunn... Then there's the perennial problem of our bass player...
我正在考虑要不要重录以前的专辑呢，所以碟片什么的，我现在可给不了你。
I'm considering re-recording the previous album, so I can't give you the disc right now.
抱歉啦，{NICKNAME}！以后等我处理完乐队的事情，有机会的话我肯定会送你几张专辑的！
Sorry, {NICKNAME}. When I finish handling the band affairs, I will definitely send you some albums if I have the chance!
禁止乘客躺在沙发上吃东西…禁止乘客在帕姆刚拖干净的地板上踩出脚印…禁止……
No eating on the couch... No footprints on Pom-Pom's freshly mopped floor... No...
What about no passengers on the Express.
禁止乘客上列车…不对！列车上没有乘客了，那还叫什么列车！
No passengers on the Express... No passengers on the train!? Then what kind of train is that!
诶？有吗！我一直闷着头写准则，自己还没来得及仔细看看呢！
Really? I have been writing these guidelines, and I haven't had time to take a closer look at them!
哎，现在列车上的乘客越来越多，什么人都有——呃，我不是在说你，不是每个乘客都像你一样乖巧懂事。
There are more and more passengers on the train now, and there are all sorts around. Pom-Pom is not talking about you. Not every passenger is as well-behaved and sensible as you.
帕姆在想，身为列车长，接下来得加强对列车的管控，这需要管理学知识……
Pom-Pom is thinking, as the conductor, Pom-Pom needs to strengthen my control of the train, which requires knowledge of management...
对了，{NICKNAME}乘客，我听三月七乘客说，贝洛伯格可是个大城市，你们还认识那里的大人物！
{NICKNAME}, I heard from March 7th that Belobog is a big city and you know the bigwigs there!
想必会有精通于此的人帕！你有什么推荐的人选吗？
Some of them must be proficient in management! Do you have any recommendations for candidates?
诚挚向你推荐上层区的…
诚挚向你推荐下层区的…
我就说嘛，你果然是在贝洛伯格认识了不少新朋友，那就麻烦你代我去请教一二帕！
As expected, you have met many new friends in Belobog. I would like to trouble you to reach out for advice for me!
Please give me some management advice...
管理经验？你很有眼色嘛！
Management? You've come to the right person!
记住组织里的每个成员，还要带大家一起吃好吃的，玩好玩的！还有…还有…定期组织大探险活动！
Remembering every member in The Moles, bringing everyone to eat delicious food, and having fun together! And... and... conducting regular big adventures!
这样才能当好鼹鼠党的老大！怎么样，虎克是不是很厉害！一般人可做不到呢！
That's how you become the boss of The Moles! Am I amazing or what! Ordinary people can't do it!
Please give me some management advice...
这其实和情报官的工作一样，都要依靠脑力。
In fact, management is the same as the work of an intelligence officer, and it all depends on brain power.
细心地搜集每个人的资料，梳理出有用的部分，根据实际情况分门别类备份整理…基本就是这些了。
Carefully collect everyone's information, sort out the useful parts, and organize them according to the actual situation... Basically, that's it.
听起来虽然很庞杂，但实际做起来会很有成就感。诀窍的话，就是细致。
It sounds complicated, but doing it can be very rewarding. The trick is to be meticulous.
Please give me some management advice...
我最近也在思考这方面的内容。你要是问从前的我，可能会得到无数个听上去很专业的回答。
I've been thinking about this as well recently. If you ask the old me, you may get countless professional-sounding answers.
但现在，我的答案只有一个——
But now, I have only one answer for you.
要站在大家的角度切身处地去思考。因为我的每一个决策，都可能影响到无数人的生活……
Think from everyone's point of view. Because every decision I make may affect the lives of countless people...
Please give me some management advice...
管理经验？这些年来我在「地火」的确积累了一些心得，不过也称不上什么经验——那就是把专业的事情交给专业的人去做。
Management? Over the years, I have accumulated some experience in Wildfire, but it can't really be called management. I just leave professional things to professional people.
举个例子，下层区的秩序过去是「地火」来维护，但以后我们会交还到银鬃铁卫手里，毕竟他们才是专业人士。
For example, the order in the Underworld used to be maintained by Wildfire, but in the future we will hand it back to the Silvermane Guards. After all, they are professionals.
有他们在，我们才能腾得出手，去处理其他事务。这样一来，下层区的居民，既能同时得到铁卫的保护，也能得到我们的帮助。
With them, we can be free to deal with other affairs. In this way, the Underworld people can not only get the protection of the Silvermane Guards, but also get our help.
Please give me some management advice...
这个问题…得请教史瓦罗先生。
This question... I have to ask Mr. Svarog.
正在处理「外来者」的提问。
Question from the outsider is being processed.
计算，需要按照既定的规则，将一切可能与概率演算出来，执行风险最低与成功率最高的结果。
Calculations require consideration of all possibilities and probabilities according to the established rules, and executing the result with the lowest risk and the highest success rate.
Please give me some management advice...
要管理列车…大概就是要有一定的觉悟。
Managing a train... probably requires a certain amount of awareness.
要负责列车乘客的日常生活，事项繁琐又枯燥，那就得有勇气，随时准备好承担一切职责。
You will be responsible for the daily life of the passengers, which is tedious and boring, so you have to have courage and be ready to take on all responsibilities at any time.
必要时，连休息时间都要贡献出来，得有这样的觉悟才行。
When necessary, you need to contribute even your rest time. This kind of awareness is required.
{NICKNAME}，快告诉帕姆，你都问到了什么吧！
{NICKNAME}, tell Pom-Pom what advice you got!
哦！帕姆好像懂了。但…又好像没懂？这就是管理学大师的建议帕，很有深度！
Oh! Pom-Pom gets it. But... Pom-Pom is not sure... Advice from the master of management is truly deep!
要制定列车行为准则，帕姆还有很长的路要走呢。
Pom-Pom still has a long way to go to develop a code of conduct for the Express.
I asked around in the space station...
你怎么心事重重的样子？
列车长在这儿干什么呢？
What are you doing here, conductor?
丹恒乘客睡在资料室里，我以前查房的时候，还有些担心他就这么睡觉会不会睡不着和着凉什么的……
Passenger Dan Heng sleeps in the archives. I don't know how he manages to get a good night's rest in that room, though. I was always worrying that he'll catch a cold.
不过后来帕姆发现，服务器机组散发的热量还是挺暖和的。而且丹恒乘客对此完全不在意，让帕姆不要担心他。

But then Pom-Pom made a discovery: The heat emanating from the server unit provides plenty of warmth. And since Dan Heng himself insists on sleeping there, Pom-Pom decided to stop worrying about him so much.
他还说什么自己在绳子上也能睡得着。唔，你说这是什么原理，真是奇怪……
He also said something about being able to sleep on the rope. Pom-Pom don't know what he meant by that, seems really strange if you ask me...
帕姆最佩服丹恒乘客的一点是，他居然喝得下姬子的咖啡，甚至还称赞过几次。
One of the things Pom-Pom admires about Dan Heng is that he can actually drink Himeko's coffee. He even complimented her on it a few times.
我一度怀疑丹恒乘客的舌头是不是有什么问题…不过他偶然跟我透露过，原来他认为姬子的咖啡是用来锤炼心性的绝佳工具。
I used to wonder if there was something wrong with Dan Heng's taste buds... but later he mentioned to me in passing that he regards Himeko's coffee as an excellent tool to test his grit.
…总之这件事你可不要告诉姬子帕，姬子身为列车的领航员，没有功劳也有苦劳，总要给她留几分薄面的……
...Anyway, please don't mention any of this to Himeko. As the Express' navigator, she puts in a lot of work that goes unnoticed, so Pom-Pom tries to not be too hard on her.
关于姬子：姬子的咖啡手艺
帕姆不明白姬子明明有精湛的维修技艺，为什么却成天捣鼓些不着调的「手调咖啡」。
Himeko is highly competent when it comes to fixing things, but then she's always pumping out this uninspired "hand-blended coffee." Pom-Pom just doesn't get it.
你说她的咖啡是「黑泥」对吧？哎，其实这已经是她改良过的版本了，现在好歹是用单分子锯手动打磨的咖啡豆。

What was the word you used to describe her coffee — "black sludge," was it? Well as it turns out, this is already the new and improved version of her coffee: The coffee beans are polished by hand with a monomolecular blade.
要还是以前啊，她用的还是速溶咖啡粉，那个剂量…那才是真正的「黑泥」，完全是一团糊糊嘛！
Back in the old days, she would just use instant coffee powder. The amount of powder she used gave a whole new meaning to the phrase "black sludge."
关于瓦尔特杨：尴尬的过去
About Welt Yang: An embarrassing past
瓦尔特…瓦尔特是个稳重的人，似乎经历了很多，不过帕姆曾见过他少有的失态的样子。
Welt... Welt is a man who seems to have been through a lot. He is calm and composed, though Pom-Pom has seen him lose his cool on rare occasions.
唔？你想问什么会失态？哦，其实也没什么，瓦尔特乘客以前是位动画师帕，列车经过某个星球的时候，他用「拟态」能力复现了其中几集给别人看。

Hmm? You want to know what caused him to lose his cool? Oh, it's nothing really. You see, Welt used to be an animator. Whenever the Express passed by certain planets, he would use his "mimicry" ability to reproduce a few episodes for others to see.
结果那几个观众追着问他要续集，瓦尔特乘客就躲在列车里一连几天没下车，说是帮姬子修理列车上的什么东西了。
This resulted in a group of fans chasing after him to beg for a sequel. Welt hid in the Express for several days straight, saying that he was just helping Himeko do some repairs.
不过，帕姆怎么不记得当时列车上有什么设备要修呢？
But Pom-Pom doesn't remember the Express needing any kind of repairs at the time...
关于瓦尔特杨：瞌睡趣事
瓦尔特乘客以前是位动画师，他好像对自己的作品十分自豪帕。闲着的时候，也会主动使用「拟态」能力复现出来播给大家看。

Welt used to be an animator, and he seems to be very proud of his work. Whenever things got slow and everyone had some downtime, Welt would use his "mimicry" ability to re-broadcast his show for everyone.
不过有好几次，帕姆都看到他明明是睡着了，但「拟态」还在不断循环播放动画。
On several occasions, Pom-Pom caught Welt sleeping in the middle of the broadcast!
我问他要不要关掉舱灯和「拟态」，让他回房间好好睡一觉。但他却坚持说他没有睡着，「拟态」和灯都别关，说什么他还要看的。

I asked him if he wanted to turn off the cabin lights and his mimicry broadcast so he could go to his room and get a good night's sleep. But he insisted that he didn't fall asleep, and that the show must go on.
什么嘛，帕姆明明看到他都打呼噜了。
But who does he think he's fooling? Pom-Pom saw him fall asleep right in front of me.
关于三月七：帕姆的辫子
三月乘客啊，是最令帕姆头疼的乘客，她总想用帕姆的耳朵绑辫子戴蝴蝶结，真是可怕……
Out of all the passengers on the Express, March 7th causes the most headaches for me. She always wants to tie my ears into bows...
所以帕姆只要看到三月乘客开着相机，帕姆就会想办法去做别的事。而且帕姆也是真的很忙啦。
So whenever I see March with her camera in hand, Pom-Pom will find an excuse to go do something else. Pom-Pom's always really busy, after all.
关于三月七：果汁爱好者
身为星穹列车的列车长，为每位乘客提供一流的服务自然是我的职责。
As the conductor of the Express, it is naturally my duty to provide first-class service to every passenger.
像三月乘客那样要求提供无限畅饮的果汁，这种事情自然也难不倒我。
A request for "unlimited juice" — put forward by passenger March — does not even pose the slightest challenge for a conductor such as myself.
因为三月乘客对口味也不挑剔，好像只要是果汁她就特别喜欢喝……
March doesn't seem to be particular about taste. As long as it's juice, she'll like it.
关于三月七：少女的心事
About March 7th: A young girl's heart
别看三月乘客成天吵吵闹闹的，就算没人跟她讲话，她自己和自己就能聊起来。
Don't think that March is running around and chatting all day long just because she has company. Even when she's alone, she'll strike up a conversation with herself.
但在整理相册和写日记的时候，她好像会格外地安静。有时候帕姆会看到她望向窗外出神，也不知道她到底在想什么帕。
March does seem to quiet down suddenly whenever she's organizing photo albums or writing in her diary. Sometimes Pom-Pom sees her gazing out the window. Pom-Pom wonders what she's thinking about.
列车上有不同的房间，自然就有不同的设施。
There are different rooms on the Express, so naturally there are different facilities as well.
像卫生间这种东西当然存在啦，不过通常在大家过量饮用餐车饮料后，就会要排队。
Of course the Express has things like bathrooms, but when all the passengers overindulge on drinks from the food truck, they have to wait in line to use them.
还有…为什么大家总是把手机丢在卫生间的洗手台上呢？真是奇怪啊，我总是能在那儿捡到大家的手机。
And... why does everyone always leave their phones on the bathroom counter? It's so weird, I'm always finding people's phones there.
我是谁，我的过去？你问这些有什么意义吗？
Who am I and what is my past? Is there any point in you asking about such things?
帕姆就是帕姆，帕姆是你们尊敬的列车长大人，在列车上要遵守列车的规矩，不要总是惹帕姆生气。
Pom-Pom is Pom-Pom, your respectful conductor. Follow the rules of the Express, and try not make me angry all the time.
About Pom-Pom: The Express and its journeys
外面的世界啊…帕姆的确是很想看看外面…不过，旅途的意义并不在于外面的风景有多么精彩，而是在于与你同行的人。
The outside world... Pom-Pom does want to see it. However, the meaning of the journey lies not in how wonderful the scenery is outside, but in the people you travel with.
无论是帕姆还是身为乘客的你们，要珍惜和我们一起共同乘车的同伴…这样的话，那片刻的欢乐与感情就有了更深刻的意义……

Whether it's me or passengers such as yourself, it's the same for all of us — we need to cherish the companions who ride along with us... That will make the moments of joy and bonding along the way even more meaningful...
说起来，丹恒乘客时常通宵整理资料，睡眠质量很成问题帕。
Come to think of it, passenger Dan Heng often spends entire nights organizing files. I imagine his sleep quality isn't great.
有些日子，帕姆为他送去餐点时，他似乎都做了不愉快的梦，偶尔还会被帕姆惊醒。
Some days, when I went to bring him his meal, it seemed that he was having bad dreams. Sometimes I even wake him up.
丹恒乘客到底梦见了什么呢？…啊，窥探乘客的隐私可不是列车长该做的事情。
Pom-Pom wonders, what is Dan Heng dreaming about? ...Ah, it is not proper for a conductor to pry on a passenger's private affairs...
丹恒乘客时常会用心保养擦拭他的长枪。虽然列车很安全，但他似乎还是没有放下防范之心。
Passenger Dan Heng often carefully maintains and polishes his spear. Although the Express is very safe, it seems that he is not willing to drop his guard.
嗯，帕姆看得出来，擦拭长枪时，他的眼神里除了警觉外，还有一丝怀念。
Hmm, Pom-Pom can tell that when he polishes his spear, there isn't just alertness in his eyes, but a glint of longing, too.
不要小看帕姆啊，帕姆可是和许多不同乘客打过交道的。
Don't underestimate me, Pom-Pom had dealt with all kinds of different passengers!
鹤运速递，啥都能寄。返航路线生成中…

请紧密跟随确保机巧鸟正常工作。
