为确保物流安全，物流机巧鸟将即刻返回停鸟架。
For security reasons, the courier cycrane will immediately return to its roost.
鹤运速递，啥都能寄。全新广告语，现面向全罗浮募集中。
Heron Express — We Mail Anything. The all-new slogan is being pumped out all over the Luofu.
Same-day delivery for small- and medium-sized parcels.
鹤运物流，仙舟生活最好的朋友。
Heron Express: Your Xianzhou lifestyle's best friend.
感谢你能担当我们的陪练，{NICKNAME}教官。
Thanks for being our sparring partner, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}.
禁区的铁卫已经布好了阵势，准备迎接你的挑战。
The Silvermane Guards have set up position in the restricted zone and are prepared to meet your challenge.
你需要突破我们设下的封锁线，并在终点接受邓恩队长的试炼。
You have to break through the blockade we've set up, and take on Captain Dunn's trial at the end.
推开眼前挡路的军械箱，继续前进吧。哔——啵。
Push away the armory box blocking your path, and continue on. Beep — boop.
参加本次练兵的铁卫都经过了特训。如果不小心触发了警戒状态，战斗会变得相当棘手。
The Silvermane Guards in this drill have all undergone special training. Combat against them can get pretty tricky if you trigger the alarm.
简单来说，他们都深谙<color=#dbc291ff>先下手为强</color>的战术思想。想避免遭到突袭的话，还是尽量<color=#dbc291ff>避开他们的视线吧</color>。

Put simply, they're all experts in the tactical art of <color=#dbc291ff>seizing the initiative</color>. If you want to avoid a surprise attack, <color=#dbc291ff>stay out of their line of sight</color> as much as possible.
哔——啵。封锁线后的大门被锁住了。
Beep — boop. The gate behind the blockade is locked.
想要继续前进，挑战邓恩队长的话，有两条路线可以选择。
There are two paths to choose from if you want to keep on going and challenge Captain Dunn.
选项一，蛮攻。只要击败在封锁线上巡逻的所有铁卫士兵和军官，大门就会开启。
Option 1: Brute force. Just beat up all the Silvermane soldiers and officers patrolling along the blockade, and the gate will open.
选项二，智取。想办法绕过巡逻铁卫的眼线，然后在侧翼区域找到控制大门的终端。
Option 2: Smarts. Find a way to bypass the patrolling guards' lines of sight, then flank them and find the terminal that controls the gate.
要选择哪种方式由你决定，{NICKNAME}教官。
（那一定就是控制大门的终端了。）
(That must be the terminal that controls the gate.)
（轻轻松松。果然「智取」就是我的强项。）
(Piece of cake. Looks like Smarts are my strong suit after all.)
大门已经打开了。请穿过封锁区，接受邓恩队长的试炼吧。
The gate's now open. Please cross the blockade and undertake Captain Dunn's trial.
喔，这不是{NICKNAME}教官么！让我看看时间……
Oh, if it isn't Drillmaster {NICKNAME}! Let me check the time...
…精彩，不愧是你，用了这么短的时间就突破了我们精心布设的封锁线。
...Marvelous. As expected, you've cut straight through our carefully-laid blockade in no time at all.
不过「副官」应该也跟你解释过了——想要赢得这场演练，你还得过我这关才行。
But the aide should have already explained to you that, if you want to win this drill, you'll have to get through me.
怎么样，{NICKNAME}？准备好再跟我较量一次了吗？
How about it, {NICKNAME}? Are you ready to go head-to-head with me?
来吧，{NICKNAME}！全盛状态的银鬃铁卫指挥官该有的战力，今天就让你见识见识！
Bring it, {NICKNAME}! I'll show you the strength of a Silvermane Guard commander in their prime!
呼…精彩…真是精彩。你的作战技巧比之前更纯熟了……
Hoo... Wonderful... Truly wonderful. Your combat skills are more proficient than before...
After that, I gacha'ed loads more.
罢了，不必详细解释。强者自有修炼秘诀，我懂！
Never mind. No need to go over the details. The strong have their own ways for getting stronger. I get it!
这次禁区演练就到此结束。去和「副官」聊聊，领取你应得的酬劳吧。
That's enough drills in the restricted zone for now. Go chat with the aide and claim your well-deserved reward.
感谢你帮助铁卫精进作战技艺——希望你能再来参加后续的演练，{NICKNAME}教官。
Thanks for helping the Guards hone our combat skills — We hope you can come back and train with us again sometime, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}.
请收下你应得的陪练酬劳。如果想要再次参加演练，欢迎来铁卫禁区找我登记。
Please accept this sparring reward. If you want to participate in drills again, come register with me in the restricted zone.
I salute you, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}. Beep — boop.
哔——啵。想要通过演练，就必须突破铁卫设下的封锁线，然后在终点接受邓恩队长的试炼。
Beep — boop. If you want to pass the drill, you'll have to break through the blockade that the Guards have set up, then challenge Captain Dunn's trial at the end.
I look forward to your performance, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}.
感谢你能担当我们的陪练，{NICKNAME}教官。
Thanks for being our sparring partner, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}.
禁区的铁卫已经布好了阵势，准备迎接你的挑战。
The Silvermane Guards have set up position in the restricted zone and are prepared to meet your challenge.
这一次的演练目标是——击败「少校」。
The goal of this drill is to defeat the Major.
没错。就是那边的大家伙。
That's right. It's the big guy over there.
笑话时间——「少校」很想减肥，他该怎么做？
Joke time: The Major wants to lose some weight. What should he do?
想要挑战「少校」，就必须先<color=#dbc291ff>调度齿轮栈桥，打通道路。</color>
You'll need to <color=#dbc291ff>configure the gear bridge to make a path</color> before you challenge the Major.
控制栈桥的终端就在禁区里的某处。期待你的表现，{NICKNAME}教官。
The terminal that controls the gear bridge is somewhere in the restricted zone. I look forward to your performance, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}.
(Seems locked. What's going on with it?)
哔——啵。看来栈桥的终端被锁住了。必须使用特定的<color=#dbc291ff>终端密钥</color>才能解锁。
Beep — boop. It seems that the bridge terminal is locked. Only a special <color=#dbc291ff>terminal encryption key</color> can unlock it.
禁区的<color=#dbc291ff>铁卫军官</color>也许随身携带着密钥。想要操控栈桥的话，看来必须要和他们作战才行。
The <color=#dbc291ff>Silvermane officers</color> here should have the key. Looks like you'll have to fight them if you want to operate the bridge.
（看来还得再找到一个终端才行。）
(Looks like I'll have to find another terminal, then.)
久仰大名！今日一见，倍感荣幸！哈！哈！哈！
We finally meet! It's an honor to see you today. Bwahaha!
This robot gets straight to the point.
This is how I welcome people!
我听邓恩指挥官提及过你的实力。实不相瞒，我早就摩拳擦掌，想与你一较高下了！
I've heard Commander Dunn mention your strength. To tell the truth, I've been itching to test my might against yours for a long time now!
——开玩笑的，你看我这体型，拳头根本磨不到一块去！哈！哈！哈！
— Just kidding. I'm a robot, and can't itch! Bwahahaha!
开始吧，{NICKNAME}教官！战斗真是让人热血澎湃！
Let's begin, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}! Combat really gets the blood flowing!
— Even though I don't have any blood! Bwahaha!
…精彩，实在精彩！果然如邓恩所说，你的实力名不虚传！
...Amazing. Truly amazing! Dunn was right. You really do live up to your reputation!
看来我的能力还有很多上升空间！哈！哈！哈！
Looks like I've still got plenty of room for improvement! Bwahaha!
No no, mods are for wimps!
从今天开始，我每天要多加五十个引体向上，再加一百个俯卧撑！哈！哈！哈！
Starting today, I'm going to do fifty more pull-ups and one hundred push-ups, every day! Bwahaha!
再次祝贺你完成了演练，{NICKNAME}教官！跟「副官」聊聊吧，它应该已经把报酬给你准备好了！
Congrats once more for completing the drill, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}! Chat with the aide, and it should have a prize for you!
请收下你应得的陪练酬劳。如果想要再次参加演练，欢迎来铁卫禁区找我登记。
Please accept this sparring reward. If you want to participate in drills again, come register with me in the restricted zone.
I salute you, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}. Beep — boop.
（那个军官身上或许有能操控栈桥的密钥？）
(That officer may have the key for the bridge?)
（直接正面起冲突不太理智，或许还有其它办法……）
(A head-on attack isn't the smartest idea here. There has to be another way...)
（这下只能硬着头皮从正面突破了…上吧。）
(Guess I gotta bite the bullet and smash through them directly... Bring it on.)
（那边的铁卫守着一架无人机…或许能派上用场？）
(The Guard over there is guarding some kind of drone... Maybe that could come in handy?)
（好，那个铁卫军官的注意力转移到无人机上了。）
(Okay, that Silvermane officer's distracted with that drone.)
（这下就能从背后突袭了。去拿到他身上的密钥吧。）
(Now we can launch a surprise attack from behind. Let's go get his key.)
哔——啵。找到齿轮栈桥的控制终端，打通前往禁区深处的道路。
Beep — boop. Find the terminal controlling the gear bridge to open the way into the depths of the restricted zone.
只要击败了「少校」，演习就宣告结束。
Defeat the Major to finish the drill.
I look forward to your performance, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}.
{NICKNAME}教官！真没想到，我们这么快又见面了！
Drillmaster {NICKNAME}! I never thought we'd be meeting again so soon!
这种规格的禁区演练，那小子可撑不住场面啊！
That punk can't handle drills of this scale in the restricted zone!
So you're the one calling the shots this time?
没错！这种规格的禁区演练，还是得靠我才能撑住场面啊！
That's right! You'll have to rely on me to handle drills of this scale in the restricted zone!
那么，就由我来为你讲解这次禁区演练的目标吧！
Here, let me explain to you the goal of this restricted zone drill!
面对裂界怪物的肆意入侵，我们在很多时候没有捷径可走，只能依靠「人海战术」进行抵抗。
Facing invaders from the Fragmentum, we sometimes have no other choice but to rely on strength in numbers to fight back.
这一次，{NICKNAME}教官，就交由你来检验银鬃铁卫部队的成色！
This time, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}, I'll leave it to you to test the mettle of these Silvermane Guards!
你需要在禁区内<color=#dbc291ff>战胜四十名银鬃铁卫</color>！没错，只有击败数达到这个数字，挑战才算成功！
You'll have to <color=#dbc291ff>defeat forty Silvermane Guards</color> in the restricted zone! That's right. You can only pass this challenge once you've hit that number!
还有一点！我听说杰帕德戍卫官也打算参与这次演习……
One more thing! I heard Captain Gepard plans on joining this drill, too...
但我们布置场地的时候他还不在现场——谁知道他什么时候会加入演习呢？
But he wasn't there when we were setting things up. Who knows when he'll join in on the drill?
出发吧，{NICKNAME}教官！就由你来给这群新兵蛋子好好上一课！
Get going, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}! It's up to you to teach these rookie chumps a lesson!
(I somehow have to defeat forty Guards...)
(Every journey starts with a single step...)
来了——他来了！杰帕德戍卫官加入了禁区演练！
He's coming — he's coming! Captain Gepard is joining in on the drill!
打起精神来，小伙子们！你们可不想在长官面前丢脸吧？哈！哈！哈！
Brace yourself, lads! You don't want to lose face in front of the captain, do you? Bwahaha!
{NICKNAME}教官，在你面前的有两个选择！
Drillmaster {NICKNAME}, you now have two choices!
继续原来的战略，<color=#dbc291ff>击败剩下的银鬃铁卫</color>——或者<color=#dbc291ff>直接迎战杰帕德戍卫官</color>，一劳永逸！

Stick to your original strategy and <color=#dbc291ff>defeat the remaining Silvermane Guards</color> — or <color=#dbc291ff>fight against Captain Gepard</color> and wrap up the exercise once and for all!
你会怎么选择，{NICKNAME}教官？哈！哈！哈！
（逃开杰帕德的搜索，一鼓作气完成演练吧。）
(Escape Gepard's search and finish the drill.)
谢谢你愿意担当铁卫的陪练，{NICKNAME}。这些作战经验对我们来说非常宝贵。
Thanks for sparring with the Silvermane Guards, {NICKNAME}. This combat experience really is invaluable for us.
你这样做等于变相拯救了许多新兵的性命。我谨代替禁区全体铁卫，向你致以最崇高的敬意。
In doing this, you've actually saved the lives of many new recruits. On behalf of all the Silvermane Guards in the restricted zone, I would like to extend my highest respects to you.
不知道你有没有听过这句话：论迹不论心。
Have you ever heard the line, "Judge someone on their actions, not their thoughts"?
啊，当然。报酬一定少不了。
Oh yes — remuneration is a must.
和「少校」聊聊吧，它应该已经把奖励准备好了。
Chat with the Major, and it should have something ready for you.
精彩，精彩！我无话可说，{NICKNAME}教官！你的威猛值得我世代传颂！
Amazing, amazing! I'm speechless, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}! My children would sing of your might for generations to come!
——虽然机器人也没法传宗接代，哈！哈！哈！
— But robots can't actually have children, bwahaha!
这些酬劳，你收下吧！铁卫禁区近期应该不会再组织演练了——希望你能在别处找到更多的乐子！
Take this reward! There shouldn't be any more Guard drills in the restricted zone for a while — I hope you can find fun elsewhere!
记住，你要击败四十名铁卫才算通过演练！
Remember, you have to defeat forty Silvermane Guards to pass this drill!
杰帕德戍卫官也不知道什么时候会加入战斗，你可要小心了！哈！哈！哈！
Captain Gepard could join the fray any time, so please be careful! Bwahaha!
Go on then. I believe in you, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}!
居然在这里偷懒？让我逮住了吧！
Are you slacking off here? I've caught you now!
但、但是我们根本不可能打赢那位教官啊……
B—But there's no way we can beat that drillmaster...
How long am I gonna have to wait...
嘘！我感觉有人要来了，准备作战！
Shh! I feel like someone's coming. Get ready to fight!
大门纹丝不动，门后没有任何声响。
The door doesn't budge. No sound comes from behind it.
Knock even more loudly on it.
大门依旧纹丝不动，但里面似乎传来了什么动静…只持续了一瞬间。
The door still doesn't budge, but for just a split second... you think you can hear faint noises from within.
Maybe you should keep at it a little longer?
大门没有回应，但「少校」嘹亮的全域广播传入了你的耳朵——
There's no response, but you hear the Major's loud region-wide broadcast...
喂喂，{NICKNAME}教官！你可要想清楚了，杰帕德戍卫官说不定就在那扇大门后面休整哦？
Hey, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}! Do you know what you're doing? Maybe Captain Gepard is resting behind that door!
主动去招惹他的话，<color=#dbc291ff>战斗说不定会变得异常棘手……</color>
If you purposefully go bother him, <color=#dbc291ff>your fight might get real tricky...</color>
不过「擒什么先擒王」这种说法，你肯定听过吧？如果你真的能战胜全盛状态的银鬃铁卫戍卫官，那这次演练也就没有什么拖下去的必要了。

"If you want to kill a snake, chop off its head" — ever heard that one before? If you really can defeat the captain of the Silvermane Guards at his full strength, then there's no need for you to drag this drill on.
让你们见识下什么叫斩首行动。
I'll show you how it's done with capturing the ringleader.
...I expected no less from you. What bravery!
我还是乖乖去打铁卫吧…
I think I'll be good and take the Guards instead...
…还有一句话叫「识时务者为俊杰」！
...There's another saying: "A wise man adapts to circumstance."
Hey, {NICKNAME}! I can't believe you are here!
我本来都不指望了——毕竟你之前已经帮了我们那么多，再提要求就有点蛮不讲理的意思了。
I didn't think you would come. After all, you have offered us a lot of help. I'd be imposing on you if I ask anything more from you.
唷，血气方刚！有我年轻时的派头，哈哈哈！
Wow, I admire your fighting spirit! You remind me of myself when I was young, hahaha!
As long as I'll be rewarded, I'm open to any missions.
那是当然，这怎么可能让你白出力呢？于情于理都说不过去啊。
Of course, you will. How can we make you work for nothing?
I'll do my best to punish and eliminate the evil.
唷，大义凛然！有我年轻时的派头，哈哈哈！
Wow, you're so righteous! You remind me of myself when I was young, hahaha!
By the way, this Corridor of Fading Echoes...
荒凉，比我想象中还要荒凉。我只记得十几年前，贝洛伯格的北方还没有破败到这种程度。
It's way more desolate than I imagined. A decade or so ago, the northern region of Belobog was in a better state than this.
不过迟早有一天，我们要把这些残垣断壁全都修整一遍，把那群怪物统统赶出这片城区。
I believe we'll repair the ruins and get rid of the monsters one day.
听好，{NICKNAME}，这次的作战目标很简单，<color=#dbc291ff>全灭「残响回廊」里出现的裂界怪物。</color>
Listen up, {NICKNAME}. The goal of this operation is simple: <color=#dbc291ff>Destroy all the Fragmentum monsters in the Corridor of Fading Echoes</color>.
威廉应该跟你提过「照雪灯炉」了，对吧？技术部之前给我科普了那玩意的用法。我凭记忆再给你复述一次，听好了。
William must have told you about the Snowshine Lamp, right? The Technology Division has taught me how to use these things before. I'll try and lay it out for you from memory, so listen up.
「照雪灯炉」由两部分组成，第一部分是地髓驱动的<color=#dbc291ff>「热能核心」</color>。别看这小玩意不起眼，里面可是蕴含了巨大的能量。
Snowshine Lamps are made from two parts, one of which is the <color=#dbc291ff>thermic core</color> driven by Geomarrow. Don't underestimate this little gizmo, as it's packing some real power inside.
第二部分就是<color=#dbc291ff>「基座」。只要把「热能核心」安插到「基座」上，就可以启动「照雪灯炉」，放射出足以削弱裂界怪物的能量场</color>。
The second part is the <color=#dbc291ff>base. Slotting the thermic core into the base activates the Snowshine Lamp and radiates an energy field, which can weaken the Fragmentum monsters</color>.
不过，「热能核心」的结构非常不稳定，在长期无人看管的情况下可能会自行脱落，<color=#dbc291ff>甚至被怪物藏到难以寻找的位置……</color>
But the thermic core's structure is very unstable and can fall out over time if nobody is monitoring it — <color=#dbc291ff>and may even be carted off and hidden by these monsters...</color>
如果你想借用「照雪灯炉」的机制来降低作战的负荷，那就多留意一下散在它处的「热能核心」吧。
If you want to use the Snowshine Lamps to reduce your load in combat, then pay close attention to its loose thermic core.
噢，对了，现在这风雪可不小…战斗的时候要小心，身体被冻僵就不好办了。
Oh yeah — the snow's really coming down now. Be careful when you're fighting. You really don't want to come down with frostbite.
去击垮它们吧，{NICKNAME}。有我在这里把守，不必担心背后。
Go and defeat them, {NICKNAME}. I'll keep watch here, so don't worry about guarding your back.
只要<color=#dbc291ff>把热能核心和底座组合起来</color>，照雪灯炉就能发挥出效果了。
As long as <color=#dbc291ff>the thermic core is slotted into its base</color>, the Snowshine Lamps will fire up.
启动灯炉，然后<color=#dbc291ff>把那些杂碎吸引到能量场里</color>逐个击破吧。
Fire up the lamp, then <color=#dbc291ff>lure those scums into its energy field</color> to destroy them one by one.
唔…这颗核心怎么被丢到那么远的角落去了？也不知道是谁干的……
Whoa... How did this core make it all the way over there? Who did that...
这么大的雪，我建议你每一步都谨慎行事，{NICKNAME}。<color=#dbc291ff>绕过巡逻的怪物，去把核心捡回来吧。</color>
In a snowstorm this bad, I advise you proceed carefully with every step, {NICKNAME}. <color=#dbc291ff>Kite around any patrolling monsters, and retrieve the core.</color>
这照雪灯炉的效果的确不同凡响，应该多加利用才是。
Snowshine Lamps are simply incredible. We really should deploy them more often.
干得好，{NICKNAME}！干净利落，是你一贯的风格。
Well done, {NICKNAME}! Being straightforward has always been your style.
周围已经没有怪物活动的迹象了，我猜这回廊里应该能暂时消停一阵。
There are no more traces of monsters in the surroundings. The corridor should be peaceful from now on.
…不过裂界的影响可没这么容易根除，离那些家伙卷土重来也只是时间问题。到时候我可能还要麻烦你来帮忙。
...Yet, the effects of Fragmentum are here to stay. It's only a matter of time before they make a comeback. I might need your help again when the time comes.
辛苦你跟那个叫威廉的联络员保持联系了。那小伙子虽然说话不太利索，但办事靠谱的很，希望你多担待。
I hope you'll keep in touch with William. That boy might not be articulate, but he is very reliable. Please be more patient with him.
这些东西你拿去吧，就当是我雇你干这趟苦差的报酬。保重，{NICKNAME}！
These are for you. You can treat them as my rewards for you. Take care, {NICKNAME}!
（这一拨裂界怪物应该都清理完了…回去跟奥列格汇报吧。）
(This group of monsters should be done for... Go back and report to Oleg.)
Go back and report to Oleg.
唷，又见面了，{NICKNAME}！我就知道，你这热心肠的家伙肯定不会袖手旁观的。
Here we are again, {NICKNAME}! I knew someone as kind as you wouldn't watch the trouble from the sidelines.
如我所料，裂界肯定不会就此安分下来。北边的城墙外不知道还潜藏着多少怪物，时刻准备好侵入回廊。
As I expected, the Fragmentum would not be willing to back off so easily. There must be countless monsters lurking outside the northern wall, waiting to invade the corridor.
你抬头看，这糟糕透顶的天气…空气里还有一股子裂界的腐败味道……
Look at this horrible weather... The stinking smell of the Fragmentum permeates the air...
我有种预感，{NICKNAME}——这次我们要面对的敌人肯定更加难缠。不过好在技术部已经提前部署好了照雪灯炉，对我们的行动有很大帮助。

{NICKNAME}, I have a feeling we'll be up against even tougher enemies this time. Luckily, the Technology Division has made sure all the Snowshine Lamps are ready — it is a tremendous help to our action.
<color=#dbc291ff>找到能源核心，启动照雪灯炉，在它们的加持下干掉敌人吧。</color>记住，扫荡要彻底，裂界里的杂碎一个不留！

<color=#dbc291ff>Find the energy core and activate the Snowshine Lamp. Then, get rid of the enemies with the help of the light.</color> Remember to do a thorough job and spare none of the Fragmentum monsters!
这个关口就由我来把守。前方的扫荡工作就交给你了，{NICKNAME}。
I'll stay to guard this pass. I'll count on you to finish up the task, {NICKNAME}.
干得好，{NICKNAME}！在你的帮助下，咱们又拿下一场大胜！
Awesome, {NICKNAME}! We've achieved another great victory with your help!
周围已经没有怪物活动的迹象了，我猜这回廊里应该能暂时消停一阵。
There are no more traces of monsters in the surroundings. The corridor should be peaceful from now on.
不过，即便我们已经完成了两次扫荡…我猜裂界的怪潮还是不会善罢甘休。毫无疑问，我们要面临的是一场持久战，{NICKNAME}。
Even though we've carried out two raids, I don't think it's enough to send them home. Without a doubt, we're facing a protracted war, {NICKNAME}.
还请你和威廉保持通信，如果回廊里又出了什么状况，他肯定是第一个知道消息的。
I hope you'll keep in touch with William. If anything happens here, William will be the first to know.
这些东西你拿去吧，就当是我雇你干这趟苦差的报酬。保重，{NICKNAME}！
These are for you. You can treat them as my rewards for you. Take care, {NICKNAME}!
（那堆怪物后面有一座照雪灯炉…也许可以避免正面蛮干，绕后解决它们？希望还能捡到多余的核心，点燃那座灯炉……）

(There's a Snowshine Lamp behind that mob of monsters... Instead of facing them head-on, maybe we can skirt around the side and take them out? I hope we can get that extra core and fire up the Snowshine Lamp...)
唷，又见面了，{NICKNAME}！威廉告诉我你正在路上的时候，你都想象不到我有多激动！
Here we are again, {NICKNAME}! You could have no idea how thrilled I was when William told me you were on your way here!
之前的两次作战，你的表现真是惊人——铁卫里的小年轻都在疯传你的事迹呢。依我看，你在部队里的名望很快就要超过我了，可喜可贺！
Your performance in the last two raids was outstanding! The young Silvermane Guards can't stop talking about you. In my opinion, your reputation in the troop will soon surpass mine. Congratulations!
It's a walk in the park to me.
哈哈哈，年轻就是好啊！从远处欣赏你作战的英姿，对我这把老骨头来说也算是种享受！
Hahaha, it's good to be young! For an old-timer like me, it's a treat to watch you in action from afar!
I'm still waiting for you to get your hands dirty.
我这把年纪，上前线硬拼已经有点力不从心了。我还是从远处欣赏你作战的英姿吧，{NICKNAME}。
Fighting at the front lines is a tall order for someone my age. I'll stay here to watch you in action, {NICKNAME}.
话说回来…你能感受到吧，{NICKNAME}？这空气里的压迫感……
By the way... Can you feel the oppression in the air here, {NICKNAME}?
到了这个地步，我也没什么好叮嘱你的了。去战斗吧，{NICKNAME}！
At this point, I have no more advice to give you. Just put your best foot forward, {NICKNAME}!
不用担心背后，这里有我在。用上你能利用的所有资源，杀它们个片甲不留！
I have your back. Use all the available resources and annihilate them!
（齿轮栈桥的桥臂上也设置了照雪灯炉……）
(There's also a Snowshine Lamp on the trestle of the gear bridge...)
（或许能利用这点来清理裂界怪物？试试看吧。）
(Perhaps we can use this to clear out all the Fragmentum monsters? Let's give it a try.)
难以置信…你凭一己之力就把它们干得落花流水，而且自身毫发无损。
This is unbelievable... You've single-handedly beaten them to a pulp without being injured.
你是贝洛伯格的传奇，{NICKNAME}。你不单存护了这座城市的当下，还为保住它的未来尽了一份力。
You're the legend of Belobog, {NICKNAME}. Not only have you preserved the present of this city, but you've also contributed to its future.
夸人的事我不太会，可能还是那个叫威廉的小伙比较擅长。不过，我还是得让你知道，贝洛伯格所有人都欠你一句谢谢。
William might be better than I at giving compliments. Still, I must let you know that every citizen of Belobog owes you one.
不说这些了，聊点开心的吧——比如你的奖励。拿着，{NICKNAME}！这些都是你靠实力挣来的。
Let's talk about something positive, like your rewards. Please have this, {NICKNAME}! You have earned this.
*电波滤音*为了你的安全，我帮你远程启动了「回响发生装置」。
*electronic voice* For the sake of your safety, I've remotely activated the Reverberation Generator.
*电波滤音*异象中的隐形怪物非常敏锐，请小心回避，不要被怪物先发制人。接下来何时启动装置，就交由你自己判断了。

*electronic voice* The invisible monsters affected by the anomaly are extremely keen, so be careful and don't let them catch you off guard. As for when to activate the generator next, I'll leave that up to you.
（确实有进食的痕迹，并且像是四足生物，还需要一些线索。）
(There are indeed signs of feeding here, and it looks like it's from a four-legged creature. I need more clues.)
（这里有进食痕迹，难道说真的是一种*野生生物*引起了异象？）
(Here, some signs of feeding. Is this anomaly really caused by some sort of "wild creature?")
（这两处线索都指向了海滩更深处，到那边调查看看吧。）
(Both clues lead to deeper parts of the beach. I should investigate there.)
*电波滤音*我这边一无所获。您似乎发现了些线索，请继续调查，我随后赶到。
*electronic voice* I've found nothing on my end, but it seems you've found some clues. Please keep it up. I'll be arriving soon.
*电波滤音*这附近怪物数量太多，<color=#dbc291ff>请直接冲刺到浮梯处，不必恋战！</color>
*electronic voice* There are way too many monsters here. <color=#dbc291ff>Just sprint straight to the levitator and don't engage with them!</color>
（好像是次元扑满的声音，赶紧跟上去。）
(That sounds like a Warp Trotter. I should hurry up and track it down.)
（扑满应该是逃进行医市集里了，还得继续向前才能找到它……）
(It must have escaped into the Healer's Market. I've got to keep moving to find it...)
(I mustn't let it get away this time.)
（在这里能听到扑满的声音，应该就在这附近了…）
(I can hear the Trotter again. It must be somewhere close by...)
（剩下的扑满应该都在积玉坊的广场上了，一口气全部抓住吧。）
(All the other Trotters should be at the plaza at Trove of Verdure. Let's catch them all at once.)
（次元扑满在危急时刻能够跨维度逃跑，必须要赶在离开前击败它。）
(Warp Trotters will escape to other dimensions in times of distress. I must defeat them before they get away.)
*电波滤音*我们已经侦测到异变的范围在不断缩小，这一切努力果然没有白费。
*electronic voice* The anomaly's impact area has become smaller. Looks like we're making progress.
*电波滤音*加油，我们胜利在望。
*electronic voice* Keep at it! We're doing great!
*电波滤音*没错，就是这个方向，次元扑满向这个方向逃了。
*electronic voice* Yep, we're on the right track. That Warp Trotter is fleeing in this direction.

<color=#dbc291ff>使用「回响发生装置」</color>应该就能锁定隐身怪物的位置，请酌情使用。

*electronic voice* By the way, the Realm-Keeping Commission has placed some bait on the beach. If the Cloudhymn Magic is really linked to food, you may find something near the bait. Could you go check it out?

Anyway, we've made progress in the investigation. Thanks to your discoveries, the Realm-Keeping Commission will be looking into those Warp Trotters next.
如果您有心帮忙到底的话，我也会在丹鼎司等您的。拿着吧，这是您应得的酬劳，感谢您协助地衡司完成了本次调查。我们该回去了。

Meet me at the Alchemy Commission if you're willing to help us all the way through. But for now, please take this reward as a token of our appreciation for all your assistance. We should be heading back.

*electronic voice* We've detected a lot of monsters near the Healer's Market. They must have manifested with the cloudhymn magic anomalies, but I'm pretty sure you know well how to handle them.

*electronic voice* As another reminder, the <color=#dbc291ff>Reverberation Generator</color> will help you locate the monsters. Please use it wisely.
*电波滤音*记住，<color=#dbc291ff>不必恋战</color>，目标一直是次元扑满。我们保持远程联系，请一路小心。
*electronic voice* And just a heads-up, <color=#dbc291ff>don't engage those monsters</color>. Our main focus is the Warp Trotter. We'll stay in contact remotely. Please be careful.

无路可逃的次元扑满在你的面前瑟瑟发抖，它没有想到「寻味丹鼎司之旅」竟是它的穷途末路。噢，可怜的次元扑满。
Cornered and trapped at a dead end, the Warp Trotter trembles before you. Obviously, it didn't expect its "gourmet-crawl across the Alchemy Commission" to end like this. Oh, what a poor little guy.
请问，就在当下，你的心中是否产生了一丝不忍的情绪？或者说你早已经习惯了心如寒铁，没有任何事情能够让你动摇？
At this moment, are you feeling any trace of pity for this poor creature? Or has your heart become as cold as iron, impervious to any emotion?
早抓住早结束，差不多得了。

这不过就是一次任务罢了，「不忍的情绪」能带来什么？差评如潮的续集而已。

放走次元扑满，这意味着丹鼎司里随时可能会再出现异常…更重要的是，也许你会完成不了任务目标，这样真的可以吗？
Letting it go means that anomalies may happen manifest in the Alchemy Commission again... and more importantly, you won't be able to complete your task. Are you really sure you want to do this?

*electronic voice* ...Do you have the Reverberation Generator on? Watch out! Something is approaching you from behind!
功夫不负有心人，这只次元扑满终于被我们抓住了！…主要是被你抓住了！
Finally, we've caught this Warp Trotter... or rather, you've caught it!

如果您有心帮忙到底的话，我也会在丹鼎司等您的。拿着吧，这是您应得的酬劳，感谢您协助地衡司完成了本次调查。

"I laugh at the Trotter's poor tactics and the abomination's lacking guile. Were I them, I'd set an invisible creature at the narrow pass, and catch the hunters by surprise."

*electronic voice* Remember that the <color=#dbc291ff>Reverberation Generator</color> will help you locate invisible monsters. Please use it wisely.

不过，我现在还没有搞清楚次元扑满是如何模拟出云吟术的…说不定，这是博识学会里的课题，我也是一头雾水。

*electronic voice* Keep hunting! You will get it!

谁不急啊，我也急。不止是工人，现在迴星港封锁，罗浮上的物流系统也会大面积停摆，多耽搁一天都是几千万的损失……

Everyone's antsy. I'm anxious, too. It's not just about the workers. With the Stargazer Navalia sealed, the logistics system on the Luofu will also come to a massive halt. A single day's delay costs tens of millions in losses...
可咱们现在确实抽调不出那么多人手了啊！要是谁能有这个本事，一个人冲进去清理污染，还能全身而退……
I get that we can't spare that many people right now! If only someone had the ability to rush in alone, clean up the contamination, and make it back out in one piece...
得了吧你。别做梦了，想点儿实际的吧。
Alright, you. Quit dreaming. Let's think more realistically, huh?

{NICKNAME}！您要是肯来帮忙，那我们可真是得救了。
{NICKNAME}! If you are willing to help, then we really are saved.

Here's the thing... Stargazer Navalia has to resume production as quickly as possible, but several areas with Ambrosial Arbor pollution have emerged, so we have no other choice but to continue blocking it off.

But every department is finding it difficult to spare staff members, but it's an urgent matter... So, if you are able to go in...

Let me just remind you that the monsters in these polluted areas are connected by some kind of special power. One slip up will alert all of them to your presence.

Imagine it this way. There are invisible wires everywhere. As soon as you step on one of these wires, those monsters will come rushing in together, forcing you into a tough battle.

While we currently can't determine the underlying principle of how the monsters are connected together, we can detect their locations.
请您拿着这只谛听吧。（递给玩家）这是工造司改造过的。只要活用这只谛听，就能看到那些看不见的线，从而避免无意义的战斗了。

Please take this Diting. (Hands to player.) This was modified by the Artisanship Commission. You will be able to see those invisible wires by using this Diting. That'll allow you to avoid any unnecessary battles.

Good luck. Please come back safely. Glory to the Cloud Knights!

您这话说得就见外了。您是大英雄，怎么能亏待呢？

Successfully touched down... My butt needs urgent medical attention!
Hey! You forgot your treasure chest~
你们想升高时，就向上仰望。我向下俯视，因为我已经升高。
When you wish to rise, look upward. I look down because I've already risen above.
广告牌上的角色和尘灵有什么区别？他们也不过是在你注视的目光中给予你固定不变的反馈。
What's the difference between characters on a billboard and wispae? They're both just giving you the same canned responses when you look at them.
瞧，噗噜的未来世界。一切都落进水里，却不再有什么落进深深的井底。
Behold, future world of ploos. Everything has fallen into the water, yet nothing falls into the deep bottom of the well anymore.
天下熙熙，皆为利来；天下攘攘，皆为利往。
All the hustle and bustle of the world is driven by profit. All the coming and going in the world is for gain.
你是一座大桥，我是一座小桥。我们是桥梁而不是目的，是过渡和没落，而不是虚幻的月亮。
You're a grand bridge, I'm a humble one. We're bridges, not destinations. We are transitions and declines, not some illusory moon.
从前我也幻想有一座独栋的房子，只有我自己住在里面——直到我意识到家务劳动是多么沉重的一种负担。
I used to dream about having a detached house all to myself... until I realized what a massive burden housework is.
如果在世界的中心呼唤闪电，我会因为装模做样而被天雷惩罚吗？
If I beckoned lightning at the center of the world, would I get struck by divine lightning for being pretentious?
铁打的座位，流水的尘灵…我们都是失败者，我们也都是成功者。
The seats stay the same, but the wispae keep changing... We're all losers, and we're all winners.
同路的时光虽然短暂，留下的记忆却可以绵长。银河漫漫，你我都是彼此旅途中的一站。
Though our time together was brief, the memories we made will last forever. Across this vast cosmos, we're just a stop along each other's journey.
如果所有的列车都只抵达同样的终点站，我们对旅行的看法会发生变化吗？
If all express trains only ever reached the same final destination, would our view on traveling change?
「{RUBY_B#YOU SHALL NOT PASS}此路不通{RUBY_E#}」——它可以是英雄的豪言壮语，也可以是一个尘灵对您的温馨提示。
"{RUBY_B#YOU SHALL NOT PASS}Road Closed{RUBY_E#}": It could be a hero's rallying cry, or just a wispae giving you a friendly hint.
空心的铁皮人梦想着找到一颗心…在故事的开头，他们总是很难察觉，自己并不需要模仿人类。
The hollow Tin Man dreamed of finding a heart... At the start of the story, they always find it hard to realize they don't need to imitate humans.
不知道在新年假期里，门神会不会也有加班费？
I wonder if the deities of the gate get overtime pay during the New Year holidays, too?
有些人不必看，有些人看不懂——菜单的真正作用，是让你觉得自己仿佛有的选。
Some people don't need to look, and some others wouldn't get it anyway... The real purpose of a menu is to make you think you actually have a choice.
在别人眼中，我们都不过是一个被捏扁搓圆的等差序列…拿走我吧，表情并没有意义。
In everyone's eyes, we're nothing but an arithmetic sequence to be squished and molded however they please... Just take me. Expressions are unnecessary.
你站在桥上看风景，看风景的人在楼上看你。
You're watching the scenery as you stand upon the bridge, while someone enjoying the view upstairs is watching you.
鸟粪石是最高品质的磷矿。如果我富含磷的成分…是否也可以靠磷火来成为一只萤火虫呢？
Guano is the highest quality phosphate ore. If I were rich in phosphorus... could I also become a firefly through phosphorescent fire?
如果有什么无法实现的愿望，那就去航海吧。在星海的彼岸，人或许能重新找回自己的面容。
If there's a wish that can't come true, then sail out into the ocean. Beyond the sea of stars, perhaps one can find their true selves again.
生活不会给你贴超速罚单——它知道你最大的困境是点不着火花塞。
Life won't give you a speeding ticket. It knows your biggest struggle is getting your spark plugs to fire in the first place.
写字的人不知道自己在写什么是一种常态。如果他们知道，他们就不会写那么多了。
Writers not knowing what they're writing about? That's just par for the course. If they actually knew, they wouldn't churn out nearly as much.
生命的意义，是漫长低谷中那唯一的高峰。当那个机会到来的时候，请记得将生死置之度外。
The meaning of life? It's that one peak in an endless valley of lows. When that moment comes knocking, remember to throw caution to the wind and forget about life and death.
自从人们穿上了鞋子，他们的脚就不能感受大地的温度。自从人们穿上了一样的鞋子，他们的脚就再也不属于他们自己。
Ever since people started wearing shoes, their feet can no longer feel the warmth of the lands. Ever since people started wearing the same shoes, their feet no longer belong to themselves.
如果你走上了岔路…不要悲伤，不要心急：岔路里才会有无法预期的风景。
If you find yourself on a detour... don't be sad, don't be anxious: It's on the detours that you'll find the most unexpected scenery.
你有没有发现一件怪事？我们明明是「无名尘灵」，却拥有天罡地煞的名字。真不知道人们究竟记住了我们，还是没记住我们……
Ever noticed something weird? We're called "Nameless Wispae," yet we've got these grand divine names. Makes you wonder if people actually remember us or not...
如果我们把时间切成孤立的瞬间，飞行的箭矢也可以同时静止不动。电子屏幕有刷新率的上限…宇宙也会如此吗？
If we slice time into isolated moments, a flying arrow can be both in motion and perfectly still. Electronic screens have refresh rate limits... could the universe work the same way?
小隐隐于地，大隐隐于天。
The lesser hermit hides on earth, the greater hermit hides amongst the skies.
人生五十年，与下天长久相较，如梦又似幻…才怪哩。现在这生活方式，每十年一大变，五十年长到不行了好吧。

A human life span of fifty years, compared to the span of the heavens, is but a fleeting dream... Yeah, right. With the way we live now, everything changes every decade. Fifty years feels like an absolute eternity, okay?
人生在世，不过是在试图配平一个永远也配不平的等式。
Life's just one big attempt at balancing an equation that'll never balance out.
升起吧，伟大的正午！让我做全世界的日光灯。
Rise, o high noon! Let me be the fluorescent light of the entire world.
这世界上最深重的孤独，是你光天化日之下却必须打着手电筒——而且在人群里找不到人。
The deepest loneliness in this world is when you're standing in broad daylight but still need to carry a flashlight. Even then, you can't find someone in the crowd.
可别笑话仓鼠球——上班下班，上学放学，谁又不是生活在仓鼠球里面呢？
Don't go laughing at the hamster wheels. Commuting back and forth from work or school, aren't we all just living in hamster wheels of our own?
当你找回了自己的鞋子，你也就找回了自己的道路。
When you find your shoes, you'll find your way.
黑板需要板擦，人类需要睡眠，有毒的记忆需要遗忘。
Blackboards need erasers, humans need sleep, and toxic memories need to be forgotten.
如果冬天永远不会到来，那么永恒的秋天会比短促的春天得到更高的评价吗？
If winter never came, would an eternal fall be rated higher than a fleeting spring?
一个残酷的事实——如果没有在风浪里晕船到吐，你就没有真的认识过大海。
Unpopular opinion: If you haven't hurled your guts out from seasickness in rough waves, you haven't truly met the ocean.
如果整个世界都只有黑白，你永远也不会知道自己其实拥有色彩。
If the whole world were just black and white, you'd never know you had colors.
世上的很多事，都好像一块屏幕——屏幕里面的想出去，屏幕外面的想进来。
A lot of things in this world are like a screen: Those inside want to get out, and those outside want to get in.
如何判断自己是不是被困在了一个被演算模拟的世界？找找身边的镜子，看看它们反不反光，能不能映照出无穷个你和无穷个她。

How can you tell if you're trapped in a simulated world built by extrapolation? Look for mirrors around you and see if they actually reflect, if they can show infinite versions of you and infinite versions of her.
什么是银河里最厉害的功夫？第一流的剑客，他的锋刃并不用于斩人，却要用于裁纸。
What's the most powerful martial art in the cosmos? A first-rate swordsman doesn't use their blade to cut down foes, but instead use it to cut paper.
用流在外面的泪，你写不成一本好书。用流在里面的血才可以。
A masterpiece is not written with tears wept for the world to see. It is written with the blood that flows within.
当诚实成为快乐的先决条件，你和我就可以天下无敌。请收下这条捷径。
When honesty becomes the prerequisite for happiness, you and I can be unstoppable. Here, take this shortcut.
水中的月亮和天上的月亮，哪个才是更真实的月亮？先别笑，这不是一个天文学的问题。
The moon reflected in the water or the moon in the sky, which one's the real deal? Hold your laughter, this isn't an astronomy question.
人生中难免会遇到一些问题，一旦答错就意味着死亡。提问，唯一一个无法和欢愉兼容的命途是什么？
Life inevitably throws questions at you. Get one wrong, and it spells death. Here's a question: What's the one and only Path that's incompatible with Elation?
The answer is the Destruction. Did you guess it right?
如果你发现一群陌生人又很看重你，说话又好听——快跑，别掉进了商业广告的陷阱。
If you run into a bunch of strangers who think the world of you and sweet-talk you excessively, run. Don't fall for their marketing trap.
我在水面的这头，你在水面的那头。究竟是谁在水面之上，又是谁在水面之下？啊，我忘记了你们人类不能在水下呼吸。
I'm on this side of the water, you're on the other. But which of us is above the water, and which is below? Oh, that's right... I forgot you humans can't breathe underwater.
为什么电影里喜欢拍大侠在屋顶打架？因为现实中既没有大侠，也不会有人真的在屋顶打架。电影，很奇妙吧~
What is with the obsession with sword masters clashing atop roof tiles in movies? In reality, there are no heroes, and nobody actually fights on roofs. Movies are a curious thing, aren't they?
如果你是要寻找水中的幻月，那么你可就走错路啦。唔…这句话是我第几次说了来着？其实我本来的台词并不是这个，可惜愚者们修改了我的剧本——开个玩笑，我的台词一开始就长这样。

Looking for the Phantasmoon in the reflection? Sorry, you're in the wrong place. Wait... how many times have I said that? My script wasn't even supposed to say this, but the Fools messed with the script... Just kidding! This was always the line.
如果自动售货机不出货，那就麻烦你踢它一脚。曾经有个尘灵在这里提醒人们「就算被吞钱了也不要踢一脚哦」——结果他们每个人都要踢两脚。

If the vending machine doesn't dispense, then please give it a kick. There used to be a wispae here reminding people to not kick it even if it eats your money... So naturally, everyone kicked it twice.
请抬头看一看，并且，千万不要抬头看。有个数学家告诉我，这样说可以让一个人抬头看的机率最大化。
Look up, but whatever you do, don't look up. A mathematician told me that saying it like this maximizes the chances of getting someone to look up.
在侦探小说里，这样的一个冰柜很可能隐藏着惊天的秘密。但很可惜，住在这里的人说了，冰柜里只有速冻食品。顺便一提，我的这两句台词是他自己帮忙写的。

A freezer like this is usually where the shocking twist is kept in mystery novels. Sadly, the resident claims there's nothing inside but frozen food. Incidentally, he's the one who helped me write that bit.
如果睡眠是死亡的预演，那么失眠又是什么？
If sleep is a rehearsal for death, then what does it make insomniacs?
失眠是生活无意义的注脚。
Insomnia is life's footnote on meaninglessness.
啊，被你发现啦。可以帮忙把我藏进一个黑洞里吗？这样或许就能摆脱愚者们的傻笑了。
Ah, you found me. Could you help hiding me in a black hole? Maybe that way I can escape those Fools and their annoying grins.
人生就像银河里的星轨，总会在意想不到的地方发现新的道岔。
Life is like the star rails in the cosmos, you'll always find new detours in the most unexpected places.
在酒馆里待久了，你会误以为世界是静止的——愚者们日复一日，总是在毫无差别的情绪氛围里做着毫无差别的事情。
Spend enough time in a tavern, and you'll start thinking the world's stuck on repeat. Fools doing the same old thing, day in and day out, wrapped up in the same bland emotions.
分不清左右手和分不清上下方哪个更可怕一点？别问我，我既没有手也没有脚。
Which is scarier: Not knowing your left from your right, or not knowing up from down? Don't ask me, I've got neither hands nor feet.
有些尘灵拿龟兔赛跑的故事去笑话兔子。它们似乎不明白，我们既像乌龟一样慢，又像兔子一样懒。
Some wispae like to mock the hare in the story of the tortoise and the hare. They don't seem to get it. We've got the tortoise's speed and the hare's work ethics.
悄悄告诉你一个秘密——医生并没有能力把你洗脑，但是手机上的视频可以。
Let me tell you a little secret: Doctors don't actually have the ability to brainwash you, but videos on your phone? Totally can.
为什么愚者们如此喜欢厕所笑话？别担心，他们只是无差别地嘲笑一切自己无法消化的东西。就算是阿哈本人来了，那也得被塞进这里冲走。
Why do Fools love toilet humor so much? Don't worry, they just indiscriminately laugh at everything they can't digest. Even if Aha THEMSELF showed up, THEY'd get stuffed in here and flushed away too.
这年头的愚者们认为舞台上的角色都是小丑…却没有发觉他们自己变成了一群没有灵魂的小丑。
These days, Fools think all the characters on stage are clowns... never realizing they've become a bunch of soulless clowns themselves.
嘘…愚者们正坐在一个火山口上，哪怕从满月的那头都能看到这里汹涌的岩浆……
Shhh... The Fools are sitting on top of a volcano, even when we can see the raging magma from the furthest end of the full moon...
The finish line's in sight! Keep it up!
That's right, this is the end of the line!
I'm keeping this as a souvenir!
画画好难啊…画画比数学都难…
Drawing is so hard... It's even harder than math...
Uh-oh... looks like you found me out.
你得先这样再这样，然后那样…
You gotta do this first, then that, and then that...
哼哼，这是对观察力的考验。
Hehe, this is a test of observation skills.
You can take a break here, you know~
Is that Florthoven there on the left?
透明平台可以直接跳跃穿过哦。
You can jump straight through transparent platforms, you know.
按住方向键可以扒在墙壁侧面！
Hold the directional buttons to cling to walls!
啾，人家刚刚还在想，不小心飞到这种奇怪的地方，说不定能像童话那样，有一场别样的邂逅。
Tweet, I was just thinking that accidentally flying to a weird place like this might lead to some kind of fairy tale encounter, you know?
然后，就遇到了客官您啾。
And then, I met you, dear guest, tweet.
看到人家藏起来的羽毛，有没有感到很怀念啾。
Seeing those hidden feathers... doesn't it just fill you with nostalgia, tweet?
Memories are the prelude to dreams.
伤疤被掩盖，昨日还在，啾。
Even with scars concealed, the past lingers still, tweet.
这儿的狸猫比你会躲多了。
The furbos around here are way better at hiding than you are.
啾，这样对待淑女，可有些不解风情啾。
Tweet, treating a lady like this is rather unclassy, tweet.
啾！撒谎可不是好习惯，哪怕是人家也会生气的啾。
Tweet! Lying is a bad habit, even I get mad about that, tweet.
哎，相逢总是短暂，人家也要回美梦小镇照看孩子们了，再见啾！
Ah, meetings are always so brief... I'd better get back to Dreamville to look after the little ones. Farewell, tweet!
我猜你一定很有舞蹈天赋！
I bet you've got a real talent for dancing!
无名客就是要有双飞毛腿！
The Nameless have gotta be fleet-footed!
智慧才是无名客的最强武器。
Wisdom is the Nameless's greatest weapon.
下次不如给博识尊出个题看看…
Maybe I should give Nous a quiz next time...
Puzzles like this are a piece of cake~
Huh? Did I not hide well enough?
This wispae came especially to watch the fight!
Whoa, those are some serious moves!
我、我不会灰心的！熟能生巧！
I... I won't get discouraged! Practice makes perfect!
您的幽默感已符合入场要求~
Your sense of humor meets the entry requirements~
试试愚者的妙妙蹦床吧！
感觉后面一直有东西盯着我…
I feel like something's been staring at me from behind...
不要玩弄人家的内心啊…
Don't toy with someone else's heart...
"I guess this is what they call love~!"
可到底什么才是爱情呢...
But what exactly is love, anyway...
The moonlight is truly beautiful tonight.
你拥有光的味道，想必也掌握着时空的科学？
You possess the essence of light. Surely you must also have a command of the science of spacetime?
有时候，我也想去白云的另一端看看。
Sometimes, I long to have a look at the far side of the clouds.
...but I'm afraid of falling to my death.
Dogs love bones, cats love fish...
And what does the paragon of animals enjoy?
The sun, the moon, and the stars...
你们如果喜欢我，能不能冲我眨一眨眼？
If you guys like me, can you give me a wink or something?
What goes up must come down.
在返回尘世之前，你应该先收获一些报酬。
Before you head back to the mortal realm, you should collect some rewards first.
世界由不同的颜色构成…
The world is made up of different colors...
只盯着一种颜色，小心毕设没法过关哦？
You're focusing on only one color? Don't be surprised if you can't pass your final project!
跑步的人容易抱怨跑道…
Runners are quick to complain about the track...
就像上学的人容易抱怨课本。
It's like how students always complain about their textbooks.
他们应该多留意自己的鞋子。
They should keep a closer eye on their shoes.
有句祝福的话，叫一帆风顺…
There's an old saying that goes, "Smooth sailing to you"...
可在太空时代，要一艘帆船有什么用呢？
But in the Space Age, what's the point of having a sailboat?
总有人争论键盘应该做什么。
People are always arguing about what a keyboard should do.
在生活中已经越来越难见到键盘了。
Keyboards are getting harder and harder to come by these days.
毕业只是人生的第一步而已。
Graduation is just the first step in life.
无名的勇者…拿好你的本钱…
勇敢去面对未知的星际风暴吧。
Bravely face the unknown stellar storms ahead.
当我还是一只蝌蚪的时候…
When I was just a tadpole...
我也想做银河的大英雄。
I wanna be a cosmic hero too.
后来？我做了星际和平公司的保安。
After that? I became a security guard for the Interastral Peace Corporation.
快乐更讨喜，还是忧伤更高贵？
Is happiness more pleasing, or is sorrow more noble?
你会发现他们本就是一体两面。
You'll find they're two sides of the same coin.
人与人之间的悲欢并不相通…
People don't really understand each other's pain and joy...
人与人之间本来就不是相同的物种。
People were never really on the same page to begin with.
每个守望者都有一块自己的麦田。
Every guardian has their own field of rye to watch over.
They just sit there day in, day out...
只负责把在麦田里跑错路的孩子抓住…
They just catch kids who've wandered off the path and into the rye...
So they don't fall off a cliff.
否则人们会被震耳欲聋的寂静…
Otherwise, people will be deafened by its thunderous silence...
Torturing you till you go deaf.
笑话可以酿造出什么样的饮料？
What kind of brew can a joke produce?
甜酒，烈酒，还是苦酒乃至毒酒？
A sweet wine? A strong spirit? Or perhaps a bitter vintage... or even a poisonous one?
我们这里擅长酿造让他们自以为是酒的…
Here, we specialize in brewing something they only think is wine...
冬天来了，春天还会远吗？
If winter is here, can spring be far behind?
诗人大抵是一种特别耐冻的物种。
Poets are a breed that's especially good at handling the cold.
经营者就应该勇攀高峰。
A good businessman should always aim for the top.
等你当上老板，你也会发现…
When you become the boss, you'll find out too...
工作真的是坏心情最好的调剂。
Work really is the best cure for a bad mood.
At least when I'm on the clock...
世界总是它最简单的样子。
The world is always at its simplest.
You've had a rough time getting here.
Go ahead and collect your reward first.
没有人能轻松地站在高处。
No one reaches the top without breaking a sweat.
Go ahead and claim your rewards.
恭喜恭喜，一点小意思还望笑纳~
Congrats, congrats! Just a little something, I hope you like it~
爬了这么高，有没有累了呢？
You've already climbed this high. Are you feeling tired yet?
贪婪地拿走这些奖励吧，不要客气！
Go ahead and snatch up these rewards—don't be shy! Greed is more than welcome here!
Kitties and raccoons, don't you dare judge me
人鬼神怪都从这儿渡河
Mortals, ghosts, gods, and monsters... All must cross the river here
健忘的愚者在江畔垂钓
A forgetful Fool fishing by the riverside
天外的伶人曾于此放歌
Actors from beyond the sky once sang their songs here
故人归来要捞起水中月
An old friend returns to fish out the moon's reflection in the water
Sing your song and walk your path, nameless traveler
Will we see each other again?
今天的运动量就达标了…
什么，有猴子不爱吃香蕉？
What? A monkey that doesn't like bananas?
那它一定不是真正的猴子！
Then it can't be a real monkey!
Once upon a time, there was a monkey.
它爬着爬着就变成了人。
It kept crawling and crawling until it turned into a human.
我要自己留着，才不给你呢。
I'm keeping them for myself. No way I'm giving them to you.
猴子开始发现自己变老，
The monkey started noticing he was getting old,
源于踩到香蕉皮之后滑倒。
It all started after slipping on a banana peel.
据说我们都是星穹列车的亲戚…
I heard we're all related to the Astral Express somehow...
饭后百步走，活到九十九…
A hundred steps after each meal, and you'll live to be ninety-nine...
...Ugh, rodents are really a no-go, I guess.
兔子长出长耳朵用来预警，
Rabbits evolved long ears as an early warning system,
却方便了猎人捕捉自己。
But making it easier for hunters to catch them in the process.
Life is all about staying active!
自从有了龟兔赛跑的故事，
Ever since that whole tortoise and the hare story,
Let's start building up that stamina.
All clear, no signs of danger!
Just another night with nothing to do.
只要点出水下呼吸的技能，
As long as I unlock the Water Breathing skill,
I'll never have to worry about drowning again.
坐井观天也是一种智慧，
There is a certain wisdom in being the frog at the bottom of the well,
至少能让人忘掉很多烦恼。
At the very least, it allows one to forget many a worry.
这世界上最厉害的股神，
The greatest stock market genius in the world,
is a fox who likes sitting at round tables.
A fox lives to make money!
Uh, keep on earning that dough!
Hey, we just love hearing that clink~
我笑那阿哈无谋，愚者少智。
I laugh at Aha's lack of cunning and the Fools' naïveté.
Holding onto the tavern at the end of the world like that...
不知道变成概念股去上市。
But who knows, maybe it'll become an Index Funds and go public.
Oh my gosh! I'm the Toilet Knight!
Yeah! Yeah! Totally flying high, woo-hoo!
快使用二段跳，嚯嚯哈嘿！
Quick, use your double jump! Hiya-hah-hey!
进入附近的<color=#f29e38ff>「二次元JUMP！」</color>寻找我吧！
Come find me at the nearby <color=#f29e38ff>Interplanar Jump</color>!
在次元壁上按「下」就能离开~
Press "Down" on the Dimensional Wall to leave~
Try flipping the music score upside down?
据说，愚者们会在黑屏的时候偷偷更换对面的房间
Rumor has it that the Fools swap out the room across from you when the screen goes dark
Head out and you'll be on the rooftop!
This way to the imagenesis classroom!
Head out and you'll find the art classroom~
Head back to the ball court from here?
So the restricted section is through here?
这里可以返回档案室呢。
We can head back to the archive room from here.
How about we head back to the hallway from here?
Exit ahead, back to the classroom~
Return to the comic classroom from here~
Exit up ahead, the music room~
Just head out and you'll be across the river!
Head out here, and you'll be back on the main street.
Head out, and you'll be right back at the food street.
这里有什么神秘的房间？
What kind of mysterious room is this?
出去就到共愿帮的对岸啦~
Once you head out, you'll be on the opposite side of the Synwish Syndicate~
That's the newspaper agency is right inside.
The office is just up ahead.
出去就能看到巨大的帝垣琼玉！
Just step outside and you'll see the massive Celestial Jade!
If you wanna jump to your heart's content, this way~
You can skate across the ice to the other side!
Head outside and you can get to the rooftop~
出去可以到更高的天台哦~
Head outside and you can get to the higher rooftop~
Heads up, you're about to enter the dark street...
Heads up! Once you leave, there's no coming back!
Head out, and you'll be back at the collection room!
前方就是黄金告解室…嗯嗯。
The Golden Confessional is just up ahead... Mhm.
Head across to get to the hospital.
Head across to get to the collection room.
Time to head up to the tavern's second floor!
回到桥上可以看看风景哦~
You can check out the view when you get back to the bridge~
Will there be more new friends...?
Let me tell you a joke...
Sorry, the dialogue box is too tiny
Guess how much I like you?
Come closer, let me get a whiff...
Don't worry... the spikes are made of gummy candy
终极挑战已开启，各单位警戒！
The Final Showdown commences! All units, constant vigilance!
随着宇宙中总熵的缓慢增加，短生物种将成为越来越普遍的现象：就像一年生植物比多年生植物更具演化优势一样。然而，长生是任何生命个体都会拥有的愿望——这就是银河中普遍的斗争。

With the slow increase in universal total entropy, it follows that short-lived species will become increasingly common, much as annual plants possess an evolutionary edge over perennials. However, the desire for longevity is innate to all life, giving rise to the struggle pervading the cosmos.
盛大的节日！人们最美丽的冲动都来自应对「无聊」。我们开拓新的世界，最重要的动机就是——我们不想再像过去的人们那样生活下去了！哈哈哈哈！

What a festival! Humanity's finest drives are born in the fight against "boredom." And our greatest reason to trailblaze new worlds is... our sheer refusal to live as those who came before us did! Hahahaha!
开拓并不意味着总要领头。领航员只有一个，无名客却可以有任意之多：我们这些跟随命运的人，未必就不如创造命运的人高贵。也就是说，粉丝或许比明星本身更有价值！

To trailblaze is not always to lead. There is only one Navigator, but there can be as many Nameless as the stars. Those who answer destiny's call are no less noble than those who issue it. Seen in this light, the fans might just be more valuable than the star themselves!
愿力可以是赢家，也可以是输家——当它是赢家的时候，它总是把事情变得更加简单；当它是输家的时候，它总是把事情变得更加复杂。
Wishpower can be a winner, or it can be a loser. As a winner, it always makes things easier. As a loser, it just complicates everything.
格斗游戏的招式可不能太少！在无名客的战斗里，一切都是武器，一切的战斗方式也都被允许——这才是真正肩负着宇宙生存的斗争！唯一的原则就是不能伤到同伴！

A fighting game can never have too many moves! In the combat of the Nameless, anything goes and everything's a weapon. That is the true struggle for cosmic survival! The only principle is: Do not hurt your companions!
啊，这该死的单向门。它让我想到我一直把某人当作朋友，可那人却一直把我当成敌人的往事…爱总是会宽恕被爱者，那人是这么说的——看来我并不热爱单向门！

Ugh, this cursed one-way door. It takes me back to when I once considered someone a friend, who in turn saw only an enemy... Love always forgives the beloved, or so they say. Well, it seems I feel no such charity for one-way doors!
下水道隐含了一个深刻的假设…关于熵的假设。按照这个假设，人类注定会一再衰败。他们唯一的救赎是获取食物——然后将它们献祭并用下水道冲走。下水道是文明最深刻的象征。

The sewer harbors a profound hypothesis... one of entropy. By it, humanity is doomed to recurrent decay. Our sole redemption is to procure sustenance, offer it up, and flush it away. Thus, the sewer stands as civilization's ultimate emblem.
神明的信仰者，往往假设神明不会对人类犯罪，人类的一切困境都是由他们自己可悲的能力造成。他们应该思考：万一神明的力量比人类还要可悲，那么他们会不会因为需要一个弱者而需要神明。

Believers operate on the assumption that gods do not sin against man, laying every human plight at the door of our own pathetic faculties. They really ought to reflect: if divine power proved even more paltry than that of humans, would they still need gods simply because they need an inferior?
人们总是为了利己和利他争论不休。但愿他们能够理解，这只是一种类似透视的作画技巧，不同的流派对它们有不同的应用。

People always exhaust themselves in the debate between egoism and altruism. Hopefully, they shall come to see that these are but principles of composition, like perspective, applied differently by different schools.
热爱和厌恶有时来源于同一种诱因。这种情况大多发生在有人把生牡蛎添加到汉堡当中的场合。
Love and hate sometimes share the same trigger. This situation mostly arises when someone decides to add raw oysters to a hamburger.
成为无名客吧，这是一种多么高贵的理想！但你也要想清楚…作为一块高贵的大理石，你真的认可这个理想，情愿它把你雕成不可改变的形状吗？友情提醒，雕刻比拍照可痛多了！

To be a Nameless is a noble ideal! But think this through... As a noble block of marble, do you truly accept this ideal? Are you willing to be shaped by it, irrevocably? Friendly reminder: The sculpting bites way deeper than any camera's flash!
我要尽情享用美食！不然我会无法忍受自己的弱点——那种弱点让我对着一切东西都要大吃特吃！我可不想在饥肠辘辘的时候面对那些吃完只会让我后悔的食物……

I'm going to indulge! Properly! If I don't, I can't bear this hunger so consuming that it makes me want to devour everything! On an empty stomach, I refuse any tempting food that I know will just leave me with regret...
漫画的重点，不仅在于让人理解，也在于让人「不理解」。「不理解」能够保护作品的主题不被随意践踏。「不理解」能够在之后理解的一瞬间释放巨大的能量。我要找到一本我不理解的漫画。

The point of comic isn't just getting people to understand, it's also getting them to "not understand." That "lack of understanding" protects the themes from being trampled on. And it is in the moment understanding breaks through that its power is fully unleashed. I must find a comic that I cannot understand.
一个自诩为天才的无家可归者。他因为极度的自我厌恶而对自己的精神发起了凶恶的复仇——并使得自己成为了「世界本无意义」的最佳注脚。讽刺地是，很少有人把他当作一个背叛者。

A self-proclaimed genius with no home to return to. In his extreme self-loathing, he waged a savage war upon his own psyche, rendering himself the perfect footnote to the claim that "the world is meaningless." Ironically, scarcely anyone ever saw him as a traitor.
不要模仿我的行为，否则你会被高速行驶的列车产生的吸力吞噬。我不怕吞噬，是因为我已经碎裂——而你还需要维持身体的健全。

Do not mimic my deeds, lest you be devoured by the suction generated by the high-speed Express. I do not fear being devoured, for I am already shattered. You, however, still owe wholeness to your form.
星神为何而存在？有人说，要是没有智慧的人，星神也就不会存在…某种意义上这的确言之有理。但是，这件事还有更冷酷的一面——要是没有愚蠢的人，星神就更不可能存在！

Why do the Aeons exist? Some say if there were no intelligent beings, the Aeons probably would not be... There's truth in that. But the colder logic runs deeper: without folly, the Aeons most certainly would not be!
欢迎光临！您是悲观主义者吗？咖啡会是您给自己的最好奖励。您是乐观主义者吗？咖啡也会是您给自己的最好奖励！
Welcome! Are you a pessimist? Then a perfect coffee is your best reward. An optimist? Then you need coffee all the more!
来喝汽水吧！这样动物们就不会把我们当作同类。不然，作为同类，它们会觉得我们又哭又笑，荒唐透顶，充满不幸…可不能让它们这么认为！
Let's drink some soda! So the animals won't mistake us for their own kind. Otherwise, seeing us cry and laugh, they'd think us such tragic, ridiculous creatures... And we mustn't let that happen!
「朋友们鼓掌吧，喜剧就要结束了！」…高傲的自封为神者以此自诩。冲吧，撕破他的面具，告诉他这个世界的观众究竟在期待什么！
"Applaud, friends, the comedy is over!" Thus crows the self-proclaimed god. Charge! Tear off his mask and tell him what this world's audience truly craves!
安全出口？无名客的世界里可没有那样的东西。选择其一，其他的可能性就会一并消失——关键的是，没有人能向你保证一个正确答案。
An emergency exit? Such a concept does not exist for the Nameless. To choose is to let a universe of alternatives die... And the kicker is, no one holds that guarantee of a correct answer.
什么叫公司呢？就是一种把幸福和不幸都当作电脑病毒一并清除的组织。
What is a corporation? It is an organization that deletes both happiness and misery alike as if they were system errors.
加速！加速！！加速！！！一切金钱的问题都可以用加速来解决——我说的。
Faster! Faster!! FASTER!!! Every money problem can be solved with more speed. Mark my word.
枣！尚！！嚎！！！当一个尘灵独处时，它说话会变得大声，写字会变得大声——它要制造一切行为的回声，好让天地万物都知道自己还存在。这是尘灵的美德。
Goooooood! Moooooooorning!!! When a wispae is alone, it speaks loudly and writes loudly to proclaim to the world, through echoes born of every act, that it still exists. That is the virtue of wispae.
人类？幻造种？尘灵？都不是，这年头嗓门最大的东西叫发电机。
Humans? Imagenae? Wispae? None of the above. These days, the loudest things around are called: generators.
呀吼！终于找到我了吗？我刚创作完一部悲剧，现在满脑子只想创作喜剧啦！哈哈哈哈。
Yahoo! Took you long enough! I just finished writing a tragedy, and now my mind is flooding with nothing but comedy! Hahahaha.
不用担心，我不会被一张假嘴吃掉——就算它是真的，尘灵也不够它塞牙缝啦。说真的，星神要想成为爱的对象，祂就必须先放弃审判的权威…嗯，我后面的这位老兄说不定还挺有前途。

Fear not, I'm in no danger from a literal fake mouth. And even if it's real, a wispae wouldn't be enough to barely count as a snack. Seriously though, if an Aeon wants to be a subject of love, THEY must first relinquish THEIR authority of judgment... Hmm, this buddy behind me might actually have prospects on that.
科幻片的敌人往往有一种共性——他们想要揭示这个世界是丑恶的，结果却把这个世界变得更丑恶了。
Sci-fi villains often fall for the same pattern: in their very attempt to expose the world's ugliness, they only succeed in adding to it.
嗯？伪装被识破了？太好了，总算有人帮我解套了。被人遗忘可比被人否定要难受多了。被人否定的时候起码还能发起战斗。
Hmm? I'm exposed? Wonderful! Finally, someone's here to get me off the hook. To be forgotten is a deeper wound than to be opposed. Opposition, at least, grants you a battlefield.
向死而生是一切生命的本质。哪怕长生种也会死于意外——在无限漫长的时间里，这件事会发生的概率是<unbreak>100%</unbreak>。是的：从长期主义的视角来看，我们都死了。

All existence is a march toward death. Even long-life species can die from accidents. Given infinite time, the probability of this happening is <unbreak>100%</unbreak>. Thus, from a long-term view, we are all dead.
追求真理的冲动，来源于保存生命的权力。这就是为什么，巨大的机器人就是正义！来吧，我们白刃格斗！
The impulse to seek truth springs from the will to preserve life. That's why giant robots equal justice! So draw steel and fight!
垃圾只是放错了位置的资源。
Trash is just a resource that hasn't found its place yet.
但我不是为了这个掏垃圾桶。
But that's not why I'm rummaging through trashcans.
I am searching for the ultimate art...
Bunnies don't worry about a thing!
骗你的，它只是不说而已。
Just kidding. It does. It just keeps it all to itself.
It started out as one headache...
Speak up, and that makes two.
So why not just choose to be happy?
究竟更像狼，还是更像狗？
Is it more like a wolf, or a dog?
银河间有很多神奇的传说。
The cosmos is full of wondrous legends.
仔细想想全都荒谬至极。
Come to think of it, it's all sheer absurdity.
但，传说不就是因为荒谬，
But then, isn't absurdity the very thing...
夹在旧书中的一片叶子。
that one leaf tucked away in an old book.
有一次动物们想打棒球，
Once, the animals wanted to play baseball.
they just popped a bead off
Of course, they did put it back.
Video games are way more fun!
If you don't like taking photos,
It's probably just that you're missing—
the less you talk, the more money you save.
and give your feet a good clean before bed.
A nice hot bath would be perfect!
First things when you get home:
Dare you hit a home run?
This is the life of every mechatron:
但如果身体也有自己的意识，
But if the body had a consciousness of its own,
Why should you get to be the head??
生物都习惯用肩膀的宽度，
Creatures are used to judge body's strength,
by the width of the shoulders.
所以，人类的三角肌很重要！
That's why the deltoids are so crucial for humans!
机铠的脚可不仅仅是装饰。
The feet of mechatron aren't just for decoration.
诗和远方的前提都是脚。
Feet are the prerequisite for dreams and distant horizons.
承重的部件懂得脚踏实地。
A load-bearing part knows to keep its feet on the ground.
A load-bearing design endures in solitude.
恭喜你，站在了巨人的肩上！
Congrats, you're standing on the shoulders of giants!
就是发挥想象力的时间了……
it's time to use your imagination...
这里已经没什么值得留恋！
There's nothing left for you here!
勇敢地开拓未来吧，少年！
A journey of a thousand miles
Mechatrons without feet are just couch potatoes!
Zandar also liked to say that
他只是站在巨人的肩上。
he was just standing on the shoulders of giants.
But perhaps that was meant to be ironic.
You know, Nous is but a giant head.
Uh, King or whatever, it doesn't matter.
Just come and take these rewards!
你的球技竟然在我之上？
Wait, you're better than me at this?
A long dream is but a vision, fading into light tales.
你的房间多久没打扫了？
When was the last time you cleaned your room?
我愿意用我的整个王国，
你们小人物是不会懂的。
Now where was I headed again?
The button is on my head!
和我一起逃离无聊的日常吧～
Let's escape from the drab daily life with me~
切换到黄色三角，再拨动拉杆～
Switch to the yellow triangle, then pull the lever~
Let's send this place to the moon!
Time it right, pull the lever
是开拓妖精，我们有救了
Soul's depths stirred by tempest's might,
Adorned in starlight, I shall reascend.
Welcome back to your post, high elder!
胜败乃兵家常事，再来一次吧
Winning and losing are all part of the game, let's do it one more time
Just hold "Left" and Sprint all the way!
你发出了一声不那么酷的*哼*，眼前一片漆黑……
You hmph in a not-so-cool way, and your surroundings turn pitch-black...
你输给了石头老板的爪牙，但不要憎恨你的敌人……
Don't hate the enemies that have beaten you, as they are merely Boss Stone's minions...
钟表小子和折纸小鸟可以粗心，但哈努兄弟不行……
Clockie and the Origami Bird can be careless, but not Hanu...
痛苦和恐惧不是失败，哈努兄弟还有挽回的余地……
Being in agony and fear doesn't mean he's a loser. Hanu can still salvage the situation...
哈努兄弟走错过路，但时间和运气会改正错误……
Hanu has made mistakes, but time and fate will correct them...
这里是梦境游戏《小小哈努行动》的入口，只有变成小小哈努兄弟后才可以进入。
This is the entrance to Hanu's Adventure, a game in the Dreamscape. You must transform yourself into a miniature Brother Hanu first to proceed.
被石头老板变小以后，爬楼梯就像攀登山峰一样困难，还是找找别的路吧。
After being shrunk by Boss Stone, climbing the staircase becomes as challenging as a mountain hike. Let's try another route.
石头老板放置的气球挡住了哈努兄弟的去路，没有被变小的伙伴或许能破坏它。
The balloons placed by Boss Stone have hindered Hanu's way. Those who are not shrunken can probably destroy the balloons.
哈努兄弟用智慧击败了石头老板的爪牙，这真的太酷了。
Hanu has overcome Boss Stone's minions with his wits. Impressive!
你得到了石头老板夺走的财宝，还有《小小哈努行动》的限量版故事书！
You receive the treasure looted by Boss Stone and the limited-edition storybook of Hanu's Adventure!
一阵奇怪的风吹过，在你的手里留下了一张幻造的书页。那转瞬化作电子数据的书页上，似乎记载了一首叙说洪荒时代的诗歌……
A strange wind blows past, leaving an imagenated page in your hands. The page, which instantly transforms into electronic data, seems to contain a poem that tells tales of the primordial age...
相逢就是缘。有什么我能够帮到你的吗？
Every encounter is unique and destined. How may I help you today?
I'm here for the Floating Grease Chronicles...
啊…原来是球棒浣熊的原型阁下。抱歉，我脸盲有点严重，还在像对陌生人一样打招呼。咳咳，是时候切换到「查令店长」的人格形态了。
Ah... So you're the prototype of Baseball Raccoon. Sorry, I have face blindness, thus still greeting you like a stranger. Ahem, it's time to switch to the Charing bookstore owner's persona.
重新自我介绍一下：在下是查令旧书店的店长，海伦·查令。而阁下身边的那本巨大立体书，就是历任店长的特殊朋友，《浮脂记事》，一本不会说话的幻造种古籍。

Allow me to reintroduce myself: I am Helen Charing, proprietor of Charing's Used Books. And that massive tome floating beside you is the Floating Grease Chronicles, an ancient imagenated text that can't speak, a special friend to all previous store owners.
俗话说「百闻不如一见」，阁下可以先确认一下《浮脂记事》被稍稍修复的状态。
As they say, "Seeing is believing." Why don't you check out the slightly reinstated state of the Floating Grease Chronicles yourself?
阁下或许听说过：{RUBY_B#阿哈}乐子神{RUBY_E#}曾在这个世界流下了一滴眼泪，这片土地因此而变得与众不同。
Perhaps you've heard the tale: {RUBY_B#Aha}The Laughter{RUBY_E#} once shed a tear in this world, and that's what made this land so extraordinary.
在那个时候，这里不仅不是{RUBY_B#公司的领地}二相乐园{RUBY_E#}，甚至也不能说是{RUBY_B#绘师的国度}古弁才天国{RUBY_E#}。《浮脂记事》便是关于那个时代的传说歌谣。

Back then, this place was not only not {RUBY_B#IPC's Domain}Planarcadia{RUBY_E#}, but it couldn't even be called {RUBY_B#Realm of the Artists}ancient Benzaitengoku{RUBY_E#}. The Floating Grease Chronicles tells the legends of that era.

Picking on kids is not your style at all. Therefore, you decide to follow the rules and play fair...
在好运的加持下，你终于给了这骄傲的小朋友一记深刻的教训。或者，用简单的话来说——你赢了！
With luck on your side, you taught the arrogant kid a lesson. Or in other words, you won!
I have to put him in his place!
哈，这个想法可真是太邪恶了——但崇高道德似乎对此表示并不在意……
How evil! But the higher powers don't seem bothered by it...
换句话说，你的这个念头或许没有想象中那么邪恶。倘若再深入思考，恐怕好好教育教育这个小孩子、教会他何谓「以牙还牙」才是正确的哩！
In other words, it actually might not be a bad idea to humble the kid with "an eye for an eye."
没多久，你便将自己彻底说服了。那就放手去做吧！至少那司掌「巡猎」命途的岚听过此事后一定会很高兴的。
In no time you've convinced yourself to teach the kid a lesson. So just do it! At the very least Lan, who oversees the Path of The Hunt, would be glad to hear this.
先随便出一个，然后再换手！
精彩的计谋！在裁判一声令下、你们二人出手的瞬间，你便高声叫道「快看，娜塔莎大夫来了！」——
Brilliant plan! As you two reveal your hands, you shout, "Look, is that Dr. Natasha!?"
那涉世未深的「四大天王」哪里见过这样的奇计！他果然被你一声惊呼吓得魂不守舍。你抓住这个机会，迅速将手势从石头变成了必胜的剪刀。
Your young and naive opponents have never seen such a tactic before! He indeed is startled by your words, and you grasp the opportunity to change your rock into the winning scissors.
没有人发现你的小动作。你赢了——而且赢得很痛快。
No one notices the move. You win, and in much delight.
没想到，新秀{NICKNAME}竟然拿下两分！看来赢家已经诞生，游戏结束了……
The rookie {NICKNAME} has scored two points! I guess we have a winner and it's game over...
按照我们「黑暗拳斗大赛」的规矩，你理应得到奖励！
According to the rules, you get a prize!
来，这是我们精心准备的——「愤怒拳套」——的配方！
It's the secret to making our Wrathful Gauntlets!
你只要按照这个方法来做，就能打造出威力巨大的拳套啦！怎么样，是不是很「黑暗拳斗」啊？
Just follow its instructions and you can create powerful gauntlets! How's that for a Dark Fist!?
你们哪里搞到这种危险玩意的…
Where did you get such a dangerous thing?
这是我们「黑暗拳斗大赛地下擂台」的秘密！
That's an Underground Ring Dark Fist Tournament secret!
好了，时候不早了——玛丽，汤姆，戴维，我们回诊所吧！
Okay, it's getting late. Mary, Tom, and David, we should get back to the clinic.
你等着，我一定会回来的！
I'll be back. Just you wait!
啊…有人在那里吗？在窗户外面……
Ah... is someone there? Outside the window...
我的眼睛…看不见东西。还请您原谅我的失礼……
My eyes... I can't see. Please forgive my rudeness...
陌生人…请问您可曾见过一位女性？她的声音温柔，还戴着饰有铃铛的发带……
Stranger... have you seen a girl around? Her voice is soft and kind, and she wears a headband with a bell...
那铃铛会发出清脆的响声，好听极了……
The bell chimes with crisp clarity. It's a joy to hear...
那人…是我的姐姐。她已出门许久，却没有回到家中……
That person... is my elder sister. She has been out for a while and hasn't come home yet...
姐姐对我说，她要去的地方叫作…「裂界」。在那儿能够寻得值钱的东西……
She told me she was going to some place called... the "Fragmentum," and she could find something worth selling there...
若您曾见过我的姐姐，可否转告她速归…？
If you've seen my sister, could you help me tell her to come home quickly...?
她的妹妹十分孤单，正在家中等她……
Her younger sister is waiting for her all alone at home...
Ahh... the sound of the bell...!
那熟悉的、清脆的响声…姐姐，是您回来了吗……
That familiar, crisp chime... Big Sis, are you back...
No... No... How could this be...
虚弱的啜泣声渐渐微弱。
The already-weak sobbing fades away gradually.
I have not seen your big sister.
啊…我明白了。谢谢您，好心的陌生人……
Ah... I understand. Thank you, kind stranger...
姐姐啊…您到底去了哪里…？
Big Sis... where on earth have you gone...?
窗后的暖光依旧如薄暮般昏暗。
The warm light behind the window is still dim as dusk.
你试图敲打窗棂求取回应，却只得到一片死寂。
You try rapping on the window for a response, only to be greeted by a deathly silence.
准备离开时，你在窗台下的阴影中发现了一只小巧的八音盒。
When you try to leave, you notice an exquisite music box by the shadow of the window sill.
转动滞涩的发条，你听到几近崩溃的机械结构相互倾轧，发出令人不安的乐声。
Creaky springs turn, and you hear the sequential jostling of tired mechanical switches and cogs sing an eerie melody.
噢、噢…！路过的好心人啊，求求你，请帮帮我……
Oh, oh...! Kind passerby, please, please help me...
我的妹妹…她离家出走了！我四处寻找，却怎么也找不到……
My little sister... she ran away from home! I've looked everywhere for her, but I can't find her...
她的身体虚弱，眼睛也看不见东西…要是一个人在外面出事了，我该如何是好？
She's always been frail, and her eyes can't see... whatever would I do, if something happened to her out there?
啊，我真是个不合格的姐姐…竟会让这种事情发生…！
Argh, I'm a failure of a big sister... to have let such a thing happen...!
在你眼前的这位女性，看起来十分焦虑。
The girl before you appears very anxious.
她那憔悴的面庞上浮现出一丝安心的笑容。
A faint smile of comfort lines her drained visage.
片刻，那笑容倏然消散——同她本人一起于裂界中溶解。
In an instant, that smile fades and dissolves — along with her person — into the Fragmentum.
——裂界中的又一个回音残响彻底消失了。
...Another echo of the Cadence lost in the Fragmentum.
I have not seen your little sister before.
啊…我究竟该怎么办才好……
你这家伙——终于让我抓到你了！
…我是谁，这重要吗？告诉你，我是正直的贝洛伯格人民公仆，荣誉的银鬃铁卫列兵！
...I am an honorable Silvermane Guard and a righteous servant to the people of Belobog!
肆意破坏公物的家伙，今天被我抓了个现行！不给你点颜色瞧瞧，简直妄对我的铁卫誓词！
I caught you redhanded, you vandal! Under my sworn oath as a Silvermane Guard, I shall carry out proper justice!
什么？！你连自己犯了什么事都不知道，怎么一秒就怂了？
What? Did you just give up without knowing what you did?
不行！肆意破坏公物的家伙，今天不好好教训教训你，简直妄对我的铁卫誓词！
You won't get off that easy, vandal! You will taste the iron fist of justice!
我只是想恢复一下状态…
I'm just trying to stay in shape...
Are you trying to reason with me?
我告诉你——你每打碎一件补给容器，禁区的某位铁卫兄弟就得多加班三个小时，把新的容器放到原处……
You should know, for every supply vessel you break, that's three hours of overtime for someone in the restricted zone to replace it...
这是我的自由，你管不着！
What I do is my right and it's none of your business!
还在嘴硬？看来必须得让你尝点苦头才行了——
Backtalking, are you? Guess I got to put some hurting on you...
今天弟兄们就要让你知道，破坏禁区公物要付出什么代价！给我上！
We'll show you the price to pay for damaging public property in the restricted zone! Get 'em!
呃…道歉要是有用，还要银鬃铁卫干嘛？你…呃…我必须让你知道事情的严重性！对，严重性！
If apologies worked, we wouldn't need Silvermane Guards! I must show you how serious this is. Yeah, how serious!
摊牌了！我就是公物破坏狂！
Fine. I admit I'm a repeat offender.
我就知道，你的歉意都是装出来的！
I knew all that apologizing was an act!
今天弟兄们就要让你知道，破坏禁区公物要付出什么代价！给我上！
We'll show you the price to pay for damaging public property in the restricted zone! Get 'em!
我真的知错了！我再也不敢了。
Please stop! I won't do it again!
…咳，我第一次碰见道歉态度这么诚恳的家伙…看来你还算明辨是非。那这次…这次就…呃…放过你吧。
...Ahem, you're the first one to apologize so sincerely. I guess I, uh... can let you go this time.
…但是，但是！你得给我时刻记住——破坏公物者，虽远必诛！
...But know this — no vandals will be tolerated!
行了，快走吧。禁区本来就不是任你游荡的地方。
All right, you may leave now. The restricted zone is not a hangout.
这玩意不是会自动刷新吗？
自动刷新？你怕不是在做梦吧！
Renew? Are you from another world?
我告诉你——你每打碎一件补给容器，禁区的某位铁卫兄弟就得多加班三个小时，把新的容器放到原处……

Please stop! I won't do it again!
…咳，我第一次碰见道歉态度这么诚恳的家伙…看来你还算明辨是非。那这次…这次就…呃…放过你吧。
...Ahem, you're the first one to apologize so sincerely. I guess I, uh... can let you go this time.

...But know this — no vandals will be tolerated!
行了，快走吧。禁区本来就不是任你游荡的地方。
All right, you may leave now. The restricted zone is not a hangout.
You think an apology is enough?
我告诉你——你每打碎一件补给容器，禁区的某位铁卫兄弟就得多加班三个小时，把新的容器放到原处……
You should know, for every supply vessel you break, that's three hours of overtime for someone in the restricted zone to replace it...
虽然但是…这关我什么事？
But... what's that got to do with me?
不、不关你事？你知道银鬃铁卫的休息时间有多宝贵吗？你知道浪费别人三个小时的生命是多可耻的一件事吗？
"What's that got to do with you"? Don't you know how precious breaks are to Silvermane Guards? Don't you know how precious three hours are to another person?
我就知道，你之前的歉意都是装出来的！
I knew all that apologizing was an act!
今天弟兄们就要让你知道，破坏禁区公物要付出什么代价！给我上！
