Heheheh, please forgive me. You're the best, boss. See you next time~
…啊？老板老板，你一定是开玩笑的吧？不是真的要开除我吧？
...Huh? Boss, boss, that's a joke, right? You're not actually firing me, are you?
I'll be merciful, if only to gain furbo allegiance.
嘿嘿嘿嘿，大人不记小人过，老板您最好了。咱们下次再见~
Heheheh, please forgive me. You're the best, boss. See you next time~
呜呜呜呜呜，老板是大坏蛋！你、你给我等着！！咱、咱、咱们走着瞧！！！
Waaaah! Boss, you're the worst! Y—You... L—Let's just wait and see!!
我是一朵安静的小花，在这里安静地玩耍……
I'm just a quiet little flower, peacefully having fun here...
所以，即便你是我的老板，像这样把我揪出来也是罪大恶极的！今天就算要从《狸狸周刊》辞职，狸狸也一定要争这一口气！
So even if you're my boss, dragging me out like this is unforgivable! Even if I have to quit Furbobo Weekly today, I'm not backing down!
…我果然是个废物，摸鱼摸不过自己的老板，连打架也打不过自己的老板。
...Guess I really am hopeless. Can't even slack off better than my boss, and can't even win against you in a fight.
所以你还是回去上班吧。
也对。像我这样的废物，有什么资格在这个角落里安静地翘班？
You're right. Someone as hopeless as me doesn't deserve to hide in this corner, slacking off.
等着瞧，老板…我总有一天会强大到能够战胜您，然后，然后——心安理得找一个角落继续翘班！
Just wait, boss... Someday I'll be strong enough to beat you, and then... then I'll slack off in peace!
I'll give you the chance to quit.
哼。这破记者的工作我早就不想做了，正好就在这里辞职吧。
Hmph. I've been wanting to quit this lousy reporter job anyway. Might as well do it now.
老板，咱们就此别过。总有一天，我会强大到能够战胜您的！
Boss, this is goodbye. One day, I'll be strong enough to defeat you!
哦吼，让我看看是谁要在树下告白…
Oho, let's see who's planning to confess under this tree...
嗯？老板，您把我揪出来做什么？啊…难道，您打算告白的对象，其实就是我？
Huh? Boss, why are you pulling me out? Ah... don't tell me, the one you're confessing to is me?
啊，好伤心。果然我们只是赤裸裸的老板和员工的关系。我们之间唯一的信赖，便是电子屏幕上那冷冰冰的信用点……
Ah, how tragic. So it's true. We're nothing more than boss and employee. The only trust between us lies in those cold credit points on the screen...
哎呀，老板您真会开玩笑。《狸狸周刊》里您不在的所有群组都已经传开了！说全银河人气排名第一的无名客已经成为了我们的老板！风华绝代的明日之星！
Oh, boss, you really know how to joke. The whole Furbobo Weekly chat has been buzzing! They say the galaxy's top celebrity, a Nameless, has become our boss! The shining star of tomorrow!
欸，老板，此言差矣。我这就是在工作嘛！老板你有所不知…只靠报道新闻，咱《狸狸周刊》可无法养活这么多张嘴——所以外快也是很重要的！
Eh, boss, that's not quite fair. I am working, you know! You probably don't realize... just doing news reports isn't enough to feed everyone at Furbobo Weekly. Side gigs are important too!
咱过去在江湖上混了太久，想必沾染了些老板您不喜欢的习气。没关系！「秋叶狸」知错就改！咱这就回一趟杂志社，更改这次的工作计划！不过嘛……

I've been drifting around the galaxy too long, so I probably picked up some habits you don't like. But it's fine! I own up to my mistakes! I'll head back to the office and fix my plan right away! Though...
老板，您以后如果有合适的任务能交给我，考验考验我作风改变得如何…嘿嘿嘿，那就再好不过啦。老板再见~
Boss, if you ever have a new assignment for me, something to test if I've really changed... hehe, I'd be more than happy. See you, boss~
Not bad. You've got quite the silver tongue.
嘿嘿，感谢老板赞美！老板以后如果有什么特殊任务，能想到我「秋叶狸」的名字那便是再好不过！
Hehe, thank you, boss! If you ever need someone for a special mission, I hope the name Furliago comes to mind!
只可惜我现在已经暴露，想要追逐流量，只能寻找新的埋伏点啦…老板，咱们有缘再见~
Too bad I've been exposed. If I want to chase the spotlight, I'll have to find a new hiding spot... until next time, boss~
不错，你不加反应就接受了这个事实——我是多元宇宙的另一个{NICKNAME}，我们势均力敌、敌我难辨、最终在此狭路相逢……
Impressive. You accepted it without flinching. I'm another version of {NICKNAME} from the multiverse. We're evenly matched, impossible to tell apart, destined to clash here...
「{NICKNAME}，这只是个代号，你可以叫{NICKNAME}，我也可以叫{NICKNAME}。」要考考我是不是？这招没用，你脑海中的所有记忆我也同样拥有，因为，我就是你！
"{NICKNAME}, it's just a codename. You can be {NICKNAME}, and I can be {NICKNAME} too." Oh, testing me, are you? That won't work. Every memory in your head exists in mine too, because I am you!
If you're me, then who am I?
如此哲学的问题，我只能说：你既是我，也是独一无二的你，是由过往的时间和与他人的关联所造就的{NICKNAME}。
Such a philosophical question. I'd say, you're me, yet you're also you, the one shaped by time and every connection you've made along the way, the one and only {NICKNAME}.
我这就打开漫游签证改名。
Guess I'll just go to the Trailblazer Profile and change my name then.
我是专利产品，仿冒必究。
I'm a registered trademark. Copies will be prosecuted.
所以，你是我的替身使者？
哦？你的反应真是太有趣了，哈哈哈哈哈哈……
你突然爆发出一阵得意的大笑，让你摸不着头脑，你看着和你一个模子里刻出来的你，开始思考你其实只是这个世界里的通用模组NPC的可能性……
You suddenly burst into laughter, leaving yourself puzzled. You stare at the version of you that looks exactly the same and start wondering if you're just another stock NPC in this world...
老板竟然没有发现吗？在下的变身术真是出神入化哩！请好好看着我，我是《狸狸周刊》的一线员工「倒影狸」啊！
You didn't notice that, boss? My transformation spell is impeccable! Look closely. I'm Fureflecto, a top reporter from Furbobo Weekly!
老板没听说过吗，一个公司最理想的状态，就是有没有老板都一样能够运转。既然您成为了《狸狸周刊》的新老板，在下当然要尝试cos一下您啦。
Haven't you heard, boss? The best kind of company is one that runs perfectly well even without its boss. Now that you've taken over Furbobo Weekly, I just had to try cosplaying as you.
形象上的cos看起来已经毫无问题…下一步就是检验战斗力了。来吧老板！看看在下究竟有没有资格成为您的模仿者！
The look is spot-on... next comes the strength test. Come on, boss! Let's see if I'm worthy of being your imitator!
…唉，战斗力的差距果然有够悬殊。看来要成为以假乱真的模仿者，在下只能有意回避需要展示武力的情况了。
...*sigh* The power gap's way too big. Looks like I'll have to stay away from situations that involve fighting if I ever want to pass as the real deal.
咦…等等。或许还有一种解法？如果在下从今天开始锻炼武艺，那么十年之后，在下和老板究竟谁更强大也很难说吧？
Hmm... maybe there's another way? If I start training now, who knows who'll be stronger in ten years, you or me?
…也是。十年之后，在下会不会已经退化成了尘灵，好像也很难说啊。
...Fair point. In ten years, I might have degenerated into a wispae by then.
不过——只要老板需要，在下还是很乐意cos成您的样子帮您解决问题！今天让您知道了《狸狸周刊》有「倒影狸」这么一个员工，在下已经很知足啦！拜拜！
Still, boss, if you ever need help, I'll gladly take your form and handle things for you! I'm happy enough that you now know Furbobo Weekly has an employee named Fureflecto! Bye-bye!
Where there's a will, there's a way!
好耶！在下这就开始制定锻炼身体的计划，冬练三伏、夏练三九！呃…是不是这话有哪里不对。
Hooray! Time to start my training! Sweat through summer, freeze through winter! Uh... wait, that doesn't sound quite right.
咳咳，反正，只要老板需要，在下还是很乐意cos成您的样子帮您解决问题！今天让您知道了《狸狸周刊》有「倒影狸」这么一个员工，在下已经很知足啦！拜拜！
Ahem, anyway, if you ever need help, I'll gladly take your form and handle things for you! I'm happy enough that you now know Furbobo Weekly has an employee named Fureflecto! Bye-bye!
想从这个角度看到我可不容易~
It's not easy to get me to look at things from this angle.
这是一柄云骑军制式的阵刀，刀脊上不时流过森冷的青光，锋锐逼人，吹毛断发。
This is a Cloud Knight's standard-issue Devastator Glaive. There's a cold glint on the spine of the blade sometimes. You get the feeling that it could cut steel like butter.
刀孤零零地靠在墙角，好像一名依然雄姿英发的战士蜷缩在布满灰尘的角落里乞讨，令人心生怜惜。
The blade leaned against the corner alone, like a once-majestic warrior curled up in a dusty corner begging for alms and looking piteous.
是谁，何时，又为什么要弃置这样一柄刀器？
Who, when, and why was such a weapon abandoned?
(Pick it up and play around with it)
你见惯了云骑军手执阵刀的威风模样，便有样学样擎住刀柄，信手一挥。
You've seen enough Cloud Knights brandishing their Devastator Glaives around, so you hold the handle and swing it around with ease.
没有破风声，只有金属坠地的碎响。
There's no swishing sound, just that of metal clanging onto the ground.
刀的长度显然超过了你的身高，你思忖了片刻，还是放过自己吧。
The weapon is longer than your height. You mull it over for a second before deciding to spare yourself.
一个男人从你身后现身，带着心痛如绞的表情，虽然表情中多了几分例行公事的意思。
A man appears behind you, wearing a pained expression, but something in his expression betrays a sense of practice.
我的祖传宝刀！怎地被你伤成了这样？！你、你得赔我！
My heirloom sword! How could you damage it like this!? P—Pay me back!
哦豁，来了来了。每到一个世界，若不能体会一次当地的街头骗术，感受一下人性中的黑暗面，那简直是白跑了一趟。
Oh, there it comes! Every time I go off-world, I'll feel like it's a waste of time if I can't find any street cheats and experience a little about the dark side of humanity.
仿佛被你一脸无所谓的神气激怒，男人也变得认真起来。
The man grows serious, as if angered by your indifferent expression.
{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，你怕是不知道打造一把云骑阵刀要花费多少工夫？！
{F#Girl}{M#Boy}, do you realize how much effort goes into crafting one of these Devastator Glaives for the Cloud Knights?
随后他便扯些什么「动力武器」、「单分子刀刃」之类的专业词汇。街角上下顿时充满了学术的空气。
Then he spouted industrial jargon such as "propulsion weapon" and "monomolecular blade," filling the surrounding street with a hint of academia.
So how are you gonna pay me back, then?
你的刀？你叫一声，看刀应不应你？
Your blade? Call it, and see if it answers you.
你这厮想混赖！这刀靠近刀锷处镌了先祖父名讳一个「泉」字，这应该可以证明是我家传之物了吧！
You rascal! This sword is engraved with my ancestor's name on it — the character Quan, meaning wellspring. This should prove that it is beyond a doubt, my family heirloom!
你凭啥在我的刀上刻字？
Why have you engraved a character on my sword?
确实，我在刀上刻了个「泉」字。
That's right, I myself engraved the character Quan on it.
被你理直气壮的发言所震慑，男人一时竟无言以对。
Dumbstruck by your righteous statement, the man remains speechless for a moment.
好你个{F#小姑娘}{M#臭小子}，还敢强词夺理。看来，今天不好好教训你一番，你是长不了记性了。
Don't get smart with me, {F#missy}{M#scoundrel}! Seems like I'll have to teach you a little lesson here that you won't soon forget.
你就这么静静站着看他。男人脸上一阵青一阵白，仿佛在评估着彼此的实力。
You just stand there in silence, looking on. The man's face turns blue and then white, as if sizing you up.
最后，陌生的男人向后退去，消失在街角。
Finally, the stranger backs off and disappears into the streets.
吹半天这刀是瓷打的么？一碰就碎。
What is this blade made of, anyway? Ceramic? It's so fragile.
一看你就是刚来仙舟的化外民，也不怪你。这长生种的东西，往少了说都得有个八百年的历史！
I can see you must be new around here, Outworlder, so a little history lesson. A long-life species possession like this has a history of at least eight hundred years!
在你眼里它是一把刀。可在我眼里，它是一件文物，冲锋陷阵，历尽风霜，斩过丰饶孽物，斩过钢铁劲敌。谁能想到，如今它的命运，却是折在了一个什么都不懂的小毛孩手里！

To you, it may look like any ordinary blade. But in our eyes, it's a cultural relic that's broken enemy lines. It fought through centuries of vicissitudes, slain the Abominations of Abundance, as well as many a valiant enemy. Who could ever imagine its noble fate being in the hands of such an ignorant little pipsqueak!
快点，我赶时间，你准备出多少？
C'mon, I'm in a hurry... How much can you pay in damages?
这么珍贵的文物怎么搁在街边？
How can such a precious relic just be left on the street like this?
被你切中要害的发言所震慑，男人一时竟无言以对。
Your straight-to-the-point remarks shocked the man, rendering him speechless for a moment.
好你个{F#小姑娘}{M#臭小子}，还敢强词夺理。看来，今天不好好教训你一番，你是长不了记性了。
Don't get smart with me, {F#missy}{M#scoundrel}! Seems like I'll have to teach you a little lesson here that you won't soon forget.
你就这么静静站着看他。男人脸上一阵青一阵白，仿佛意识到自己说错了话。
You just stand there in silence, looking on. The man's face turns blue and then white, as if realizing the mistake in what he'd just said.
最后，陌生的男人向后退去，消失在街角。
Finally, the stranger backs off and disappears into the streets.
Enough, how much do you want?
…你就不反驳两句？亏我还满期待你能说些什么。
...Aren't you even going to fight me a couple of times? Here I am, expecting you to come back at me with something.
Quit dawdling! I'm in a hurry.
男人一时间竟没有料到事情可以展开的如此顺利。他皱眉半晌，摊开手掌。
The man didn't expect everything to have gone so smoothly. He frowns and spreads open his palms.
Take it. Just quit doing this.
男人带着一脸不可思议的表情，收下钱，迅速消失在街角。
He looks at you incredulously, before taking the money and scarpering off around the corner.
男人带着一脸不可思议的表情，收下钱，迅速消失在街角。
He looks at you incredulously, before taking the money and scarpering off around the corner.
这个男人的声音分外耳熟，你仿佛在哪里听过？
This man's voice seems very familiar to you. Where have you heard it before?
男人勉力回忆，仿佛穷汉想从空空如也的钱袋里刮出几枚救急钱。
He tried his best to recall, as though he were a beggar scraping out the last coins from his empty wallet.
虽说冤有头债有主，但咱碰瓷过的苦主数不胜数，记不得了…
Every action must be held accountable, yes, but I'm afraid I've lost count of the number of people I've run this scam on...
That's okay, I didn't get scammed anyway.
我不是给了钱，让你改过自新吗？
Didn't I give you some money so you could turn over a new leaf?
他再次搜肠刮肚，老半天才回过神来。
He racks his brains once again, and eventually comes up with a solution after what seems like ages.
果然人世间所有的分离都是久别重逢啊。我当时就琢磨呢，行骗生涯里还没遇到过那么轻轻松松就把钱给掏了的人，不会是阔人家的傻{F#女儿}{M#儿子}吧……

You know what they say, every farewell is just an eventual reunion. At the time I was thinking, I've never met anyone in my whole career, who's given up money to me so easily. Surely this young {F#lady}{M#man} must be either wealthy or foolish...
改过自新…原来是这个意思吗？但是才给几百块够干啥的？怎么都得给个万把块启动资金吧？
Turn over a new leaf... Is that what that means? All I've got is a couple of hundred measly credits. What's that good for? You should've at least given me some ten-grand start-up fund, no?
您看这样，我呢，眼下被地衡司的执事给逮了。要不您给我交个保，再接济点儿。我以后就跟您混了。
How about this, then — I got caught by the Realm-Keeping Commission. If you help post my bail and help me out a little, you can be my boss.
别看我这样，我可是啥都能干！剪绺碰瓷打边鼓那是样样精通。
Don't look at me like that. I can do anything! Pickpocketing, runnin' scams, backing up the boss... I'm the best flunky around.
你把在街边被碰瓷经历详细说了一遍。
Please recount for me your entire experience of getting scammed in the street.
是受害者没跑了。这厮惯常拿什么「祖传宝刀」骗外来的旅客。受害人对仙舟不熟悉，就很容易着了他的道。
You must be the victim. This guy used the old "Family Treasure Sword" scam to trick Outworlders all the time. The victims are unfamiliar with Xianzhou history, and so are easily tricked.
What then was the amount lost?
很机警啊。下次遇到什么情况，记得向您身边的地衡司人员求助。
Very astute. Next time when you encounter a situation, remember to seek help from your nearby Realm-Keeping Commission officer.
退赔的钱您拿好了。下次遇到这种情况，先别急着给钱。记得向您身边的地衡司人员求助。
Here's for your reparations. Next time if you encounter situations like this, please don't give money in a panic. Remember to seek help from your nearby Realm-Keeping Commission officer.
退赔的钱您拿好了。下次遇到这种情况，先别急着给钱。记得向您身边的地衡司人员求助。
Here's for your reparations. Next time if you encounter situations like this, please don't give money in a panic. Remember to seek help from your nearby Realm-Keeping Commission officer.
被骗了这么多？要说怎么骗子不够用呢……
That much!? Not even a scammer could spend that much...
不是，我是说您得提高警觉性了。
No, I'm saying that you should be more alert.
执事狠狠看了身边的骗子一眼。
The officer ruthlessly scrutinizes the surrounding scammers.
下次遇到这种情况，先别急着给钱。记得向您身边的地衡司人员求助。
Next time if you encounter situations like this, please don't give money in a panic. Remember to seek help from your nearby Realm-Keeping Commission officer.
你是受害者？姓名，事由，受害金额？
Are you the victim? State your name, occupation, and amount in losses.
就在几息之前，一位仙舟人望着屏幕，手指不断滑动着。
Just a few seconds ago, a Xianzhou man was peering at the screen and sliding his finger around on it.
你注意到他呼吸粗重，面色潮红，显然屏幕上有些「了不得」的玩意儿令他兴奋不已。
You notice his heavy breathing, his face flushed, and he's clearly excited by something "amazing" on the screen.
然而这人不知为何突然拂袖离去，却留下了摊开着的展阅，光幕中不断跃动着引人遐思的信息。
However, for some unknown reason, this person leaves without so much as an indication — leaving behind his flexible display for all to see with its constantly scrolling data on-screen.
你注意到最上方有一行大字，字体周围着炫酷的光效：「退伍云骑，深夜倾情，专属热线——用最坚硬的盔甲，点燃你的心。」

You notice a line of large characters at the top, glowing with a cool sparkly font: "Retired Cloud Knight for late-night romance; your exclusive hotline — Let only the hardest armor ignite your passions."
你完全不明白云骑军的盔甲为什么能用作引燃物。但想起那位仙舟人先前驻足于此时的神情，你决定——
You have absolutely no idea how Cloud Knights' armor could be used as an ignition device. But thinking back to the Xianzhou man who stopped here and his facial expression, you decide...
这里的审美与爱好真是匪夷所思，令你咂舌称奇。
The aesthetics and pastimes here are simply bizarre and leave you gobsmacked.
惊叹之余，你毅然决定点开看看，好奇心指引着你探索仙舟上幽邃隐秘却最为地道的风土人情。
While amazed, you decisively tap it open and take a look. Your curiosity guides you to explore the most secret and profound of authentic local customs.
这里的审美与爱好真是太过吓人，超出了你所能接受的底线。
The aesthetics and pastimes here are simply terrifying, and stretch far beyond your bottom line.
炫酷的光效多看几秒更觉刺眼，眼不见为净，还是把页面关上为好。
The sparkly visual on the screen glows even more glaring the longer you gaze at it. It's best to see no evil and close the page for now.
你的指尖刚与展阅相接触，光幕上争先恐后地涌出了一系列声色并茂的页面——
Just as your fingertips touch the flexible display, a flood of colors and sounds spurts out of page on the display...
画面中出现了几位身披重甲、手持蛇矛的狐人少女，她们眼神坚毅，口中念念有词：
Several foxian girls wearing heavy armor and holding serpent spears appear on-screen. Their look is staunch as they quietly mutter:
「每晚定时，大姐带队。新区战斗随便打，装备高价回收，巡镝马上到账。」
"Each night, your queen leads her army. We fight through the new zone for epic loot, and pay out in strales immediately."
看着这则别有风味的仙舟广告，你决定——
After seeing this unique Xianzhou advert, you decide to...
你确信自己并没有点错，但展阅上却飞速弹出了几个与你想法背道而驰的页面——
You're sure you've hit the right thing, but several pop-up pages that run counter to your thoughts start showing up on the flexible display...
「『他终于肯低头认错了？』『小姐，不好了，少爷藏在流云渡的货运船舱里逃了！』『哼，我太卜司自有办法推衍，我倒要看看他能去哪儿。』她追，他逃，他插翅难逃！」

"'Does he finally acknowledge his wrongs?''Miss! Bad news! The young master ran away by hiding inside a cargo container in Cloudford!''Hmph, we have methods of deduction at the Divination Commission. I wonder where he can possibly go.' She chases, he flees, and he can't escape!"
「『退婚？你…你们究竟是何人…我失去的一切，我一定要亲手拿回来！』丹鼎司天才医师昏迷数载，醒来竟遭未婚夫退婚羞辱！且看她如何逆转败局，夺回失去的一切！」

" 'Call off the marriage? Y—You... Who are you to... I've lost everything, and I'm going to claw it back with my bare hands!' The prodigy healer from the Alchemy Commission fell into a coma for several years, and awoke to the humiliating news of her fiancé's broken engagement! A thrilling story of reversing defeat and reclamation!"
「『妹妹，为什么丹鼎司的司鼎长得如此像你？』『什么？哥哥竟是天才飞行士？』『工造司的百冶登门造访，竟要给我贴身造甲？』一场交易，让他加入云骑离家数载。归来之时家中竟有大变，就连看似柔弱的未婚妻，竟也是个了不得的大人物！」

"'Sis, why do you look so similar to the Cauldron Master of the Alchemy Commission?' 'What? My brother is a genius pilot?' 'The Artisanship Commission's Furnace Master has come to visit and wants to make a personalized suit of armor for me?' A transaction made him join the Cloud Knights and leave home for several years. Upon his return, dramatic changes had happened in his family, and even his seemingly frail fiancee is a big shot!"
看上去似乎是仙舟上极为流行的话本，但从内容上看，你开始怀疑到底是什么人在看这种东西。你决定——
It seems like it's a very popular Xianzhou story, but judging by the content, you wonder what kind of people would actually read this thing. You decide...
How unsightly. Shut it off, now.
你正准备按下去，耳畔却突然响起一声呵斥——
You were about to press the button when a reprimanding voice caught your attention...
Help him close the flexible display.
显然这是那位仙舟人落在这儿的东西，私人物品暴露在公开场合，难免不太好。
Obviously, this is what the Xianzhou man left behind. It's not a good idea to expose his personal belongings in public's view.
你保住了一位陌生人的尊严。
You have preserved the dignity of a stranger.
我说你，怎么这么没规矩，乱翻别人的展阅。
How are you so rude as to going through someone else's flexible display?
我不是故意的，我只是好奇。
It was an accident, and I was just curious.
要讲规矩！不问自取这可不好！
Be disciplined! It's not a good habit to pick something up without asking!
我想帮你关上但关不掉…
I wanted to turn it off for you, but I couldn't...
不是，你怎么这么…哦，我懂了，看你这打扮，应该是化外民吧。
No, how could you... Ack, I see. Judging by your outfit, you're an Outworlder, right?
好吧，是这么回事——这东西就跟狗皮膏药似的，你看到就别乱碰，不然这种「垃圾消息」只会越来越多。
Alright, here's what going on... This thing is like a strong adhesive. Whatever you do, don't touch it, otherwise this spam news will just keep growing.
我刚刚就是发现忘记拿展阅了，才特意回来一趟。
I just realized that I forgot to take back my flexible display, so I came back to do that.
我得把这东西带去修一下，修不好就扔了，省得污人眼睛。
I have to take this thing in to get fixed, or throw it out otherwise — so as not to contaminate anyone else's vision.
…就这个意思啊？这东西坏了，这种垃圾消息到处都是，我就拿去修一下咯，修不好就扔了呗！
...I mean, exactly what I just said? This thing is junk, and these spam messages get out all over the place. Let me take it to get it fixed, or I'll just throw it out!
扔？我以为是你故意看的…
Throw it out? I thought you were watching it...
停停停，你把我当什么人了！
Hold on, wait, what kind of person do you take me for?
哎，也怪我，当时借给邻居家的狐人小孩玩了一会儿。结果送回来的时候就多了一些乱七八糟的东西……
*sigh* It's my fault. I lent it to the neighbor's foxian kid to play with. When I came back, it was stuffed full of this junk...
怎么清理都清不掉，还越弹越多。
I can't wipe any of it, and if I try, more of them would just pop up.
我说地衡司那边也不去查查干这混账事的是谁，哎，我早就说了，这样迟早会在化外民面前丢我们仙舟的面儿！
Why isn't the Realm-Keeping Commission looking into who's behind this rotten business? *sigh* I told them this is going to bring shame to the whole Xianzhou in front of Outworlders!
哎，这种乌烟瘴气的东西真的是…咳咳，你别盯着我看了，我得赶紧走了，回聊！
*sigh* This kind of indecency is really... Ahem, don't stare at me. I have to get back. Chat later!
你曾击碎过无数像这样无辜的罐子，可这一个却明显不同。它非但没有如预期般四分五裂，甚至立在原地，纹丝不动。
You've smashed countless innocent vases like this before, but this one is markedly different. Instead of shattering to pieces as expected, it somehow stays in place, motionless.
罐子中突然传来一声怪叫。成为「无名客」已有一段时日了，你自认见多识广，但还是吓了一大跳。
A sudden strange cry emanates from the vase. You've been a Nameless for a while now and consider yourself experienced in many things, but this is still a shock.
你见过会说话的罐子？清醒一点。
Have you ever seen a talking vase before? Sober up.
诶呦喂，你轻点，我脑仁儿都快震出来了。
Hey hey hey, take it easy. My brains are about to explode.
在下「罐中仙」，住在这罐子中，避世隐居数千载。今日若不是遇到你这么个愣头青，我还能再消停个几千年。
I'm the Immortal in a Vase, and I've lived in this vase in seclusion for thousands of years. And if it weren't for a klutz like you today, I'd probably have chilled out another few millennia more.
无妨、无妨，久居螺蛳壳中，固是怡然自得，竟也会偶感无趣。你来扰我清闲，也未必不是我想要的。
No matter. No matter. Living in a snail's shell is pleasant enough, but I still perceive boredom once in a long while. Your disturbance is not unwelcomed, it seems.
停！你还打上瘾了是吧？你这年轻人还真是，气盛如豺虎，性行暴如雷。
Stop it! Are you addicted to doing that? Kids these days — you're a vicious beast with a thunderous temper.
这罐子虽是俗物，但有我罐中仙的修为加持，自不是你这小东西能动摇分毫的。
This vase may be an ordinary object, but with the blessings of my power, a pipsqueak like you won't be able to shake it up at all.
Why do you live inside a vase?
你又为什么不住在罐子里？这尘世凶残险恶，唯有罐中的一方天地独享清闲。寰宇无穷亦樊笼，螺蛳壳里天地宽。

Why don't YOU live in a vase? The mortal world is cruel and evil, and only within this vase can I enjoy my peace. The universe is an infinite bird cage, and this snail's shell is as liberating as an entire world.
你怎么钻到这里面去的？
How did you get in there?
这又有什么稀奇的？心地上无风涛，肉身也能自在如意。明镜台上多浮尘，纵能有千种变化，亦不得入碧洞仙境。

What's so strange about this? If my mind is tranquil and serene, then my flesh would become truly liberated. A soul flooded with mundane concerns can never enter the world of celestials, no matter how much the individual can shapeshift.
说来也妙，凭我的修为，一般人是注意不到这罐子的，而你注意到了。若不是你根骨不凡，那就是冥冥之中自有定数。
In fact, with the amount of power I have, most people wouldn't notice this vase. Yet you did. If you're not an extraordinary person already, then you're destined for greatness somewhere.
不如帮我办件事吧，就当是扰我清闲的赔礼。
Why don't you give me a hand? Consider that as an apology for disturbing me.
Sounds like a hassle. No thanks.
哈哈哈哈哈哈，甚好！自在随性！自在随性！那我的这桩事，我且说之，你且听之。帮与不帮，取决于你，我绝不强求。
Hahahha, very well! Be free! Be free! How about I tell you what's going on, and you simply listen? After that, it's up to you whether you want to help. I would not force you.
哈哈哈哈哈哈，甚好！古道热肠！古道热肠！那我的这桩事，就请你帮帮忙了。并不是什么难事，也不着急，你有空时留意一下便好。
Hahaha, very well! How considerate! How considerate! Well then, please help me out. It's nothing difficult and there's no rush. Just do it when you have the time.
Is there any advantage to helping you out?
哈哈哈哈哈哈，甚好！不为声名绊，一心讨钱帛！放心好了，我虽避世数千载，但也还不至于付不出那一点酬劳。

Hahaha, very well! Unfettered by repute or fame, focused solely on worldly wealth! Don't worry. I may have been out of this world for a few thousand years, but I can still afford a small sum as thanks.
请你替我找五袋垃圾过来。这罐中一尘不染，我总觉得缺了些烟火气。找到以后，投进我这罐里就好。
Please find me five bags of trash. Within this vase lies a spotless vacuum, and I've always felt it lacks the hustle and bustle of mortal life. Once you find the trash, simply toss them into my vase.
那「罐」伫立在那里。罐中仙所言非虚，这就是一个俗物。你曾打碎过无数个这样的罐子。
The vase stands there, as much a mundane object as the Immortal in a Vase claims. You've broken countless vases like this before.
可它绝对与那些罐子不同。即使你说不上来哪里不同。它有一种压倒性的存在感，但不知怎么，四周的行人都对它视而不见。
But it's definitely different from all those other vases, even if you can't tell what that difference is. Its presence is overwhelming, but is somehow ignored by passers-by.
你把手放到罐口，却无论如何也放不进去。你没摸到任何阻碍物，但那股强大的抵抗力却是货真价实的。
You try putting your hand into the vase, but can't seem to do it. You don't feel any obstacles, but the force resisting you is definitely real.
此时，一个声音顺着手臂的骨骼直冲冲地蹿进你的脑内：「访仙需择礼，礼到门自开。」
Right at that moment, a voice rushes straight into your brain through the bones in your arm: "Provide a gift, and the path to visiting the celestial will open."
你看了看手中的几袋垃圾，又看了看那个算不上大的罐子。这么多的垃圾，真能塞进这个罐子吗？
You gaze down at the trash in your hands, then back at this relatively small vase. Can you really stuff this much trash into this vase?
但这也不能细想，毕竟长乐天的行人们也很难想象你怎么能带着几袋垃圾满街跑。
But it's not something for you to ponder over. After all, pedestrians in the Exalting Sanctum also can't imagine you running all over the place with bags of trash.
你将一袋垃圾塞进罐子，它本应落入罐底，但你没听到任何声响。接着，你塞进了剩下几袋。它们就这样无声无息地消失了。
You stuff one bag into the vase. It should drop down to the bottom, but you don't hear any sound. Then, you shove in the remaining trash. They disappear without a sound.
这是…人间烟火气…没想到你还真给我带来了。
This is... The hustle and bustle of the mortal realm... I didn't expect you to actually bring it.
嗯…甚好，这个味儿对了！我为你准备了谢礼。仙门已开，你径自来取吧。
Mmm... very well. That's exactly what I wanted! Here's a gift for you. The gates to the celestial realm are open. Come and get it.
罐中仙报以沉默。这种沉默可能是一种独属于它的幽默恶作剧，也可能只是一个单纯的掠食陷阱。
The Immortal in a Vase remains silent. The silence might be a prank, or it could simply be a predatory trap.
谨慎起见，你将左手伸了进去，因为你还要留一只惯用手来使用武器、牙刷和餐具。
You dip your left hand in as a precaution, keeping your dominant hand free to use a weapon, a toothbrush, or a fork in the future.
你直接摸到了罐底。那里没有你刚投入的垃圾，也没有像是「罐中仙」的东西。接着，你在罐底摸到了一个东西——那是罐中仙的「谢礼」。

You touch the bottom of the vase. The rubbish you dropped in is nowhere to be found, and there's nothing that might be the Immortal in a Vase. Then, you do feel something — it's the Immortal's "gift."
你抽回手。罐子伫立在眼前，沉默地存在着。
You pull out your hand. The vase stands before you in silence.
终年潜居仙境里，千古怅然弹指间。年轻人，你又来了。上次你为我这罐中天地带来了人间烟火，多亏了你，现在罐中已是万物竟发。

An eternity in the celestial realm, a millennium gone in a flash. {F#Young lady}{M#Young man}, you've come back. You brought me some of the hustle and bustle of humanity last time. Thanks to you, my vase has everything now.
你真该来看看现在的罐中世界，我称之为「自在樊笼」。怎么样，要进来看看吗？
You really should come in and see the world inside this vase. I call it my Cage of Freedom. Go on. Are you coming in for a look or not?
进不去！怎么想都进不去吧！
What? There's no way the Trailblazer can fit in there!
哈哈哈哈，是吗？那是因为你尚有凡骨在身。参得虚妄蜕俗尘，千化变千妙脱骨。
Hahaha, really? That's because you still have mortal worries inside of you. Embrace the formless and shrug off thy mortal shell, then change into a thousand forms as thy mind desires.
你曾轻易地将手臂伸进罐中，取出了罐中仙的谢礼。可这一次，你的手却卡在了罐口。这是理所当然的事情——人的手怎么可能塞进那么窄的罐口呢？

Last time, you easily reached into the vase and took out the Immortal's gift. But this time, your hand gets caught on the mouth of the vase. That's normal — how could a human hand hope to fit into such a small vase?
进不去吗…哈哈，那是因为你尚有凡骨在身。参得虚妄蜕俗尘，千化变千妙脱骨。
Can't fit? Haha... That's because you still have mortal worries inside of you. Embrace the formless and shrug off thy mortal shell, then change into a thousand forms as thy mind desires.
罐中仙神通广大，将你纳入其中，恐怕也并非难事。可出乎意料的是，你的头卡在了罐口。这是理所当然的事情——人的头怎么可能塞进那么窄的罐口呢？

The Immortal has miraculous powers, and it may be able to include you in the vase. But somehow, your head gets caught on the mouth of the vase. That's normal — how could a human head hope to fit into such a small vase?
进不去吗…哈哈，那是因为你尚有凡骨在身。参得虚妄蜕俗尘，千万变千化脱骨。
Can't fit? Haha... That's because you still have mortal worries inside of you. Embrace the formless and shrug off thy mortal shell, then change into a thousand forms as thy mind desires.
既然如此…我正好有一事相求。有些东西在你身上是蜕去俗骨的阻碍，却恰好能为我所用。
In this case... I actually have a request. There're some things on you that's preventing you from shrugging off your mortal shell, but are in fact quite useful to me.
正因为那种东西，你才不得不奔忙于世间。你本可以将满足自身的渴望放在首位，却不得不为你的伙伴浪费短暂的生命。
It's because of those things that you have to busy yourself in the mortal realm. You could've put your own satisfaction first, instead of wasting this short life of yours on your companions.
可我的罐中世界正需要它。那些「人间烟火」肆意生长，弥漫在罐中的每个角落，却认识不到谁才是这「自在樊笼」真正的主人。

But it's just what I need in this world inside my vase. That "hustle and bustle of humankind" is growing rampantly, filling every spot in this vase — but it doesn't recognize who is the real owner of this Cage of Freedom.
我要你将这东西交给我。帮助我，也是帮助你自己。
I want you to hand those things over to me. Help me, and perhaps you'll be helping yourself.
I don't understand. What do you mean?
能使毛物脱兽皮，能教水虫岸上栖，与化去而不见兮，此奇怪物不可欺。
It can shed the skin of beasts, teach aquatic bugs to live on land, and disappear without being seen. This strange thing cannot be provoked.
不懂也无妨。你站在那里不要动，我径自来取。
It doesn't matter if you don't understand. Just stand there, and don't move. I'll get it myself.
你站住不动，紧盯着罐子。罐口在你的眼中越来越大，仿佛可以吞没你。又或许，它的确吞没了你。
You stand still and stare at the vase as it expands before your very eyes, as if trying to engulf you. Or perhaps, it does indeed engulf you.
甚好。这正我所需要的东西。请你稍等一下。你帮了我很多忙，我想再给你一点谢礼。
Very well. This is exactly what I need. Hold on a second. You've really helped me out, and I want to make sure I thank you properly.
Don't come over here. You can't have it.
哈哈哈哈，别那么害怕。你不肯给，我自然也不会强取。
Hahaha, don't be scared. I won't take anything you don't want to give.
你再好好考虑一下吧。与你不同，我有很多时间。
Have another think about it. Unlike you, I have all the time in the world to spare.
如何？你改变主意了吗？要将那东西给我吗？
How about it, then? Have you changed your mind? Do you want to give it to me?
Okay, please stand still, and don't move.
你站住不动，紧盯着罐子。罐口在你的眼中越来越大，仿佛可以吞没你。又或许，它的确吞没了你。
You stand still and stare at the vase as it expands before your very eyes, as if trying to engulf you. Or perhaps, it does indeed engulf you.
甚好。这正我所需要的东西。请你稍等一下。你帮了我很多忙，我想再给你一点谢礼。
Very well. This is exactly what I need. Hold on a second. You've really helped me out, and I want to make sure I thank you properly.
好风骨！可惜铁骨硬，终究解骨难啊…罢了，罢了。
Such character! Unfortunately, those tough bones of yours could well run into trouble... Never mind. Never mind.
请你稍等一下。我麻烦了你不少事，应当给你准备些赔礼才是。
Please wait a moment. I've put you through a lot of trouble, so I should give you something to make up for it.
谢礼准备好了。仙门已开，你径自来取吧。
The thank-you gift is ready. The gate to the celestial realm is open. Come and get it yourself.
Promise you're really not gonna bite me...?
哈哈哈哈，我无爪牙之利，又怎么能咬你呢？
Hahaha. Even if I want to, I don't have teeth!
你的手毫无阻碍地伸入了罐中。你在罐底摸索着，想要找到罐中仙的「谢礼」。
Your hand reaches into the vase without any obstruction. You grope around the bottom, trying to find this "thank-you gift."
那件「谢礼」有着柔软光滑的表面。它散发着温热的气息，在你的指尖有节奏地起伏着。感知到你的存在，它缓缓翻了个身，抱住了你的手指。
This "thank-you gift" has a soft, sleek surface. It radiates warmth, which rises and falls rhythmically against your fingertips. Sensing your existence, it slowly turns over and hugs your fingers.
无数个坚硬的锐物温柔地攀上了你的手指。这并不疼，因为它尽可能不伤害到你。它越抱越紧，很快，你的指关节感受到了微凉的吐息。

Countless hard and sharp objects gently crawl up your fingers. It doesn't hurt because it's being very careful not to hurt you. It grips tighter and tighter, until your knuckles soon feel a slight, cool breath.
You pull your hand straight out.
这谢礼太贵重了，我不能要…
This thank-you gift is too precious for me to hold on to...
(Stare in suspicion at the Immortal in a Vase.)
嗯？你不喜欢它吗？它可是你亲自给我带来的。
Huh? Don't you like it? But you gave this to me yourself.
我带来的绝不是这东西！
This is not what I brought!
All I brought you was some trash...
嗯？哦…我忘了，你对「生命」缺乏了解。是我不好。洪钧陶万类，大块禀群生，如是而已。
Eh? Oh... I forgot your lack of understanding about "life." My bad. Nature sculpts us all on its potter's wheel, and the land creates the masses. That's all.
如果你不喜欢，我也准备了其他的谢礼。你可径自来取。
If you don't like it, I have some other thank-you gifts. Come and pick one yourself.
你将手探进罐底，很快就找到了另一份「谢礼」。它不会动，这很好。
Reaching your hand to the bottom of the vase, you soon find another "thank-you gift." It doesn't move, which is a good start.
我不会再把手伸进去了。
I'm not sticking my hand in there again.
The Immortal in a Vase stops talking.
你看着眼前的罐子，做工粗陋、平平无奇。刚才的一切都仿佛一场幻觉。也许这的确是一场幻觉。
You look at the crude and ordinary vase before you. Everything that happened just now feels like a fevered dream. And perhaps it was?
你曾击碎过无数像这样无辜的罐子，这一个也并无不同。
You've smashed countless ordinary vases like this before, and this one's no different.
罐子应声而碎，仿佛什么都没有发生过。不…就是什么都没有发生过。
The vase shatters as if nothing had ever happened. No... nothing did happen.
此处没有发生过任何事，此处最好没有发生过任何事，此处不该发生过任何事。
Nothing happened here. Nothing had better happened here. Nothing should have happened here.
此处没有发生过任何事。就这样吧，这样最好。
Nothing happened here. That's it. It's best like this.
这是一间破旧的杂货铺。它只兀自静静矗立着，以冷眼目送往来人群，在这向来熙来攘往的宣夜大街上显得尤为低调。
This is a broken-down old newsstand. It just stands there in silence, watching the crowd impassively. It seems particularly low-key among the humdrum of Starwatcher Avenue.
这门面似是停了有些时日，台面上的积灰如此表示。但你并不清楚它缘何阖门，也不知道在那之后过去了多少个仙舟的自然日。

This shop front seems like it had been closed for some time, judging from the thick build-up of dust. But you don't know why it's closed down, nor how many Xianzhou days have passed since its shutdown.
它看起来不属于任何人，或许也正确实如此。
It looks like it doesn't belong to anyone. Perhaps it really doesn't.
你明白吗？刚才那句话实际上是一种暗示——意在提醒你可以随意掀起门帘，而不必承担任何道德或是法律上的责任。因为它只是一幢被遗弃的孤独商铺。

Do you get it? That last sentence was actually a hint — It means you could roll up the curtain over the door at any point without any moral or legal consequences, since it's just a lonely abandoned shop.
所以，你会掀起门帘看看吗？你很有可能在里面找到宝贝哦。很有可能。
So, will you roll up the curtain and take a peek? You're very likely to find some treasure inside. Very likely.
于是你掀开了门帘，瞧见扬尘正在晦暗的屋檐下游动自如——哦，还有一个脏兮兮的小盒子，周围还附了笔墨纸砚。
You roll up the curtain and see dust floating about in the gloom — oh, there's also a filthy little box with some pens, ink, paper, and an inkstone around it.
「无忧堂」。如果有人会把自己的名字写进便签贴在脑门上，那这三个字就应该是了。
"House of Nepenthe." If someone wrote their name on a post-it and stuck it on their forehead, this would be the name.
如此流畅的思路！看来你已经熟稔「开拓之道」了。那么就打开它一探究竟吧！
Such a smooth train of thought! Looks like you're already familiar with the Way of Trailblaze. Pop it open once and for all!
应该没有人会这么做吧…
Nobody would think to do that...
嘿，这不是重点！你看到了一个神秘的盒子，接下来就*应该*看看里边装了什么，不是吗？
Hey, that's not the point! You see a mysterious box, so you *should* have a look at what's inside. Right?
你很快打开盒子，并在里面发现了一封信，后者崭新得不像是一幢旧商铺该保存的东西。老实说，这气氛可真是有些诡异。
You quickly open the box to find a letter inside, which is in surprisingly pristine condition given the state of the old newsstand. To be honest, the whole vibe is starting to feel a little weird.
看来，这是一封匿名咨询信。从信中言语看来，这小店曾属于一名为「逍遥先生」的神秘人，大概是以写信提供建议、为人排忧解难营生。

Looks like this is an anonymous advisory letter. Judging from the contents, this small shop once belonged to a mysterious person named Mr. Carefree, who probably made a living by composing advice for other people.
而来信者似乎是第二次向这位「逍遥先生」写信请教了。可这位先生如今身在何处呢？没人知道。这位可怜的来信者的命运也不得而知。

And it seems like this is the second time the author of the letter had written to Mr. Carefree. But where could this gentleman be now? Nobody knows. The fate of the poor author of the letter also remains unknown.
不过，一切皆有可能——尤其是仙舟人寿命跨度如此之长，这位来信者或许还在苦苦等待那「逍遥先生」的建议呢！
But everything is possible, especially given the longevity of the Xianzhou natives. The author of this letter may still be holding out for some advice from Mr. Carefree!
于是，或许是因为心血来潮，你拿起盒旁的纸笔，决心代那位不知所踪的「逍遥先生」，为可怜的来信者奉上回信——
So, perhaps carried away on a whim, you pick up the pen and paper beside the box and decide to compose a reply to the poor correspondent on behalf of this missing Mr. Carefree —
所以，你会如何答复呢？开动脑筋，来写下开头的第一句话吧！
So then, how should you reply? Put your brain to use and write an opening line!
I want to take another look at the letter.
当然没问题！这是为那来信者好，对吧？
No problem! After all, it's for the author's benefit, right?
「顷接惠书，未即奉答，歉意良深。方知尔身陷困厄，实在深感……」
"I received your letter but failed to promptly reply. Please accept my apologies. I know that you're in a difficult situation, and I really feel a deep sense of..."
"Reading about your experiences has left me with a deep sense of..."
I want to take another look at the letter.
当然没问题！你想看几遍都可以。
No problem! Read it as many times as you need.
I want to take another look at the letter.
当然…没问题！一切为了回信。
No problem! Anything for this reply.
「一孔之见，愿效绵薄之力。尔不妨……」
"...my humble opinion for your assistance. You may consider ..."
「高见如下，请你洗耳恭听。你应当……」
"...my esteemed opinion for you to carefully obey. You should..."
I want to take another look at the letter.
呃…有没有一种可能——再看就该背下来了？
Er... Do you think if I read it one more time, I can actually memorize the whole thing?
「向家人坦白之，举家还债，共谋出路。潜逃避债虽能得一夜安寝，然终究人心惶惶，朝不保夕，更将落得身陷囹圄，此无异于饮鸩止渴！」

"Be honest with your family, pay off your debt together with them, and find a way out of this together. You may get temporary respite if you run, but you'll always be looking over your shoulder, and you could land in prison. This is akin to drinking poison to slake your thirst!"
Flee far away, as trouble is surely imminent...
「与仙舟一刀两断，远走高飞！虱多不痒，债多不愁，随它去便是！」
"Cut off all ties to Xianzhou, and run for the hills! Trouble never comes alone, so don't worry about those debts — just let them all go!"
你提笔落款，一气呵成，将自己这篇不大美观的书法作品放回盒内。
You sign your name in one flowing motion, and shove your crude calligraphy back into the box.
目前，你尚不知道这一切是否真的有任何意义——何不过后再来看看呢？
Right now, you have no idea whether or not this means anything — Why not come back to check it out later?
No, I've always obeyed the law.
但你随时可以回到这里！*随时*都可以。
But you can come back here any time! *Any* time you want.
这间破旧的杂货铺依旧冷冷地立在此处。自你上一次在这里以「逍遥先生」的名义，为寻求解惑的来信者送出答复已过去了一段时间。
The musty old newsstand is still standing there, impassive as ever. It's been a while since you've played the role of Mr. Carefree here, replying to correspondents writing letters in search of help.
为了求证你所做的一切是否有意义，你再次掀起了那落满灰尘的门帘……
You roll up that dusty curtain once more, seeking confirmation that everything you've done actually has meaning...
…是的，先前的来信与你写成的去信双双消失在那脏兮兮的小盒中。取而代之的则是一崭新的信件——
...It worked. The previous letter and your reply have both disappeared from that filthy little box. Instead, a brand-new letter has taken their places —
信中人似乎对于在千百年后再度收到「逍遥先生」来信感到十分欣喜。可你明白，时过境迁，如今的来信者与「逍遥先生」皆非故人，可谓是物是人非。

This correspondent seems delighted to have received another letter from Mr. Carefree after millennia, but you know that times have changed and this correspondent is no longer the same person who had composed the initial letter. People change.
你也明白，自己不可能留在这里，一辈子扮演那位替人消愁破闷的「逍遥先生」——尽管你或许真的很想这么做。
You also know that it's impossible for you to stay here, role-playing as Mr. Carefree and solving problems for everyone for the rest of your life — no matter how much you want to.
可你只不过是一名开拓客，是仙舟罗浮上无数来去匆匆的过客之一。你有自己必须走的路，而那位来信者亦如是。身为开拓客的你对此再清楚不过。

You're only a Trailblazer, one of the innumerable passers-by on the Xianzhou Luofu. You have your own path to take, and so does this correspondent. As a Trailblazer, this is something you know only too well.
「无忧堂」的信件往来即将到此为止——你伛身退出昏暗的铺面，放下门帘，径自离去。
This is the end of your correspondence in the House of Nepenthe — You duck out of the dingy storefront, let down the curtain over the door, and leave.
这间破旧的杂货铺依旧冷冷地立在此处。自你上一次在这里以「逍遥先生」的名义，为寻求解惑的来信者送出答复已过去了一段时间。
The musty old newsstand is still standing there, impassive as ever. It's been a while since you've played the role of Mr. Carefree here, replying to correspondents writing letters in search of help.
为了求证你所做的一切是否有意义，你再次掀起了那落满灰尘的门帘……
You roll up that dusty curtain once more, seeking confirmation that everything you've done actually has meaning...
…是的，先前的来信与你写成的去信双双消失在那脏兮兮的小盒中。取而代之的则是一崭新的信件——
...It worked. The previous letter and your reply have both disappeared from that filthy little box. Instead, a brand-new letter has taken their places —
信中人似乎对于在千百年后再度收到「逍遥先生」来信感到有些忧伤，信中所述的悲剧也令你感到五味杂陈。你想再回复些什么，却无论如何都不是滋味。

This correspondent seems a little sad to have received another letter from Mr. Carefree after millennia, and the tragedy outlined in the letter leaves you with mixed feelings. You want to reply, but can't find the right words.
你明白，时过境迁，如今的来信者与「逍遥先生」皆非故人，可谓是物是人非。你不必为这三千年前上演的小小悲剧承担任何责任。

You know that time changes everything, and this correspondent is no longer the same person who initially wrote to Mr. Carefree. People change. You don't have to bear any responsibility for this little tragedy that played out three thousand years ago.
你也明白，自己不可能留在这里，一辈子扮演那位替人消愁破闷的「逍遥先生」——尽管你或许真的很想这么做。
You also know that it's impossible for you to stay here, role-playing as Mr. Carefree and solving problems for everyone for the rest of your life — no matter how much you want to.
可你只不过是一名开拓客，是仙舟罗浮上无数来去匆匆的过客之一。你有自己必须走的路，而那位来信者亦如是。身为开拓客的你对此再清楚不过。

You're only a Trailblazer, one of the innumerable passers-by on the Xianzhou Luofu. You have your own path to take, and so does this correspondent. As a Trailblazer, this is something you know only too well.
「无忧堂」的信件往来即将到此为止——你伛身退出昏暗的铺面，放下门帘，径自离去。
This is the end of your correspondence in the House of Nepenthe — You duck out of the dingy storefront, let down the curtain over the door, and leave.
哎老板——事先说好，和之前那些同事不一样，咱这可不是上班摸鱼。
Hey, Boss, just so we're clear, I'm not like those who slack off on the clock.
<s>俗话讲，在游戏更新的第二个版本，角色们的行为都会与之前的印象构成二律背反</s>…呃，我究竟在说什么？
<s>There's an old saying: Game characters' behavior will develop an antinomy with their previous impressions in the second major update</s>... Wait, what am I even talking about?
总之，变成拍摄剧集的道具，就是咱为了在这里获取最新情报的，最新的卧底手段！
Anyway, turning into a prop for the film shoot is our latest undercover tactic to snag the freshest intel around here!
You kinda lost your reason there.
Huh? I don't see any raisin here.
Don't push yourself too hard at work.
没事儿没事儿，咱这个伪装，运动量为零！
No worries! This undercover work requires little physical effort!
说穿了，你只是想玩变身。
Let's be real. You just wanna play dress-up, don't you?
哎！还是老板您独具慧眼…变成超能力勇者或者外星战士，那些都还是太俗套了。时下真正的流行，乃是「新闻兵法·不动如山」！
Ah! Sharp eye, boss... Turning into a superhero or an alien warrior, that's all way too cliché these days. What's really trending now is the "Art of Journalism: Immovable as a Mountain"!
咳咳，开个玩笑。总之咱是在正式渠道通过应聘道具演员进来的，也不会在别人的工作场合直接拍照，没有钻任何程序上的漏洞。

Haha, just kidding! Anyway, I got in through official channels by applying as a prop actor. I'm not gonna whip out my camera on someone else's work site. Besides, I didn't exploit any loopholes or anything.
不过嘛，只要消息进了咱的耳朵，那世上就自然没有不透风的墙——这可是八卦记者的职业素养，老板也一定明白我在说什么吧？不占用您的时间了，老板再见！

But hey, once word reaches my ears, there's no such thing as a secret that stays hidden. That's the mark of a professional gossip journalist, and I'm sure you know exactly what I mean, boss! Won't take up any more of your time. Catch you later, boss!
哟，老板！好久不见，不知在您的眼中，在下的模仿能力有没有新的长进？
Yo, boss! Been a while! So, what do you think? Any improvements for my imitation?
Wait, how did I become an exhibit!?
因为台上的{NICKNAME}其实是我倒影狸啊！
Because the {NICKNAME} on stage is me, Fureflecto!
爱模仿我的，是哪个狸来着？
Which furbo was it that liked to imitate me again?
诶，老板你有所不知——这里原本摆着《苍天航路绒绒号》里的球棒浣熊限定款模型。在下寻思，这二次创作跟原型的距离有点太远，实在是不够激动人心……

Ah, boss, you probably don't know the full story. There used to be a limited edition Baseball Raccoon figure from Fluffy Across the Blue sitting right here. But I figured that this fan creation strayed a bit too far from the original design, and honestly, it just wasn't exciting enough...
所以，就有了在下基于自己理解的这次再创作！请叫它行为艺术！
That's why I created this re-creation based on my own understanding! Please call it an art!
不断有观众来找我打卡互动哩，有摸我脑门的，舒服得我哩哩叫！
Tons of visitors keep coming up to interact with me! Some pat my forehead. It feels so good that I start furboing with delight!
还有尝试喂我干脆面的，我说我不爱吃这个，爱吃叶子，还把他们吓了一跳！
And some tried to feed me instant noodles! I told them I don't like those and I prefer leaves. It totally freaked them out!
You're acting completely out of my character!
老板，秉承新的创作理念…
Boss, it's time to embrace a new creative philosophy...
您的模仿者再次前来较量！
Your imitator has come to challenge you once more!
老板老板，在下有没有展示出二次创作的灵魂？
Boss, did I show you the true soul of fan creation?
That's a terrible piece of work.
唉，看来连老板也无法理解在下的艺术…在下的确是误入歧途了啊。
*sigh* It seems even the boss can't appreciate my art... I've truly lost my way.
——老板千万不要怪罪！进行新的修炼之后，在下还会来找您检验的！
Please don't be upset with me, boss! I'll come back for another test once I'm done with my new training!
别说，是有点抽象的灵魂。
Well, that's one abstract soul right there.
哇！老板你是懂行的！艺术的灵魂就是抽象！
Whoa! Boss, you really get it! The soul of art is abstraction!
在下这真是跃跃欲试，迫不及待要投入新的修炼了…老板，下次再会！
I'm itching to get started and can't wait to dive into my new training... See you next time, boss!
Don't I have any portrait rights?
唔…原来，老板始终在意的是这一点吗？
Hmm... So that's what you have been worried about all along, boss?
…明白了，在下会改头换面，投入新的的修炼！老板，后会有期！
...Understood. I'll reinvent myself and throw myself into a new training! Boss, until we meet again!
老板，鉴定一下我埋伏的实力！
Boss, check out my ambush skills!
怎么样，老板！我这一招「藏木于林」效果如何？
So, boss! How'd you like my little "hiding in plain sight" trick?
You call this hiding in plain sight?
上次我不是变成中庭的树木吗？那个还是有些显眼了，所以这次我决定加入「绒绒号」的主角团！
Didn't I turn into a tree in the courtyard last time? That was a bit too conspicuous, so this time I've decided to join the main cast of "The Fluffy"!
Alright, that took me forever to find...
嘿嘿，上次我不是变成中庭的树木吗？那个还是有些显眼了，所以这次我决定加入「绒绒号」的主角团！
Hehe, didn't I turn into a tree in the courtyard last time? That was a bit too conspicuous, so this time I've decided to join the main cast of "The Fluffy"!
Not as good as last time when you turned into a ginkgo tree.
什么？我本想变成中庭的树木还是有些显眼了，所以这次我才决定加入「绒绒号」的主角团！
What? I intended to turn into a tree in the courtyard, yet it would be a bit too conspicuous, so this time I've decided to join the main cast of "The Fluffy"!
…嗯，对！其实是老板玩捉迷藏的能力突飞猛进了！这才显得我精心谋划的进阶技巧反而平平无奇！
...Uh-huh, yeah! Actually, it's the boss's hide-and-seek skills that have improved dramatically! That's why my carefully planned advancement techniques seem so unexceptional in comparison!
啊…要是我也能像老板一样，亲身参与「绒绒号」那样的奇遇就好了……
Ahh... If only I could experience a wondrous adventure like you did in "The Fluffy"...
Hard work can change your destiny.
谢谢老板鼓励！我这就去关注一百个健身博主！
Thanks for the encouragement, boss! I'm gonna go follow a hundred fitness bloggers right now!
不是谁胸口都埋着星核。
Not everyone has a Stellaron lodged in their chest.
明白了，我这就去关注一百个幻造生物学博主，看看能不能给自己也植入星核！
Got it! I'll go follow a hundred imagenesis bloggers right now and see if I can get a Stellaron implanted in myself too!
好，就派你去除掉纳努克！
Alright, then I'll send you to get rid of Nanook!
呃，仔细想想，我也算是上有老下有小……
Oh, wait, I've got family and kids...
是我呀，这样悄无声息地出现，吓到你了吗？
It's me. Did I scare you with how I popped up without a sound?
嗯哼~你的回答总是令人欣悦，真是像蜜饯一样甜美的孩子……
Mm-hmm~ Your answer is always so delightful, and you're as sweet as sugary preserves, dear child...
是吗？那你说一说，我的香气、裙角和笑容，与你记忆中的她有几分还原？
Oh really? Then tell me: my perfume, the hem of my dress, my smile... how closely do they match the woman in your memories?
你看，匹诺康尼本身已经是一场梦境了，这里的人们却为你经历的梦境又搭建了一场异常浮华的造梦。
You see, Penacony itself is already a dreamscape, yet the people here have built an extravagantly ornate dream based on the dream you experienced.
偶尔我也羡慕过，那么多人为你的故事欢呼，你总是与开拓银轨上遥遥升起的黎明相伴，而不是那些终将腐烂成灰的记忆。

Sometimes I envy you. So many people are cheering for your story. You're always there with the dawn rising over the silver rails of the Trailblaze, not stuck with memories that'll just rot away to nothing.
不过，被遗忘的东西也是有温度的，像一场散场舞会之后，曾经紧贴的额头上久久不散的余温…哦！你脸红了，是狸我太近了吗？
But even forgotten things carry warmth, like the lingering heat on foreheads pressed close together long after the dance has ended... Oh! You're blushing. Am I fur too close to you?
至少此刻，别狸开我的视线，别擅自挣脱属于你我的这份「记忆」喔……
At least at this moment, don't furb away from me, and don't break free from this memory that belongs to you and me...
Sorry to break it to you, but I've already seen through you.
Your furbo speaking habits just gave you away!
Wh—What!? You saw right through me?
亏我熟读了一百遍《苍天航路绒绒号·橡木鸣蛀之梦篇》，还背诵了这么多句子作为我的开场白。
I've read Fluffy Across the Blue: Dream of Gnawing Oak a hundred times and memorized all those lines for my opening!
哼！既然如此，那就——为我，焚身起舞吧！
Hmph! In that case... Immolate yourself in my dance!
你怎么还在背她的台词？
Why are you still reciting her lines?
曲终人亡的时刻…美不胜收。啊啊啊，可惜现在要亡的是我「大狸花」哩！
The moment when it all dies... is so beautiful. Ahhh, the one about to die now is me, The Dahlifur!
…老板，我知道错了。可我真的太喜欢玩cosplay了，从来没有那么多人关注过我、喜欢过我，只有变成他们喜欢的角色的模样……
...Boss, I know I was wrong. I just love cosplaying so much. No one's ever paid attention to me like this... No one's ever liked me this much. It's only when I become the characters they love...
大家才会注意到我，亲热地喊我「老师」，把我簇拥在人群中心啊！
That's when everyone would notice me, call me with such warmth, and have me right at the center of the crowd!
啊啊啊，难怪老板不让我玩cosplay，因为…现在还是上班时间啊！
Ahhh, no wonder the boss won't let me do cosplay, because... I'm still on the clock!
我这就回去认真工作，等下班时间，我可以再来的吧？我会再来的！
I'll head back and get to work right away, but I can come back after work, right? I'll definitely be back!
You should totally be an actor at Star Rail FEST!
啊啊啊，老板您…也为我一比一还原的cosplay而倾倒吗？就知道我的狸猫变化之术堪称天衣无缝，除了老板根本无人能识破哩！
Ahhh, Boss! Are you... blown away by my perfect cosplay, all too faithful to the original? I knew my furbo transformation technique was absolutely flawless. No one but you could ever see through it!
祝老板参观愉快！那我就多走动走动，去打卡下一个展览点位了。
Hope you enjoy your visit, boss! I'm gonna keep moving and check out the next exhibit spot.
老板还是不够认可我倒影狸哩！那用战斗较量的方法，能不能让你认可我呢？
Boss still doesn't really appreciate me, the mighty Fureflecto! Maybe I can prove myself in a head-to-head showdown? You'll finally see what I'm capable of.
好久不见，{NICKNAME}。没想到司辰宫会派您过来帮忙，那我可就彻底放心了。
It's been a while, {NICKNAME}. I didn't think the Palace of Astrum would send you over to help, so now I'm relieved.
真不愧是您，符合我对您一直以来的印象。
Truly, you are just as I have always imagined.
我听说薪水很高的样子。
I heard the remuneration is high.
我是被天舶司绑架来的。
The Sky-Faring Commission kidnapped me here.
The Sky-Faring Commission is quite resourceful...
那么话不多说，我们准备开工吧。我需要您操纵机巧鸟，找到丢失的货物。
Let's get ready to work then. I need you to control the cycrane and find the missing cargo.
找到货物后，只要拍照给我提供一个准确的位置就行，我会派专员回收，不必劳烦你。
After locating it, just send me a picture of it showing its exact location. I'll dispatch someone to recover it, don't you worry.
如您所见，这些机巧鸟栖木周围跑来些坏东西，多半是被鸟儿吸引来的，胡搞一气，连栖木都被咬坏了。
As you can see, these bad things running around the cycranes' roost are mostly attracted by the birds and are causing chaos. Even the roost is being bitten and damaged.
唉，当务之急还是尽快修理栖木，恢复物流系统。
*sigh* The top priority right now is still to repair the roost and restore the logistics system as soon as possible.
怪不得要「受过军事训练」…
No wonder the job asked for experience in military training...
是啊…这要是换别人来，我还真不一定能放心呢。
Yeah, if someone else were to take the job, I don't know if I'd be as relieved as if it was you.
那当然了，要是无聊的工作，我才不会劳烦您出手呢。
Of course. If it's something mundane and boring, I wouldn't have asked you.
你这活给多少钱我也干不了…
I cannot do this job no matter how much you pay me...
您可别打退堂鼓啊，我和鹤运物流现在可不能没有您。
Don't give up now. The Heron Express and I can't do it without you.
呃…忘了确认了，您肯定会修理栖木吧？
Um... I forgot to check with you. You do know how to fix the roost... right?
没关系，我知道您会修理一些机巧，仙舟上这些机巧的原理都大差不差。
No worries. I know you can fix some ingenium items. The ingenia used on the Xianzhou are all pretty much the same.
Why can't you fix it yourself?
哎哟哟，我看见玉兆的界面就开始眩晕，还得是您来。
Oh, no no no. I get woozy and nauseated the moment I see the interface on the jade abacus. You do it.
那就麻烦您先去处理一下那些怪物了…余下的问题，等我们修好栖木以后再谈。
Please go and deal with those monsters first...we can talk about the remaining problems after we fix the roost.
这下就算是修好了…真是辛苦您了！
It's finally fixed...thank you so much for your hard work!
不过，接下来才是重头戏…您得操纵机巧鸟，寻找丢失的货物。
But, the next step is the main event...you need to operate the cycrane to find the lost cargo.
我当初第一次操纵机巧鸟的时候也这么开心！
I had the same reaction the first time I controlled the cycranes!
Why don't you do it yourself?
说来惭愧…自从做了管理岗以后，我已经很久没有自己实操了，手艺生疏…你懂吧？
This is embarrassing... Ever since I took on a management position, I haven't had much hands-on experience. Use it or lose it. You know what I'm saying?
总而言之，您只要找到丢失的货物，拍照给发给我就可以了！剩下的事情交给我们。
In any case, all you need to do is find the missing goods, take pictures, and send the pictures to me. We'll take care of the rest.
托您的福，流云渡的问题算是暂时解决了，鹤运物流也离恢复正常状态更近了一步。
Thanks to you, Cloudford's problems have been temporarily resolved, and Heron Express is one step closer to fully operational.
今天的工作就到此为止了，这是您应得的酬劳，请您收下吧！
That's all for today's work. This is your well-deserved reward. Please accept it!
之后…应该还会有类似的事情需要拜托您，到时还要再请您出手相助了。
In the future...there may be similar things that need your help. I'll have to ask for your assistance again.
辛苦您了！我们下次再见！
Have a nice day. See you soon!
Of course. We'll never shortchange you.
不得不说，您的表现真是远超预期。不但找到了遗失的货物，还顺便找到了一只遗失的机巧鸟…您果然值得信任。
I gotta say, your performance far exceeded expectations. Not only did you find the lost cargo, but you also happened to find a lost cycrane... You truly are trustworthy.
这是您应得的酬劳，请您收下吧！
This is your well-deserved reward. Please accept it!
(Phew, it's time to get rid of the monsters.)
(Hmm... It's time to fix the roost.)
我看看…咱们先去<color=#dbc291ff>积玉坊</color>那边找找看吧，记录显示有货物是在那附近丢失的。
Let me see... How about we head to the <color=#dbc291ff>Trove of Verdure</color> first? The record shows that some items were lost in that area.
我看看，下一件货物是丢失在…<color=#dbc291ff>流云渡</color>的货道附近。好，我们去看看吧！
Let me see, the next item was lost... near the Cargo Lane of <color=#dbc291ff>Cloudford</color>. Let's check the place out!
嗯？机巧鸟似乎收到了一些<color=#dbc291ff>奇怪的讯号</color>？应该和我们要找的货物没关系，不过你有时间的话可以去找找看。

Eh? The cycrane seems to have received some <color=#dbc291ff>strange signals</color>. I suppose they aren't related to the items we are looking for, but you may search for them when you have the time.
原来那些奇怪的讯号是从这里发出的！看来这只可怜的机巧鸟是故障以后被困在这里了…没关系，我已经标记好了位置，很快就会有人来救它的。

So this is where those strange signals came from! Looks like this poor thing has been stuck here since it went faulty... Don't worry. I've marked its location, and someone will come to its aid in no time.
嗯！失踪货物已经标记好了，感谢您的协助！回收货物就交给我们来进行吧。
Yes! The missing items have been marked. Thanks for your help! We'll take care of the retrieval.

I have other things to do...
没关系，没关系…毕竟是我们有求于人，还得看你的时间安排。
No worries... After all, we were the one requesting help. We'll work around your time.
{NICKNAME}，我们又见面了。鹤运物流最近确实丢了些货物，你懂的。
{NICKNAME}, we meet again. ...Well, Heron Express has indeed lost some items recently. You know what I'm saying?
缺了您的经验和能力，搜救效率简直是出大问题，我只好得拜托您，来帮帮我，帮帮鹤运物流……
Without your experience and expertise, the retrieval efficiency would simply be disastrous. I have no choice but to ask you to help me and Heron Express...
那个…我们的回收预算被砍掉了，就算麻烦您出手帮忙，我也没有办法给你任何回报了…没关系吗？
But... our retrieval budget for this has been cut, so we won't able to pay you for your help. Are you still fine with it?
Say no more. Show me the way.
…您真是太好了！我们这就出发。
...You're so nice! Let's hit the road right away.
好吧，我知道这是强人所难——接下来就交给我们鹤运物流吧。
I understand this might be a little too much. Just leave the rest to us.
…不过，你要是真的有空，随时都可以来找我！
...Still, you are welcome to come find me anytime if you are free!
What do I have to do?
鹤运物流希望能委托你去到这些货物丢失的地方，操纵机巧鸟来寻找这些丢失的货物。
Heron Express hopes to entrust you to go to places where goods have gone missing and find them by controlling cycranes.
另外，那些地方现在算不上安全，所以途中可能会遇到一些危险，也请你最好准备。
Side note, these places are not entirely safe, so there might be some dangers along the way. Please be prepared.
I have other things to do...
没关系，没关系…毕竟是我们有求于人，还得看你的时间安排。
No worries... After all, we were the one requesting help. We'll work around your time.
这位客人，柜台上的东西可不兴这样带走啊？
You think you can just take things from the counter like that?
不好意思，我这就还给你。
I'm sorry. Let me give that back to you.
这个小零件给我又何妨？
Why not just let me have this small component?
呵呵，我没有要在这小零件上刁难客人的意思，毕竟小小零件。
Hehe, I didn't mean to make things hard on you. After all, it's just a small component.
不过咱这里是「赎珠阁」，换言之，咱这里是家典当铺，我对商品的价值也格外敏感——你以为它毫无价值时，它可能价值连城。
But we're the Jeweler's Pagoda here, a pawnshop, and that's why I'm particularly sensitive to a good price — one man's trash is another man's treasure.
客人，你拿走这枚小零件之后，打算要怎么做呢？
What do you plan on doing with that small component then?
我喜好收集，会放在背包里。
I like to collect them for my inventory.
然后过不了多久，你就会想不起自己曾经放过一枚零件在背包里。
And let me guess: After no time at all, you've forgotten that you ever had anything in there at all, right?
我相信它总之有一天会有用的。
I trust that it'll be useful someday.
总有一天会有用…但是你知道它现在毫无用处。
Someday... But right now, it's useless.
拿去卖废品，多少值一点钱。
I'll scrap it for some pocket money.
这当然是不错，估计能换5个信用点？
This is pretty good, and you could maybe get about 5 credits for it?
但是如果我告诉你，它远不止这点儿潜力呢。
But let me tell you: It's far more useful than just that.
这样吧客人，刚才<color=#dbc291ff>「赎珠阁」门前走过了一位青年</color>，一直念叨着「复仇、复仇…」，你去问问他，也许会有些收获。

How about this, then? Just now, a <color=#dbc291ff>young man just passed by the door of the Jeweler's Pagoda</color> muttering on about "Revenge... Revenge..." Go ask him. It might just be worth your while.
等你有所收获了之后，您再来找我，我再和您讲讲这枚小零件的价值。
If you manage to get something, come back to me and I'll tell you about the true value of this small component.
关于这个小零件的事儿…
刚才「赎珠阁」门前走过了一位青年，一直念叨着「复仇、复仇…」，你去问问他，也许会有些收获。
Just now, a young man passed by the door of the Jeweler's Pagoda muttering on about "Revenge... Revenge..." Go ask him. It might just be worth your while.
等你有所收获了之后，您再来找我，我再和您讲讲这枚小零件的价值。
If you manage to get something, come back to me and I'll tell you about the true value of this small component.
Where did I put that component...
Revenge, I must get my revenge...
You're giving off a hostile vibe!
戾气重？你说的对，我自己都没有注意……
Hostile? You're right. I didn't even notice...
Who are you taking revenge on?
It's nothing to do with you.
If revenge breeds revenge, will there ever be an end to it?
不，我必须以牙还牙，以眼还眼。
No, I must have a tooth for a tooth, an eye for an eye.
抱歉，我有些太过于不注意他人感受了，我向你道歉。
I'm sorry. I wasn't paying attention to other people's feelings there. I apologize.
请问您是找我有什么事情吗？
Is there anything I can do for you?
您真是一个善良的人，愿意和我这样的人搭讪。
You really are a kind person if you're willing to strike up a chat with someone like me.
虽然是个人的私事，告诉您也无妨，我丢了一枚很重要的零件。
It's a very personal matter, but I guess it's okay to tell you that I've lost a very important component.
那是我父亲工厂里生产的零件…可惜后来无良银行对我们的工厂撤资，最后工厂倒闭了，父亲也受了打击卧床不起。

It's a component that used to be made in my dad's factory... It's a shame that those heartless bankers pulled their investments from the factory which directly led to its shutdown. My poor dad fell ill then and never really recovered.
我随身带着厂里的小零件，不断提醒自己，要成为一名「善良的银行家」，可惜刚才从星槎上下来的时候，零件弄丢了。

I like to carry little components from the factory around with me as a reminder to myself to be a "Good Banker." But it's a real shame that I dropped the component when I was getting off the starskiff.
So you work in a bank, too?
我们家族的仇人就在银行里，要是不靠近他，我要怎么复仇呢？
Our family's personal rival works in a bank. Keep your friends close, but your enemies even closer...
好像在哪里听说过这个故事…
I think I've heard this story somewhere before...
您是一位化外民吧，见多识广，肯定听说过不少故事。
You're an Outworlder, right — you know lots about lots of different things, yeah? You must've heard a lot of stories out there.
哎…要是能找到那枚小零件就好了。
Sigh... If only I could find dad's missing little component.
…你怎么知道我弄丢了一枚重要的零件。
...How did you know that I lost an important component?
我曾经将那枚零件狠狠攥在手里，流出了血…零件的缝隙里留着血渍。而这一枚零件却干干净净，仅是有一些锈渍。
I remember gripping onto that component so tightly that dug into my skin... There should still be bloodstains on my component. But this one's clean besides the rust stains.
不过，这确实是来自我父亲的零件厂，它依然能够激励我。
Still, it's from my dad's old factory so it still inspires me.
谢谢你，这枚小小的零件我一定会好好保存的。不过，我不能白白拿走这枚小零件，这样吧，我把这个铁盒送给你吧。
Thank you. I will hang onto and cherish this. But surely, I can't just take without giving something back, so how about you have this iron box here?
I'm not putting you out too much?
这个铁盒是客户不需要的宝物。说是宝物，你看，它还有个钥匙孔，已经生锈了，钥匙还找不到……
It's a treasure that a customer no longer needs. By treasure, I mean... Look here, there's a slot for a key that's rusted over. And I don't have the key...
你说它值钱，它也许很值钱，但是我打不开。我们既然有缘，我将这个铁盒给你，希望你能有所收获。
It may be very valuable indeed, but I can't open it. Since we've been destined to meet, let me gift you this box here in the hope that it's something worthwhile.
谢谢你，找我还有什么事情吗？
Thank you. Is there anything else I can do?
客户告诉我，他看到三余书肆里卖铁盒，实在是太感兴趣就买下来了。
The customer told me that he saw these for sale in the Spare Time Book Shop and couldn't help getting them out of curiosity.
但是他实在是打不开，转手又送给了我。
But he couldn't get it to open, so he passed it on to me.
I went and replaced the component...
怎么样，我说的没错吧，这枚小零件比你想象得更有价值，还帮你换到了一个铁盒。
How about it, I was right, wasn't I? This small component was more valuable than you could've possibly imagined — it even managed to get you this iron box.
你是怎么知道那个人需要的？
How did you know they needed it?
这不过是善于观察而已，雕虫小技，不足挂齿。
That's just my knack for observational deduction. It's really nothing special.
不过你看，这个铁盒里藏着你不知道的秘密，或许它还有潜在的价值。
But look here — this box contains mysterious, unknown secrets. Perhaps it's potentially worth something.
现在终于可以卖废品了。
Now it's finally time to sell some scrap.
如果直接去卖掉，依我估值，这铁盒也就<unbreak>40</unbreak>信用点左右……
If you sell it directly, you'd only get about <unbreak>40</unbreak> credits based on my initial valuation...
不过你看，这个铁盒里藏着你不知道的秘密，或许它还有潜在的价值。
But look here — this box contains mysterious, unknown secrets. Perhaps it's potentially worth something.
Feels like I can exchange this with someone I know...
看来客人已经深谙此道了。
Looks like you're already familiar with this hustle, too.
这样吧，我给你一些提示。
What about this — I'll give you a few hints.
在长乐天有一家叫<color=#dbc291ff>「三余书肆」</color>的书店，去那里看看吧。
There's a bookstore over in the Exalting Sanctum called the <color=#dbc291ff>Spare Time Book Shop</color>. Go check it out!
Excuse me, is there an iron box here?
Are there really no iron boxes here?
以前有本化外民的小说叫《铁盒》，就在右转第二排的架子上，可惜现在已经卖掉了……
We used to stock a novel by an Outworlder called "Iron Box." It used to be there, second shelf on the right — but it's a real shame, we've already sold out...
我找的不是书，那真的是一个铁盒。
I'm not looking for a book, but an actual iron box.
可是，我们这里是家书肆，卖的全是书，不卖铁盒。
But we're a family bookstore here? We sell books, not boxes.
你为什么来书店找铁盒？
Why did you come looking for a box at a bookstore?
说来都是一段笑谈，您要是不介意的话，我可以全部告诉您。
It's all a bit of a joke. I'll tell you all about it, if you don't mind.
如你所见，我是一个持明族。我在上一次蜕生之前遇到了一位化外民，他自称是「流光忆庭」的信使，能帮我保存回忆。
As you can see, I'm a Vidyadhara. Before my last hatching rebirth, I met this Outworlder who claimed to be a messenger from the Garden of Recollection who could help me preserve my memories.
他承诺我，会将我最美的回忆存在「忆泡」之中，而这「忆泡」会小心保存在一个铁盒里，蜕生之后，我便能用那「忆泡」回到过去的记忆里。

He promised me that he'd store all of my most beautiful memories inside this Memory Bubble which he'd be keeping for me inside this iron box — and that after my hatching rebirth, I could use this Memory Bubble to return to the memories of my past.
前世给我留下笔记和一把钥匙。可惜，书店里没有铁盒，那位使者想必也只是一位骗子…哎。
My past self left behind a key and a notebook for me. But unfortunately, there're no iron boxes here at the bookstore, so that messenger must have been a scammer... Sigh.
Where on earth is that iron box?
Do you need this iron box?
你刚好有一个铁盒，天下怎么有这么巧的事情？
You've got an iron box with you? What an incredible coincidence!
也许这都是冥冥注定，铁盒的「忆泡」里有着我最美的回忆……
This might just be destiny, but this box's Memory Bubble contains all my most precious memories...
这个铁盒不会是和我这把钥匙完全匹配吧？请让我试一试。
Don't tell me this box matches my key exactly? Let me give it a try.
钥匙虽然与铁盒钥匙孔匹配一致，但钥匙孔内锈蚀化严重，你注意到她尝试了几次终于打开了铁盒——究竟是锁钥匹配，还是强硬捅开，你不得而知。

The key apparently fits, but the inside of the keyhole is severely rusted. You notice that after several attempts she finally twists open the lid — but you'll never know whether the key fit, or whether it was forced open.
…没有「忆泡」，等等，这是照片…戒指…还有一封信。
There's no Memory Bubble... Hang on, here's a photo... A ring... And a letter to someone.
你等待女子读完了信件，她泪光闪闪，就好像如约收获了最美的回忆。
You wait as she reads the letter. Tears stream down her face as if her most precious memories are being reaped.
我的前世爱上了一名短生种，却担心他们相爱的经历无人记得，于是编了一个「忆泡」故事，希望我能找到她留下的铁盒，她真是太自私了。

My past self had fallen in love with this short-life species person, but was afraid nobody would remember their love story. So she made up this caper about a Memory Bubble, hoping I could find the box she left behind. How selfish she was!
为什么会放在书店里呢？
And why'd you leave it behind at a bookstore?
大概只有我们爱凑热闹的店长才知道了。
I think only our mischievous friend the shopkeeper knows.
要不是你带来了铁盒，我就错过这些回忆了。这样吧，我也不白拿这铁盒，我把这一罐刚采的「鲛人泪」送给你，也当是我的答谢了。
If you hadn't brought me the iron box, I'd have missed all of these memories. How about I give you this jar of Draconic Tears to you as a way of saying thanks?
这是鳞渊境洞天特产的药材，价格不菲，但我这一罐「鲛人泪」品质粗糙，也卖不到什么好价格，怎么处置就交给你了。
It's a herbal specialty from Scalegorge Waterscape. It's usually quite pricey, but this jar of Draconic Tears here is of lower quality. I won't get much for it, so why don't you take it?
也许，这一罐「鲛人泪」也许还能与人换到什么好宝贝，或者直接回「赎珠阁」，找瀚典掌柜换个好价钱？
Perhaps you can swap this jar for something special, or try your luck at the Jeweler's Pagoda — I'm sure Pawnbroker Handian will fetch you a good price?
谢谢你，我打算回鳞渊境了。
Thank you. I'm heading back to Scalegorge Waterscape.
我家是做药材生意的，这些「鲛人泪」就是我从鳞渊境里带出来的。
My family is in the pharmaceutical business, and I've brought these Draconic Tears over from Scalegorge Waterscape.
品质看上去一般，反倒是有些天然去雕饰的意思。听说熟悉仙舟文化的化外民会喜欢这个，但是到哪儿去找这样的化外民呢，你说是吧？

As average as they may look, they're molded to look like that. I heard discerning Outworlders steeped in the Xianzhou culture like it this way, but how am I ever going to find this kind of Outworlder around?
I swapped it for a jar of Draconic Tears...
没想到客人已经从小零件换到昂贵的药材了。
I didn't expect you to score expensive pharmaceuticals like that from just a small component.
This jar of Draconic Tears is really valuable!
值钱，但是还是不够，我最多给你<unbreak>1000</unbreak>信用点。
It's valuable, but still not enough. I'll give you <unbreak>1000</unbreak> credits. That's my best offer.
更有价值的做法，客人其实心里明白吧？
There's another way that's more profitable, and I suspect you know what I mean...
Feels like I can exchange this with someone I know...
客人很清楚，宝贝的价值终究是因人而异的。
You know very well that one man's treasure is another man's trash.
就当这是我最后一次提示了。
听说仙舟上有位从<color=#dbc291ff>星际和平公司远道而来的仙舟通</color>，他可能对「鲛人泪」感兴趣……
I heard that there's a Xianzhou <color=#dbc291ff>aficionado who came all the way from the IPC</color>. He might be interested in your Draconic Tears...
你好像对「鲛人泪」感兴趣。
You seem pretty interested in Draconic Tears.
哈哈哈哈，看来我自言自语的毛病得改改了。
Hahaha, I really should correct this bad habit of talking to myself.
最近对仙舟的志怪故事感兴趣得不行，我可以说是「朝思暮想」了。
I've grown infatuated recently with the mysteries of Xianzhou culture. I've been obsessed with thinking about them...
其中有一篇讲波月古海里，有能活上千年的鲛人，流下眼泪就能化为珍珠，我看了这种志怪故事难免浮想联翩。
In one of them, there are drakons in the Lunarescent Depths that can live for thousands of years — and their tears crystallize into pearls. It's enough to set the mind racing!
但是那鳞渊境洞天一般不让咱们这样的化外民前去，市场上能买到「鲛人泪」又太过干净了，未免少了些传奇意味。
But the Scalegorge Waterscape delves generally don't let Outworlders like us go down, and the Draconic Tears out on the market are all too processed, so they lack that legendary authenticity.
虽说这是一味药材，但是市面上贩卖药材都看上去都珠光宝气，为了迎合传说故事而清澈得稍显刻意，也许这就是「过犹不及」吧。

These are pharmaceuticals, but on the open market they always end up looking like sparkly jewels — all scrubbed up nice and pretty to pander to those hunting for legends. Or perhaps that's going a bit too far.
我这人虽然是老外，但是我就喜欢当地人自己的东西，当地人用什么我就用什么。那些干净漂亮的「鲛人泪」都太虚假了，没有收藏价值。
Me, I may be an Outworlder but I like local customs and use whatever the locals use. Super-clean and clear Draconic Tears are too fake for me, and aren't worth collecting.
我这里有一些不干净的。
I've got some all-natural ones right here.
就喜欢不干净的「鲛人泪」，让我看看吧。
I just like natural, unclean Draconic Tears. Let me have a look.
果然我们俩聊得来啊，看来这就是「物以类聚，人以群分」啊，哈哈。
Looks like we've something in common. Birds of a feather flock together, haha!
既然你和我一样，那你有没有我想要的「鲛人泪」呢？
Seeing as we're so similar then, have you got any Draconic Tears for me?
其实我这里有一些「鲛人泪」。
Actually, I've got some Draconic Tears right here.
市场上的「鲛人泪」我见过太多了，希望你能给我看点儿不一样的。
I've seen too many Draconic Tears on the markets, so I hope you can show me something a little different.
哈哈哈哈，我第一次看这样玻璃罐子装着的「鲛人泪」…而且，这正是我想要的「有一些粗糙的鲛人泪」，谢谢你啦。
Hahaha, this is the first time I've seen Draconic Tears inside a glass jar like this... And this is exactly the kind of authentic Draconic Tears that I'm looking for! Thank you so much.
Hey, you gotta play by the rules.
Please could you reciprocate in kind?
明白明白，往而不来，非礼也；来而不往，亦非礼也。
Ah, got it. "Do unto others as you would have them do unto you."
我身上也没有带什么值钱的东西，这个小礼物就送给你了，不成敬意。
I didn't bring anything valuable with me today, so here's something very small for you as thanks.
集装箱门打开，你看到里面站着两个怪家伙。看得出来，这是两个药王秘传的莳者在秘密会谈。
The container doors open and you see two weird people standing inside. You can tell that this is a secret meeting between some disciples of Sanctus Medicus.
你不认识他们，于是依着仙舟戏曲的习俗，在心中给他们起了「匪兵甲」和「匪兵乙」的名号。
You don't know them, so based on the conventions of Xianzhou Opera you decide to name them "Bandit A" and "Bandit B."
你们面面相觑，六目相对，气氛颇为尴尬。这时，你问出了那个此时最该问的问题——
The three of you all look at each other in blank dismay and the vibe starts to feel a little awkward. Right then, you decide to ask the most appropriate question of all at that time:
Mercy of Sanctus Medicus, the Arbor's new growth.
莳者一心，同登仙道！原来是自己人啊，吓我一跳，还以为是神策府那帮猎狗找来了呢。
Unity of Discipuli Medici, the Immortality's true path! So you're one of us then. You really freaked me out — I thought you were one of those stupid dogs from the Seat of Divine Foresight.
Just a hero who happens to be passing by.
我是…我是谁关你什么事啊？
I am... What does it matter to you who I am?
等会儿，这人是不是有点眼熟？
Hang on. Doesn't this guy seem familiar to you?
*仙舟粗口*！我想起来了！这家伙是景元的客人，是罗浮外面来的猎狗！
*Xianzhou profanity*! I remember now! This is Jing Yuan's guest, an Outworlder dog!
既然被你认出，只好动手了！
You got me. Guess we'd better fight!
That's the spirit! Bring it on!
Quick, this *Xianzhou profanity* wants to run!
哇，终于重见天日了！差点以为要直接给老子打包发送到法珊泽尔了！
Finally, daylight! I thought I was going to be sent off to Farschanzel!
What were you doing in there?
我被人骗进了这个陷阱啊！你敢信吗？这世上竟有人坏到去欺骗一个单纯的阴晴伞！
I got tricked into this trap! Can you believe it? I never thought there'd be people in this world who could cheat pure and simple Baroumbrella!
认真的吗？你打开一个集装箱，里面钻出来一个会说话的阴晴伞，而你此时最想问的问题竟然是「法珊泽尔是哪里？」
Are you kidding me? You've just opened up a container and found a talking mushroom inside, and the first thing you want to ask me is "Where's Farschanzel"?
这大概说明你是真的见多识广……
This probably demonstrates that you're well-traveled and experienced...
总之，很感谢你把我救出来。
Anyway, thank you very much for helping me out of here.
刚才我正在开开心心在路上飞，突然冒出一个小屁孩，跟我说：「我这里有小阴晴伞不能看的好东西！」
Just now I was flying along the road, happy as can be when this kid appeared out of nowhere and told me: "I've got something cool here that little Baroumbrella can't see!"
我一听就来精神了啊！毫不犹豫地就跟着他走了，然后他就骗我钻进了这个集装箱……
I got really fired up when I heard that! So I followed him without hesitation, and before long he'd tricked me into this container here...
这个集装箱里货物特别多啊，我还以为都是…都是…都是「小阴晴伞不能看的好东西」……
There's so much packed into this container, and I thought it was... I thought it was... "Cool stuff that little Baroumbrella can't see"...
结果仔细一看才发现，他所谓「小阴晴伞不能看的好东西」，竟然是几大箱发往域外的蘑菇干！

But on closer inspection, I realized that all the "cool stuff that little Baroumbrella can't see" was actually just a container stuffed full of dried mushrooms — and addressed to an off-world destination!
我刚想怒斥这孩子，就看到他狞笑着锁上了集装箱的门…要不是你来得及时啊，我现在真的就被寄到法珊泽尔了！和那些蘑菇干一起！

Just as I was about to scold this child, I saw him grinning as he locked the gate to the container... If you hadn't arrived when you did, I'd be halfway to Farschanzel by now! Just like all those dried mushrooms!
总之，这里还有些好东西，就当做是我的谢礼吧。
Anyway, there's still some good stuff here. Take it as a gift for rescuing me.
集装箱的门打开时，两人显然吓了一跳，直勾勾地看着你。看起来，这是一对正在共度美好时光的情侣。
As the door to the container opens, two people stare at you, petrified. Looks like you've just walked in on a couple of lovers trying to have a great time with each other.
你不认识他们，于是依着仙舟戏曲的习俗，在心中给他们起了「小梁」和「小祝」的名号。
You don't know them, so based on the conventions of Xianzhou Opera you decide to name them "Rom" and "Com."
你你你你你你是谁？为什么突然开门？
Wh—Wh—Wh—Who are you? What's all the rush?
I'm just a treasure hunter passing through...
Don't mind me, as you were...
吓死我了，我还以为是家里人来抓我们了。
You freaked us out! I thought you were my family coming to bust us.
我们两个的家族从三劫时代开始就不怎么融洽，可偏偏到了我们这一代，竟在学宫中义无反顾地相爱了。
Ever since the Three Sufferings Era, our families have been at each other's throats — but this generation, we fell head over heels in love with each other at the academy.
家人为了拆散我们，想了很多办法…但爱又是如何能被外力所消解的呢？所以，我们决定藏在这艘「化蝶号」货运星槎上，偷偷离开罗浮……

Our families keep trying to split us up, all these different schemes... But how can true love be broken from the outside? So that's why we hid out here on this freight starskiff, the SS Butterfly: We want to sneak off the Luofu...
陌生人，在此相逢也算是有缘…收下这些吧，这些财物是我们与原生家庭最后的联结，将它们交给你，我们二人便与那两家人再无关系了！

Well, stranger, I guess it's fate that we met each other here, too... Take these. They're the last remaining ties we have to our families. If you take these, then the two of us will have nothing more to do with either of our families!
娘子说得对…收下吧，就当是对我们这段缘分的见证。
She's right... Take these, as a testimony to our destiny.
再见了，陌生人。愿你与所爱之人可以平安幸福，直到宇宙的终结。
So long, stranger. May you and your loved ones remain safe and happy until the universe ends.
不等你做出回答，小梁和小祝就乘着「化蝶号」一起离开了码头。
Without even waiting for an answer, Rom and Com jump aboard the SS Butterfly, and depart the jetty.
呃…你怎么解开的这么快？
Ugh... How'd you solve it so quickly?
说来惭愧，我还没来得及准备宝箱…因为准备放在宝箱里的礼物迟迟没有到货。
I'm ashamed to say that I haven't had time to prepare a chest... Because the gift I was going to put inside hasn't been delivered yet.
唉…让你白跑一趟，真对不起。这样吧，给你一个取货码。
Ugh... Sorry about wasting your time, I'm really sorry. How about this, I'll give you a collection code for the item?
你去星槎海找梓桥，告诉她这个取货码，就能拿到我原本准备好的「宝箱」了。
Go and see Ziqiao in Starskiff Haven and tell her this code. She'll be able to give you the chest that I was going to give you.
那我先走了，祝你一切顺利！再见！
Alright, then I'm heading out. Wishing you all the best! So long!
你还没反应过来，她就风风火火地离开了码头。
Before you could react, she shot off from the jetty.
要取货？好啊，取货码拿来我看一下。
Alright, give me the collection code please.
我看看…没问题，你的货是这件。不过，你的这件货物是货到付款的。价格…需要<unbreak>1000</unbreak>信用点。
Let me see... Not a problem, here you go. But you do know this item is cash-on-delivery, right? It's... <unbreak>1000</unbreak> credits, please.
